C: .「真是漫长的旅途。」她说。 「我一直在等待，太久太久了。」████ 看向她：「领你走上这条路的不是厄运，而是探索欲和好奇心。」 「当然，」她笑，「可我所经历远不及你。」 「不，我从未经历过你所经历的一切。」████ 摇头：「有多少双脚就有多少条旅路。」 「此刻，纵使我们已站在同一处，所见所思也不尽相同。」 他们不说话，抬头看向星空，此时他们望见流星，一条，两条，三条…然后是许多细小的，绚烂的，明明灭灭的光芒，最后，壮丽的烈光撕裂了黑夜。 沉静的声音使空气再度流动：「你看见了什么？」 「星星结束了它们的旅途。」她答。 ████ 笑：「可我看到它们的旅途正刚刚开始。」 他们不再说话。 「我们该回去了。他们还在等着我。」 ████ 沉默。然后问道：「迄今为止的旅行，令你感到幸福吗？」 她提起手提箱，向着列车的方向走去，没有回头。 「一如既往。」
E: "What a long journey." She says. "I've been waiting for so, so long."████ looks at her: "It wasn't bad luck that has led you down this path, but wanderlust and curiosity." "Of course," she smiles, "But I've experienced far less than what you've been through." "No, I've never experienced the things you have." ████ shakes their head: "There are as many routes as there are pairs of feet." "Right now, we may be standing in the same place, but we harbor different thoughts and views." Together, they look up to the stars in silence, and just then saw meteors streaming down: One, two, three... And then more, smaller ones, flickering and flashing ever so finely before a magnificent blaze tore open the night. A quiet voice disturbs the still air once more: "What do you see?" "The stars have finished their journey." She says. ████ laughs: "I, instead, see that their journey is only just beginning." They do not speak again. "Let's go back. They're waiting for me." ████ is silent, then asks: "Has the journey so far made you happy?" She picks up her suitcase and walks back in the direction of the Express without looking back. "Same as always."

C: 成为空间站「黑塔」的站长后，艾丝妲的生活相较从前更为忙碌。她需要管理各抒己见的科员，替黑塔回复多如牛毛的信件，以及频繁和公司交涉，从各种渠道购置新的设备…但与此同时，她也在这里获得了最大的自由—— 「调用2号设备舱的纽尔•伊曼望远镜，设置100倍天文单位，观测前方『星前云核』。」 「要特别注意粒子密度，一旦发现超致密结构，马上开始记录『恒星胚胎』的分裂过程。」 闲暇时，艾丝妲偶尔也会想起，自从自己接手这个空间站之后，黑塔女士已经许久没有出现。她也曾询问过，得到的只是「没有趣的新东西，我就不来了」这样的回复。 「…还不如听这小姑娘和你们吵架有趣。」 她想起很久以前的那一天，黑塔漫不经心地跟身边人说道。 回忆中的黑塔仿佛站在绚烂的星光中，带给她掌控星空与自己命运的力量。
E: After becoming the Lead Researcher of the Herta space station, Asta's life is now busier than ever before. She has to manage the researchers and their differing opinions, reply to the numerous correspondence meant for Herta, constantly negotiate with the IPC, and procure equipment from various different sources... But at the same time, she's experiencing the greatest freedom she'd ever known... "Deploy the Nyul Iman telescope in the second equipment bay. Set it to 100× astronomical units, and begin observation of the pre-nebula core in front of us." "Pay close attention to particle density. If you discover any super-dense structures, commence recording of the protostar fragmentation process at once." In her spare time, Asta would sometimes consider how Madam Herta never seems to come around anymore after Asta arrived at the space station. She even made inquiries, but was told, "If there's no interesting new stuff, I won't bother coming in." "...I'd rather listen to this girl debate with you." She thought back to the words Herta had casually told her family on that day long age. The Herta of her memories seems to stand out amongst resplendent starlight, giving her the power to control the starry sky — and her own destiny.

C: 剑，长六尺五寸，重十四斤。 此乃云骑重剑形制，需双手握持挥舞。锋刃蕴藏离火，在接敌瞬间足以切开器兽的惰性外甲。 另有佐战援护的飞剑十二把，接入自「大椎」至「阳关」一线穴道，应使由心，一瞬间施展开来，如惊风疾雨。 她对剑术还不甚了解。她还有很多要学。 戎装女子来不及教她更多，就要率军出征。于是少女的第二课便在战场上学，由那些倒下的敌人教。 「刺」固然简单明了，但动作灵敏的怪物不会自觉迎上剑尖，任由少女处决。于是她学会了「斩」。 接着是「缠」，在力量惊人的怪物面前，少女懂得了以剑脊卸去攻击。 对剑术，她自认已心融神会，于是跳上了身高十倍于己的器兽战卒「龙伯」。 折断所有随身携带的剑，也不过在对手巨硕的身躯上留下成打成打的伤口。 她被巨掌拍飞，躺在战场的血泥里，再度被恐惧淹没。在溺死的关头，她才明白，剑术亦有极限。 一支装填炽火的弩矢炸去了龙伯的头颅。「起来。」戎装女子看着她。 「我不学剑了。这东西…没用。」 「没用？在我手里倒是好用的很。说到底，是人无用罢了。」 「……」 「不学剑，那你想学什么？飞行士星槎上的炼石箭，神臂直配备的炽火弩？还是…朱明仙舟的朱明火？要消灭那颗妖星，有它也尽够了。你想学那些？没毛病，那些东西连照面都不用打，便能杀死对手。」 「…我只是不明白，你为何一定要我学剑！？」 「上至将军下至兵卒，每个云骑都要从出剑开始学起。 「工造司的各色军械确实能代你杀灭敌人，但那些都是兵器自行运作罢了。如果有那么一天，箭矢耗尽、星槎坠落、金人停转，谁来保护你我，谁来保护仙舟？ 「握住这柄剑，给我牢牢记着，只有云骑亲自掌剑上阵，才是人类自己的战斗。我们用自己的血肉、自己的技艺向那些非人的孽物们证明，我们必将战胜它们，而不是让机巧代我们行事！」 戎装女子转身离去，将她和断剑留在了演武室里。 剑，长二尺一寸，只余残锋断锷。
E: A sword, 6 feet and 5 inches in length, weighing 14 catties. This is a Cloud Knight greatsword that must be wielded with both hands. Its edge contains enchanted fire that can split open the mechabeast's inert armor at the moment of contact. There are 12 Flying Swords providing support, connected into her spinal meridian from the acupuncture points of Dazhui to Yaoyangguan. She needed only to think for these swords to instantly span out like a blistering storm. She was still unfamiliar with the way of the sword. She still had lots to learn. The woman in armor had no time to teach her more before the woman was tasked with leading the army on the field. Therefore, the girl's second lesson is to be learned on the battlefield, taught by the enemies she would fall. "Stab" is easy, but swift monsters won't run into the sword's tip on their own or let the girl execute them. That is how she learned "slash." "Entangle" is next. Against monsters with overwhelming strength, the girl learned how to parry with the back of the sword to deflect enemy attacks. She believed she had learned enough of the sword and therefore leapt onto the mechabeast war pawn "Gigantes" that dwarfed her at least ten times over. She broke all the swords she brought with her and only managed to leave a few dozen cuts on the opponent's gigantic body. She was whacked away by an enormous hand. Lying in the blood-soaked mud of the battlefield, she was once again swallowed by horror. In that split moment before death claimed her, she finally understood that even the art of swordplay had its limits. An arrow filled with blazing fire blew off the Gigantes' head. "Get up." The woman in armor looked at her. "I don't want to learn the sword anymore. It's... useless." "Useless? It's pretty useful in my hands. It is the wielder who was useless." "..." "If you don't learn the sword, what do you want to learn? The alchemical arrows on the pilots' starskiffs? The blazing fire flung by divine crossbows? Or... The artillery of the Zhuming Xianzhou? Such instruments would also be enough to destroy that demonic planet. You want to learn about them? Fine. Those things can kill the enemy even from beyond visual range." "...I just don't understand why you insist on teaching me the sword!?" "From the general to the smallest pawn, every Cloud Knight starts by learning the sword. "The various constructs provided by the Artisanship Commission can certainly kill the enemy for you, but those deeds are to the merit of the material rather than the person. If there comes a day that the quivers run empty, that the starskiffs crash, that the aurumatons freeze — Who will protect you and I, then? Who will protect the Xianzhou? "Hold this sword. Remember, it would not be a true fight for humanity if Cloud Knights didn't wield swords and march onto the battlefield themselves. Rather than letting ingenia do the work for us, we will show our final victory to those inhuman abominations by our own blood and prowess!" The woman in armor turned and departed, leaving the girl and the broken sword in the training room. A sword, 2 feet and 1 inch in length, only its broken fragments remained.

C: 在取得第八个博士学位后，拉帝奥获得了第一真理大学空缺两个琥珀纪的一等荣誉学位——即使在多年以后，这依然是校史上前无古人、想必也后无来者的成就。此时拉帝奥早已成为社会风云人物，但他身边的师友却有着多种看法。笔者得到了一份珍贵的电子资料： 「 校园热点： 1、#一等荣誉学位授予维里塔斯•拉帝奥# 阅读（2500）评论（145） 详情： 本校空缺两个琥珀纪的一等荣誉学位即将授予维里塔斯•拉帝奥，以表彰其在生物学、医学、自然神学、哲学、数学、物理学、工程学等领域的杰出贡献。因其在星球能源课题上的卓越表现，维里塔斯•拉帝奥将直接获得任教资格。 维立塔-数学系教授： 恭喜拉帝奥！他的勤奋与智慧配得上一切荣誉！还记得他为了能够更专注地思考，选择戴上头套，隔绝外界的一切干扰。这世上又有多少人能做到呢？我虽然教过拉帝奥一段时间，但实际上我从拉帝奥身上学到的，恐怕比我教给他的更多。拉帝奥以其诚实和直率为第一真理大学带来了全新的空气，我们应当感谢他！ 赞成（1000+）反对（2） 哲学系小混子： 这还不进天才俱乐部？ 赞成（850）反对（5） 物理是优美的： 据说某个议员的儿子来上拉帝奥的助教课，把钱扔在拉帝奥的身上让他帮他蒙混过关，结果被拉帝奥大骂一顿后扔出了教室，你没听错，是「扔」…真是神一般的男人…… 赞成（550）反对（112） 买基金的韭菜： 上过他的助教课，完全听不懂，坚持到最后，勉强拿了个0分，幸好不是负的…… 赞成（448）反对（37） 在天国旅游的人： 被他骂哭过的人都给我点赞！ 赞成（330）反对（110） 猫听完都死了： 听说他洗浴时也不摘头套？ 赞成（220）反对（10） 跟着哥走： 也还好吧？要是我努力一下我也行…… 赞成（1）反对（1000） …… 你可能还喜欢： 2、#维里塔斯•拉帝奥获得第八个博士学位# 3、#维里塔斯•拉帝奥登上大学课本# 4、#维里塔斯•拉帝奥是疯子吗？# 」 据统计，拉帝奥任教共开设五十二门课程，教学风格以严厉、繁难著称，结课率不超过3%，而那些坚持到最后的学生几乎都成了某个领域的专家学者。 …… ——摘自《智慧之为特权：解密真理医生》第八十二页
E: After acquiring his eighth doctoral degree, Ratio was awarded the First Class Honors Degree that had been left vacant for two Amber Eras in the University of Veritas Prime. Even many years later, this achievement remained unparalleled in the history of the university and was likely to remain unmatched for generations to come. At that time, Ratio was already a prominent figure in society, but there were varying opinions about him among his teachers and peers. This is the electronic copy of some valuable information I gathered: " Campus Highlights: 1. #First Class Honors Degree Awarded to Veritas Ratio# Views (2500), Comments (145) Details: The First Class Honors Degree of our university that has been vacant for two Amber Eras will soon be awarded to Veritas Ratio in recognition of his outstanding achievements in the fields of biology, medicine, natural theology, philosophy, mathematics, physics, engineering, etc. Given his remarkable contribution to the subject of energy sources on this planet, Veritas Ratio will be granted direct eligibility for teaching. Professor Velita, Department of Mathematics: Congratulations to Ratio! He deserves all the glory for his diligence and intelligence! Do you still remember how he put on a headgear to keep away all external distractions and completely focus on thinking? Who else in the world could manage that? Although Ratio was my student for some time, I'm afraid I actually learned more from him than what I taught him. Ratio was a breath of fresh air at the University of Veritas Prime with his honesty and straightforwardness. We should all be grateful to him! Agree (1000+), Disagree (2) Philosophy_Delinquent: Shouldn't he be a member of the Genius Society already? Agree (850), Disagree (5) Physics_Is_Beautiful: Rumor has it that some congressman's son attended a class where Ratio was the TA. The guy tossed some cash on Ratio, trying to bribe him for a pass. Ratio came down hard on the guy and threw him out of the classroom. That's right — he literally THREW him... What a god among men. Agree (550), Disagree (112) BearMarket_Loser I once went to a class where he was the TA and couldn't wrap my head around what he was saying. I held on to the end and scored 0. I count myself lucky that my score wasn't negative... Agree (448), Disagree (37) Cosmos_Walker Give me a like if you've ever cried because of his scolding! Agree (330), Disagree (110) BoredomKillledTheCat Is it true that he showers with his headgear on? Agree (220), Disagree (10) Follow-My-Lead He's not that great, is he? I can do the same if I just work harder... Agree (1), Disagree (1000) ... You might like: 2. #The 8th Doctoral Degree Under Ratio's Belt# 3. #Ratio Featured in College Textbooks# 4. #Is Veritas Ratio Crazy?# " According to statistics, Ratio has taught 52 courses during his tenure. The courses, known to be harsh and challenging, have a completion rate of no more than 3%. Almost all the students who made it to the end have become experts in certain fields. ... Extracted from page 82, Wisdom as a Privilege: Decoding Dr. Ratio

C: 在那黎明照拂的圣城，织者抚弄金丝，连缀命运。\n背负「浪漫」火种的黄金裔，召集世间英雄，带领他们再度踏上漫长的征程\n——击落众神，归还神火，予以几近覆灭的翁法罗斯新生。
E: In that holy city kissed by the dawn, the weaver caresses the golden threads, entwining fates.\nThe Chrysos Heir that bears the "Romance" Coreflame gathered the world's heroes, leading them on a long journey once more\n— to topple the gods, reclaim the divine flame, and grant rebirth to the nearly fallen Amphoreus.

C: 为了消除星核带来的危机，{F#少女}{M#少年}{NICKNAME}选择与星穹列车同行。
E: A {F#girl}{M#boy}, {NICKNAME}, decides to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the threat of the Stellaron.

C: 布洛妮娅或杰帕德的弱点被击破时，我方全体恢复能量和战技点。
E: When Bronya or Gepard's Weakness is broken, all allies will recover Energy and Skill Points.

C: 可可利亚的召唤物会标记一个敌方单位，作为可可利亚控制技能的额外攻击目标，标记持续直到召唤物被击破或击杀。
E: Cocolia's summons will mark a unit as an additional attack target for Cocolia's control ability. The mark will last until the summon is Weakness Broken or defeated.

C: 开拓之旅的第一晚，你睡得不似列车上那样安心。\n这倒不是因为你对列车单间有什么深厚感情，而是你总能在半梦半醒中听到军靴踢踏的声音。\n现在又一阵急促的敲门声传来——直觉告诉你似乎大事不妙…出门查看状况吧。
E: On the first night of the trailblazing expedition, you don't sleep as soundly and at ease as you did on the Express.\nIt's not because you have some kind of close bond with the Express but because you keep hearing the sound of troops moving around as you sleep.\nAnd now, you can hear frantic door-knocking — your instincts tell you that something's not right... Go and investigate.

C: 三月七试图说服你，但结果呢？你突然不是那么在乎了，因为你在此时此刻遭到了小朋友的挑衅。\n这你可忍不了！——是时候让小朋友感受成年人世界的严酷了。\n这群小鬼还不知道的是，刚才的演练不过是热身罢了…真正残忍的「捉迷藏游戏」才刚刚开始！
E: March 7th attempts to convince you but you no longer care for it as much anymore, because the kids have started taunting you.\nYou will not stand for this! It's time to show these children the cruelty of the grown-ups' world.\nLittle do they know that the practice just now was just a warm-up... The cruel and real Hide-and-seek is only about to begin!

C: 看来，在三月七和丹恒的斡旋下，「地火」终于和无名客们统一战线。现在，你们的目标已经非常清晰了：尽量与史瓦罗和平交涉；如果不成，「地火」也做好了开战的准备。\n为了达成这一目标，奥列格为列车组的各位安排了向导。至于向导的人选，你恐怕已经心里有数了——\n然而，在指定地点等待着你们的，似乎不是那个熟悉的深蓝色人影，而是某个混沌的漆黑化身…
E: It seems Wildfire has finally sided with the Nameless due to March 7th and Dan Heng's mediation. Now, your goals are crystal clear: Do your best in diplomacy with Svarog and if all fails, Wildfire will be ready for battle.\nTo reach your goals, Oleg has arranged a guide for the crew. You probably already know who the guide is going to be...\nHowever, the person waiting for you at the designated location doesn't seem to be the dark blue silhouette that you were expecting. Instead, it's some sort of black chaos avatar...

C: 桑博如约带你们来到了通向史瓦罗基地的大门前，却又在此处卖了个关子：原来，想要打开这道铁门，你们必须从认证机器人处收集认证才行。\n如果他能一次性把话说完的话，你们也不至于浪费时间兜这个圈子了——这就是你不想和桑博共事的原因…之一。\n你集齐了三级认证，是时候打开大门直面史瓦罗了。
E: As promised, Sampo leads you to the gate of Svarog's base. He then leaves you with a cliffhanger: In order to open this gate, you'll have to collect certifications from the certification robot.\nIf he could just tell you everything at once, you wouldn't have to waste time running in circles — this is the reason why you dread working with Sampo... One of the reasons at least.\nYou've collected all three levels of certifications. It's time to open the gate and meet Svarog.

C: 追踪星核猎手——你们想象着这桩任务的艰巨危险，猜测卡芙卡会准备怎样的诡计和陷阱。她却悠闲自若地现身，告诉你们已等候许久。一切并不如你们所想的那样。
E: Tracking the Stellaron Hunter — You could feel the gravity and danger of the task at hand and speculated on the tricks and traps Kafka prepared for you. But instead, she shows up at ease and tells you that she's been waiting for your arrival for a long time. It's not at all how you imagined it.

C: 令你感到意外的是，你的老朋友桑博也来到了匹诺康尼。流萤看起来对他不是很信任，但热情如故的深蓝男子还是想要让你们领教一下何为大人的世界。\n据他所说，你们此行的目的地是一座名为「皮皮•皮皮西的沙龙」的沙龙——这名字应该是故意的。
E: What surprises you most is that your old friend Sampo happens to be in Penacony, too. Firefly doesn't seem to trust him very much, but the ever-friendly and enthusiastic dark-blue gentleman wants to teach you all about the "adult side" of things.\nAccording to him, your destination for this journey is a salon named "Peppy Pepeshi's Salon" — The name must have been intentional.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n黑天鹅认为情况或许比想象中的更严重，你们应当尽快赶到烙印着流萤痕迹的那片忆域才是。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nBlack Swan believes that the situation may be even more serious than she imagined. You must hurry to the Memory Zone branded with traces of Firefly as quickly as possible.

C: 你与那位有原则的猎犬家系成员再次相遇了。看起来他依旧有原则，恐怕你得故技重施才能让他放弃原则了。
E: You cross paths with the principled Bloodhound Family member once more. As he seems to remain a man of principles, you might need to resort to your old tricks to make him cooperate.

C: 另一边，黄泉——意思是你——和瓦尔特为了挖掘出家族正在隐瞒的真相，孤身潜入至朝露公馆。然而，你们发现本应壁垒森严的公馆里全然不见人影，仅有游荡的怪物四处巡逻。\n究竟发生什么事了？
E: Meanwhile, Acheron — that is to say, you — and Welt have infiltrated the Dewlight Pavilion to bring to light the truth hidden by The Family. To your surprise, the place is empty when it is supposed to be heavily guarded. Only some wandering monsters can be seen patrolling the place.\nWhat's going on?

C: 你本以为只要与列车组会合，可如今你们结成的队伍简直堪称浩大——加拉赫、米凯、米沙、流萤、知更鸟、星期日…而促成这一热闹场面的似乎正是那位向来漫不经心的大叔，加拉赫。\n如果不是他太孤单想和大家热闹热闹，那么他一定在暗中策划着某种惊天阴谋…好在他看起来对你们并无敌意，也许你们能以和平的方式得知整个事件的全貌。
E: You originally thought you would just be meeting with the Express Crew, but the group you have now amassed is massive... Gallagher, Micah, Misha, Firefly, Robin, Sunday... And it seems that the person who led to the creation of this lively scene was precisely the seemingly indifferent Gallagher himself.\nIf this isn't just because he's lonely and wants to spend some time with everyone, then he must be secretly formulating some kind of shocking conspiracy... Fortunately, he doesn't seem to bear you any ill will. Perhaps you will be able to grasp the full picture of your surrounding situation peacefully.

C:
我想与被弃绝的人们一起
赤脚踩过玻璃渣铺成的小路

我想与被憎恶的人们一起
裸身穿越镶嵌着刀片的峡谷

我想与亵渎者们一起
淌着血踏过众神的尸体

我想为所有的悖逆者咆哮
我想为所有的异端者殉道

只要高洁的圣人们还在燃烧
我就不会熄灭自己卑劣的火
E:
I want to be with those who were cast out
to walk barefoot over paths paved with shards of glass

I want to be with those who are hated
to walk naked through valleys embedded with a thousand blades

I want to walk with the blasphemers
bleeding as we tread over the corpses of the gods
I want to raise up a battle cry for all the traitors
I want to be martyred for the heretics

As long as the pure saints still burn
I will never extinguish my flames of dishonor

C: 你在入梦池中醒来，惊觉自己已经返回现实「白日梦」酒店。根据三月七的说法，这次你确实是从太一之梦中醒来了——在你昏迷期间，星核已被封印，而橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。她还说列车组受到了邀请，要去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。\n高档游轮、豪华宴会…这才是庆功宴该有的样子。还等什么？做好准备就出发吧。
E: You wake up in the dreampool and find yourself back in the real Reverie Hotel. According to March 7th, you really have woken up this time from Ena's Dream — the Stellaron was sealed while you were out, and all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. She also said that The Family has invited the Crew to The Family's Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.\nHigh-end cruise ships, luxury banquets... Now THIS is what a celebration banquet ought to look like. What else are you waiting for? Get ready to set off.

C: 又一次回到了白日梦酒店，曾经承载你诸多回忆的入梦港埠。入梦前不必回顾过去的痕迹，因为每次睡眠都会带来一场崭新的美梦…或噩梦。\n该准备入梦了。酒店为你准备了和上次一样的房号，不知道是怕你恋旧，还是懒得打扫其他房间。
E: Once more, you find yourself at The Reverie, the gateway into the Dreamscape that is imbued with many of your memories. There is no need to reflect on your past before diving into the Dreamscape, because each sleep births a brand-new sweet dream... or a nightmare.\nGet ready to dive into the Dreamscape. The hotel has assigned you the same room as last time, whether out of consideration for your nostalgia or sheer laziness to tidy up other rooms.

C: 又费了好大工夫，你闯进了这什么蕉社的地界，这群人的脑子不知道是不是也被什么人搅过，说话比你还怪。\n去跟他们聊聊吧，至少显得你说话像个正常人。
E: Putting in some serious work, you crash the turf of Slumba... or whatever. Can't tell if these folks have been brainwashed by someone. They chat in a way even weirder than you do.\nWell, go have a chat with them. It might actually make you seem like the sensible one here.

C: 又费了好大工夫，你闯进了这什么蕉社的地界，这群人的脑子不知道是不是也被什么人搅过，说话比你还怪。\n去跟他们聊聊吧，至少显得你说话像个正常人。
E: Putting in some serious work, you crash the turf of Slumba... or whatever. Can't tell if these folks have been brainwashed by someone. They chat in a way even weirder than you do.\nWell, go have a chat with them. It might actually make you seem like the sensible one here.

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…你已经完成了忍法宗师•苦茶大师的试炼，依照大师先前所言，你此刻已经拥有了成为「忍徒」的资格。\nAK-A-3，忍者的游戏好玩吗？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like a Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? Having passed the challenges set by the Ninja Grandmaster, Master Kucha, you are now eligible to bear the title of a ninja initiate as he had previous stated.\nAK-A-3, are you enjoying your little ninja game?

C: 如今星期日折断羽翼，坠落于眼下的境地，深知奇迹并非行于云端，而是行于地面。而那宝贵自由的开端，他希望能借此让自己的道别井然有序。\n在万维克的帮助下向这场美梦辞别吧，尽管提出不合理的要求，欠下他的人情也没关系。
E: Sunday has lost his wings and fallen into the state you now see. He has come to realize that miracles are not to be carried out in the skies but on the ground. And, at the beginning of this precious freedom he had found, he hopes to make his farewells quick and orderly.\nBid farewell to this beautiful dream with the help of Wonweek. Make as many unreasonable requests as you need, and you can just owe him a favor for later.

C: 纵有万分不舍，也还是到了送别停云小姐的时候——眼下发生的不是重逢，这或许也不算坏消息。重逢如此美好，不如留待今后。\n前往晖长石号与姬子会合。
E: Though you wish it wasn't true, the time has come to bid farewell to Miss Tingyun... This is not a reunion, but maybe that is not such a bad thing. When a reunion is so perfect, it gives you something to look forward to in the future.\nGo to Radiant Feldspar and meet up with Himeko.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 与此同时，奥赫玛城中，阿格莱雅也开始着手处理尼卡多利渗透一事。但奥赫玛的政局似乎并没有我们所预想的那么稳定。
E: Meanwhile, in the city of Okhema, Aglaea has begun addressing Nikador's infiltration. However, the political situation in Okhema appears far less stable than we had anticipated.

C: 留守列车的姬子为卧病在床的三月七准备了定制餐食，打算去她的房间探望一番。
E: Himeko, on watch at the Express, has prepared a specially made meal for the bedridden March 7th and plans to check up on her.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 与风堇一同前往友爱之馆，获取能够补充智库的资料，补充对翁法罗斯的认识。\n找找与阿那克萨戈拉斯有关的资料。
E: Head to the Library of Philia with Hyacine to collect materials for the data bank and expand our understanding of Amphoreus.\nLook for documents related to Anaxagoras.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n斯缇科西亚的亡魂们重复诉说着往昔，他们似乎是来自「黄金世」的亡者。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe spirits of Anaxagoras repeatedly recount the past. They seem to be those who fell during Era Chrysea.

C: 另一方面，在奥赫玛，元老院卑劣的加害计划正在悄然实施，很快，便演变成了一场巨大风波。
E: Meanwhile, in Okhema, the Council of Elders' despicable scheme was quietly taking shape, and soon, it erupted into a storm of chaos.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 击败塞涅俄丝的同时，风堇与迷迷不约而同地感应到奥赫玛发生的异变，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
E: At the moment of Seliose's defeat, both Hyacine and Mem sensed a strange happening in Okhema at the same time. Our window of consideration is narrowing by the second.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 「戏剧」实为某人年少时的记忆，舞台是昔日的哀丽秘榭，{NICKNAME}带着一肚子的问题， 扮演着其人「最重要的伙伴」，陪伴他与昔涟一同找寻着某物…
E: The "theater" is actually someone's childhood memories, staged in the Aedes Elysiae of old. {NICKNAME}, with many questions in mind, assumes the role of this person's "most important companion," joining him and Cyrene on their search for something important...

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.

C: 「大地」的权能已在手中，我会担起职责，也会与你们并肩面对「再创世」。\n如果当初是荒笛与长夜月构筑了忆潮世界，那么现在的我有能力找回{NICKNAME}。
E: The authority of Earth is now in my hands. I will shoulder this responsibility and stand with you all to face "Era Nova."\nIf it were Terravox and Evernight who built the memoria tide world, then I now have the power to bring {NICKNAME} back.

C: 螺丝咕姆的宝贝看起来不错，希望它在探索矩阵上同样有效。
E: Screwllum's treasure looks promising. Let's hope it works just as well on the Matrix.

C: 归墟埋藏着三千万世的执念与苦果。随着不断深入，万敌、赛飞儿、遐蝶、风堇相继加入队伍。在埋藏着救世之愿的晶体旁，那刻夏等候已久。我们需要启动仪式，尝试带走白厄的愿望，止息他心间沉重的回响。
E: The ruins harbor the obsessions and bitter fruits of <unbreak>30</unbreak> million cycles. As we venture deeper, Mydei, Cipher, Castorice, and Hyacine join the team one after another. Anaxa has been waiting by the crystal that holds the wish to save the world. We need to initiate the ceremony, attempt to take away Phainon's wish, and silence the heavy reverberation in his heart.

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 奇物「螺中笑声」受到模因病毒的感染，在空间站里大肆传播「毒鸡汤」。艾丝妲请你帮忙调查病毒的源头。\n三位可疑人员，究竟谁会是这场闹剧的起源？
E: The Curio "Crackup Conch" is infected by the memetic virus, spreading anti-motivational quotes in the space station. Asta wants your help to investigate the source of this virus.\nWhich of the three suspects caused this drama?

C: 奇物「螺中笑声」受到模因病毒的感染，在空间站里大肆传播「毒鸡汤」。艾丝妲请你帮忙调查病毒的源头。\n三位可疑人员，究竟谁会是这场闹剧的起源？
E: The Curio "Crackup Conch" is infected by the memetic virus, spreading anti-motivational quotes in the space station. Asta wants your help to investigate the source of this virus.\nWhich of the three suspects caused this drama?

C: 艾丝妲不在基座舱段，黑塔又似乎受到了袭击，你决定先去黑塔办公室看看情况
E: Asta is not in the base zone, and Herta seems to have been attacked yet again. You decide to head back to Herta's office to find out what's up

C: 通过埃美丽的见闻，阿德勒有了一个大胆的猜想
E: Adler had a bold hypothesis thanks to Emily's information.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n看来就我们俩了，有点扫兴。不能让三月感觉出来。准备好了就出发。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nLooks like it's just us. Bummer. Can't let March know, get ready and get gone.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n布洛妮娅遇上麻烦了。催债的事，不太懂。和三月商量商量对策。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nBronya is in trouble. Didn't really get this thing called "debt collection." Discussing solutions with March.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n找到托帕了。开始交涉。希望别说错话。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nFound Topaz. Negotiations are starting. Hopefully we don't say the wrong things.

C: 你与朗道姐弟抵达了矿区中一处被围困的临时阵地，并吩咐矿民掩护没有战斗能力的幼童及老人立刻向矿区大桥撤离。\n在成功为此处阵地解围后，你们立刻继续向前搜索落单的难民——阵地中矿民提及的几人应当就在附近，仔细寻找吧。
E: You and the siblings arrive at a temporary base in the besieged mining area. You inform the vagrants to immediately retreat to the mining bridge with the children and the elderly.\nAfter successfully solving the issue for this base, you keep moving forward and look for miners who have been separated from the others. The few people who the miners mentioned should be around here. Look for them carefully.

C: 沿途的难民应当已经全部疏散了。现在只需追击残余的裂界怪物，将它们彻底赶出这片矿区。\n周遭的空气已近乎严寒，怪物中异样的存在应该就在前方不远处。请提高警惕，谨慎前进。
E: All the refugees should have been evacuated. Now you just need to attack the remaining Fragmentum monsters and completely chase them out of this mine.\nThe air around you is almost freezing cold. The abnormality amongst the monsters shouldn't be far. Be on high alert and progress carefully.

C: 工业展区的雕塑「齿轮与智慧」失窃了，你和佩拉来到下层区的机械聚落调查此事。\n没想到，你们居然从故障的机器人体内发现了「齿轮与智慧」的组件。\n继续找到其它出现故障的机器人，收集零件吧。
E: The sculpture Gears and Wisdom in the Industrial Exhibit was stolen. Pela and you arrive at the Robot Settlement in the Underworld to investigate this matter.\nYou did not expect to find parts of Gears and Wisdom inside the malfunctioning robot.\nKeep looking for other malfunctioning robots and collect the parts.

C: 没想到「天人金枝」竟然是这种东西，这玩意真的能入药吗？或许这就是丹鼎司医术的神奇之处吧…尽管求取药材的过程有些曲折，无论如何你总归是拿到了药材，快把这玩意带给陶德吧。
E: Surprisingly, the Divine Aureate Twig is this thing. Can this really be used as medicine? Perhaps this is the mystical aspect of the Alchemy Commission's medical skills... Although the process of obtaining the medicinal herb was somewhat tortuous, in any case, you have obtained it. Hurry and bring it to Todd.

C: 在身体发生进一步的变化前，陶德只想体验孩童应有的快乐。你答应了他的请求，陪着他在长乐天四处转悠，却不料遇见了一些人……
E: Before further physical changes occur, Todd just wants to experience the happiness that children deserve. You agree to his request and accompany him around the Exalting Sanctum, but unexpectedly meet some people...

C: 就在你们决定如何处置「黛青小姐」的时候，青雀的牌友——也就是「黛青小姐」真正的粉丝，希望和你能够立即谈话。你不知道他为什么躲在墙角，而不是加入到对话里。去跟牌友谈一谈吧。
E: Just when you are deciding what to do with Ms. Daiqing, Qingque's game mate, who is a genuine fan of Ms. Daiqing, wants to have a conversation with you right away. You don't know why he hides around the corner instead of joining the conversation. Go talk to the game mate.

C: 隐书似乎不在三余书肆…在这附近找找看吧。
E: Yinshu doesn't seem to be at Spare Time Book Shop... Look for her nearby.

C: 铖杰师傅希望能够去一趟迴星港亲眼见证星槎的诞生，而现在那里四处都是怪物，幸好你武德充沛，铖杰师傅叫上了你一起……\n你希望大家能够更多地关注你的才华，你那些美好的东西，而不是「你很能打」。
E: Chengjie wanted to witness the birth of starskiffs with his own eyes at Stargazer Navalia, where monsters currently roam. Luckily for him, combat is your forte, so he asked you along...\nYou kind of wish people would pay more attention to your talents, those beautiful aspects of you, and not just "you can fight."

C: 莱恩老师撕掉了最后的手稿，并且希望铖杰去寻找其他的梦想。不知道铖杰师傅现在是作何感想呢？\n你知道追求梦想是值得鼓励的事情，放弃梦想也同样如此…这一切如何判断呢，那就看你自己了。
E: Master Ryan tears apart the last of his manuscripts and wants Chengjie to pursue his own dream. What does Chengjie think about that?\nYou understand that having a pursuit is something to be encouraged, and giving up a pursuit is the same... Which decision is the right choice, that depends on you.

C: 准备工作已经完成，接下来只要让三月七接入大衍穷观阵中，就可运用穷观阵卓越的演算能力来探索她的过去了。\n三月七似乎隐隐有些不安，你也颇为担心，但此行你无法同去，只好相信符玄的能力了……
E: The preparations are complete. All that is left is for March 7th to connect with the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Then, you will be able to use the Matrix of Prescience's outstanding calculation capacity to explore her past.\nMarch 7th seems to be a little anxious, and you are rather worried, too. However, you are unable to go with her on this journey. You have to put your faith in Fu Xuan's skills...

C: 随着大衍穷观阵的演算，三月七回到了并不久远的过去。\n为了自己的安全，还是先完成符玄布置的作业吧。\n好在这作业并不难，只需要辨认出眼前两位太卜大人的真假就好。
E: As the Matrix of Prescience Ultima starts its calculations, March 7th returns to the not-too-distant past.\nFor her own safety, she should first complete the homework Fu Xuan assigned.\nThankfully, the task isn't too hard. She just has to figure out who is the real master diviner out of the two before her.

C: 原本无法回到罗浮的游子回到了罗浮，丹恒邀请你与他一道同行会见罗浮持明族龙尊，他决心要面对过去。\n你从未期待「冷面小青龙」能讲多少有关自己的事情，这也许是个机会。走完这一趟返乡之旅，去和阿七炫耀吧。
E: The wanderer, once meant to be permanently exiled, has returned to the Luofu. Dan Heng, determined to face his past, has invited you to join him in meeting the high elder of the Vidyadhara.\nYou never expected "Cold Dragon Young" to talk much about his own affairs, so this might be a rare chance. Finish this homecoming adventure and show off what you reaped to March 7th after.

C: 小聪再一次自闭了。你知道他经历了什么，也对此深表惋惜，去看看他吧，希望他能振作精神。\n再说了，你一直惦记着的「重谢」还没有拿到呢。\n如此经历一次，不见得是坏事。
E: Cong has withdrawn into himself again. You know what he's been through and feel sorry for him. Go check on him. Hopefully his spirits will lighten up.\nBesides, you haven't gotten that "Big Reward" you've been thinking about all this time.\nIt's not necessarily a bad thing to experience something like this at least once.

C: 信中所书之事含糊其辞。但显然，留下它的人想邀请丹恒前往他所熟悉的「故地」，重叙旧日情谊。
E: The business outlined in the letter is muddled. However, it is clear that whoever left it wishes to invite Dan Heng to an "old place" familiar to him and reminisce past friendships.

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 浮烟自称对恚炎的秉性了如指掌，它提出了一条破局之道。不过这鬼祟之物是真心想帮助人类取胜？抑或是它的提议包藏着别样的祸心？若不任由它将底牌掀开，一切尚未可知。尽管不安，但你们必须撑到这底牌掀开的一刻。\n而今绥园陷落，判官们镇伏岁阳的计划功亏一篑。而今能指望的上，唯有你和那位行事胆小如鼠的藿藿。
E: Cirrus claims to know Furynox like the back of its hand, and proposes a game changer of a counter. But does this shifty creature really want to help humanity win? Or could it be that it secretly harbors ulterior motives? We'll never know what's up its sleeve unless we let it play its trump card. You're nervous, but you have to hold on until that trump card gets played.\nWith the fall of Fyxestroll Garden, the Judges' suppression of the heliobi fell short at the final hurdle. Now, the only ones the Xianzhou can count on are you and the timid Huohuo.

C: 不出意外，孤云被偷走了！现在嫌疑最大的人就是云璃，这也不出意外。但是云璃是个说到做到的女孩儿，她答应了你不会对孤云出手，你可以相信她。\n先听听大毫怎么说的吧。
E: To no one's surprise, Guyun has been stolen! And lo and behold, the prime suspect is none other than Yunli. But Yunli has promised she wouldn't do anything to the sword, and you know you can trust her because she is someone who makes good on her word.\nHear what Dahao has to say first.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 沦入狼爪，陈于刀俎之间，曜青医士椒丘正努力寻求拖延与分化步离人的良机……也许在这场狼与狐的周旋之间，他能找到救治其主的秘密，抑或逃出生天的机会？
E: Having fallen into the wolves' clutches and now at the mercy of their blades, the Yaoqing healer Jiaoqiu is trying his best to find an opportunity to stall for time and split up the borisin... Perhaps, in this battle between fox and wolf, Jiaoqiu will be able to find the secret to curing his superior or a way to escape his current predicament.

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 为了应对呼雷似假似真的袭击宣言，天击将军决定兵分三路。她将亲自担起重责——确保星槎海、长乐天等地面的安全……仅凭她一人之力？
E: In response to Hoolay's seeming promise of an assault, the Merlin's Claw decides to split her troops into three squads. As for herself, she shall shoulder the heavy responsibility of ensuring the safety of ground locations like Starskiff Haven and Exalting Sanctum. Wait... Does she intend to accomplish this all by herself?

C: 于司辰宫顶端，天击将军一击定鼎。而此时此刻，在金人巷中，你和貊泽从大战的余波中起身搜寻幸存者……以及椒丘的下落。
E: Atop the Palace of Astrum, the Merlin's Claw brings the battle to an end with a single attack. Meanwhile, Moze and you emerge from the battle's aftermath in Aurum Alley and begin the search for survivors... as well as for news about Jiaoqiu's whereabouts.

C: 空无一物的战场中，新死的顽敌再度现身于眼前。老练的猎手将面对一场特殊的逐猎……而她，已成猎物。
E: On the empty battlefield, a tenacious and freshly-dead foe makes an appearance once more. The veteran hunter is primed to go on a special hunt... but this time, she is the prey.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩不知为何引来了猎犬家系的追捕，帮助他摆脱困境吧。
E: For some reason, Lesley Dean is being pursued by the Bloodhound Family. Help him resolve this issue.

C: 柯柯娜似乎在往一个地方跑去，赶紧追上她看看发生了什么吧。
E: Cocona seems to be running towards a particular location. Catch up with her and see what has happened.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 找到了躲藏的了奥尔拉，听听他们究竟聊了些什么吧。
E: You found Orla, who's in hiding. Listen to what they are talking about.

C: 命运的泰坦们啊，若你们已看到悲惨的命运，为何不来拯救我们，反倒放任黑潮吞噬一切？还是说，即使是你们，也无能为力？
E: O Fate Titans! If you have seen our tragic destiny, why would you not save us? Why would you allow the black tide to devour everything? Or could it be that even you yourselves are powerless against it?

C: 夜梦已开始喧嚣。
E: The night's dream has begun to rumble.

C: 发现了一只看上去很着急的呜呜伯，去问问它发生了什么要紧事吧。
E: You come across a Wubbaboo that looks anxious. Go and ask it what's going on.

C: 铁卫禁区的吉尔伯特似乎有些烦恼，去和他聊聊看吧。
E: Gilbert from the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone seems troubled. Go talk to him.

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 伊来内牺牲自己换取了「余火」。是时候让它发挥起作用来了。
E: Alain sacrificed himself in exchange for the Embers. It's time for it to prove its worth.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 帕姆测不准自己的身高，去帮帮帕姆吧。
E: Pom-Pom is unable to measure their own height accurately, go help them.

C: 试着向杰帕德讨教一些管理学经验。
E: Ask Gepard about his managerial experiences.

C: 与守卫迴星港的云骑兵交谈，看看他们是否需要帮助。
E: Talk to the Cloud Knights guarding Stargazer Navalia and see if they need any help.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 青年深知，再无任何事阻止他奔向所爱。
E: The youth knows that there's nothing that will stop him from rushing towards his love.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是磐岩镇中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from Boulder Town...

C: 阿克赛挖掘出了新的古代遗迹，继续你的探宝之旅吧！
E: Aksay has excavated a new ancient ruin. Continue your treasure hunting journey!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 考虑到你们手中已扣留一名岁阳犯人，你们决定充分利用，争取将它转作污点证人，为你们提供情报。
E: Since you have already captured a heliobus criminal, you decide to get as much value out of it as possible. You will try to flip it so as to provide evidence for you.

C: 你们将此事的来龙去脉告知景元，请他前往祈龙坛劝说彦卿。
E: You inform Jing Yuan about everything and request his assistance in heading to Dragonprayer Terrace and reasoning with Yanqing.

C: 云端机器人负责将测试人员的思维同步至云端，你答应来参加界种科的专项测试。
E: The Cloudbot is responsible for synchronizing the tester's thoughts to the cloud. You agree to participate in the Department of Ecology's special test.

C: 西衍先生突然联系你，说自己得到了一只很神奇的新宠物，而且「您一准儿会喜欢的！」\n去三余书肆看看吧，也许那只宠物会给你带来什么意外惊喜呢。
E: Mr. Xiyan suddenly contacted you and said that he got a miraculous new pet, and that "you will definitely like it!"\nGo to Spare Time Book Shop and have a look. Maybe that pet will bring you an unexpected surprise.

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 伙伴们似乎想到了突破封锁的计划，去找你的狱友问问看吧。
E: Your companions seem to have figured out how to break through the barricade — Go ask your cellmate.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄已经完成，去交差吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has concluded. Go show it to the client!

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 三月七竟然给你搞来了演武仪典的内场通行证？ 这不去看看可就亏大了。\n话说总感觉在这短短几周时间里，她已经迅速混成了罗浮的大人物…也不知道去餐馆报她的名字有没有优惠。
E: March 7th actually managed to get a backstage pass for the Wardance? That'd be a huge loss if you don't go and check it out.\nIt feels like she has rapidly become a powerful figure on the Luofu in just a few short weeks... Would you get a discount in a restaurant if you tell the owner you know her?

C: 雪国飘摇寒苦愁，孤拳铁铸赴仙舟。\n古来僻壤生豪勇，天下少年第一流。
E: From snowbound sorrow, by his lonefist to the Xianzhou.\nThe barren land birthed a brave soul, the epitome of young morals.

C:
「明知注定失败的比赛，我也要参加到底吗？」
「那老子问你：注定失败的人生，就不活了吗？」
「可如果这注定是一场徒劳的悲剧，又何必看到结尾呢？」
「因为你是个战士啊，蠢材。」
E:
"Should I still participate in a tournament till the end when I know I'll definitely lose?"
"Then let me ask you: Will you stop living if you know you'll life is doomed to fail?"
"But why should I see the end of this story when it's fated to be a tragedy that I can't change?"
"Because you're a fighter, idiot."

C: 卢卡正遭受着巨大的心理压力，这导致他的幻觉愈发严重。\n陪他再去一次丹鼎司吧，也许了不起的灵砂大人可以帮到他。
E: Luka is experiencing severe mental stress, making his hallucinations even worse.\nGo with him to the Alchemy Commission one more time. Maybe the great Master Lingsha can help him.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n尽管还有乐队成员没能成功劝服，但演出仍然要继续，当务之急是完成要演奏的曲目。为了帮助乱破进行创作，你必须收集到足够的作曲灵感。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThough some band members remain unconvinced, the show must go on. The most urgent thing right now is to finish the piece you need to perform. You need to collect enough inspiration to help her with composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n学院代表将乐队从排练室里赶了出来，还宣称要取消你们的演出资格。为了与学院抗衡，你们决定要强行在闭幕演出的舞台登场。首先要做的，仍旧是收集足够的作曲灵感。帮助乱破完成创作。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe academy rep kicks the band out of the practice room and declares they want to cancel your eligibility to perform. You decided to forcibly perform on the closing ceremony stage in order to fight against the academy, and you still need to prioritize collecting enough inspiration to help Rappa with composing.

C: 提问：未来是确定的，还是混沌的？
E: Question: Is the future destined or chaotic?

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about the work

C: 打开那扇门后，摆在你面前的是数之不尽的房间…若要找到最深处的宝库，必须先解除所有封印才行。
E: Opening the door, you are greeted by the sight of countless other rooms... If you want to reach the vault at the very depths, you will have to dispel every single seal.

C: 在「情商」配方的助力下，真理医生为素裳上了一堂精彩、成功、妙趣横生的课程。\n这份配方还有另一种功效尚未调制…回到临时吧台准备接待下一位客人，或者为真理医生再调制一杯调饮吧。
E: With the help of the "EQ" Recipe, Dr. Ratio delivered a brilliant, successful, and entertaining lesson to Sushang.\nThis recipe has another effect yet to be mixed... Return to the makeshift bar to serve the next guest, or mix another drink for Dr. Ratio.

C: 虽然意外错失了加入旅团的机会，但在负责人的推荐下，驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大仍然接受了实习的邀约。值得开心的是，因为你的关心与照料，它已经不再感到迷惘了。那么，是时候见证驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大令人啧啧称奇的成长啦！
E: Although missing the chance to join the troupe by accident, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas still accepted the internship offer on the supervisor's recommendation. The good news is, thanks to your care and attention, it's no longer feeling lost. Now, it's time to witness Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's remarkable growth!

E: Complete Swarm Disaster: Third Plane

C: 与三月七汇合
E: Meet up with March 7th

C: 收伏最后的岁阳
E: Capture the final heliobus

C: 前往星穹列车，决定宝烛的去留
E: Go to the Astral Express and decide upon Arkeri's fate

C: 完成一次任意难度的「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」
E: Complete Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears 1 time at any difficulty

C: 前往禁闭舱段，与保姆机器人对话
E: Go to the Seclusion Zone and talk to the Helper Robot.

C: 进入混乱梦境，寻找伙伴
E: Enter the chaotic Dreamscape and look for your companions

C: 帮助情绪失控的迷钟
E: Assist the out-of-control Ticker.

C: 推进《美梦往事》的剪辑工作
E: Get the editing for Dreamjoy Memoir started

C: 在大剧院中找到胶卷
E: Find the film in the Grand Theater

C: 剪辑《美梦大机密》
E: Edit Dreamjoy Secrecy

C: 前往第二道关卡的入口
E: Go to the second stage entrance

C: 通过第二道「演技派」考验
E: Pass the second "School of Acting" test

C: 打开街机附带的地图，获得第四台街机的信息
E: Open the map that comes with the arcade machine and obtain information about the fourth arcade machine

C: 前往金人巷，参加约定的决斗
E: Go to Aurum Alley and engage in the promised duel

C: 帮助卢卡走出失败的阴影，重振旗鼓
E: Help Luka out of the shadow of defeat and regain his motivation

C: 登上擂台，狠狠赢取积分吧！
E: Step into the ring and get those points!

C: 完成「枘凿六合•Remake」简单模式I
E: Complete Hexanexus: Remake Easy Mode I

C: 完成「码放货物」困难模式III
E: Complete Inventory Arrangement Hard Mode III

C: 与垃圾桶组合进行说唱大比拼
E: Conduct a rapping battle against the trashcan group

C: 在「黄金的时刻」寻找作曲用的灵感
E: Collect inspiration for composing a song by wandering around the Golden Hour

C: 参与值日赚取资金，将卧室建造完成
E: Take on duties to earn funds and complete building the bedroom

C: 和三月七讨论照片
E: Discuss the photo with March 7th

C: 抵达新房间
E: Reach the new room

C: 抵达下一个房间
E: Reach the next room

C: 跟随学者的指引，接入树庭「网络」
E: Follow the scholar's guidance and connect to the Grove's network

C: 准备参加第二场淘汰赛
E: Prepare to participate in the second knockout match

C: 赢下第二场冠军赛
E: Win the second championship match

C: 招待客人
E: Welcome the guests

C: 坚韧训练
E: Tenacity Training

C: 坚韧训练
E: Tenacity Training

C: 三月小姐，这毫无疑问是出色的剑术天赋。
E: Miss March, this is undoubtedly an exceptional talent in swordplay.

C: 三月小姐，除了热情，你还需要更多耐心和努力。
E: Miss March, in addition to enthusiasm, you also need more patience and effort.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>坚韧训练</color>的效率提高#1%
E: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Tenacity Training</color> efficiency by #1%

C: 前2次行动：<color=#f29e38ff>灵敏与感知训练</color>的心情消耗降低#1%，且效率提高#2%
E: For the first 2 actions: Reduces <color=#f29e38ff>Dexterity and Acuity Training's</color> Mood consumption by #1% and increases efficiency by #2%

C: 专注力分配
E: Distributed Attention

C: 灵活性小憩
E: Agile Respite

C: 快乐工作法
E: Joyful Working

C: 力量逃课法
E: Strength-Build Strat

C: 请选择本日想要椒丘提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Jiaoqiu to provide you today

C: 九旻
E: Autumnal Nonet

C: 藿藿希望帮助三月七习剑，尾巴提出了诱人的建议。
E: Huohuo wishes to help March 7th learn the blade, and Tail offered forth an alluring suggestion.

C: 初花剑客行•泄火
E: Way of Primaveral Blade: Release

C: 你能想象吗？在被列车打捞起来之前，我一直被封在一大块冰里，在宇宙中漂流。
E: You might not believe it, but before all this, I was stuck in a huge block of ice drifting through space.

C: 更何况，我们刚被{RUBY_B#「毁灭」}纳努克{RUBY_E#}瞥了一眼，万一再被反物质军团盯上就糟了。
E: Not to mention, {RUBY_B#The Destruction}Nanook{RUBY_E#} threw us a glance just now. If we're targeted by the Antimatter Legion, then things could go south fast.

C: 应该去仙舟。
E: We should go to the Xianzhou.

C: 很难相信这样的人被云骑军抓住，星核猎手却要来找我们出手相助。
E: It's hard to believe that someone like him could be captured by the Cloud Knights and that the Stellaron Hunters would look to us for help.

C: 仙舟联盟…我只听说过，还没打过交道呢。
E: The Xianzhou Alliance... I've heard of them, but never had any contact with them.

C: 星核猎手也许没骗我们，仙舟真的出事了……
E: Maybe the Stellaron Hunters were telling the truth. It seems like something really did happen to the Xianzhou...

C: 我就知道他没那么简单。
E: I knew there was more to him than meets the eye...

C: 本月度商业保险理赔提醒通知：请于本月<unbreak>21</unbreak>号前提交线上理赔材料。
E: This month's commercial insurance claim reminder: Please submit your online claim by the <unbreak>21</unbreak>st of this month.

C: 部分监控画面处于黑屏状态，似乎需要输入特定ID才有权限查看对应录像。
E: Some of the windows are blacked out. It seems you need to enter a specific ID to gain permission to view the corresponding footage.

C: 有套独立的防护系统…看来对黑塔而言，「星核」不是寻常的藏品呢。
E: It has its own security system... I guess even for Herta, a Stellaron is no ordinary rarity.

C: 喜欢…大概。
E: I guess...

C: …心跳和脉搏很微弱，三月，准备做人工呼吸。
E: ...Weak heartbeat and pulse... March, you better do CPR.

C: 下，上，右
E: Down, up, right

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着停云：「……？」它沉默了半晌，突然大叫「噢噢！我的眼睛！」
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Tingyun perplexedly. It remained silent for a long time before it suddenly shouted, "Oh! My eye!"

C: 「4分！」它宣布。眼睛猛然一睁，倍感恐惧，瑟缩不安：「<unbreak>100</unbreak>分！<unbreak>1000</unbreak>分…？<unbreak>10000</unbreak>分……？」
E: "4 points!" It announces. As its eyes suddenly snap open, you see a shiver of fear and uncertainty run through it: "<unbreak>100</unbreak> points! <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> points...? <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> points...?"

C: 你认真数了一遍储存便携装置的立方体，发现一共有二十一个。你又数了几次，但每次的数量都不一样。
E: You carefully count the cubes that store the portable devices and find there are <unbreak>21</unbreak> in total. You count a few more times, but end up with a different figure each time.

C: 出口在那边…怎么过去呢？
E: The exit's over there... how do we get to it?

C: 麻烦的事一会儿再想。先集火，以免夜长梦多。
E: Let's worry about that later. We need to focus fire — fast.

C: 人不可貌相啊，黑塔，你这具身体看着比{NICKNAME}小多了。
E: Don't judge a book by its cover, Herta. Case in point, that puppet body of yours is actually much smaller than {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们随时可以回来让黑塔做研究呀，她现在兴趣满满呢。
E: We can come back any time to let Herta conduct her research. She's absolutely fascinated now.

C: 星穹列车是怎样的？
E: What's the Astral Express like?

C: 我也会被「裂界」侵蚀么？
E: Will I also be corroded by the Fragmentum?

C: 我能留在空间站吗？
E: Can I stay at the space station?

C: 嗯，想说什么都可以。
E: Hm? Go ahead, speak your mind.

C: 果然是列车的样子。
E: As I expected, it looks like a train.

C: 除此之外还有很多假说：「伸缩」论，「热炬」论，「平行成像」论……等等。「谜语人」派系宣称银河只是一场梦境，据我所知，Ⅸ的崇拜者很喜欢这个说法。
E: There are other theories as well: The "Stretching" theory, the "Heat Torch" theory, and the "Parallel Imaging" theory... The Riddlers claim the galaxy is just a dream and IX's followers seem to like that claim.

C: 还是朴实一点吧。
E: Let's just keep it simple.

C: 你说还有别的合伙人？
E: You said there are other partners?

C: 是隐形人！
E: It must've been the invisible man.

C: 咦，你是…昨天在克里珀堡的……
E: Huh? It's you... you were there at the Fort...

C: 筑城者们是星神克里珀的追随者。是他们预见了危机，并筑起高墙，建立贝洛伯格，存护了人类文明的火种。
E: The Architects are followers of the Aeon Qlipoth. It was they that foresaw the crisis, built up our walls, and established Belobog — preserving the spark of human civilization.

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 巡逻的铁卫好多，平时也这样吗？
E: There are so many Silvermane Guards on patrol. Is it usually like this?

C: 别怕，茉莉小姐…这件事并不是你的错，交给我们处理就好——铁卫上层现在已经介入这起事故了。更何况你刚遭到报复，还是别和那帮恶棍硬碰硬为好。
E: Don't be afraid, Miss Molly... This isn't your fault. Just let us handle this from now on. We the Silvermane Guards are now officially on this case. For now, it's best for you not to directly confront those thugs since they've just shown they are not shy about using violence.

C: 那个时候…母亲尝试着将「星核」的声音也植入我的脑海。那种感受…是撕心裂肺般的折磨。幸好你们及时赶到。
E: My mother... she tried to force the voice of the Stellaron into my head... It was a terrible feeling. I don't know what would've happened if you hadn't shown up.

C: 居然能活到这个时候…
E: ...be able to survive up till now.

C: 噫，真晦气！我去翻翻黄历，没准今天不宜出行。
E: You poor thing! I'll go check the lunar calendar — today might be unlucky.

C: 照片？那是啥，快给虎克看看！
E: A "photo?" What's that? Hook wants to see it!

C: 快，巴里…快叫爷爷！
E: Here, Barry... say hello to grandpa!

C: 你先别急着答应啊，这事可能比你想的要复杂……
E: Ha, don't get ahead of yourself, this might be more complicated than you think...

C: 哎，让我想想该怎么开口……
E: Uh, how can I put this...

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 啊，抱歉——刚才只顾着和姐姐说话，忘了向你解释事情的原委。
E: Ah, sorry, my head's still in the argument. It's like this.

C: 我也受不了坐办公室的工作…
E: I couldn't stand an office job either...

C: 当然啦，毕竟是我们朗道家的祖先嘛！
E: Of course, after all, she was a Landau!

C: …如果她能在和你们的旅行中改掉这个毛病的话，那我想也算是值了吧。
E: ...If she can remedy that habit during her trip with you, then I guess it will have been worth it.

C: 虽然姐姐平时就没什么时间观念…但今天的情况确实特殊，就不怪她了。那么久没回家看爸妈…能多聊聊也好。
E: You weren't that early, either... Still, I don't blame you — you hadn't seen Mom and Dad in a long time... I'm glad you managed to speak to them.

C: 邮筒对你张开黑漆漆的筒口，就像嗷嗷待哺的婴孩。
E: The mailbox opens its black mouth to you, like a baby waiting to be fed.

C: 信的内容实在太可怕了，以至于你刚读完，它就碎成飞灰，再也无法还原。
E: The content is so scary that the letter disintegrates and drifts away on the wind as you finish reading it — never to be restored again.

C: 一种五颜六色的小花，看模样就很便宜。
E: A colorful flower. It looks pretty cheap.

C: 怎么啦，里面是什么？你的表情好怪喔。
E: What's up? What's in there? What's with your expression?

C: 仅仅靠近这只垃圾桶，浓烈的恶臭就已扑面而来。
E: You smell a strong stench as you approach the trashcan...

C: 我做了个怪梦…
E: I had a weird dream...

C: 当然，我不知道筑城者下达封城令的原委，也说不定封锁突然解除了呢？那样的话，你们就帮「地火」完成了他们最想做的事啦。
E: ...Of course, I don't know the whole story behind why the Architects ordered the lockdown. Who knows, thanks to you, they might finally be about to lift it... something that Wildfire's wanted to achieve for a long time now.

C: 注意防御！
E: Hold the line!

C: 得想法揍他一顿。
E: We've got another butt to kick.

C: 咦，约书亚居然没在这儿……
E: Huh? Where's Joshua?

C: 谁要跟你搭伙。
E: Fully booked.

C: 这前面是流浪者的聚集地，现在入口被封起来了。估计是怕愤怒的矿民报复吧。
E: This area up ahead is a vagrant dwelling, but they've sealed off the entrance. I guess they're afraid that angry miners might try to take revenge.

C: 试图颠覆计算结果的人类，是对下层区生存战略的巨大威胁。计算完成，结论已经明确：用武力使「地火」及其同伙服从是效率最高的方案。
E: Human failure to accept the calculation result is a significant threat to the survival strategy of the Underworld. Calculation complete, result unequivocal: Armed suppression of Wildfire and their allies is the optimal course of action.

C: 很多——这也是「地火」一直拿他没办法的原因。史瓦罗的势力太强大，靠我们的人手根本撼动不了。
E: A lot... which is why Wildfire has never been able to take him down. Svarog's forces are too strong. We don't have enough firepower.

C: 哼，虎克又不是地上人，才不会说谎呢！
E: Hmph, Hook isn't an overgrounder y'know! Hook never tells fibs!

C: 谢谢你的夸奖！
E: About time I got some credit for it!

C: 虎克看到黑色头发的大哥哥，被蓝色头发的叔叔带去搏击俱乐部了。
E: Hook saw the blue-haired guy take your dark-haired friend to the Fight Club.

C: 他们是一群为了维持地下秩序自发组织起来的实干派。铁卫撤出地底后，这地下的秩序就都靠「地火」维持了。
E: They're a band of do-gooders who sprung up to maintain order in the underground. After the Silvermane Guards withdrew, Wildfire set up shop.

C: 此人从未展示出自己的意图，仅仅通过手段就将我们推到如今这个进退两难的局面，这样的人最是危险不过。
E: He hasn't revealed his true intentions, but he has managed to corral us into a difficult situation — almost without us realizing. That's a dangerous person indeed.

C: 真好啊。
E: ...That sounds nice.

C: 你的关注点好奇怪啊。
E: How very astute of you.

C: 可可利亚大人，我以人格担保，那些「天外来客」绝非我们此前所设想的恶党。
E: Madam Cocolia, it is my firm belief that the visitors from beyond the sky are not the villains we had imagined before.

C: 怎么了，漆黑的虎克大人？
E: What is it, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?

C: 没什么特别的，只是我做过的诸多玩偶之一。不过，虎克真的很喜欢它。
E: Yeah, I've lost count of all the dolls I've made. Still, Hook clearly likes this one a lot.

C: 虎克好像挺喜欢这个玩偶的？
E: Hook seems really fond of this bear.

C: 我怕弄脏我的手。
E: I don't want to get my hands dirty.

C: 你这家伙，虽然态度让人不爽，但是办事效率确实没的说…我没看错人，嚯哈哈！
E: You had an annoying attitude but you still got the job done... I was right about you, ah—haha!

C: 找怪物嘛，肯定是朝着铆钉镇方向走的。你现在出发…应该还来得及吧！
E: He probably headed to Rivet Town. That's where the monsters are, after all. If you leave now, you may still catch him.

C: 但科鲁泽先生留下的温暖，我希望它能在地底一直传递下去……
E: But I do hope the kindness left by Mr. Kluzer will live long and prosper...

C: 所以甭担心——赛程安排那都是小意思，我们拳馆的业务既全面又灵活，绝对没有疏漏。
E: So don't you worry, schedule arrangements are trivial matters. Our services are comprehensive and flexible. You will definitely be well taken care of.

C: 我先去其他地方转转。
E: I'll go mill around elsewhere first.

C: 可不是吗。当时我那位远房大哥才刚接过宾馆的家业没多久，他亲笔写了封信邀请我去上层参观。没想到啊，这一别就是将近二十年……
E: Don't I know it. My distant cousin had only just taken over the family business at the time. He wrote me a letter inviting me to head up and take a look. It's been nearly <unbreak>20</unbreak> years already...

C: 我还以为屋子要塌了…
E: I thought the whole building was about to collapse...

C: 那是世界末日吗？
E: Then could it be the end of the world?

C: 好好享受这片刻宁静吧，姑娘。这是咱们应得的。
E: Enjoy the peace and quiet, Natasha. We earned it.

C: 十几年了，我终于能见着我的宝贝女儿了……
E: It's been more than ten years. I can finally see my little girl again...

C: 铁卫的臭小鬼，大摇大摆……
E: Those Silvermane Gizzards, just prancing in here...

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》？
E: The Adventurous Moles?

C: 书写信件需要时间，寄送信件也需要时间。庞大的时间成本，才使得通信如此弥足珍贵，有谁会对廉价的玩意趋之若鹜呢？只是动动手指而已——比如朋友发来的短信，根本懒得回复不是吗。
E: Composing a piece of mail requires time, and so does mailing it. Written mail's value comes with its temporal investment. Who would derive excitement from that which is of low-value? It's just a tap and a swipe, like the text message from your friend you didn't bother to reply.

C: 你把纸条上的数字改成了<unbreak>84</unbreak>——这么做或许只是一时兴起。但是，冥冥之中你有种预感，这改变了很多事情。有一个包裹将消失在地底，有一只铁瓶将坠落，有一个人将哭泣。
E: You changed the number on this piece of paper to <unbreak>84</unbreak>. You may have done this out of no reason, but you have a feeling that this has changed many things. A package will be forever lost in the underground. An iron bottle will fall. Someone will cry.

C: 你成功挽救了这个有些脆弱的信封——这可不是一种修辞，而是信封真的在掉渣。纸屑随着矿区特有的烟尘随风而逝，消失在了灼热空气的深处。在彻底化为齑粉之前，你的义举拯救了它。
E: You rescue the fragile envelope — this is not a hyperbole, the envelope is disintegrating. The paper scraps crumble into thin air, merging with the unique mine dust, then disappear into the abyss of scorching air. Before its final act of glory, your actions gave it salvation.

C: 在星际和平公司的帮助下，该星系已可通过书面通用语进行简单沟通。
E: There is some good news, though — with the help of the IPC, the residents of Holstein have learned to communicate through written language.

C: 为什么我们选择这个时机来到仙舟？我们如何得知这场灾变与星核有关？什么人向我们透露仙舟的消息？……
E: Why did we choose to come to the Xianzhou now? How did we know that the incident is related to a Stellaron? Who leaked their information to us...?

C: 这可糟了，我和{NICKNAME}都是笨嘴笨舌，一不小心就说错话的类型……
E: Aw, crud. One of us is gonna blurt something out or get something wrong, I just know it...

C: 没错，我们是被陷害的！
E: That's right! We've been framed!

C: 对，我只能想到一个合理的解释：不论「刃」被捕一事是否属实，至少现在，「刃」很可能已经脱离了仙舟的掌控。
E: Yes. The only sensible conclusion I can draw is that Blade had already escaped when Jing Yuan spoke to us — provided they even captured him in the first place.

C: 因此，景元如果想钓出星核猎手，就只有我们这个与卡芙卡产生联系的诱饵。
E: Therefore, given our connection to Kafka, we represent the only way of luring the Stellaron Hunters in.

C: 既然将军有令，天舶司自当全力配合。星核猎手的调查就托付给各位了。星槎海各处设施的通行凭证，我会一并开具，方便你们行事。
E: Seeing as the general gave the order, the Sky-Faring Commission will lend you our full support. The Stellaron Hunter investigation is in your hands now. I'll issue you a pass so you can access the facilities around Starskiff Haven.

C: 她是很有能力啦，不过心智上还要再磨磨，什么时候磨去了直脾性，我大概会考虑退休吧。
E: She is very capable, but her intellect is burdened by a quick temper. I'll retire when she's achieved a better balance.

C: 恩公莫要被她的话引走了注意。
E: Don't let her words distract you.

C: 封锁了，还发工资吗…
E: The area's been sealed off... are we still going to get paid...

C: 恩公若是闲不住，可以到处逛逛，也可以这就动身和太卜司使者碰头。
E: If you're bored, you could go and find the messenger from the Divination Commission.

C: 这个人，传说他拥有能预见「可能性」的力量。黑塔说公司认为艾利欧能看见无限多的可能性产生的时间支流，这样的能力几近于预知未来。
E: It's said that he has the power to foresee "possibilities." According to Herta, the corporation believes Elio can see the temporal branching of infinite possibilities — which is very much like being able to predict the future...

C: 不必，我有专船接送。
E: No need, I have a vessel picking me up.

C: 这是修辞！修辞！不要在故事里死抠现实的字眼啊！
E: Those are metaphors! You shouldn't take poetry so literally.

C: 我不过是一介医师，帮不上您什么忙。这些是丹鼎司配发给外勤医师的丹药，也许能应急，拿上吧。
E: I'm just a doctor — there's not much I can do to assist you. These are medicinal pellets that the Alchemy Commission hands out to field doctors — you might find them useful in an emergency. Take them.

C: 哦，不知怎的，我看你与罗浮有种极为契合的感觉…大概是我看错了吧。
E: Ah. For some reason, you seem to fit right in here... Perhaps I read it wrong.

C: 谈谈你吧。
E: Let's talk about you.

C: 谈谈你吧。
E: Let's talk about you.

C: 罗刹明明都看见操作台了，为啥我们还找了这么久……
E: Luocha already saw the control panel — why is it taking this long to find it...

C: 呃，得看上面有什么安排，如果还有未疏散的民众，我还得再回来。
E: Umm, that depends on the higher-ups. If there are still civilians to evacuate, then I'll need to come back.

C: 基站拆了？
E: Maybe they demolished the base stations?

C: 随便聊聊天，不要在意细节！
E: I was just making small talk, never mind the details!

C: 像{F#小姐您}{M#您身边这位}这般俊俏的美人儿自然也不能错过。要不要试戴一下最新推出的这款「琢月」系列……
E: ...and I'm sure this pretty young lady won't want to miss out on our Verdant Luna selection. Please, try anything you like...

C: 四下找找，或许还有线索。
E: Let's look around and see if we can find some clues.

C: 抱歉，为防机密外泄，「药王秘传」之事只有我和将军知晓。
E: Apologies. To avoid dissemination of intelligence, the general and I kept the involvement of the Disciples to ourselves.
Agh...

C: 但论烦恼和痛苦，和咱们这些短生种也没什么两样。
E: ...they aren't so different from us short-life species when it comes to worries and suffering.

C: 光阴流转，凡七百余载后，持明龙裔大限将至，又将再度结成龙卵，眠于古海下，静候下一世蜕生。
E: The worldly limit of the Vidyadhara is reached after seven centuries. They return to the ancient sea and form a shell — awaiting the next hatching rebirth.

C: 很好，就用这赐予仙舟长生的力量，为你们带来「毁灭」吧！
E: The very power that brought the Xianzhou long life, I will use to bring it destruction!

C: 以幻胧看来，各位现在像蝼蚁般渺小呢。
E: Hahaha... This body was born of the Arbor. You are but ants.

C: 决定了，就从这傲慢不可一世的仙舟将军开始吧…！
E: Let's start with this arrogant Xianzhou general...

C: 各位，务必小心。
E: All of you, ready yourselves.

C: 要找店铺，也许该问问罗浮本地人。
E: If we want to find it, maybe we should ask some Luofu locals.

C: 我们知道的情报很多了…
E: I think we already have the gist...

C: 我们会出席仪式的。
E: We'll be there at the ceremony.

C: 驭空在此谢过诸位。我已请十王司判官通传了「慰灵奠仪」的想法，接下来我会前往迴星港督造星槎，筹备仪式。各位若有事，就来那边找我吧。
E: Once again, my thanks to all of you. I've asked the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission to ratify this soul-soothing ceremony, and have commissioned a special skiff at Stargazer Navalia for the ceremony. If you need anything, that's where I'll be.

C: 金人巷？
E: Aurum Alley?

C: 三十年前，我曾参加过一场惨烈的战争。我和我的挚友一同出航，但回来时却只剩下了我孑然一身。
E: Thirty years ago, I fought in a terrible war. My comrade and I set sail together, but only I returned.

C: 所以，告别就算了吧。
E: Therefore, forget about any farewells.

C: 是这样啊，为了路上解闷，我推荐你听听西衍先生讲的云上五骁传奇。
E: Is that so? Well, before you leave, I recommend listening to Mr. Xiyan's Legend of the High-Cloud Quintet.

C: 要走了吗？
E: You're leaving?

C: 欢迎光临白日梦酒店，愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如需办理入住，请直走到酒店前台。
E: Welcome to the Reverie! May you experience an unforgettable holiday! If you need help checking in, please head straight to the concierge.

C: 有何不可？
E: (Why not?)

C: 可如果我不能歌唱…舞台又有什么意义？
E: But if I can't sing... what meaning does a stage have?

C: 我已经在这里等了十多分钟了，您知道对我而言，十多分钟等于多少信用点吗？
E: I've been waiting here for more than ten minutes. Do you know how many credits ten minutes is worth to me?

C: 家族可不能让客人们带着负担入梦啊。
E: The Family cannot allow guests to enter a dream while bearing burdens.

C: 如果这只是匹诺康尼或家族的内部事务，我们不应随意插手。
E: We shouldn't interfere if this is just an internal affair of Penacony or The Family.

C: 我会考虑的。
E: I will think about it.

C: 不好意思，可系统里确实没有您说的这个名字……
E: I'm sorry, but your name really isn't in the system...

C: 希望别再遇到麻烦了。
E: I hope we don't run into any more trouble.

C: 关于知更鸟…
E: About Robin...

C: 应该没有。
E: Probably not.

C: 你靠近「入梦池」，甜蜜的女声自房间四周传来，空气中有香气氤氲，二者一同将你裹入怀中。这香氛甘冽、深沉、奢华。这令你想到熟成的果实，又像霞光中的远海。
E: You approach the Dreampool and hear the sweet voice of a female singer coming from all around the room, fragrance permeating the air. Together, these two elements envelop you in their embrace. The scent is sweet, profound, and luxurious — reminiscent of ripened fruits and a distant ocean painted by the hues of a setting sun.

C: 别在意，他从来都是这样。请好好享受家族为各位打造的美梦乐园吧，我们就先失陪了。祝你玩得开心！
E: Don't mind him — he's always like that. Please enjoy the beautiful dreamscape The Family has built for everyone. We shall take our leave. Have a blast!

C: 抱歉为您带来了不好的入住体验…但如果您去到「黄金的时刻」，相信所有的烦恼都会烟消云散的！
E: I apologize for any unpleasantness in your stay... but if you enter the Golden Hour, I'm sure all your troubles will dissipate in an instant!

C: （好的！正在为您复现……）
E: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this accusation?

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
E: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
E: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

C: 当然有。
E: Of course there is.

C: 我不是这个意思！虽然崇拜无名客是真的……
E: That's not what I meant. Though I do admire the Nameless...

C: 他的事迹传向银河，令那些心怀梦想的人们蜂拥而至，一场又一场宴席造就了如今的盛会之星。在匹诺康尼，这个名字无人不知，无人不晓。
E: As his inspiring story became known across the cosmos, those with a dream flocked to Penacony in droves. They held feast after feast, eventually building the Planet of Festivities we have today. Everyone in Penacony knows this name.

C: 「你怎么知道的？」——你很想问问你的老朋友为何如此笃定，但你的人物设定不允许你这么做。
E: "How do you know?" You really want to ask your old friend how they're so confident, but your character design doesn't permit you to do such a thing.

C: 看来你得变回原样才行。
E: Looks like you have to turn back into how you were.

C: 我该如何相信你？
E: How am I supposed to believe you?

C: 我该怎么帮他？
E: What should I do to help him?

C: 我自己一个人是用不了<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>的，因为他们都看不见我！所以拜托你了，闭上眼睛——
E: I can't pull it off on my own, because they can't see me! So, please close your eyes...

C: 对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
E: Great! It means you've mastered the art of Clockwork!

C: 石头老板？呃，我没明白您的意思……
E: Stone? Um, I'm not sure I get what you mean...

C: 对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
E: Great! It means you've mastered the art of Clockwork!

C: 呜呜…我…突然想起了母星的老妈……
E: *sob*... I... thought about my mother on my home planet...

C: 你能感受到吗？这种感觉…甚至可以说——有点疯狂！就像连续喝了十瓶元年苏乐达，然后在梦境贩售店狠狠泡上一整天！
E: Can you feel it? This is... wild! It feels like I just downed ten bottles of Epochal SoulGlad in one gulp and spent an entire day at the Dreamscape Sales Store!

C: 我说了多少遍——施工重地，非请勿入！
E: How many times do I have to repeat myself? Unauthorized personnel are not allowed at the construction site!

C: 姬子会给我们泡杯咖啡…
E: Himeko would make coffee for us...

C: （…奇怪，人都去哪儿了？）
E: (...Strange, where's everyone gone?)

C: 我一定会保护好它的。
E: I will definitely keep it safe.

C: 契约？什么契约？
E: Deal? What deal?

C: 你已经得到了我的信任。我将为你而战，伟大的灵魂。
E: You have earned my confidence. I will fight for you, O glorious soul.

C: 黑天鹅小姐，现状我们已充分了解了。回到你最初的提议……
E: Miss Black Swan, we fully understand our current predicament now. Going back to your original suggestion...

C: 现场？什么现场…不会吧…我的天——这下更有意思了。
E: She was there? Wait, what... You're kidding... Oh my, this just got even more interesting.

C: 不排除其他人的可能。
E: It doesn't rule out others.

C: （告知此前的经历…）
E: (Elaborate on what you experienced...)

C: 这也就意味着，发出无名客密文的人和梦境异变的幕后主使是同一阵营…甚至可能是同一个人。
E: Which also means that, the one who sent out the encrypted Nameless message and the mastermind behind the anomaly are on the same side... Maybe even the same person.

C: 这扇门…打不开吗？
E: This door... can't be opened?

C: 这只怪物的残骸表面似乎没有任何异样。但当你以手抚之，指尖传来的高热令你如触电般退却。
E: The surface of this creature's remains appears unremarkable. Yet, as your hand grazes it, the searing heat transferred to your fingertips sends you jolting back, as if struck by an electric shock.

C: 砂金不在这个方向，你知道，他也清楚。你还可以选择回头，去看看他口中的事实是什么。但如果继续向前，就意味着「拒绝」。
E: Aventurine isn't here. You know that, and so does he. You can also choose to turn around and find out what the facts are directly from his mouth, but if you insist on going forward, that signals a "rejection."

C: 千万别站错了边。我要是你，就会和黄泉保持距离。毕竟再怎么说，摆上台前的算计，也远胜过藏匿于阴影中的怪物…不是么？
E: Careful you don't get stuck on the wrong side. If I were you, I'd keep my distance from Acheron. After all, any schemes out in the open are always going to be better than a monster in the shadows... right?

C: 但不要害怕，听从内心的选择吧。我们都是这样行过世间，留下长短不一的影子，最后…留下珍贵的回忆。
E: But follow your heart and don't be afraid. We all walk through this world casting shadows of different lengths, and ultimately... all we leave behind are precious memories.

C: 你该醒了，赌徒。
E: Time to wake up, gambler.

C: 他们还活着，你也一样。
E: They're still alive, as are you.

C: …这是？
出于安全考量，家族将行政地点建在梦境深处，机关在这些隐夜鸫雕像里：<color=#dbc291ff>雕像的朝向是可以控制的</color>。
E: For security reasons, The Family built the administrative site deep in the Dreamscape, with the mechanisms hidden in these Nightingale statues. <color=#dbc291ff>The direction of the statues can be controlled</color>.

C: 那你天才般的大脑一定还记得这里原本放着什么吧，教授？
E: With your brilliant mind you shouldn't have any trouble recalling what was here last time, right, Doctor?

C: 要不咱们就这样离开？你再找个机会把我塞进星期日的衣领里，就用这种方式打入家族内部……
E: Actually I think we could make this work for us. Just find a way to slip me into Sunday's collar, and I'll infiltrate The Family just like that.

C: …如果不是，那我就是站在您这边的。
E: ...If not, then it means I'm on your side.

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 然后再随便编个理由，避重就轻，找你把礼金要回来。这是场赌局，他可太熟悉了，赌的就是你一着不慎，满盘皆输。
E: Then he makes up some trivial excuse, downplaying the matter, and requests the gift money. This is a gamble, one he's all too familiar with, betting on your single misstep leading to a total loss.

C: 这就是所谓的「同谐」？…建立在拘禁和逼迫之上？
E: Is this what the Harmony represents? Is it built upon constraint and coercion?

C: 每位家族成员都将自己视作神体的一块拼图，围绕着唯一的{RUBY_B#星神}核心{RUBY_E#}、共同的{RUBY_B#同谐}理想{RUBY_E#}，在祂的指挥下，忠诚地各司其职，奉献自我，同时又反受其给养。
E: Each member of The Family sees themselves as a piece of the divine puzzle, revolving around a singular {RUBY_B#Aeon}core{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Harmony}a shared ideal{RUBY_E#}. Under THEIR command, they loyally fulfill their roles, offering themselves while also receiving sustenance in return.

C: 当人放任精神沉溺于无需代价，没有痛苦，只有安逸和享乐的梦境时，他们和「坏死」的距离便会越来越近。无论他认为自己活在何种极乐中，死亡都是无从改变的结局。
E: As people immerse their souls in the Dreamscape, where consequences and pain cease to exist, and only ease and pleasure prevail, they draw closer and closer to necrosis. Regardless of the perceived bliss, death looms as the inevitable conclusion.

C: 这些宝石送给你。
E: Here, I got these gems for you.

C: 那我再去找找。
E: I'll come back later.

C: 要来碰杯吗？善于倾听的陌生宾客，就当是…为这个遥不可及的梦提前庆祝一番。
E: Want to raise a glass, my attentive listener? Let's consider it... a toast to my far-fetched dream.

C: 哎…和你聊过后，总感觉心里不是滋味。各种念想混在一起，有点痛快，又有点想哭……
E: Well... talking to you has got me feeling a bit down. My thoughts are swirling, making my mind clear and bringing tears to my eyes...

C: ——敬悲哀的真相。
E: ...To the sad truth.

C: 一句留言：「将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
E: There's a message. "...Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber?"

C: 此行验证了不少先前的猜想，值得我们再仔细消化下。{NICKNAME}，给瓦尔特发条消息，问问他那边情况如何吧。
E: Now that we've confirmed a lot of our suspicions, let's take a moment to think about the clues we have. {NICKNAME}, send a message to Welt and see how things are going on his end.

C: 看来匹诺康尼的「梦主」和这位老奥帝先生都对星期日最近的表现不太满意。
E: It seems neither the Dreammaster of Penacony nor this Old Oti is happy with Sunday's recent performance.

C: 这点我不否认。但我好奇的是，为何一场如此兴师动众的骗局，到头来却没有一个人从中获利——包括犯人自己？
E: I'll admit that. What I'm more curious about though, is why such a grand scheme failed to benefit anyone in the end, including the perpetrator himself?

C: 我要你们的{RUBY_B#酋长}拉拿{RUBY_E#}来见我。我有话要说。
E: I want your {RUBY_B#Chief}Lanor{RUBY_E#} to meet with me. I have something to say.

C: 它们很漂亮，对吧？姐姐说，那是{RUBY_B#地母神}「芬戈妈妈」{RUBY_E#}的礼物。彩色的眸子能给人带来好运。
E: They're pretty, aren't they? Sis said they're a gift from {RUBY_B#Gaiathra}Mama Fenge{RUBY_E#}. Colorful eyes are said to bring good luck.

C: 你早就清楚，如果家族真对每一位前来求援的家人都投以宽容，又何必这样高垒深堑？
E: You've known all along, if The Family truly showed leniency to everyone who came seeking help, why would there be a need for such high walls and deep moats?

C: …看它的样子，啧啧，多像你支离破碎的人生啊。再怎么披着光鲜亮丽的外表，里头依旧是颗卑微的小石子…这玩意可比你的命重要得多。
E: ...Just look at it, tsk. Shattered, just like your life. Poor thing. A humble pebble coated in the most lustrous sheen. I take it back, this thing is far more precious than your life.

C: …我们拭目以待。
E: ...We'll just have to wait and see then.

C: 你这次倒是很真诚。
E: You sound sincere this time, at least.

C: 依我看，两者都不是正确答案…你拒绝面对它，只因为它证明了你的软弱。
E: From what I see, you refuse to confront it, because it only proves your weakness.

C: 嗯，我会的。那…先生，你也要回去了吗？
E: Sure, I will. Then... Mister, are you going back too?

C: 来吧，看看谁能笑到最后——游戏开始！
E: Alright, let's see who has the last laugh — let the game begin!

C: 为什么——不能活得更痛快一点？
E: So why can't I be happy too? Why can't I feel that free?

C: …你是怎么发现的？
E: ...How did you find out?

C: 你要走了吗，你最后还是选择…离开这座梦境？
E: You're leaving? You ultimately chose to... leave this Dreamscape?

C: 说说看，巡海游侠是个怎样的组织？
E: Alright then. Tell me, what kind of organization are the Galaxy Rangers?

C: 认为「虚无」不存在令使…没准只是因为我们还不够「虚无」呢。
E: To reckon that Nihility Emanators don't exist...? Maybe we just ain't nihilistic enough.

C: …方才的奇异景象是由克劳克影视乐园的设备故障引发，家族已第一时间封锁现场，并无人员受伤。各位宾客敬请放心。
E: ...Attention, please: The unusual event that occurred moments ago was due to a technical malfunction at Clock Studios Theme Park. The Family has promptly responded to secure the area, and we're happy to report that there have been no injuries.

C: 我从来不知道，你还会做这种事。
E: I never knew you could do this.

C: 希望你已平复了心情。等你做好准备，我们就出发。
E: I hope you've regained a little composure. We'll move out when you're ready.

C: 你是…忆域迷因？
E: You're... a Memory Zone Meme?

C: 想…但我觉得不能把它关起来。
E: I do... but I don't want to lock it up in a cage.

C: 没事，你不用相信我，你该相信的……
E: Fine, you don't have to trust me. What you should trust is...

C: 好啊。如你所愿，她来了……
E: Alright, as you wish. Here she is...

C: 噫，要不杨叔还是别去了吧……
E: Maybe you can just stay behind this time, Mr. Yang...?

C: 一旦谈判出现变故，相当于坐实了家族染指星核的意图，这可是那位使节梦寐以求的「突破口」。届时，我会利用这枚发信器将消息传给公司。
E: If negotiations go south and The Family show their true colors by going after the Stellaron, I'll use this transmitter to send a message to the IPC. It'll be just the opportunity the IPC Ambassador was hoping for.

C: 过奖，过奖。
E: Awww, you're making me blush with these flatteries... Keep them comin'!

C: 又回到这里了……
E: Back here again...

C: 这片梦境的风景真的很美，对吧？
E: The scenery in this Dreamscape is truly breathtaking, isn't it?

C: 两位稍安勿躁，来龙去脉我都知道，酒店需要先和星期日先生取得联系。这样吧，我安排两个贵宾室的酒水位，请二位边休息边等待。
E: I apologize for the inconvenience. Please wait while we try to contact Mr. Sunday. I'll arrange two premium seats in the VIP Lounge, so you can rest there while you wait.

C: 但我认为，阿基维利的陨落，同样是祂为无名客留下的宝贵遗产。
E: But in my opinion, Akivili's fall holds significance for the Nameless.

C: 至于我…我同样在那片战场上失去了太多，无法再度踏上征程了，反而变成了最适合完成这件事的人。
E: As for me... I've suffered too many losses on that battlefield to advance any further, and that makes me the most fitting person to carry out this task.
