C: 只要拿下第一名，我们就能夺得盛会巨星的称号，受到知更鸟小姐的亲自接见…不过这个不重要啦，重要的是我们能比普通观众更早进入大剧院！
E: As long as we clinch the top spot, we'll be able to attain the title of Festive Superstar and be able to personally bask in the graces of Miss Robin... Not that that's important. What's crucial is that we can enter the Grand Theater before the audience arrives!

C: 你看，我们都是钟表，都是一家人！我想帮助你，让你快乐起来！可以告诉我，你的烦恼是什么吗？
E: You see, we're all clocks, we're family! I want to help you be happy! Tell your pal Clockie what's troubling you!

C: 这地方真是热闹……
E: This place is buzzing...

C: 你也来参加谐乐大典吗？
E: Will you be participating in the Charmony Festival as well?

C: 其实，我们已经见过「钟表匠」了……
E: Actually, we've already met the Watchmaker...

C: 呵，领航员，我正有此意。既然人已到齐，我们就从那场会谈讲起吧。
E: Ah, Navigator, that is precisely my intention. With all present, let's begin by discussing the details of that meeting.

C: <size=36>不像演的！</size>
E: <size=36>Beautiful!</size>

C: 重要的是，此身如今已立于此处——狭路相逢，我，「纯美骑士团」的银枝，恳求与二位展开一场骑士道的较量！
E: What matters is that I now stand before you — our paths have crossed. I, Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, am humbly requesting for a battle with you both in the name of the Code of Chivalry!

C: 快把杨叔还给我们！
E: Give Mr. Yang back to us, now!

C: 好。那，就去我刚才说的两个房间看看吧。
E: Yeah, then let's check out the rooms I just mentioned.

C: 它们听从镜子小姐的安排，在船上负责各种工作，是最好的水手。
E: They follow Miss Mirror's orders and handle all sorts of jobs on the ship. They're the best sailors.

C: 不，我应该会留在这里。然后…就结束了。
E: No, I'll stay here, and then... this is where it ends.

C: 那么你知道，「钟表把戏」究竟是什么吗？
E: So, do you know what clockwork actually is?

C: 这是「筑梦拼图」，对吧？是要我们把出口变出来？可是现在该上哪找这最后一块拼图呢……
E: This is the Dream Jigsaw, right? So, we're supposed to find the exit? But where can we find the last piece...?

C: 我、我要去观景车厢擦地了！我答应了列车长……
E: I... I'm going to clean the floor in the Parlor Car! I've promised the conductor...

C: 敬不完美的…明天。
E: To the imperfect... tomorrow.

C: 「故在那日，万众集结一心，将神投入毁灭坑中。」
E: "Thus, on that day, all beings united and cast the Aeon into the abyss of oblivion."

C: 它就在帷幕之后，或者，你也可以认为它就是剧院本身。
E: It hides behind the curtain. Or rather, it is the theater itself.

C: 哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，明察秋毫！
E: Hahaha, if it isn't the Galactic Baseballer — a hero with unparalleled insight!

C: 真可爱。不过，你知道我这么做更深层的原因是什么吗？
E: How adorable. But, do you know the deeper meaning behind it?

C: 无数流星划过今夜的天空…如果选中了正确的那一颗，它将把你的愿望，带向千百个世界。
E: Countless shooting stars streak the sky tonight... If you can pick the right one, it will carry your wish to thousands of distant worlds.

C: 在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>——而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。
E: There's a <color=#dbc291ff>major flaw</color> in the story you have experienced, yet within that flaw lies a glimmer of hope.

C: 和平就是我们最大的愿望，除此之外别无所求。
E: Peace is our greatest wish — beyond that, we desire nothing else.

C: 星期日的仆人
E: Sunday's Servant

C: 「梦主」
E: "Dreammaster"

C: 诚然如此，黑天鹅小姐。所以，计划中最重要的一环不是让所有人弃暗投明……
E: I agree with you, Black Swan. That's why the most critical aspect of this plan is not to convince everyone to choose the right path...

C: 你知道，身为偷渡者，她进入梦境的方式有别于我们。没有酒店的入梦装置，没有家族的帮助，她能从梦中惊醒的手段也只有一种…一次真正的「死亡」。
E: As you know, Firefly is a stowaway who entered the Dreamscape in a different way from ours. Without the dreampool in the hotel or assistance from The Family, she can only awaken from this dream in one way... a real "death."

C: 那是「存在」的颜色，你要跟着它，它将为你指引出路。如此，你们一定能够在阳光下相聚。
E: That's the color of "existence." Follow it, and it'll guide you and illuminate the way out. By doing so, you'll eventually reunite in the warmth of the sunlight.

C: 有些事我已经很难想起，但也有些事…我很难忘记。
E: For me, some things are difficult to recall, yet there are others... that I find challenging to forget.

C: 誓以十万七千三百三十六枚音符，通告尔等，加入光荣的合唱——归于天堂！
E: With <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> notes, I solemnly invite you to join the glorious chorus — and ascend to the heavens!

C: 忆域的海面下，距水中的满月最近的花园里，一位老人斜倚在安乐椅上，寂静无声。
E: Beneath the sea surface of Memory Zone, in a garden closest to the full moon in the water, an elderly man rests on a recliner, enveloped in utter silence.

C: …喂，{NICKNAME}！别睡啦，太阳晒屁股啦——
E: ...Hey, {NICKNAME}! Wake up! The sun's frying your butt!

C: 现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
E: Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.

C: 现在，橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。列车组也受到邀请，去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。
E: Now, all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. The Family has invited the Crew to the Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.

C: 哈哈哈，谢谢你的好意提醒，我看还是不必了。和那位女士坐在一张谈判桌上，该当心的永远都是别人~
E: Hahaha, thank you for the reminder, but I don't think that will be necessary. When she's at the table, it's the others who need to be cautious.

C: 嗯，所以接下来的会谈，我们务必要按商议好的策略来推进。就像下一盘棋，每一步都要审时度势。
E: Yes, that's exactly why we need to handle the conference following an agreed-upon strategy. It's like playing a game of chess, where every move needs to be carefully thought out.

C: 记住我们的目标：为公司入驻匹诺康尼创造机会。砂金已经划开了一道口子，而你我…要把它彻底撕开。
E: Remember, our goal is to create an opportunity for the IPC to enter Penacony. Aventurine has already made a small opening, and you and I... we're going to tear it wide open.

C: 我欣赏你的沉稳，翡翠女士！你一定见过很多世面。
E: I appreciate your composure, Miss Jade! You must have witnessed much in your worldly experiences.

C: 一段旅途行将结束的时候，总会让人感到怅然。我们能做的，就是让它拥有一个尽量圆满的结局。
E: The conclusion of a journey can often be sorrowful. All we can do is try to make sure it ends on a happy note.

C: 但「同谐」的惩戒在所难免，等待他的将是一场审判，至于细节…家族不愿透露太多。
E: However, facing punishment from the Harmony is inevitable. He will face a trial. As for further details... The Family would rather not disclose them.

C: 敬沉眠于地下的无名客们，还有我的好友，加拉赫。
E: Here's to the Nameless resting in peace... and to my friend, Gallagher.

C: 我们不被外面的世界接受，因此才聚在这里。
E: We're not accepted by the outside world, so we've gathered here.

C: 翡翠女士，我还有一个问题想问。
E: I have one more question for you, Miss Jade.

C: 而代价…因为这些铁骑从来没有被视作独立的「人」，自然也无代价而言。
E: As for the price... Those Iron Cavalries weren't exactly seen as regular, independent "humans," so there wasn't really a price to be paid.

C: 别瞎看，喝你的酒！
E: Don't look around! Just focus on your drink!

C: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
E: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)

C: 变…身？你在说什么呢？
E: Trans... form? What are you saying?

C: 这么一想，当时在贝洛伯格，还好布洛妮娅赶到的够及时——要是她晚来一步，咱们怕是连朋友都做不成了~
E: Now that I think about it, it was good that Bronya got there when she did in Belobog — if she came any later, we probably wouldn't have ended up as friends~

C: 复活阿基维利！
E: Revive Akivili!

C: 劳逸结合有其科学依据，相关论证过程可以参考学术期刊《揽星》第<unbreak>31467</unbreak>期<unbreak>21</unbreak>页。汲取知识是为了更好地生活，别像学会那帮蠢材一样本末倒置了。
E: The principle of balancing work and relaxation is scientifically grounded, with the relevant proof process detailed on page 21 of the 31467th issue of the academic journal Starseizer. Acquiring knowledge aims to enhance living. Don't invert priorities like those dolts at the Guild.

C: （典礼还没开始，先休息一下吧……）
E: (The festival hasn't started. Let's take a quick break...)

C: 难道星核猎手压榨成员？
E: Are the Stellaron Hunters this exploitative of their members?

C: 好了，既然你找到了我，轮到我完成使命了。接下来，我将倒数五个数，然后爆炸！
E: All right. Now that you've found me, it's my turn to complete my mission. Next, I'll count down from five, and then explode!

C: 我都要爆了，你还在乎这个？
E: I'm about to explode, and that's all you're concerned about?

C: 真的吗？你真的什么都不问吗？好吧，真为你惋惜。
E: Really? You really have no questions? Okay then, what a pity.

C: 炸弹的状况如何了？
E: How's the bomb situation?

C: （该回列车了…或者，我还可以和黄泉作最后的道别。）
E: (I should get back to the Express... Or, maybe I could say my final goodbye to Acheron.)

C: 又要来场谐乐大典？
E: Is it going to be a repeat of the Charmony Festival?

C: 旁听生？
E: Guest students?

C: 我就是「大人物」。
E: I'm a VIP.

C: 在下…竟然无法与这些邪祟沟通！
E: I... I am unable to communicate with these fiendlings!

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 阁下还未从妖术中醒来吗？莫非是正气断惑手刀的忍力消散了，让在下再来一次……
E: Are you still under their spell? Or has the ninja power of my Righteous Chop dissipated? Fear not, I can do it again!

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 惊梦剧团！来战！
E: Dreamjolt Troupe, prepare for combat!

C: 是芮克先生提到的「学术造假」吧，没想到折纸大学也会发生这种事。
E: You mean the "academic fraud" Mr. Reca mentioned? I can't believe that sort of thing happens in Paperfold University, too.

C: 财富学院
E: Fortune Academy

C: 因、因为折纸大学的学生来自各个星球，听一位社员说，他的故乡吃什么都要蘸辣……
E: B—Because Paperfold University students come from many different planets. One of the members said they dip everything in chili back at home.

C: 既然是访客，这次就放过你吧，以后别再违反校规了。
E: Since you're a visitor, I'll let you off this once. Don't break school rules again.

C: 这是常盘国的同学给我起的，是不是很可爱！
E: A classmate from Tokiwa calls me that. Isn't it cute?

C: 既然是伎乐忍徒准备的试炼，在下也没有理由推辞。
E: If it's a trial prepared by Ninja Initiate Gigaku, I see no reason to refuse.

C: 哇，太完美了！我要把这些场照挂到摊位上！
E: Wow, perfect! I'm going to display these photos at the booth.

C: 正是。
E: Precisely.

C: 要出手吗？
E: Should we take action?

C: 嗯…好吧，睡蕉社不会拒绝任何想成为朋友的人。那就让我来考考你吧。这几道题目，你想先回答哪个？
E: ...Fine. The Slumbernana Association is always happy to make more friends. Are you ready for the challenge? Now, which of these questions would you like to start with?

C: 对了，可以让我检查一下你的身体吗？
E: That reminds me. Shall I give you a checkup?

C: 什么「波波」？
E: "Big bother"?

C: 哈，毕竟不是自己的地盘，还是把话说明白好些——
E: Hah, this ain't my turf, so let me just make some things clear.

C: 我明白…那就拜托波提欧先生和三月七小姐先行动起来。
E: I understand... In that case, please go ahead with your plans first, Mr. Boothill and Miss March 7th.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 唔…可如果连丹恒你都开始蕉蕉蕉，就太引人注目了吧。
E: Hmm... But you'd draw too much attention if you started speaking Bananese too, Dan Heng.

C: 好久不见呀，异乡人。
E: Long time no see, outlander!

C: 当你回过神的时候，你脑海的画作已经出现在了墙壁之上。
E: When you come to your senses, the painting in your mind is already on the wall.

C: 太、太强了蕉！在这么短时间里筑造出如此大体积的物件，真是堪比专业筑梦猴的手法……
E: Th—That's impressive, bana! Weaving such a large object in such a short time is comparable to the work of a pro Dreamweaver!

C: 但是，0分！
E: But I'm giving it a big fat zero!

C: 你有在课上捣乱的自由，我就有给你打低分的自由，这还不够自由吗？标新立异就要付出标新立异的代价，给我下去蕉！
E: You're allowed to disrupt my class, and I get to flunk you for that. THAT'S freedom for you. You pay a price for trying to be creative. Now, get back to your seat, bana hmph!

C: 啊？你们说什么？给我再说一遍蕉！？
E: Wh—What did you just say!? Bana grr! Repeat that if you dare!

C: 我们追逐的传奇富商、盛会巨星，他们的精彩人生是那么遥远，仿佛属于另一个世界……
E: Those famed tycoons and Festive Superstars that we pursue lead lives we can never hope to experience... So dramatic, eventful, and out of this world.

C: 明白了。感谢芮克先生推荐，我们会去看看的。
E: I see. Thank you for thinking so highly of us, Mr. Reca. We'll make sure to drop by.

C: 正合在下心意。
E: Great ninja minds think alike.

C: 最爱演的一集！
E: Yes! My favorite kind of episode!

C: 在远处为了个果子和其他猴子打成一片的，是那颗星球上最聪明的人，他曾经知道人要怎么飞到天上去。
E: The one in the distance, fighting with the other monkeys over a piece of fruit, used to be the smartest person on his planet, even having the knowledge to send people soaring into the sky.

C: 不对蕉！
E: Hold on, bana!

C: 莫要畏惧…忍侠不可畏惧！
E: Steel your nerves... A Ninja Hero never fears!

C: 进行切磋
E: Spar with them.

C: 我不知道，忍徒。
E: I do not know, my disciple.

C: 已做出决定。
E: I've made my decision.

C: 银枪•修罗殿下，在下的超•听力无法捕捉到邪祟的声响了，虾蟇•忍者所言非虚。
E: Silvergun Shura, even with my super hearing, I'm no longer able to detect the sounds of the fiendling. Perhaps Ninja Gama is right.

C: 让他交代原始博士的去向。
E: Make him tell us where Dr. Primitive is.

C: 学术研讨会已经结束了，真正的代理校长与老师们也回来了。
E: The academic conference has concluded, and the actual acting dean and teachers are back.

C: 不可能！众神早就陷入疯狂了！
E: Impossible! The gods have long been consumed by madness!

C: 不错，是时候执行备用计划了。
E: Mm. Time for plan B.

C: 这就是试炼？
E: This is the trial?

C: 内心至深的恐惧…白厄阁下，想必是在试炼中看见了自己的过去，还有那倾覆于<color=#dbc291ff>黑潮</color>下的故乡了吧……
E: The greatest fear in the depths of his heart... Lord Phainon must have been forced to relive his past during the trial and revisit his homeland that had fallen to the <color=#dbc291ff>black tide</color>...

C: 来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
E: Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?

C: 来到翁法罗斯后已多次听人提及，能否请各位展开讲讲，这「黑潮」究竟是？
E: Since coming to Amphoreus, we have heard many talking about this "black tide." Could you tell us more about it?

C: 来吧，懦夫！{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}将给我力量，随我一同血战至死亡的疆界！
E: Come at me, coward! {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will grant me strength and fight alongside me to the death!

C: …先循着厮杀声的源头前进吧。
E: ...Let's first follow the sounds of battle to their source.

C: 请你们先赶赴树庭吧——愿瑟希斯捍卫你们的思想！
E: Please make your way to the Grove first. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts!

C: 树庭，路途远！准备，要做好！
E: The Grove is far! It's important to be ready!

C: 这个缇安知道！大家说，这座很大的学院，就是这么来的。
E: Trianne knows this! Everybody says that was how this big academy came to be.

C: 那…它们到底遭遇了什么？为什么只剩下小小的影子了？
E: But... what happened to them? Why are there only tiny shadows of them left?

C: 这…好可怕……
E: This looks... really scary...

C: 黑色的怪物业已倒下，如同倾圮的雕像。其身躯内有金色的余灰残留，与翁法罗斯常见的黄金血或为一物。
E: The black-colored monster has fallen like a toppled statue. Within its body lie golden ashes, perhaps the same substance as the golden blood that is commonly seen in Amphoreus.

C: 打开门上的锁前，还是先设法打开眼上的锁吧。
E: Before you try unlocking the door, perhaps you should first find a way to clear the fog that clouds your vision.

C: 这个人，好难相处呀！
E: What a difficult person!

C: 大家似乎都被疏散走了。
E: Everyone seems to have been evacuated.

C: 嗯，这算是到目前为止唯一一个好消息了。事已至此，我们专心回收火种就好。
E: Yes, that seems like the only good news so far. We can just focus on retrieving the Coreflame then.

C: 如此「开拓」之开拓者，天下间便还有什么可以抵挡你了？他宝贝的，天下间便还有什么可以抵挡你，更何况一座连动都不能动的水车？！你猛睁开眼，便狂啸一声——
E: As such a "Trailblazing" Trailblazer, what in the world could possibly stand in your way? Son of a fudge, nothing can stop you, let alone an immobile waterwheel! You snap your eyes open and let out a fierce roar—

C: 那我来努力开动脑筋…呣呣呣…
E: Then let me ignite my creativity... Ummmm...

C: 杯水车薪。但你想要救活这颗大树的期盼是如此热烈，以至于不知何种存在从遥远多元宇宙深处向你投来赞许的目光。
E: A futile effort. Yet your fervent hope to revive this great tree was so intense that some presence from the distant multiverse cast an approving gaze upon you.

C: 瞧见那边厢的浅塘了么？那水间生着睡莲，乃是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}最初挥泪浇灌，并以{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}携来「友亲之爱」呵护成的，两位尊神永世相伴之信物。
E: See that shallow pond over there? Water lilies grow there. Initially, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} watered them with their tears while Mnestia nurtured them with affectionate love. They are a token of the eternal companionship between the two gods.

C: 多的暂且不便多说。言至于此，去罢？
E: Now is not the time for me to elaborate further. So, please proceed?

C: 嗯！阿雅给的纺锤好厉害，缇安好像找到小那刻夏啦——
E: Yup! The spindle that Agy gave us is so powerful that Trianne seems to have found Nax...

C: …很遗憾，看起来它确实忍住了。
E: ...Alas, it seems it has indeed resisted the urge.

C: 哈哈…鲜血的味道…
E: Haha... the sweet taste of blood...

C: 为了奥赫玛！死吧！
E: In Okhema's name! Perish!
Ugh...

C: 你又在耍什么把戏？
E: What are you playing at this time?

C: 翁法罗斯的大地上，有些生命死于黄昏，有些生命死于拂晓，而有些生命——它们命中注定死于正午的烈阳！
E: On the land of Amphoreus, some lives meet their end at dusk, some at dawn, and yet others... are fated to perish under the blistering sun at noon!

C: 你好，我们有要事求见阿格莱雅大人，麻烦通报一下。
E: Hello. We have an important matter to discuss with Lady Aglaea. May we trouble you to inform her of our presence?

C: 对！
E: Yeah!

C: 就像…妈妈一样？
E: Just like Momma...?

C: 呜，我想想……
E: Mmm... Let me think...

C: 为什么不呢？不过，如果想要教书育人，这么好动可不行。
E: Why not? But if you're going to be a teacher, you might need to tone down that hyper energy of yours.

C: *我们*…梦到妈妈了。
E: We... had a dream about Mama.

C: 我理解你的想法，阿雅。但在这件事上…*我们*已经下定决心。
E: You have a point, Agy. But... our decision has already been made on that matter.

C: 你想主张…它来自翁法罗斯之外？
E: Are you suggesting that... it originates from beyond Amphoreus?

C: 缇宝…*我们*恐怕得走了。这座神殿里……
E: Tribbie... We should leave. This temple...

C: …该结束了。
E: ...It's time to end this.

C: 但…盗火行者的剑想要伤到你，得先穿透我的胸膛。
E: But the Flame Reaver will have to step over my dead body if they wish to do you harm.

C: 都一样…你和我…我们都把纷争和恐惧当做食粮……
E: You and I, we're both the same... We feast on strife and fear...

C: 走吧，奔向你的战场，为那盗火的鬣狗送去死亡。
E: Go now. Your battlefield calls. Send that flame-thieving hyena to their death.

C: 接过{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的神职后，你看见了什么？
E: What did you see after assuming {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia's{RUBY_E#} divinity?

C: …多吃蔬菜，多锻炼；少看闲书，少熬夜。
E: ...Eat more greens, work out more often, avoid mindless reads, and get more sleep.

C: 为什么这么问？
E: What makes you say so?

C: 再见了，迈德漠斯！
E: Farewell, Mydeimos!

C: 你也找到值得守护之物了吗？
E: Have you found something deserving of your protection as well?

C: 还记得之前万敌说的话，身在战场，就要抛却杂念……
E: But remember what Mydei said before? "Cast aside all distractions once you're on the battlefield"...

C: 不久前……
E: Not long ago...

C: 想取这女孩的性命？先跨越我的尸体。
E: If you want this girl dead, you'll have to kill me first.

C: 小白想了解的是什么呢？
E: What do you seek to learn, Snowy?

C: 既然心意已决，就照你说的做吧……
E: Since you have made your decision, then let's proceed as you wish...

C: 我的旅途，将要从这里开启。
E: This is where my journey begins.

C: 你…能听见我们说话？
E: You can... hear us?

C: 很久…或是不久之前。
E: It was a long time ago... or not so long ago...

C: 纵观寰宇，通过某种方式攫取命途力量，达成「奇迹」的仪式并不罕见。我与人签订的「典贷契约」，不也是一种助人心想事成的仪式吗？至于我们获赐的基石…更是如此。
E: Across the cosmos, ceremonies that tap into a Path's power to create "miracles" aren't uncommon. The Credit Contracts I make with people. Aren't they a form of wish fulfillment, too? And even more so... are the Cornerstones we received.

C: …就会优先处理「私人恩怨」。哼哼，谢谢您，奥帝先生，我受益良多。
E: You'd deal with the personal vendettas first. Heh, heh. Much appreciated, Mr. Oti. I'll keep that in mind.

C: 我并非为成就世上一切善念而来，却注定为摧毁世上一切恶念而死。
E: I have not come to bring all the good in the world, but I am fated to perish, defeating all evil in the world.

C: 这些废物点心比我想的还不顶事，总之，先撤退吧。
E: These useless mooks are even worse than I thought. Anyways, just fall back for now.

C: 混账，你是谁啊？
E: Who the heck are you!?

C: 我一向是个在不运与强运的狭间中游走的赌徒，但就算对我来说，这「抽牌」的结果也有些……
E: I've always been a gambler, teetering between bad luck and incredible fortune. But even for me, this draw of the cards is a bit...

C: 不过，身为「抑止力的守护者」——你们不必细究那是什么——我原本就应当出现在「错误的圣杯战争」之中，也许那两位也是因为相同的原因，来到了你们的世界。
E: That said, as a Counter Guardian — you don't need to know what that means — my job is to show up when a Holy Grail War goes wrong. Maybe the other two were pulled here for the same reason.

C: 无论御主想要令战争消失还是赢取胜利，都需要找到几个同盟。就像舞台上的演出不能仅有主角独舞一样。
E: Whether you want to end this war or win it, you're going to need allies. No performance is complete with only the lead on stage.

C: 构成我身体的不再是魔力，而是其他基本元素。而这位音符小姐，身为Caster的你，应该比我更清楚发生了什么。
E: My body is no longer composed of magical energy, but of other fundamental elements. But you, Miss Note, being a Caster, you should have a better idea than I do of what has happened.

C: 我现在先给你一锤子！
E: I see you're itching for a fight!

C: 即使逃去其他地方，只要后退的本性不改变，迟早有一天会无处可去的。
E: As long as your instinct is just to back down and run, you'll run out of places to go even if you manage to get out of this place.

C: 我们顺道在空间站停靠一段时间，也来见见一些老朋友——{NICKNAME}，如果你愿意，这回也可以和我们一起离开。
E: So we're stopping by the space station for a while to meet some old friends. You can join us and leave with us this time if you want, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我今天已经充当过一次众矢之的了啊…这一次，机会就留给老奥帝先生好了。
E: I've already been the scapegoat once today... So I'll pass this opportunity to Mr. Oti.

C: 人们追逐它，为它战斗，为它奉献，为它生死，就像是…我们的匹诺康尼。
E: People have pursued it, fought for it, made sacrifices for it, and died for it, much like they did for our own Penacony.

C: 我就不一样了，除开金钱回报，世上还有什么能更好地度量你为一件事所做的努力呢？
E: I'm not like that. What else can truly measure the effort you've put in apart from cold hard cash?

C: 知名的导演芮克与友人联手打造！更有苜蓿草家主、匹诺康尼商业大亨老奥帝先生独家赞助！
E: Directed by the renowned Mr. Reca and his trusted companions! Lastly, exclusively sponsored by Old Oti, the head of the Alfalfa Family and a business tycoon of Penacony!

C: 恕我直言，如果有谁能轻而易举地击败那位Saber，那站在这里的我们，都不会有还手之力。
E: With all due respect, if that hypothetical enemy could easily defeat your friend's Saber, then none of us here would be walking away alive.

C: 哈哈哈，我一直想看你们露出这副表情，这副像傻瓜一样被我玩弄于股掌的表情！
E: Hahahahaha! I've always wanted to see you people like this! A bunch of idiots subjected to my every whim!

C: 一具没有身份的尸体，先别管它为什么还能动。总之，你并未从它的身上找到线索，但我可以给你们一些小提示。
E: A nameless corpse lies before you, don't ask why it's still twitching. More importantly, you find no clues on it, but I've got a little hint for you all.

C: 你到底哪只眼睛看到我们在逃跑？
E: Pray tell, does anyone look like they're running from you?

C: 波提欧、知更鸟和音符小姐下落不明，而斯科特和他的从者随时准备卷土重来。
E: Boothill, Robin, and Miss Note are all still missing. Skott and his Servant could strike again at any time.

C: 不过我有种直觉，就算他们此刻占据上风，也对我们无可奈何。
E: Still, I've got this feeling... even if they've got the upper hand now, they've got no real way to finish us.

C: 与此同时，邪恶的怨灵也找上了她们，誓要将这些天外来客撕碎，吞没！
E: But at the same time, evil spirits approach them, determined to shred and consume these visitors from beyond the sky!

C: 这噩梦太可怕了。
E: This nightmare is terrifying.

C: 你信这鼻行兽养的玩意儿，不如信我是仙舟的将军。别怪我说话难听，让他这样的人悔改，不如叫反物质军团去盗贼公国植树造林。
E: You trust this son of a Nosewalker? Might as well believe I'm a general of the Xianzhou. No offense, but making someone like him turn over a new leaf is like asking the Antimatter Legion to plant trees in the Kingdom of Banditry.

C: 为了不辜负大家的信任，我也不会向邪恶屈服的呱。
E: To honor the trust placed in me, I will never bend to evil. *ribbit*

C: 好死！开香槟喽！
E: Yay! Time to crack open the champagne!

C: 哎呀，哎呀，连牛仔这样正儿八经的拓荒者都看不下去了。我说导演，虽然我不了解你的生平…但毫无疑问，票房惨败、潦倒而死的结局八成是注定了的。
E: Oh. Oh my. Even a proper pioneer like the cowboy can't bear to watch any longer. Director, though I don't know your life story... but surely a box office disaster and a miserable end seem all but fated.

C: 我也和你们一起去，音符小姐，无论她现在是敌是友，我都要把她带回来。
E: I'm going with you. It doesn't matter whether Miss Note is now friend or foe. I will bring her back.

C: 葛瑞迪先生，请问您如何看待部分媒体将《外太空六号》列为寰宇百大烂片之首？
E: Mr. Grady, how do you respond to certain media calling Outer Space 6 the number one worst film in the galaxy?

C: 多少替人考虑下啊，匹诺康尼的头号逃犯。光是和你站在一起，就够惹祸上身的了。
E: Spare a thought for me, will you? Just being in your company is plenty enough to get me into trouble, Mr. Prime Fugitive of Penacony.

C: 什么情况。
E: What's going on?

C: 保险起见，直到彻底离开匹诺康尼为止，你必须与我同行。
E: Agreed, but until you leave Penacony for good, you are to stay by my side.

C: 我似乎也没有提议的立场。愿听从各位无名客的判断。
E: I doubt I'm in any position to be proposing ideas, but I'm happy to defer to the Nameless and aid with any plans you may have.

C: 看你个子小小的，人倒是挺厉害嘛……
E: You may be small, but you're pretty amazing!

C: 果然，调律自身是最为棘手的事。
E: As expected, the trickiest thing is tuning yourself.

C: 那么最后一个问题。
E: Now, the final question.

C: 你想多了，是一切都不能控制。
E: Don't flatter yourself. You can't control anything.

C: 欢迎加入星穹列车。
E: Welcome aboard the Astral Express.

C: 他还没正式加入啦！只是搭个车，没人能撼动你的地位。
E: He's just traveling with us, not an actual member of the Express crew yet! Your newbie status is untouchable.

C: 也许只是黑塔女士又有了什么动作吧。
E: For all we know, Madam Herta could be making a move again.

C: 列位去过匹诺康尼，应当知晓在跃迁至阿斯德纳时，一些人会陷入联觉梦境。
E: You've all been to Penacony before. I presume you are aware of how some might find themselves in a Synesthesia Dreamscape after warping to Asdana.

C: 放心，车厢上有独立的推进器，一定能把你们送进翁法罗斯，找个安全的地点着陆。
E: The car you're getting has its own thrusters, so just buckle up, and It'll take you into Amphoreus and land you somewhere safe.

C: 少女蜷在剔透的冰层中，紧阖双眼、一语不发。
E: Curled up in the clear ice, the young girl remains silent with her eyes fixed shut.

C: 无理取闹，想靠这种小伎俩影响我？门都没有！
E: Ridiculous! Hoping to stop me with such cheap parlor tricks? Not a chance!

C: 有点像猫。
E: A cat of sorts?

C: 看，那边。
E: Look at that.

C: 好啦！安静一下，现在*我们*要召唤「神迹」了……
E: Alright! Silence, please. We are about to summon a miracle...

C: 老头，别把自己骗了…
E: Don't lie to yourself, old man...

C: 呜嗡——！
E: Urrhh!

C: 至于你，万敌…如果我没记错，你的责任应当是保护市民吧？
E: As for you, Mydei... If I'm not mistaken, shouldn't your responsibility be protecting the citizens?

C: 好奇这双眼眸吗？我并非双目失明，相反，能看见的远比常人更多。
E: Curious about my eyesight? Well, I'm not blind. On the contrary, I can see much more than the typical person.

C: 等待阿格莱雅大人的命令！
E: Wait for Lady Aglaea's orders!

C: 那是你的同伴？似乎不怎么友善。
E: Is he your companion? You two don't seem to be on friendly terms.

C: 以新土抟我形貌，以硕果赋予智慧。以蝶翎点亮情思，以金血浇铸命运。
E: Craft my likeness with fresh earth, and grant my intellect with your fruits. Illuminate my emotions with the wings of a butterfly and forge my fate with golden blood.

C: 我，探险家达米亚诺斯，今天便要插上羽翼，触摸天空——向所有人证明天外之界的存在！
E: I, Explorer Damionis, shall put on these wings today and touch the sky — proving to everyone that a world beyond the sky exists!

C: 往日无法重现？可你分明展现过{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的神迹。
E: The past cannot be recreated? But you clearly showed us {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} Miracle before.

C: 不试试水温？
E: Aren't you going to test the water's temperature?

C: 沉下去，再做一次。让灵水浸没你的手腕。熟悉它的温度、触感……
E: Sink deeper and do this once more. Submerge your wrists in the spirit water. Familiarize yourself with its temperature, its touch...

C: 抱歉，前方暂时不便通行。
E: I'm sorry, this route is not open yet.

C: 如果二位心中还有疑问，我会尽全力解答。
E: If you still harbor doubts, I'll do my best to provide you with answers.

C: 在白厄和一众圣城卫士的护送下，你和丹恒回到了重渊的坠毁点，合力打捞起了列车车厢。
E: Escorted by Phainon and the holy city guards, you and Dan Heng return to the crash site in the Abyss. Together, you salvage the Express' coach car.

C: 该给三月七拍张这儿的照片。
E: We've got to take a photo of this place for March 7th.

C: 你忘了么？从抵达圣城开始，天空就一直这么明亮。
E: Did you already forget? The sky has been this bright since we arrived at the holy city.

C: 如今，{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}不知去向，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}仍在觊觎大地；而{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}，虽然还未流露出对人类的敌意，但同样不容小觑。
E: As we speak, the {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#} remains missing, the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} is still coveting our land, and {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} present significant threats, despite their lack of overt hostility toward humanity.

C: ——敞开每扇通向胜利的大门！
E: And throw open all gates that lead to victory!

C: 天才啊，你不说都没人发现。
E: Genius. We never would have known if you hadn't said anything.

C: 有来有回，十步太多了——先还你一步。
E: Returning the favor. Ten steps are too many, you can have one back.

C: 我早就说过，你们对这城中地形一无所知，如何能赢过我？
E: I told you before that you don't know the lay of the land in this city. That's why you won't beat me.

C: 对了，刚才忘了说，前面拿到一块刻着悬锋城古语的石板，待会儿帮忙翻译下？
E: I just remembered — we came across a slate with inscriptions in an ancient language of Castrum Kremnos. Could you help translate it?

C: 壮哉，战争之魂不朽。
E: Immortal soul of war, ever by my side.

C: 进攻奥赫玛的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}只是一具半身。按它的意思，悬锋城中不会还有吧？
E: The {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} that attacked Okhema was only a double. Considering what the Titankin said, could there be more of them in Castrum Kremnos?

C: 废话少说。
E: You talk too much.

C: 英灵，为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}献上汝之战魂……
E: Martyrs, consecrate your souls of war for the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}...

C: 不错，感觉你的状态都不一样了。
E: Not bad. Something feels different about you already.

C: …你还好吗，遐蝶小姐？
E: ...Are you alright, Miss Castorice?

C: 「愚蠢…盲目……」
E: "Obtuse... blind fools..."

C: 自己站上去。
E: Stand on top of it.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，能请您上前吗？{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}似乎在呼唤着你。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, could you please step forward? {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} seems to be calling out for you.

C: 流萤？
E: Firefly?

C: 名字？我的？不记得。
E: Name? Mine? Don't remember.

C: 只要能帮得上忙就行。
E: As long as you're able to help.

C: 剧本上写着「不留活口」…{NICKNAME}。
E: The script says, "Leave no survivors." ...{NICKNAME}.

C: 你要离开了，对吗？因为你要去做一件重要的事…你总是明白什么才是最重要的事。
E: You're leaving, right? Because there's something important that you have to do... You always understand what's the most important.

C: 我把一切都忘了…
E: I have forgotten everything...

C: 状况持续了不到一分钟，然后……
E: It hadn't even been a full minute when...

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 找哈托努斯，有何贵干？
E: To Chartonus, what brings you?

C: 那是…达米亚诺斯？阿格莱雅女士已经将他释放了吗？
E: Is that... Damionis? Did Lady Aglaea release him already?

C: …那预言也不过是他故事的旁白。
E: ...then the prophecy is nothing more than a footnote to his tale.

C: 快要成功了吗，格奈乌斯阁下？
E: Lord Gnaeus, are we almost there?

C: 它凭着意志与黑潮缠斗，但终究落败。在神性被彻底污染前，它将自己的一部分剥离了出来……
E: They battled the black tide by sheer will alone, but ultimately succumbed to it. Before their divinity could be completely corrupted, they removed a part of it...

C: 你怎么感觉到的？
E: How can you tell?

C: …幸好有他们两位在。
E: ...It's fortunate we had the both of them there with us.

C: 那就来吧——不管你打算用什么方式阻挠我前进，我都已经做好准备了。
E: So be it. No matter what obstacles you plan to put in my way, I'm ready to overcome them.

C: 但如果那刻夏节外生枝，做出可能危害我等的决定…我绝不会吝惜极端手段。
E: However, if Anaxa decides to make any move that places us in danger, I will not hesitate to take extreme measures.

C: 待大事尘埃落定，愿我们还能长谈一次，关于诸位的归程，还有天空的诅咒…是时候揭开禁忌，将这些议题摆上台面了。
E: When the dust settles, I hope that we'll have the chance to have a long chat regarding your return journey and the curse of the sky... It's about time that we lift the taboo and discuss things openly.

C: 这本书的作者名叫阿尔基皮亚，是周游过许多城邦的吟游诗人。
E: The author of this book is Archepia, a wandering bard who traveled to many cities.

C: 详细说说公民大会。
E: Tell me more about the citizens' assembly.

C: 对，人家也觉得很神奇！喂喂喂，一二三，喂喂喂，一二三……
E: Right? I think that it's amazing, too! Testing, testing, one, two, three. Testing, testing, one, two, three...

C: 因你…于穿过天界的一刻…<color=#dbc291ff>便已将生命丢弃</color>……
E: Because... from the moment you crossed the sky... <color=#dbc291ff>your life was cast away</color>...

C: …我已经…
E: ...I'm already...

C: 接下来，他会赴约前往树庭调查情况，而你应该和迷迷一起去找到遐蝶。
E: Next, he will go to the Grove to check out the situation, while you should be looking for Castorice with Mem.

C: 对不起，我应该早点察觉到的……
E: I'm sorry. I should have noticed that something was amiss earlier...

C: 我…似乎捕捉到了什么。阁下被剥离的灵魂，正在某处徘徊，找寻不到出路……
E: I... seem to have caught a glimpse of something. Your soul is currently roaming someplace and cannot find a way to escape...

C: 又回到这里了。
E: I'm back here again.

C: 灰黯之手，塞纳托斯？
E: Hand of Shadow, Thanatos?

C: 有趣的见解，可惜难以证明或证伪。毕竟自幻灭世以来，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}便不再言语。无论学者还是祭司，皆对尊神的陨落作出了宣言。
E: An intriguing concept, albeit challenging to substantiate. After all, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} has maintained a profound silence ever since the Era Erasa, while scholars and priests alike have conveyed the message of the gods' imminent fall.

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}，神话中天父的同袍，如今正寄居在我的脑子里。若由我来提问，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}想必没有拒绝的理由。
E: {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, the kin of the sky father as recounted in myths, now resides within my brain. Were I to inquire, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} would have no cause to refuse.

C: 不必自谦，阁下。在我看来，您的胆识和魄力不愧于七贤人之名，足以胜任我等蹈锋饮血的事业。
E: No need to be humble, my lord. From my perspective, your courage and gumption are worthy of the reputation of the Seven Sages. Your bravery is more than adequate to accomplish our perilous endeavor.

C: 就延续方才的话题，让我们聊聊那位共同的敌人，阿格莱雅吧。
E: Continuing from the earlier topic, let us discuss our common enemy: Aglaea.

C: 在下一次公民大会上，那位{RUBY_B#遐蝶}与死亡如影随形的少女{RUBY_E#}也会站在我们这边。
E: At the next citizens' assembly, {RUBY_B#Castorice}that young lady who is synonymous with death{RUBY_E#} will also be standing on our side.

C: 当…当然…吾只是……
E: O—Of course... I'm just...

C: 否则…吾，大名鼎鼎的七贤人，卡吕普索…与那「曳石学派」的野蛮人，又有何区别…？
E: I... I am Calypso of the eminent Seven Sages, after all... Training would make me no different from those Helkolithist barbarians...!

C: …我不会做到那份上。
E: ...I'm not going to punish her for that.

C: 您猜怎么着？还真是。或者说，这是我业务的一部分。
E: You know, you're not wrong. At least it's a part of my responsibilities.

C: 他们本该顺着冥河，去往西风的尽头才对…如今却搁浅在了冥流的浅滩上，徘徊不前。
E: They're supposed to reach the end of the west wind by floating down the River of Souls... Yet they have floundered upon the shoals of the stream, unable to move forward.

C: 你也死了吗？
E: Are you dead too?

C: 好大——好空旷呀！这是王国的宝库吗？
E: Wow... This place is so spacious! Is this the kingdom's vault?

C: 至于真假…就没人知道了。
E: As for whether this rumor is true... Well, no one knows.

C: 我不想贸然否认你的理论。不过…不妨听我为你讲述一个故事。
E: I won't refute your beliefs for now, but would you be interested in listening to a story of mine?

C: 又是亡语蝶…我们离冥界越来越近了吗？
E: It's yet another Eulogistic Butterfly... Are we getting closer to the nether realm?

C: {RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}在上，感谢你的善举……
E: By {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} above, thank you for your kindness...

C: 嗯！大家，说得对。缇安早就知道，自己回不到大家身边啦。
E: Yup! You're right. Trianne already knows that she'll not be able to return to everyone's side.

C: 嗯，真是……
E: Mmm... Seriously...

C: 当然。现在…也只差最后一步了。
E: Yes. Just... one last step.

C: 真是不近人情哪。依吾看，汝妄自尊大的程度也不遑多让呢。
E: Such harsh words. As I see it, you are no less arrogant than they are.

C: 但也正因如此，吾才会选中了你，不是么？
E: Well that is exactly why I chose you.

C: …坐下。
E: ...Sit down.

C: 正是。他是天生的英雄，洞悉人心的能力甚至远胜于你。我能断言：他比你更胜任领袖，也只有他能完成你们的使命……
E: Yes. He was born to be a hero. He understands the hearts of the people, and I can confidently say he is a far better leader than you. Only he is capable of fulfilling your mission.

C: 别走，阁下。
E: Don't go.

C: 这位女士…似乎乐在其中。她经常这样吗？
E: This lady... seems to be having fun. Is she usually like this?

C: 哼，有求于人的是星穹列车。就算手段不那么常规，你们也得忍着。
E: Hmph, the ones who need help are the Astral Express. You will have to put up with my methods, even if they are rather unconventional.

C: 您表现出的从容不迫，正是我应当学习的特质。
E: Your calm and collected nature is truly a trait that I should learn.

C: 但在我看来，只有正确的观点和错误的观点，二者不可共存。
E: Yet in my view, there are only right and wrong perspectives, neither of which can coexist with the other.

C: 它的身下…压着什么东西？卷轴么。
E: What's that underneath it...? A scroll?

C: 课题一：发现许多以寿命长著称的奇兽实际上生活在奇兽出生和死亡记录管理不善的地方，申请研究。回复：缺乏研究意义，暂不批准。
E: Topic 1: A discovery that many mythical beasts renowned for their longevity actually reside in areas with poorly managed birth and death records for such creatures. Permission to research. Reply: Lacks research significance, not approved.

C: 会是另有所用吗？
E: Could he have taken them for other purposes?

C: 人本不能死而复生，更何况是神明。
E: Humans cannot return from the dead. Neither can gods.

C: 对于元老院，愚弄多数人远比愚弄一个人容易得多。所谓的「更多支持」也只是代替长矛，成了权力分配的手段。
E: It is far easier for the Council of Elders to fool many than just fool one person. Their so-called "more support" is no more than a ruse to distribute power using words instead of lances.

C: 有这二位英雄在，我便可向诸位许诺「黄金世」的存在！
E: With the help of these two heroes, I can promise all of you that "Era Chrysea" will exist once more!

C: 不，还记得我说过什么吗？{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}的火种有元老院秘法管控，{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的水幕也足以隔断外界的感应——
E: Remember what I previously said? {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame is guarded by the secret power of the Council of Elders. Plus, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} water curtain will be able to block out any external perceptions.

C: 元老院议员们发出*群情激昂的欢呼声*。
E: The members of the Council of Elders are cheering in excitement.

C: 抱歉，各位。我知道你们有很多话想问，我绝不隐瞒。
E: My apologies, everyone. I know that you have many questions to ask me. I will answer them to the best of my knowledge.

C: …我来了。
E: ...I'm here.

C: 塞涅俄丝…像变了个人。
E: Seliose... was like a completely different person.

C: 这般义正词严地承认自身的懦弱…看来你已彻底抛弃了尊严。
E: To admit your weakness in such a righteous manner... it seems you have completely abandoned your dignity.

C: 但是，你看到了吗？现在，千年以后——由你开辟出的道路上，走出了许多闪闪发光的英雄——
E: But do you see it now? A thousand years later, the path you forged is now walked by many brilliant heroes.

C: 艾格勒是逐火之旅的第十一枚火种。而最后一枚刻法勒的火种，就被供奉在黎明云崖的议会中心。
E: Aquila is the eleventh Coreflame of the Flame-Chase Journey. The final Coreflame of Kephale is enshrined in the council hall at Dawncloud.

C: …这里还远谈不上安全！
E: ...We're not safe yet!

C: 该走为上计了！
E: Time to retreat!

C: 掌心里的火种…在颤动。它在向我发出警告……
E: The Coreflame in my hand... it's trembling. It's sending me a warning...

C: 大家，你们一定要顺利回到地上，完成黄金裔的使命。而我……
E: Everyone, you must return and fulfill the mission of Chrysos Heirs. As for me...

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦……」
E: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans..."

C: 「我们于此索求神性。」
E: "We seek your divinity."

C: ——无妨。残酷的逐火已经让我抛弃了幻想，未来不可能是一片沐浴着西风的理想乡，静候着我们踏入其中……
E: It doesn't matter. This cruel Flame-Chase Journey has made me abandon my fantasies. The future is not a paradise with a gentle west wind, waiting for us to step in...

C: 安提基色拉人已经没有可以归还的家乡，因而我能体会您对故友与家园的关切。
E: Antikytherans have no home to return to, so I understand your concern for your old friends and homeland.

C: 还好有哈托努斯这个翁法罗斯最一流的铁匠。
E: It's a good thing Chartonus is the finest blacksmith in Amphoreus.

C: 是女孩子的小秘密，就别追问啦。
E: A girl's little secret. Don't pry.

C: 你们本该老老实实呆在历史的积尘里。公民大会已再度为黄金裔的使命赋予了正当性，至于你们……
E: You should have stayed buried in the dust of history. The citizens' assembly has once again legitimized the mission of the Chrysos Heirs, but as for you...

C: 他们和平日子过惯了…早就忘了让黄金裔世代掌权，曾经酿出何等祸根！
E: People have become too accustomed to peace... and they've forgotten the disasters that arose from allowing generations of the Chrysos Heirs to rule!

C: 桀桀桀…交给我吧，大姐头！
E: Hehe... leave it to me, Boss!

C: 哦…这样啊？
E: Oh... is that so?

C: 可能还真被你说中了，我最近精神是有点紧绷，可得好好放松下哪…走吧，去下一处宝藏。
E: Maybe you're right. I have been a little on edge lately. I need to relax... Alright, let's move on to the next treasure trove.

C: 话说…我不在的时候，你都是靠什么法子寻宝的啊，大姐头？
E: Tell me... how did you hunt for treasure when I wasn't around, Boss Lady?

C: 将抹杀黄金裔作为使命的组织……
E: An organization that sees it as their mission to eradicate the Chrysos Heirs...

C: …传信石版？
E: ...My teleslate?

C: 你害怕那些落魄的野狗会趁你们离开的时候偷走火种——
E: You think those desperate dogs will try to snatch the Coreflame while you're gone —

C: 啊，我懂了。教授的言下之意，是在暗讽其他老师的课程都够不上格吧？
E: Ah, I see. So you're saying the lessons taught by all the other teachers aren't good enough to be considered lessons?

C: 言止于此。那么，下……
E: I have nothing left to say. Next-

C: 乖~说起来，丹宝又在这里找什么呢？
E: Good Ica~ Well, what brings you here, Dannie?

C: 我明白啦。那就拜托你了，丹宝！
E: Got it. I'm counting on you, Dannie!

C: 「灵水，揭露门扉吧——」
E: "Spirit water, reveal the way —"

C: 我的先祖们都是些强直的人物，想要说服他们并不容易。同他们见面的一幕幕，我已经在心中演练过无数次啦。
E: My ancestors were all pretty strong-willed people. It won't be easy convincing them. I've run through these upcoming conversations in my head more times than I can count.

C: 同意。
E: I agree.

C: 先祖啊，请给予您慷慨的赐福吧……
E: Ancestor, please bestow upon me your generous blessing...

C: 仔细聆听风堇与祖母的交谈。
E: Listen carefully to Hyacine talk with her grandmother.

C: 分辨率多少合适？
E: What's the appropriate resolution?

C: 搞定！这里人烟稀少，岁月的痕迹清晰可见呢。
E: Done! There haven't been many people for a while, so the traces of time are super obvious.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「回避乌云的追赶？」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Avoid the pursuit of dark clouds?"</color>

C: …自从坠入大地，传说已变成了这般样貌吗？
E: ...Has the legend changed so much since your people fell to the earth?

C: {RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}，艾格勒的夙敌。
E: {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}, Aquila's nemesis.

C: 看那边，那些像硬盘一样的巨大物体——
E: Look there, those massive objects that look like hard drives...

C: 我也记得，索拉比斯。
E: I remember too, Solabis.

C: 请你一定要仔细想想这件事呀。如果你所爱的「人」只是抽象的概念，而非具体的「人」…那样的话，即便在拯救了他们以后…你能获得的或许也只是失望。
E: Please take a moment to consider this. If your love for "humans" is merely an abstract notion rather than love for specific individuals, you may end up disappointed even after saving them.

C: 火种既然不在这里…那一定是她动了手脚。换句话说…她以自己的方式履行了职责。
E: If the Coreflame isn't here... that means she must have done something to it. In other words... she fulfilled her duty using her own means.

C: 我们相信你，白厄阁下！无论你做出什么选择……
E: We trust you, Lord Phainon! No matter what choice you make...

C: 哈托努斯！坚持住！
E: Chartonus! Hang in there!

C: 嗯…记忆的质料，留存于翁法罗斯的万物之间。哪怕是一砖一瓦，也保留有许多往世的痕迹。
E: Yes... the textures of memories are preserved within all things in Amphoreus. Even a single brick or tile holds countless traces of the past.

C: 带上火种，抓紧下山吧！
E: Take the Coreflame and let's hurry down the mountain!

C: 市集的人们…或许也在经受苦难。
E: The people in the market... must also be suffering.

C: 呵，原来如此。在我介入并抹去他渗透的痕迹前，{NICKNAME}阁下已经与我那位同胞相遇了啊。
E: Ah, I see. So you met my kindred spirit before I could erase his traces.

C: 请允许我重新自我介绍：我名为吕枯耳戈斯，过去是为奥赫玛元老院的名誉元老。身为「神礼观众」，我将见证并捍卫奥赫玛全体公民自由，直到最后一刻。
E: Allow me to reintroduce myself. I am Lycurgus, once an honored elder of the Okhema Council. As the Theoros, I have sworn to watch over and protect every citizen of Okhema until the very end.

C: 接此逻辑，答案便已明朗：对我而言，那位天才是同胞，亦是「兄弟」。
E: So you see, the answer is simple: that brilliant mind is my kindred, a "brother," if you will.

C: 世界将为您的奉献动容，开拓者。
E: The world will be moved by your sacrifice, Trailblazer.

C: 他是纯洁的孩童，向昨日、今日和明日的大道上走去——
E: He is the pure child, walking upon the path of yesterday, today, and tomorrow—

C: 就像古往今来，无数贤人向众神的发问。
E: As Sages across ages have asked the gods.

C: 是你…？
E: Is that you...?

C: 将它取走吧，孩子。我很抱歉，不得不用这种办法将你们召唤至此。
E: Here, take it. I'm sorry I had to resort to such methods to bring you here.

C: 被骗了呀！嘻嘻，眼神和手脚都太慢了，你！
E: Gotcha! You'll have to be quicker than that!

C: …咦，这次没有神谕牌里的回音了吗？
E: What? No divine whispers this time?

C: 哟！救世小子来啦？
E: Well, well, if it isn't our little Deliverer!

C: 我的心愿是…找到生命里缺失的部分，感受与人拥抱的温度。那样的感觉，我已经体会过了，是我最为珍藏的回忆。至于平日里攒下的钱……
E: My one wish... is to find that missing piece in my life, to feel someone's embrace once more. That warmth... I've felt it before, and it's my dearest memory. And speaking of riches...

C: 但我相信…内心的声音……
E: But I believe... what my heart tells me...

C: 将两边的重量一起押上么？但别忘了，悬锋人和你们是死敌，沉溺于理想主义，只会让你惨死在敌军的矛下。
E: Placing us both on the same side of the scales? Foolish. We Kremnoans are your mortal enemies. Such weak idealism will only get you skewered on our spears.

C: 是啊，在男人的记忆中，如此情景曾反复上演。虽然略有出入，但万变不离其宗：{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>只有一人能活到最后，见证「再创世」</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹」……</color>{RUBY_E#}
E: Indeed! In his memories, such a scene replays over and over. Though the details may differ, this remains ever the same: {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Only one shall live till the end, and they alone will witness Era Nova</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>"All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle..."</color>{RUBY_E#}

C: 言尽于此。去吧，代我完成「再创世」。
E: Enough talk. Go, make the Era Nova happen in my stead.

C: 当然，我只是厌烦了被一条由神豢养的虫豸当成旗鼓相当的对手。
E: Of course not. But I am tired of being measured against a worm the gods keep as a pet.

C: 哪怕燃尽…世间万物……
E: Even if all creation... burns to ash...

C: 逐火…是不断失却的旅途……
E: Losses... are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey...

C: 就像你的名字那样，背负起最初的混沌，和这个我们深爱的世界吧……
E: Carry the primordial chaos, just as your name suggests, and bear this world we hold so dear...

C: 天哪，你甚至不愿意叫我一声「诡计」的半神！真是太让人伤心了。
E: Oh my, you won't even call me the demigod of "Trickery"? That is just heartbreaking.
...Yes.

C: 是啊…我再清楚不过了：不是蔑称的，只有第一次轮回而已。
E: Yeah... I know all too well: you only meant it sincerely in the first cycle.

C: 它理应照亮众人，照亮前路，照亮翁法罗斯终将到来的黎明……
E: It should shine upon all, light the path ahead, and illuminate the dawn of Amphoreus that's to come...

C: 第 <unbreak>4000001</unbreak> 次永劫回归 启程之际
E: The <unbreak>4,000,001</unbreak>st Eternal Recurrence: Time of Departure

C: 纵使神火已经如此炽烈，以至于…每次回归起点的瞬间，它便会顷刻将我烧尽……
E: Even though the divine fire burns so fiercely that, every time I return to the start, it devours me in an instant...

C: 不妨先展现下身手，让汹涌的黑潮为你停息？
E: Perhaps you should demonstrate your skills, and calm the raging black tide for us?

C: 即便无法得胜，我也必须…！
E: Even if I can't win, I must try...!

C: 以「负世」之名，我向你保证：刻法勒永志不忘。
E: Then in the name of "Worldbearing," I promise you: Kephale will never forget this.

C: 还有下下个轮回，下下下个轮回，「我」会一直一直等着你。
E: And in the one after that, and the one after that... I will always, always be waiting.

C: 是你…？
E: Is that you...?

C: 不，不对…虽然你们和我认识的{NICKNAME}和丹恒很像，但是……
E: Wait a second... You might look like {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, but...

C: 人家也觉得不可思议。就像做了一场长长的梦，昔涟的记忆、迷迷的记忆，交织在一起…醒来后，只剩下零星片段。
E: It's pretty unbelievable for me too. It's like I had a long, long dream. Cyrene's memories... and Mem's memories... they're all tangled together. But when I woke up... there were only broken fragments left.

C: 在「昔涟」的记忆里，她总是一个人待在湖边，轻晃着秋千，像是在等候谁。
E: In Cyrene's memories, she always sits alone by the lake, gently swaying on the swing, like she's waiting for someone.

C: 等收拾完人家会给你看的。先进屋了，一会儿见？
E: I'll show it to you once I'm done, okay? I'll go inside. See you in a bit.

C: 相信命运的安排。
E: Believe in destiny's plans.

C: 小心，我们先静观其变。她…恐怕是在给我们下马威呢。
E: Careful. Let's wait and see what happens. She's probably trying to scare us.

C: 灰发、金眸、善使锤矛，于今日降临雅努萨波利斯，不会有错。
E: Gray hair, golden eyes, skilled in wielding a mace. They would arrive in Janusopolis on this day. There's no mistake.

C: 乌合之众而已，不必理会。就算{RUBY_B#「大地」的半神}荒笛{RUBY_E#}已亲身弥合了分裂的大地，他们也能找到千百种借口寻衅。
E: They are merely a disorderly mob and do not warrant any attention. Even though {RUBY_B#demigod of Earth}Terravox{RUBY_E#} personally mended the fractured earth, it still didn't silence these fools.

C: 凯撒治下的奥赫玛…完全走出了战火的阴影呢。
E: Okhema under the Imperator's rule... is no longer in the shadow of war.

C: 嗯？那如果……
E: Hmm? But what if...

C: 星神存在，这是事实。
E: Aeons exist. That's a fact.

C: 哈…哈哈哈！
E: Ha... Hahahaha!

C: 以本狮坚硬的鬃毛起誓：绝无此事！不过，如果诸君想平息这道恐怖的要闻，不妨用更劲爆的话题来……
E: I swear on my stone mane, I would never do such a thing! But if you wish to quell this terrifying news, perhaps a more explosive topic would help...

C: 不用啦。只是这宴会太过吵闹，有趣的人和事又太少，有些待不住罢了。
E: No need for that. This banquet is just too loud, and nothing and no one here is interesting. I just don't really want to be here.

C: 感谢二位英勇献身，我该解开幻境了。这是凯撒出征前的最后一次致辞，大抵也是令她回心转意的唯一机会。
E: Thank you for your bravery, guests. It's time for me to dispel the fantasia. This will be the Imperator's last public address before we head off and, therefore, likely the final chance to change her mind.

C: 别忘了，我的王朝只允许「人」的存在……
E: Don't forget. My realm only allows for the existence of "humanity."

C: 头好晕，果汁也会醉吗？
E: My head's so dizzy. Can you even get drunk on fruit juice?

C: 请来这里，与我共享海底的奇珍吧。
E: Please come over and share the delicacies of the deep sea with me.

C: 当然啦。你看我现在——活蹦乱跳的，好得很呢。
E: I'm all good. Look at how fit and active I am!

C: 而且，万一你们的计划没成功，那个叫铁墓的大反派不小心跑了出来，整个银河就都要遭殃啦。
E: Also, if your plan fails and the big bad Irontomb manages to get out, then the whole cosmos will be in danger.

C: 欢迎回来，{NICKNAME}。
E: Welcome back, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「再创世」一定会到来，令翁法罗斯坠入「毁灭」。
E: "Era Nova" will come, and Amphoreus will fall into the Destruction.

C: 以及，赛飞儿，*我们*希望你尽快去一趟悬锋城。不管用什么方法，一定要和「纷争」结成同盟。
E: And Cipher, we need you to head to Castrum Kremnos as soon as possible. By any means necessary, forge an alliance with Strife.

C: 毕竟，这段旅途最初的星星之火，就是你和{NICKNAME}带来的呀。
E: After all, it was you and {NICKNAME} who lit the first spark of this journey, wasn't it?

C: 我绝不会辜负大家的信念。
E: I won't let everyone's faith in me go to waste.

C: 也只有这样，人家才能把最后一次逐火之旅，完完整整地放进「救世主」心里。
E: And the only way I can safely entrust the completed final Flame-Chase Journey to the Deliverer's heart.

C: 前进吧，救世主。
E: Go forth, Deliverer.

C: 我猜你现在没多少时间听那些难懂的原理，那就归结成几句任谁都能听懂的人话吧——
E: My guess is you don't have much time to listen to all those complicated principles right now, so let me break it down into simple terms that anyone can understand...

C: 现在，我等到了我的解脱者——若想彻底战胜我，拯救这个本与你无关的世界，就必须唤醒此处的歌者，打开名为创世涡心的囚笼……
E: And now, my deliverer has come. To defeat me and save this world that never owed you anything, you'll need to awaken the singer here and unseal the prison called Vortex of Genesis...

C: 现在，为征服星海举杯吧！
E: Now, raise your cups! To our conquest among the sea of stars!

C: 你必须先找到那沉醉的典狱长。
E: You must find the prison warden lost in her stupor.

C: 你再次倾倒圣杯，石碑沐浴蜜酿，如半神沐浴金血，承载命运的洗练。
E: You tip the chalice once more, the honey brew bathing the stone like golden blood upon a demigod, forging destiny through its purifying flow.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>祂以「智识」为名，却试图定义「已知」，封锁「可能」。在祂之后，不再有新的法则诞生，人类被永远囚禁于「星神」的洞穴之中。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>THEY bore the name of the Erudition, yet THEY tried to define "the known" and to seal off all "possibilities." No new rules were ever born after THEIR ascension, and humanity will forever be shackled within the cave known as "Aeons."</color>

C: 你的命途性质很特殊，绝不会只是「忆灵」这么简单。但有一件事我可以确定——
E: The Path characteristic you exhibit is very special. There's no way you're just a simple "memosprite." However, I'm sure about one thing...

C: 现在，它不会再拘束你了。今后的无数个日夜，你尽可为自己操办一场又一场盛大的宴会……
E: That duty will bind you no more. You will be able to hold for yourself one grandiose feast after another in the endless days to come.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「汝将于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"You shall complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides..."</color>

C: 来世…我必将归来…让群星听到军团的战鼓…听到凯撒的威名……
E: I will return... in the next cycle... The stars will hear my legion's war drums... hear... the great name of... the Imperator...

C: 「自你走出被污染的海洋，投入我的麾下，我便窥见你眼眸中的深渊，你内心的空洞。」
E: "Ever since you walked out of the tainted ocean and pledged yourself to me, I have seen the abyss in your eyes and the emptiness in your heart."

C: 第一次听说那里的故事时…嘻，我可是惊讶到说不出话来。
E: The first time I heard about that place, I... Ahaha, I didn't even know what to think.

C: 看来，你还没做好最坏的打算呀。
E: It looks like you still aren't prepared for the worst, hmm.

C: 神权并不重要。重要的是，我要以此介入世界的运转。
E: The divine authority isn't actually all that important. What's important is that I will use it to participate in the inner workings of this world.

C: （但现在，那种微妙的气息蔓延到了每个角落。）
E: (But now that oddness has spread to every corner of the train.)

C: 作为交易的一环，介意我与二位分享吗？
E: As part of the deal, do you mind if I share them with you?

C: 流光忆庭，在暗中打捞<color=#dbc291ff>「命途消失的记忆」。</color>
E: The Garden of Recollection is secretly salvaging the <color=#dbc291ff>memories of a Path disappearing</color>.

C: 如果那时是三月的加护帮助我们穿过了防火墙……
E: If it was March who helped us get past the firewall initially...

C: 而我——是忆庭的敌人，我从不掩饰。
E: I am the Garden's enemy. I have never denied that fact.

C: 一如既往，我会把这本书念给你听。
E: As always, I'll read this book to you.

C: 是《如我所书》？
E: Is it As I've Written?

C: 原来如此， 这本《如我所书》……
E: I see. This As I've Written book...

C: 也对，这么理解更直观。
E: Right. That's a more direct way to think about it.

C: 这座大墓应该与「赞达尔」无关。
E: "Zandar" likely has nothing to do with this tomb.

C: 该回去了，启动大墓中央的系统。
E: It's time to go back and activate the system in the middle of the great tomb.

C: 这座大墓，就是「记忆」的种子…
E: This great tomb is the seed of Remembrance...

C: 「负世」…这柄神权是如此沉重，我不知道该如何述说才好。
E: Worldbearing... This divine authority is so heavy that I do not know how I can even tell its story.

C: 因为此行的终点是群星，我相信，前方的风景足以将昨天照亮。
E: That's because my journey's destination lies among the stars. I believe what lies ahead will be bright enough to illuminate my past.

C: 你保护了我们，三月。
E: You protected us, March.

C: （哈…神清气爽。）
E: (Ah~ I'm wide awake and feeling great!)

C: 没准备好吗？要不喝杯特调咖啡，平复下心情？大家的评价都很不错。
E: Not feeling ready yet? How about a cup of my special coffee blend to calm your nerves? Everyone says great things about it.

C: 「别被…迷惑……」
E: "Don't... fall for it..."

C: 这是合理的推断。
E: That's a reasonable conclusion.

C: 压力涌上来了……
E: The pressure's really starting to build...

C: 在那之前，告诉我：你和「长夜月」做了什么交易，伟大的「开山者」为何会沦为这副模样？
E: Before that, tell me, what kind of deal did you make with Evernight? How was the great Mountainbreaker reduced to this?

C: 所幸……
E: Fortunately...

C: 抛却遍体鳞伤的龙蜕，才算是迎来了新生……
E: A dragon can only welcome new life by shedding away his old, scarred skin...

C: 「长夜月」在{F#她}{M#他}身边么？
E: Is "Evernight" with {M#him?}{F#her?}

C: 这里的小生灵，本大爷自会把它们带到安全的地方！至于你，就只要负责把贼灵大人的英勇事迹传颂下去就行了！
E: I'll take these little critters here somewhere safe. As for you... just make sure the brave tale of the Great Bartholos spreads far and wide!

C: 丹恒，我知道…你会回来的。
E: Dan Heng, I knew... you would come back.

C: 去照亮那无光的「长夜」。
E: Go forth and illuminate the lightless "Evernight."

E: "The maze of the Remembrance is starting to change. I cannot remain your guide on your path forward."

C: 阁下的敌意，在我计算之中。

C: 当然。
E: Deal.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>这意味着——博识尊计算中的「时刻」，正在向这个世界逼近。</color>

C: 瞧，这要是天舶司的买卖，不是赚得盆满钵满么？
E: Look, if this were a Sky-Faring Commission deal, we'd be rolling in money, wouldn't we?

C: {NICKNAME}他们，成功了吗？
E: Did {NICKNAME} and the others make it?

C: 这声音，果然是{NICKNAME}。
E: That voice is definitely {NICKNAME}.

E: This heat is brutal! Not even the Trailblaze can take it...

C: 拨动琴弦。
E: Pluck the strings.

C: 没有律法，没有对垒，惟有一头行将消亡的困兽，和同仇敌忾的「逐火精神」——
E: No laws. No opposition. Just a dying beast and the "Flame-Chase Spirit" of shared hatred—

E: Compared to me, those twelve glowing, unrefined stones...

C: 然后，是漫漫苦旅的开始。
E: And so begins a long and arduous journey.

C: 你知道该怎么做，搭档。
E: You know what to do, partner.

Blame▀▄█Ignorance▀▄█Fall into▄█▀Foolishness▀▄▄·

C: 银河不需要第三位帝皇，更遑论赝造的僭主。
E: The cosmos does not need a third emperor, much less an artificial tyrant.

C: 你还在等什么，{NICKNAME}乘客？
E: What are you waiting for, passenger {NICKNAME}?

E: Let me tell you a story. Back when he was a student, Zandar's first experiment was slipping poison into his mentor's pipe, just to see how it would affect the lungs.

C: 不合理的遗愿，我不会帮你实现。
E: A foolish last wish. I won't grant it.

C: 再说了，我之所以说它们宝贵，是因为它们背后都承载着你「开拓」的足迹呀。
E: Besides, the reason I say they're precious is that each one carries the footprints of your "trailblazing" journey.

C: 合着你也知道啊。
E: So you knew all along, huh.

C: 有意思，妄图以奉承的手段来动摇我的立场么？
E: Interesting... Trying to sway my position with flattery, are you?

C: 别着急，她总会在恰当的时刻出现。
E: Don't worry. She always shows up at just the right moment.

C: 不过，作为亲历者，我们还是可以给这个故事添上最后的几笔，对吧？
E: But as people who lived through it, we can still add the final touches to this story, right?

C: 所以，你们的课程可远没结束。不过，暂时休憩一下也未尝不可。
E: So, your lessons are far from over. But taking a little break for now wouldn't hurt.

C: 朗朗上口，孩子们肯定会喜欢这条寄语呢。
E: It's so catchy. The kids will definitely love this message.

C: 在想什么，赛飞儿小姐？
E: What's on your mind, Miss Cipher?

C: 啊，我可是第一个被卷进去的！这么说来，我要变成星穹列车的大姐大啦？
E: Hey, I was the first one to get dragged into it! Does that mean I'm gonna be the oldest member of the Astral Express now?

C: 我肯定更相信{F#她}{M#他}，还有身为「人」的自己。
E: I believe in {M#him}{F#her} much more than I believe in THEM. And I believe in who I am, as a "human."

C: 人家一度怀疑，祂是不怀好意的坏人呢！
E: Back then, I wondered if THEY might be someone with ill intent!

C: 回望的终点，「∞」最后的缺口……
E: The end of this journey back. The final gap in ∞...

C: 播下因果的涟漪——
E: Let the ripples of causality spread...

C: 钉下楔子后，等待我们的…是三千万世的再次相遇。
E: Once the anchor is placed, what awaits us... is thirty million lifetimes of reunion.

C: 嘻、拉、嗦、发、咪、唻、哆~
E: Ti, la, sol, fa, mi, re, do~

C: 一，加上八，再加上十三，得出的数字是两个「十一」。
E: One, plus eight, plus thirteen, equals two "elevens."

C: <unbreak>432</unbreak>；<unbreak>252</unbreak>；<unbreak>496</unbreak>；<unbreak>720</unbreak>……
E: <unbreak>432</unbreak>. <unbreak>252</unbreak>. <unbreak>496</unbreak>. <unbreak>720</unbreak>...

C: 通过…可以…？
E: Can... pass...?

C: 保存
E: Save

C: 昔涟是，每一句最后的，一直咯咯笑的，像是小尾巴的♪
E: Cyrene is, at the end of every sentence, always laughing, like a little tail ♪

C: 「而『哀怜』是最接近这一行为的因子。或者，这就是她被选中的原因。」
E: "'Lament' was the factor closest to this form of behavior. Perhaps that was why she was chosen."

E: But maybe... in these unchanging retellings of the story... my "lament" might be able to touch upon the divine and reach THEIR tender heart at some point.

C: 在你写下的故事里，也许不可避免，仍有悲伤和注定落下的眼泪。
E: In the stories you will write, perhaps it'll be inevitable that there are still sorrows and tears that are destined to fall.

C: 你也是这么想的，对吧♪
E: You think so too, right? ♪

C: 也许…我只是一阵微不足道的涟漪，终将被「毁灭」吞没，什么也无法改变。
E: Or maybe... I prove to be nothing more than a weak ripple, unable to change anything, and am devoured by the Destruction.

C: 请稍等。
E: Just a moment, please.

C: （「智识」的宠儿，人们口中的天才……）
E: (The cherished children of the Erudition, the geniuses lauded by all...)

C: 你笑什么？
E: What are you laughing at?

C: 战略投资部在抗灾一事上付出的辛劳，寰宇有目共睹。
E: Your department's contributions during the crisis did not go unnoticed.

C: 哈哈哈，符卿莫气。这可是成为将军的必经之路啊。
E: Hahaha, no need to be upset, Master Diviner. Cryptic talk comes with the territory of being a general.

C: 「反物质军团」干的，它们在两个系统时前全面入侵了空间站。
E: No, the Antimatter Legion did it. They completely invaded the space station two system hours ago.

C: 既然被星神「{RUBY_B#纳努克}毁灭{RUBY_E#}」盯上了，这座空间站的寿命也快到头了。
E: I guess this space station is about to meet its doom now that it's become a target of the Aeon of {RUBY_B#Nanook}Destruction{RUBY_E#}.

C: 好啦好啦，你把它丢哪去了，银狼？
E: *sigh* Yeah, yeah. Where did you send it, Silver Wolf?

C: 艾利欧说过，这个选择会改变很多东西……
E: Elio said this decision will bring about lots of changes...

C: 我有办法辨明。
E: I might have a way to solve this.

C: 你是列车的人吧？那卖你个人情，一并写上！
E: Hey, you're one of the Express folk, right? I'll do you a favor and add its damages to the books!

C: 对呀，虽然只磕了个角，那也是磕了。反正都是「公司」报销，咱也不跟他们客气。
E: Yes, even though it only got bumped slightly in the corner, it still counts as damage. In any case, IPC will reimburse us for everything, so there's no need to be coy about it.

C: 的确是个恶棍…
E: What a scoundrel...

C: 相反，每次听到他在外面「为非作歹」的消息，我都真心替他感到高兴。
E: On the contrary, whenever I hear about what kind of trouble he's making outside, I really do feel happy for him.

C: 毕竟我不知道过去这么多个琥珀纪后，来到这里的你到底是谁。
E: After all, I don't know who'd be looking for my treasure after so many Amber Eras.

C: 一切唯姬子马首是瞻。
E: As always, your guidance is wise.

C: （感觉她好像…并不意外？）
E: (It feels like she's... not surprised?)

C: 哦，你别误会，我说的不是纸质信件。自从莱斯莉走后，我们一直断断续续地通过银河电波中继器联系。
E: Oh, don't get me wrong. I was not talking about paper letters. Ever since Lesley left, we've been communicating on and off through the Cosmic Airwave Repeater.

C: <unbreak>40</unbreak>月<unbreak>-43</unbreak>月
E: <unbreak>2157</unbreak> AE, Months <unbreak>40</unbreak>–<unbreak>43</unbreak>

C: 主控舱段轮岗亭。
E: Master control zone shift station.

C: 所以，指望她回来是不现实了。就算她行进数月，跨越光年，在我的时间坐标里，我已经成了老头一个。
E: I guess it's unrealistic to hope that she will come back. Even if she travels for months and crosses light-years, I will have become an old man in my time.

C: 这样的想法很有魄力，可惜…大部分时候总是事与愿违。

C: 其中还涉及许多其他机密概念，比如什么奇物再收容小队，安全区划立，「星际和平公司」定损之类的……
E: It also involves many other confidential initiatives, such as the Curio Collection Squad, security zoning, and the Interastral Peace Corporation's damage assessment.

C: 失踪？这事我能办。
E: Missing? I can help with this.

C: 逃逸奇物目前都有队员负责，<color=#dbc291ff>「异星水魈」</color>交给我来烦恼，寻找<color=#dbc291ff>亚伯拉罕</color>只能靠你了。
E: Right now, all squad members are busy searching for missing Curios. And I'll also have to handle the whole <color=#dbc291ff>Xenohydro</color> situation. So it's all up to you to find <color=#dbc291ff>Abraham</color>.
What's the matter?

C: 看你很急的样子…算了，反正和我们科室无关。你们的事，你们自己解决。
E: You look like you're in a rush... Whatever. Our department isn't involved. You can deal with your own problems.

C: 没错，聪明人也许已经猜到了其中的秘密……
E: Yes, a smart person may have guessed by now...

C: 打起精神来，就让一切回到原点吧。
E: Cheer up and let everything go back to the way it was.

C: 用自己的眼睛，去经历他人的人生，这就是录像的魅力。
E: Experience other people's lives with your very own eyes. That is the charm of those videos.

C: 呃、那个，不是…是…啊抱歉，我、我，我是有顺着你说的那个方向去找，不过方向可能有点偏了…
E: Uhhh, well, no, that's not the case... Um, sorry, I—I did try to look up what you mentioned, but I might've gone off track halfway...

C: （感觉他好像有臆想症…难道，是被模因病毒感染了？）
E: (He's such a paranoid... Is he infected with the memetic virus?)

C: 检验报告结果已经出了，交由终端机发送到你的桌面上了，请启动审核流程。
E: The test results are out. I've sent them to you through the terminal. You may start the review process.

C: 还有二十分钟，二十分钟内我要见到药物实验审批的结果。
E: <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes left. I need to see the result of the drug test in <unbreak>20</unbreak> minutes.

C: 因为我有科学验证过的检验数据。
E: Because I have test results that have been scientifically verified.

C: 因为终端机记录了每个数据设备使用者——也就是空间站上上下下所有人的使用记录，因此我也好，其他工作人员也好，都不方便去查。
E: Simply put, anyone using any data gadget, which basically includes everyone on the space station, would have their user behaviors recorded by the terminal. It is thus inappropriate for me or any other staff member to check such information.

C: 呃，维修期间，偶尔坏一下也挺常见的。
E: Well, it sometimes breaks down during maintenance.

C: 那是…卡波特教授？你确定阿兰来过这里？
E: That's... Professor Capote? Are you sure Arlan was here, Peppy?

C: 中央空调？
E: Casanova?

C: 啊——波少心里有我！
E: Ah! Master Capote thinks about me!

C: 所谓危机，所谓灾难，不过都是现实物欲世界的虚影！然而人类的品格，人类的誓言与约定，才是最最珍贵，最最值得保留的东西！
E: Crises, disasters... these are just mirages of the material plane! A person's character and the vows of humankind are most precious — they must be protected at all costs!

C: 不过我卡波特不会放弃每一个人，哪怕我多费点口舌，也会把道理给你讲明白的！
E: But I, Capote, will never give up on anyone. Even if I have to talk through the day and into the night, I will make you understand!

C: （妙语连珠夸赞卡波特的品格）
E: (Spares no effort in praising Capote's character)

C: （录音？阿兰委托卡波特的过程被录下来了…？）
E: (Transcript? They've recorded Arlan's conversation with Capote...?)

C: 看样子，她们已经和你说了很多了。你应该也做出了深刻的内心反思吧。
E: They went through everything with you? I'm sure you reflected deeply on your actions.

C: 就这样。
E: That's all.

C: 哇，这么可爱的狗狗！…哇，你也来了。
E: *gasp* What a cute doggy! ...Oh, you're here too.

C: 这是最关键的证据！
E: Master Capote's Life Wiki version <unbreak>12.0</unbreak>!

C: 那帮小家伙，也不知道躲好点，接二连三被拍到，搞得现在风声这么紧。
E: Those pesky things just don't know how to hide themselves. They kept getting photographed one after another. And now, everyone's looking out for them.

C: 是、是吗…虽然很有道理，但你们这么说有什么根据吗？
E: I—Is that true? That makes sense, but do you have any evidence that this is the case?

C: 好，我不说你了…他们来了！噤声。
E: Okay, I'll stop... Here they come, shush!

C: 小家伙的威胁没用！
E: That thing's threat means nothing to us!

C: 按照呜呜伯的习性，或许这位荣仓终得罪了它们，它们才偷盗他的物品以施惩戒吧？
E: According to Wubbaboo's habits, maybe this Eikura Shuu offended them in some way, so they are taking revenge by confiscating his things?

C: 这么正式啊。
E: Don't worry about it.

C: 一滴水？我怎么觉得…这更像是一滴汗？
E: A drop of water? Why do I feel like... it's more like a drop a sweat?

C: 一个蓝色的水滴状物体。
E: A blue, teardrop-shaped object.

C: 差、差不多了吧，就剩几台压缩机了……
E: A—Almost... there are just a few compressors left...

C: 这，例行检查时我都没发现这条记录有问题，看到自己名字就下意识略过了…太狡猾了！
E: I—I never noticed that there was an issue with this record. I subconsciously glanced right past it when I saw my own name... She's so cunning!

C: 你，你听到了吗？我吓得一句话都不敢说啊！
E: D—Did you hear that? I was so scared I couldn't utter a single word!

C: 那恐怕不行，你忘了？艾利欧的下一个「剧本」里有我。
E: I probably won't be able to. I'm in Elio's next script, did you forget?

C: 是吗？可能是我太想见你，心急如焚吧！
E: Is that so? Maybe I just wanted to see you, so I got impatient!

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 哦…没关系，这事也不急。等你准备好了，随时和我说。
E: Oh... never mind then, it's not urgent. Come talk to me whenever you're ready.

C: …这就是你的办法？
E: That's all you could come up with?

C: 啊啊啊？银枝乘客要自己去？不行不行帕！那也太危险了！
E: Wh—What? Argenti wants to go by himself? No way! That's too dangerous!

C: 早就听闻拉帝奥先生是学会的翘楚，您愿意协助，是我们的荣幸。
E: I've long heard that you're one of the best researchers in the Guild, Dr. Ratio. We are honored to have your assistance.

C: （那个人的身份很重要，也许能把一切都串起来……）
E: (Identifying that person is crucial — it could be the key to making sense of everything)

C: 要我说，密卷科这上上下下的年轻人啊，论手脚麻利哪个也比不上你。
E: ...though I confess I did hear someone say you were the shining star of the Department of Insight.

C: （相信自己的记忆）
E: (Trust my own memory)

C: （黑塔确实没告诉我奇物的名字。我们当时在聊其他话题，她是顺带提起的……）
E: (Herta didn't mention the name of the Curio. We were talking about something else, and she just mentioned it in passing...)

C: 相信艾丝妲能妥善处理。
E: I believe Asta will deal with it properly.

C: 我们的口号是什么来着？第一，停止抱怨，调整心态，用美味的芝士流心止住负能量的传递。
E: What's our slogan again? One: Stop complaining, change your attitude, and use the delicious Molten Cheese Tart to stop the flow of negative energy.

C: 怜爱地开启异空间传送装置。
E: Tenderly activate the teleporter.

C: 幸好只是虚惊一场。不过会议是我最头疼的事物…看样子很难脱身，得在这里待上一段时间了。
E: Thankfully, it was just a minor scare. Still, meetings give me such a headache... It seems I'll have to stay put for a while.

C: {NICKNAME}，注意安全。如果你遇见实在解决不了的危险，就给个信号，我会不顾影响，亲自出面。
E: Stay vigilant, {NICKNAME}. Should you come across a threat you can't handle, just alert me. I'll come to your aid, no matter what.

C: （…这就是阮•梅口中的大麻烦？）
E: (...This is the "headache" Ruan Mei mentioned?)

C: 你还挺吓人的！
E: You're pretty scary!

C: 它似乎觉得自己的情绪感染力也十分天才。
E: It seems to believe that its emotional infectiousness is also quite genius.

C: 但那样的话，它对我们二人就都不是「无人之地」了。真是一道难题啊。
E: ...though I suppose it wouldn't be No Man's Land anymore... What a conundrum.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 怎么，没有印象了吗？
E: What, do you not remember them?

C: 姬子在小机器人的顶部轻轻按了一下，激活了小机器人。
E: Himeko lightly tapped the top of the little robot to activate it.

C: 与其说是「流放」，不如当做我请你帮个忙吧？
E: I think it's better to take this as me asking you for a favor than considering it "exile?"

C: 如今不比从前，大家对工作和生活的态度改变了。
E: Things are different now. People's attitudes towards work and life have changed.

C: 其实本来我想自己去买的，毕竟是送给一位重要的朋友。但最近的演出实在太多了，我每天都忙着排练，根本抽不出时间。
E: I wanted to go and buy them myself. They're for a dear friend, after all. But I've had so many performances lately that I've been too busy with rehearsals to do anything else.

C: 你不是演音乐剧的么？
E: I thought you did musicals?

C: 那就以歌剧院为背景吧，这是我们艺术梦想起航的地方。
E: Then let's use the theater as the background. This is where our artistic dreams took off.

C: 路线规划已生成，请在目的地附近与「尤利安」联系。
E: Route generation complete. Please proceed to the designated area and contact "Julian."

C: 我给他做过检查，还好身体没什么事。从目前的情况来看，应该是精神上受到了什么刺激。
E: I gave him a routine inspection. Fortunately, he seems completely healthy. From the looks of it, I'd say he was exposed to some kind of mental shock.

C: ——以您现在的年龄算，在同龄人中只有<unbreak>0.0003%</unbreak>的人拥有此类成就。所以，您并不是「没用的人」。相反，您是一位了不起的救援者。
E: — Calculating from your current age, only <unbreak>0.0003%</unbreak> of your peers have achieved this level of success. You are not "useless." In fact, you are a great emergency worker.

C: 说话间，空气突然变得凝重，你感觉到气温陡然降低。
E: As the words leave your lips, the air suddenly grows heavy and you feel the temperature drop around you.

C: 哟，这不是杜老板吗？
E: Oh, if it isn't Boss Du!

C: 而且他都这把年纪了，肯定不爱凑这个热闹啦……
E: At his age, he might not appreciate the extra... excitement.

C: 什么时候买的？
E: When did you buy it?

C: 虽然还谈不上宜居吧…但至少已经开始显出好转的迹象了，真替布洛妮娅跟希儿她们高兴。
E: I wouldn't call it liveable just yet, but things are looking up. I'm so happy for Bronya and Seele.

C: 这些外来者中就包括了一批「星际和平公司」的投资人。但他们在临走前做了一件大事——
E: Among those outsiders were several investors from the Interastral Peace Corporation. Before they departed, they did something noteworthy...

C: 要不干脆直接点，发消息问问她在哪吧？她看上去像是喜欢有话直说的类型。
E: We might as well just be direct and ask her where she is. She seems like the type of person who appreciates a straight approach.

C: 走吧，该进城了！
E: Come on, let's head into the city!

C: {NICKNAME}，等你们准备好了我们就出发。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's set off when you're ready.

C: 没想到又要战斗…
E: I didn't think we'd have to fight again...

C: 呃…计划赶不上变化嘛，谁能料到会发生这种事呢？
E: Nobody did, but it never hurts to be prepared!

C: 别这么见外嘛，布洛妮娅。你听着好像有点虚…没事吧？
E: That's what friends are for, Bronya! ...You don't sound like yourself. Is something wrong?

C: 我有投票权吗？
E: Do I have voting rights?

C: 而我眼前的这位「兰德」…也不遑多让。
E: Not to take away from the Supreme Guardian in front of me... Hehe, she's quite the inspiring leader as well.

C: …原来那帮黑衣人是这个身份！简直不敢相信，真相居然如此骇人！
E: ...So that's who they are. Huh, it's worse than I imagined.

C: 好复杂，好沉重…克拉拉不知道该怎么……
E: Uhh... That's complicated... I don't know what to say...

C: 要是人生的方向在这个时候就被定死了…呃，不行！光是想想我就心寒得打颤了！
E: ...just the thought of our lives being predestined from birth makes me shiver!

C: 我们把上下层区都跑了个遍，问了很多人的意见。最后的结果是…平票。
E: We talked to people in both the Overworld and Underworld. The final result was... a tie.

C: 她说会追随你的选择。
E: She's behind you, whatever you decide.

C: 行头越齐，德行越差…
E: The smarter the uniform, the looser the morals...

C: 既然是要收集民意，那肯定得兼顾上下层区居民的心情吧？
E: Alright, if we want to make an informed decision, we need to hear from both the Overworld and the Underworld, right?

C: 我现在不需要娜塔莎医生的帮助，让她省点心也省点药，去救助其他人吧。
E: I don't need Dr. Natasha's help now. Tell her to save her worries and medicine for other people.

C: 咳，算了，跟你说那么多干嘛？反正瓦赫医生已经不在了……
E: Ahem, forget it. Why am I telling you all this? Dr. Vache is dead, anyway...

C: 我是娜塔莎医生的朋友。
E: I'm a friend of Dr. Natasha.

C: 那个叫瓦赫的医生，简直就不是人…是披着大褂的恶魔！
E: That Dr. Vache wasn't human... he was a devil in a doctor's coat!

C: 必须有人站出来做正确的事。
E: Somebody has to do the right thing.

C: 我只是凑巧路过…
E: I'm just passing through.

C: …你早该料到「麻烦」会找上门来，从你决定昧着良心做假药生意的那天开始。
E: ...Selling fake medicine with false kindness. You should have expected trouble to find you sooner or later.

C: 我并不知道他还在铆钉镇留下了残余的试剂。刚听你说起时，我也有些震惊。
E: I didn't know he had leftover reagents in Rivet Town. I was shocked when you told me.

C: 都被你听到啦…其实卡波特先生安在我头上的那些罪名，我根本没有印象。
E: You heard it all... Although, I don't remember doing the things Mr. Capote accused me of.

C: 不不，「星域界种」就是这样一门非常严谨、优雅的学科，我只是如实传达出它的魅力。
E: No, astral ecology is a rigorous and beautiful discipline of knowledge. I am simply conveying its charm truthfully.

C: …这样等下去似乎不是办法……
E: We can't just wait here forever...

C: （可恶，似乎中了水魈的陷阱！）
E: (Darn it, I seem to have fallen for the Xenohydro's trap!)

C: 嗯，想把赌注押在第三方证人的判断之上……那拉明娜，就由你来定生死吧。
E: Yeah, let's see what the third-party witness says... Lamina, it's your call.

C: 大家别急，晚点听我解释…拉明娜，你是一点也不想要我给你的好处了是吧……
E: Everybody calm down, let me explain later... Lamina, you don't want the benefits I give you at all anymore, do you?

C: 这里没有危险，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不用担心。他说过，只要听她的话，任何坏事都不会发生。
E: It's plenty safe here, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. Don't worry about me! He said nothing bad can ever happen so long as I listen to him.

C: 可以吗？但这是我自己的事，不应该麻烦别人……
E: For real? That'd be great! But I shouldn't bother others with my own business...

C: 谢谢你，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。我就在这里等你。
E: Thank you {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I'll wait here for you.
Mmm...

C: 这可能就是静态美人吧…
E: This might be the so-called "Static Beauty."

C: 我会顺着左侧道路继续前进，在这期间就拜托你去右侧的锋线堡垒寻找线索了。
E: So, I'll pick the road on the left. In the meantime, please use the path on the right to go to the Frontline Fortress and look for clues there.

C: 你要是遇到裂界怪物怎么办？
E: What if you run into a Fragmentum monster?

C: 抱歉，现在没有那个心情…
E: Sorry, not right now...

C: 每年的这一天，爸妈都会送给我一束「初雪八落」，花的枝数等同于我来到这个家中的年限。
E: Each year on that day, my parents would give me a bouquet of First Snow. The number of stems represented how many years had passed since I joined the family.

C: 我明白了，要一束「初雪八落」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
E: Aww... First Snow, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...

C: …久等了，这是您要的花，请拿好。欢迎下次再来。
E: There you go, sorry for the wait. Hope to see you again soon!

C: 娜塔莎和养母紧紧地拥抱在一起……
E: Natasha and her adoptive mother share a warm embrace...

C: …咳，抱歉，老毛病犯了，我不是来给你上历史课的。不夸张地说，如果找不回「流星碎片」，综合馆开放的意义也就失去了一半。
E: ...Ahem, sorry, the tour guide in me gets a little carried away — I'm not here to give you a history lesson. Still, it's no exaggeration to say that if the Meteor Fragment isn't recovered, the museum will lose half of its significance.

C: 啊，言归正传。我们联络上了一个「地火」的探子，听说她掌握了些一手的情报。
E: ...Back to the investigation. We contacted an agent from Wildfire — apparently she has some first-hand intel.

C: 话说回来…博物馆的上一任经理前阵子刚刚离职，听说是去追逐自己的作家梦想了…你如果有兴趣的话，想不想来兼任一下经理的职位？
E: Oh, by the way... The museum's previous manager resigned recently to pursue his dream of becoming a writer... so, if you're interested, do you think you'd like to take up the post part-time?

C: 最开始我介绍你来兼职，只是想让你体验下这份工作的乐趣…没想到你能干得这么出色。
E: Y'know, I never guessed you'd become a pro at this job — I only wanted you to experience the fun of working here...

C: 你和人类相处得越来越好了。
E: You've gotten better at getting along with humans.

C: 这感觉也许怪异…但并不坏。
E: This possibility strikes me as peculiar... but not necessarily bad.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，还有佩拉姐姐，这次能帮到你们的忙——虽然只是巧合——克拉拉很开心。
E: I'm really happy that I got to help you and Miss Pela today, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}. Even if it was by accident.

C: 是什么呢？
E: So what is it?

C: 这叫什么话！所谓君子之交淡如水，大家都是有头有脸的人物，何必纠结这些琐碎杂事？
E: What a preposterous statement! You wouldn't understand — friendship between gentlemen is as pure as water. We are all dignified people, why bother with such trivial matters?

C: 这你都能记住？！
E: You can remember all of that!?

C: （糟了…只能随口编一个价钱了。希望不要太离谱……）
E: (Uh-oh. I'm just gonna have to make up an amount. Hope it's believable...)

C: 轻轻地推门而入。
E: Gently push open the door and enter.

C: 你，解决了星核危机的英雄，大守护者敬重的战友宾朋…要是只因为眼前小小的一道宾馆房门就让犯人溜走了，岂不令人耻笑？
E: Wouldn't it be a shame if you, the hero of the Stellaron crisis, the supreme guardian's respected comrade-in-arms, let the prisoner slip away... just because of a hotel door?

C: 唔…好像是不到<unbreak>60</unbreak>个。
E: Uhh... a little less than <unbreak>60</unbreak>.

C: 来，这些是给你的奖励，请一定收下！希望能在你后面的旅行中派上用场。
E: Here, these rewards are for you. I hope they come in handy on the journey ahead.

C: {NICKNAME}，您好！我和佩拉小姐又筛选了一批博物馆志愿导览员推荐信，终于发现了合适的人选……
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}! Pela and I have been screening prospective volunteer guides for the museum recently, and we've finally found the right candidate...

C: {NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，怎么连你也……
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, even you are chirping in...

C: 不过，这也侧面反映出克拉拉队员高强的能力！连失窃的展品都能找到，做志愿导览员肯定也不在话下！
E: Anyway, this case indirectly manifests your talent! Since you were able to help find the missing exhibits, I'm sure you will ace it as a volunteer guide!

C: ——开个玩笑，简历就拜托你掌掌眼啦。
E: Just kidding. Well, I'll entrust my resume to you then.

C: 当然了，该走的流程还是要走的…而且，我对你简历里的内容非常感兴趣。
E: But of course, we still have to go through the necessary steps... Besides, I'm really interested in what's on your resume.

C: 你先准备准备，希露瓦。至于{NICKNAME}——有什么事还没办的话先去吧，我们会等你的。
E: Please get ready for the interview, Serval. As for {NICKNAME}, you may get on with your things first. We'll be waiting for you.

C: 没事，我也不懂贝洛伯格文化。
E: Don't worry. I, too, know nothing about Belobogian culture.

C: …不，算了，你拿着吧。我说，你写。
E: Never mind, you keep the form for me and write down what I say verbatim.

C: ——虽然我估计多半是通过不了审核的……
E: ...Though I reckon it will still be unlikely for me to pass the background check...

C: 外星人，请带我去「星际和平家电」门店进行维修——
E: Beep, beep, beep... Alien, please take me to an Interastral Peace Appliances retail store to conduct repairs—

C: 这条路对吗？前面好像有路障。
E: Is this the right way? It looks like there's a roadblock up ahead.

C: 你们这些坏家伙！不准欺负老爹！
E: Go away, you brutes! Don't bully my daddy!

C: …你这就把自己撇得一干二净啦。
E: ...Well, passing the buck is one way to handle this.

C: 你们在外面解决矿区冲突的时候，怕事的流浪者们躲在避难所里。直到那个时候，我的探测器都还在身上。
E: When you were out resolving that big conflict in the mine, some of the more cautious vagrants like myself hid in the shelter. I still had my detector at that point.

C: 虎克过来是找老爹的「矿脉探测器」的。听说有人把老爹的宝贝给偷走了，是真的吗？
E: I'm here to find daddy's treasure, his vein detector! I heard that someone stole it, is that true?

C: 其实，我之前已经委婉地问过那几个嫌疑人了…但他们都声称自己没偷过东西。
E: Actually, we've already asked those four suspects about it... but they all claimed to not have stolen anything.

C: 虎克知道了，偷走老爹探测器的犯人就是你！
E: Hook figured it out, you're the one who stole daddy's detector!

C: 至于缺的矿具…哎，只能再加点钱找调休的矿工借了。也不知道现在谁在放假……
E: As for the missing third tool... Heck... I suppose I'll have to fork out a little extra money to rent it from the miners on leave. I don't even know who is on holiday right now...

C: 来人啊，跟我一起教训教训这小崽子！
E: Hey! Come on, guys, let's teach this brat a lesson!

C: 你这图是高仿的吧？
E: You sure this is not a fake?

C: 那对姐弟有危险，我们清理掉怪物再前进！
E: They need our help. We have to deal with these monsters first before advancing further.

C: 等等，先保持距离！这个敌人有些不对劲……
E: Wait, don't get too close! Something's not right...

C: 检查一下。
E: Have a check.

C: 是拟态雪蛞蝓。它会根据周围环境将自身重塑成与之接近的模样，以此伪装自己，非常可爱。
E: These are mimic snow slugs. They can change their appearance to match the external environment. They're really cute.

C: 那应该就是它蛊惑人心的伎俩了。还好你没遇到危险。
E: That must be the first step in their mind control process. You were lucky.

C: 为了安全着想，我们还是消灭它吧——裂界生物是贝洛伯格的敌人，不值得信任。
E: We should defeat it just to be safe. Fragmentum creatures are Belobog's enemies — they shouldn't be trusted.

C: …我明白了。但快门的声音和闪光灯很有可能会激怒它……
E: ...I understand, but the sound of the shutter and the camera bulb might send it into a frenzy...

C: 总算是拍到了……
E: Finally got a picture...

C: 不用紧张啦，佩拉。那个小家伙的习性就是如此——只要受到惊吓，它就会以一种奇妙的方式消失不见。
E: Don't worry, Pela... that's the nature of these little things. They disappear in a flash when they get scared.

C: 姐姐……
E: My sister...

C: 哼，管你是谁——居然敢从背后偷袭，我可不会放过你！
E: Hmph, I don't care how big you are. You dare sneak up on us from behind. This is it for you, pal!

C: 同款而已吧。
E: Just a coincidence. Lots of kids probably have this toy.

C: 是的，我是筑城者指定的继承人。将来，我会成为领导贝洛伯格的「守护者」。
E: Yes. I'm the successor chosen by the Architects. In the future, I will become the guardian who leads Belobog.

C: 喂——你说够了没有啊？
E: Hey! Are you done?

C: 好消息是，他愿意资助我们的冒险。你看，这把花园铲就是他给我的！
E: The good news is that he's willing to contribute to our adventure. Look, he gave me this gardening shovel!

C: 坏消息嘛，就是他要我们也帮他找一件宝贝…否则他就去找老巫婆告状！
E: The bad news is that he asked us to help him get some treasure... Otherwise, he'll tell the old witch about our plan!

C: 尤利安的老爹老妈以前就是在这附近做生意的。我们离开镇子的时候，他家有很多东西都没来得及带走。
E: Julian's parents used to own a business in this area. When we were all forced to leave the town, there were lots of things they didn't have time to take with them.

C: 告诉你吧，这罐玻璃珠对鼹鼠党来说，可是有非常重大的意义哦。
E: Let me tell you something, this jar of marbles means a lot to The Moles.

C: …咦，怎么是三个大人？尤利安上哪去了？
E: ...Huh? Grown-ups? Where's Julian?

C: 我可没料到会是这个反应…
E: I wasn't expecting this reaction...

C: 该怎么处置这个零件小偷…
E: How should we punish this parts thief then...?

C: 希儿，再带外来者朋友一程吧。
E: Seele, perhaps you can take our outsider friends the rest of the way.

C: 原来如此，鼹鼠党也是「地火」的……
E: So, The Moles are a part of Wildfire...

C: 真烦啊，快点结束吧。你们拿到一级认证没？没拿到就别来浪费时间了。
E: Ugh, let's get this over with. Did you get your first certification? If not then you're wasting your time.

C: 你伸手干嘛？是她，让她把手伸出来！
E: What are you doing? I meant her, give me your hand!

C: …嗯，克拉拉想明白了。
E: ...Mm. I understand now.

C: 帮助克拉拉修好了能源装置……
E: You help Clara repair the energy installation...

C: 把你的发言全挡回来了啊，这家伙……
E: He cut you off completely! This guy...

C: 呃…还真是只「手」啊……
E: So it's literally a helping hand?

C: 史瓦罗先生已经没法战斗了，请你们…请你们不要伤害他！
E: Mr. Svarog can't fight anymore! Please... Please don't hurt him!

C: 我们是为了自己，没那么无私。
E: We did it for us, it wasn't as selfless as you made out.

C: 再送一条人生经验：要干有风险的买卖，机智的商人都会有个备用计划——以及备用的备用计划。
E: Here's a slice of life experience for you: Resourceful businessmen never get into risky trading without a plan b... and a plan b for their plan b. Plan c, we call that.

C: 别再闯到裂界里去了。费斯曼先生听说了上次的事，专门来找我刨根问底了一番。
E: Don't go charging into the Fragmentum again. Mr. Fersman heard about what you did and came to me to find out what happened.

C: 所以…商品合同也被我弄丢了！
E: The catch is I... lost the contract!

C: 为什么拍卖行要把起拍价定得这么低啊？要是没人买，我不就亏了吗？
E: Why did the auction house set such a low opening bid? I'm bound to make a loss...

C: 虎克收下了，这样就有六百五十冬城盾用来参加拍卖啦！
E: Hook generously accepts the reward! We've got <unbreak>650</unbreak> shield for the auction!

C: 哼，休想！鼹鼠党才不是这样简单的组织！不过，我可以考虑考虑让你做我的副手……
E: Hmph, don't even think about it! We're not a simple organization! Still, I may consider making you my deputy...

C: 下层的有钱人还是挺多的。
E: There are quite a lot of rich people in the Underworld.

C: 啊…{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}，看那边——
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, take a look over there!

C: 这就是「齿狼」型的自动机兵了，不过…看上去也被进行了某种改造，大概又是个被遗弃的机械宠物……
E: This is an Automaton Direwolf, but it appears to have been modified. It's most likely another abandoned robot pet...
