C: 考虑到自动机兵仍有可能通过自身算力开发出情感模块，我对此类事件已有预案。
E: Given that automatons can still develop emotion modules using their own processing power, I have a backup plan in place.

C: 选择权在你。我就在此处等候。
E: It's all up to you. I'll be waiting for you right here.

C: 这…这是{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}的真实想法吗？
E: Do you truly believe that, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

C: 史瓦罗先生刚才提出的可能性…确实让克拉拉感到害怕。
E: Mr. Svarog's warnings about the potential risks do make me nervous.

C: 没错，它…就是帕斯卡。
E: Yes... he's Pascal.

C: 真不消停啊。前线的战况够吃紧的了，后方还出问题……
E: It never ends. Things are bad enough on the front line without things going south behind us...

C: 嗯…大概是个冰雪覆盖，冷到让人受不了的地方吧？做科研工作的人才没时间细想这些。
E: Hm... It's a place too cold to bear, covered in snow and ice. The guys doing the scientific research don't have time to worry about the surroundings.

C: 走，去问问那个铁卫，看他能不能让我们进去。
E: Come on, let's see if that guard over there will let us past.

C: 呃，怎么是你？不对……
E: Why are you here? This is strange...

C: 我…究竟该怎么办才好…？
E: What should I do...?

C: 「困住」？唔…我现在有点混乱，没法完全理解……
E: "Trapped"? Hmm... hah, I'm quite confused right now, and I can't really understand...

C: 对不起…对不起，我不该在这种情况下曝露自己！我知道你没有恶意，我愿意信任你——但斯捷潘先生说过…他说过……
E: Sorry... I'm sorry. I shouldn't risk my privacy like this! I know you mean no harm, and I do trust you — but Mr. Stefan said... he said...

C: 但不要被这支离破碎的表象迷惑，布洛妮娅。等到承诺兑现的那一天…这片废墟将成为新世界的温床。
E: Don't let its fragmented appearance fool you, Bronya. On the day the promise is fulfilled... these ruins will become the breeding ground of a new world.

C: 「存护」？「存护」何曾正视过人类一眼？那不过是筑城者自以为是的妄想而已。
E: The Preservation... Has the Preservation ever looked humanity in the eye? Nothing more than an arrogant delusion of the Architects.

C: …我们很清楚后果。
E: ...We know well the consequences.

C: 布洛妮娅！我不清楚你们之间到底发生了什么。就算你现场解释，我大概也听不懂那些玄乎的东西。但有两件事我清楚得很——
E: Bronya! I don't know what happened between you and them. Even if you explained it to me, I probably wouldn't understand all the crazy details. But there are two things I do know...

C: 可惜…可惜你看不到美好的世界了。你无法突破思想的桎梏…知道吗？你本该是…新世界的「母亲」。
E: Pity... Such a pity that you will never see that resplendent world... Unable to free yourself from the shackles of your mind... You know what? You were supposed to be... the mother of the new world.

C: 迎接你们的末日吧！
E: Behold, the end is upon you!

C: 在很多人眼里，母亲是一位优秀的守护者…如果要保存真相，就把那些错误、疯狂、邪恶与梦想保存在我的记忆中…让我来背负就好。
E: For many people, mother was an outstanding guardian... The whole truth will live on in my mind — all the mistakes, madness, evil, and dreams therein... I will be the one to carry that burden.

C: 谢谢你，陌生人……
E: Thank you, stranger...

C: （这算什么问题？总得拿点东西当任务奖励吧。）
E: (It shouldn't be a big deal. It's only reasonable to take home some rewards for finishing all these missions.)

C: 哦，对了，你对贝洛伯格的历史了解不深吧？有关「愚者」希莉儿的历史资料，你可以在这本宣传册里找到。拿去吧，就当是政务部送你的纪念品。
E: Mmm, that's right — do you know much about Belobog's history? You can find out more about Cyrille "the Fool" in this pamphlet. Take it as a souvenir from the Administrative Department.

C: 嗯？已经找到了呀，太好了。希望它能帮上你的忙。
E: Hmm? Already found it? That's great. Hope it can help you.

C: 您好，我是刚才找过您的天舶司测速员檀檀，我想问问在刚才的事故的情况。
E: Hello, I'm Tantan, Speed Tester from the Sky-Faring Commission. I contacted you earlier. I would like to ask you about the traffic incident.

C: 芦慧姑娘生气了不打紧，她总是很生气，只要对她和和气气的，不顶嘴，她就会自然消气了，俺已经习惯了。
E: It's okay if she's upset. She's always upset. But if you act nice with her and don't talk back at her, she will naturally cool down. I'm used to it.

C: 现在要先看哪一处机巧鸟的影像？
E: Which cycrane footage do you want to see first?

C: 选择不符合情景的路况照片。
E: Select the wrong photo evidence of the accident.

C: 哼，你如果不是药王莳者，便是曾见过魁首大人，受赐仙方。
E: Hmph! If you're not a Sanctus Medicus disciple, then you must have met the master primus and received her prescriptions.

C: 我知道「阴晴伞」在哪里…
E: I know where the Baroumbrella is...

C: 我把它「忧郁」的情绪权重设置得很高，它见着别人衣服上掉颗扣子都得嚎上半天。
E: I set its Gloomy setting very high, and it ended up wailing for half a day at the sight of a buttonhole missing a button.

C: 主人让我们俩来找你拿走你「灵感玉兆」。
E: Master asked the two of us to come and take your Inspo Jade Abacus.

C: 那你为何抛下我？
E: Then why did you leave me behind?

C: …怎么还有点小聪主人的风格。
E: ...Why does that sound like Master Cong's style.

C: 你没有押韵，我必须惩治你。但我念你还未把握情况，便再给你一次机会。
E: You did not rhyme with my line, and I must punish you for that. However, considering that you haven't got the swing of things, I'll give you another chance.

C: 湖上风光柳下亭。
E: Life is bitter or sweet.

C: 静斋，我喜欢你！
E: Jingzhai, I love you!

C: 你不喜欢小聪哪一点呢？
E: Why do you find Cong unattractive?

C: 这件事你得先听我说完，免得引起你的误会……
E: Let me finish before you say anything, otherwise you might misunderstand...

C: 对了，听说列车开去了罗浮仙舟。还真是巧合的缘分——嘿嘿，说到仙舟，最近我恋爱了，和仙舟的美丽狐仙小姐姐们相爱了！
E: Oh right, I hear that the Express went to the Xianzhou Luofu. What a coincidence... Heh heh, speaking of Xianzhou, I fell in love with a pretty foxian beauty in Xianzhou!

C: 你好，请问你找我有什么事情吗？
E: Good day, is there anything I can help you with?

C: 我只是一个路过的快递员。
E: I'm just a logistics specialist who is passing by.

C: 走吧，它动起来了。
E: Let's go, it's starting to move.

C: 对了，之前说好的<color=#dbc291ff>会员邀请链接</color>，我现在就帮你申请。
E: Oh yeah, I said I would give you a <color=#dbc291ff>membership invitation link</color>, I'll apply for you right now.

C: 原本我打算为了黛青小姐姐，变成文化学者的模样。但是艾丝妲代理站长认为我作为文化学者的涵养还不够，希望我仍然以材料科学的科员身份申请外驻。
E: Originally, I wanted to appear in front of Ms. Daiqing as a cultural scholar. But acting lead researcher Asta thought my cultural nuances were lacking and wanted me to apply for off-station transfer as a material science researcher.

C: 啊，这个反应…你们其中一个人就是，对吧？
E: Hm, your response suggests that one of you is the one I'm looking for, right?

C: 算是我求你了，不要让她被地衡司抓走了。
E: I'm begging you, please don't let her be taken away by the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 哎…你这外驻申请，我还得再考虑考虑。
E: Um... I may have to reconsider your off-station transfer application.

C: 我、我…因为我是她的经纪人。反倒是你们，黛青多次表达了希望粉丝不要做出过激的行为，比如跟踪之类的……你们根本就没有听进去是吧，我要注销你们会员资格！
E: Because... because I am her manager. And you might be interested to know that Daiqing has repeatedly expressed her wish that fans not engage in extreme behaviors such as, for example, stalking. Are you guys even listening? I'm going to cancel your memberships!

C: 我不是仙舟的地衡司，我不会「防止你上当」…我的目的是揭穿「美丽狐仙聊天」的真面目，确保科员登上仙舟有健康安全的工作生活。
E: I'm not a member of Xianzhou's Realm-Keeping Commission, so I'm not going to "prevent you from getting scammed." My goal is to uncover the true nature of the Foxian Beauty Chat and ensure that my fellow researchers have a healthy and safe working environment in Xianzhou.

C: 打从我攻读仙舟文明史专业开始，就一直向往着来罗浮仙舟亲眼瞧瞧那些著述里提到的胜景了。
E: Since I started studying the history of Xianzhou civilization, I have been longing to visit the famous sites on the Luofu mentioned in the books.

C: 我才发现咱俩都不是仙舟人…算了。
E: I just realized neither of us are from Xianzhou. Forget it.

C: 太好了，让我瞧瞧！
E: Fantastic! Let me have a look!

C: 真的一张也没有了！
E: There's no more left!

C: 天网恢恢，疏而不漏。他逃不了多久的。
E: You can't run from the long arm of the law. He won't get far.

C: 也不能说是关。持明族的风俗与仙舟人总有些不同。白露天赋异禀，又是要接掌持明的人选，族中把她看得紧一些也是常事。
E: Not imprisoned exactly... Vidyadhara customs are somewhat different from Xianzhou native customs. Miss Bailu has incredible talents and is next in line to rule over the Vidyadhara — it's normal that her people would want to keep a close eye on her.

C: 龙女大人？可算是找到你了。
E: The Dragon Lady? I finally found you.

C: 这个房间看上去是能够暂时隐藏住白露她们两人的。
E: This room seems to be able to hide them for a moment.

C: 可自从认识了梁沐，我突然觉得，登仙是件很可怕的事。就算不老不死，要是不认得他，不记得他，或者变成了他不认识的样子……
E: But since I met Liangmu, I've realized that these "saints" are horrible creatures. Even if I were to become immortal, to not recognize him, to forget him or become something that he doesn't recognize...

C: 一道身影伫立在此，遥望着远方的雕像，一言不发。
E: A figure is standing here, completely silent as it gazes at a statue in the distance.

C: {NICKNAME}是我的挚友，我邀请同行的见证人。视{F#她}{M#他}如我，开诚布公地说出你的要求。
E: {NICKNAME} is a close friend, I've invited {F#her}{M#him} along to bear witness. Please treat {F#her}{M#him} as you would me. Now, what was your request?

C: 另选贤能？持明族中意谁？
E: Another suitable candidate? Who does the Vidyadhara hope for?

C: 前生之过，今世切莫重蹈。告辞了。
E: Do not repeat the mistakes of a past life in this one. Farewell.

C: 白露小姐，你又逃出丹鼎司了！我都说了多少次了，丹鼎司的规矩是……
E: Miss Bailu, you fled the Alchemy Commission yet again! How many times have I told you, our rules state that—

C: …不对，这个声音我记得，是上一任丹士长，原来她…也已经蜕生了吗？
E: ...Wait, I remember that voice. That's the old chief alchemist. So she's... been reborn?

C: 多亏了丹恒和{NICKNAME}一路护送…你可要多多感谢他们。
E: Luckily, I had Dan Heng and {NICKNAME} to protect me all the way. If anyone's owed a thanks, it's them.

C: 怎么是帕姆？
E: Is that... Pom-Pom?

C: 恩公，您有什么需要，尽管开口。只要我们哥俩能办到的，一定给您办。
E: Know, sir, that if you ever need anything and it's within our power to help, you can count on us.

C: 我感觉这好像有点不太对…要不你再想想？
E: This doesn't seem right to me. Wanna try again?

C: 要告诉你们也行，付我五百镝。
E: I can tell you... if you pay me <unbreak>500</unbreak> strales.

C: 我们可是「饮茶会」的！
E: We're from the Tea Society!

C: 你就是看热闹不嫌事儿大是吧？
E: You're just here for the show!

C: 找到失事地点了…看来飞行士并不在里面。太好了。如果是在失事前逃了出去，那现在人应该还在附近。
E: We found it... looks like the pilot isn't inside. If they escaped before it came down, they should still be nearby.

C: 杨叔一副深有感触的样子。
E: Sounds like you understand the feeling, Mr. Yang.

C: 二位！请留步！
E: You two! Please wait!

C: 不如这样，我妈招待了各位上好的茶点，我也不能没什么表示。我带两位逛逛星槎海，尝尝罗浮本地最有名的小吃！
E: How about this? My mom thanked you guys with refreshments, so I should do the same! Let me take you around Starskiff Haven — we can try the most authentic snack on the Luofu!

C: 没关系，景元将军是个心胸宽广的人。我们为了一个年轻人的未来去叨扰他，他大概也不会怪罪。
E: Don't worry — General Jing Yuan is understanding. I'm sure a small visit won't trouble him — especially if it's about a young girl's future.

C: 呃…还是不要打扰她了……
E: Umm... let's leave her alone...

C: 辛苦两位撑持了，让我来助你们一臂之力！
E: You two have held out long enough — help is at hand!

C: （卡芙卡用言灵给他植入了暗示，他不记得那件事了。）
E: (Kafka used Spirit Whisper to implant suggestions into him. He doesn't remember anymore.)

C: …卡芙卡和刃还在仙舟？将军近乎明示放他们走了，可那是当时的事。没记错的话，仙舟只撤销了卡芙卡的通缉令，刃还是重犯……
E: ...Kafka and Blade are still on the Xianzhou? The general nearly released them outright, but that was then. If memory serves, the Xianzhou only revoked Kafka's arrest warrant. Blade is still a wanted criminal...

C: （这是「星核猎手」的刃，卡芙卡说他正被魔阴身所困。）
E: That's Blade. Kafka says he's Mara-struck.

C: （「我」的事情）
E: (Ask about myself)

C: （刃…他似乎认识丹恒，两人之间的关系很奇怪，也许我可以乘机从卡芙卡口中得知真相……）
E: (Blade... he seems to know Dan Heng. I don't understand the connection between them. Maybe I can learn the truth from Kafka...)

C: 卡芙卡就在后面，小心她的言灵！
E: Kafka is right here. Be careful of her Spirit Whisper ability!

C: 那可不，杨叔什么大风大浪没见过，这都小场面。
E: That's Mr. Yang — this is child's play for him. He's dealt with all kinds of dangers before.

C: 是重力发生了变化，这和跃迁的一瞬间身体感到沉重是一回事。
E: There was a gravitational shift. The same thing happens when we warp jump, only we feel heavier.

C: 我叫丹恒，旅行到此，正要和朋友会合。不劳姑娘费心，我自己出港就好。
E: My name is Dan Heng. I'm a traveler. I'm on my way to meet up with my friends. I appreciate the help, but I can leave the port on my own.

C: …你为什么——呃，我不问了。
E: ...What's that gotta... Ugh, I won't ask.

C: 只见杨叔挥挥手…
E: I'm sure Mr. Yang could clear them out...

C: 不如把信给丹恒乘客瞧瞧吧？眼下他应该待在{RUBY_B#资料室}老地方{RUBY_E#}帕。
E: Why don't you show Dan Heng the letter? You know {RUBY_B#Archives}where{RUBY_E#} to find him.

C: …不认识。既然将军不在，那我改日再来。
E: ...No. If the general isn't available, I'll come back another day.

C: 这名字对你来说陌生得像是一阵偶然掠过的轻风，唤不起任何情绪。但不知为何，耳畔却传来一阵声音。
E: This name is unfamiliar to you and elicits no feelings. However, a voice inexplicably rings in your ears.

C: 星核邪祟尚未除尽，当心。
E: Careful. There are still Stellaron spirits lurking around.

C: …代表命不久矣。
E: ...She won't live much longer.

C: 饮月…斩绝「倏忽」那一战，你还记得吗？
E: Imbibitor Lunae... Do you still remember the battle against Shuhu?

C: 很显然，我让他失望了。
E: Unfortunately, I'm going to disappoint them.

C: 我叫镜流。
E: Jingliu.

C: 我不想和云骑军同室操戈，不如这样——
E: *sigh* I was hoping to avoid a conflict with the Cloud Knights. How about this...

C: 出发吧。
E: (Let's get going...)

C: 这一路到底，不可有漏网之鱼。先到者为胜。
E: We go from here to the end of the path without leaving a speck of abomination behind us. The first one to the end wins.

C: 不成，无论她想对犯人做什么，都绝不能任她捷足先登。
E: No, no matter what she wants to do with the fugitive, she must not be allowed to get to him first.

C: 没想到啊，一来就被他们怀疑了…费了好大的力气才勉强让他们相信我是真心想加入药王秘传的……
E: They were suspicious of me as soon as I arrived... It took a lot of effort to make them believe I wanted to become a disciple...

C: 无妨。无论是追求力量还是追求长生，都是镌刻在人类基因中的本能。
E: Don't worry about it. The pursuit of power and immortality is ingrained in the fabric of human nature.

C: 那个…请问您有什么事吗……
E: Uh... C—Can I help you with anything...?

C: 不必担心，在下早就练出了过耳不忘的本领。
E: Don't worry, I've trained myself to remember everything I hear.

C: 这下我们又是十王司的人了，丹恒兄作何感想？
E: How does it feel, Master Dan Heng, to be a subject of the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 我、我这一走，毕业的事儿恐怕就没辙了。
E: I—I'm afraid that if I leave, I won't be able to graduate.

C: 送雪衣离开
E: Send Xueyi away

C: 太卜说，要提供与过去经历有关的东西？
E: The diviner said I need to provide something from my past experiences...

C: 没事啦，这是记忆空间。只要你在现实中没被它烫伤过，那在记忆中也自然不会为它所伤……
E: It's okay, this is a memory space. If something hasn't injured you in reality, then it cannot injure you in memory...

C: 你看，我和老歌德都选择了面向未来，而不是死守过去的回忆。你也该这么做的，三月姐。
E: You see, Old Goethe and I chose to face the future instead of clinging to memories of the past... you should do the same, March.

C: 贝洛伯格有一句古话，叫做「吃得苦中苦，方为人上人。」
E: There's an old saying in Belobog: "Blessed is he who can eat the bitterest of the bitter."

C: 唉…我也觉得奇怪，但走一步算一步吧！
E: It sure is... *sigh* Let's press on and see what awaits.

C: 不必回答，不必歉疚。那只是试图阻碍你的一个幻影。
E: An answer is not required. She is merely a mirage hindering your progress.

C: 可那柄弓…不是姬子姐给我打造的吗？你的谎言太拙劣啦。
E: My bow... But Himeko made that for me! You're lying...

C: 如果下次有缘再见，我会向她转达您的好评。
E: If we meet again, I will pass your esteemed praise on to her.

C: 看来三月这都是跟师父学的。
E: Looks like she learned it from her master.

C: …你平时吃得很多吗？
E: ...Do you usually eat a lot?

C: 这情况听起来十分耳熟…
E: This sounds oddly familiar...

C: 再接下来的记忆已经很模糊了，我只记得心跳声、急促的喘气声，我听见焰轮铸炼宫的匠人不断大喊着「云璃快跑」，还有无数的惨叫声。
E: I don't remember much after that, except for the pounding of my heart and the sound of my own gasps of breath. I could hear the smiths in the Flamewheel Forge shouting, "Run away, Yunli!" and the screams of agony.

C: 那些来向含光求剑的异邦人，没有一个不打着正大光明的旗号。
E: Those travelers who came seeking Hanguang's swords all came in the name of justice and honor.

C: 公共场合里…是我不对。
E: Yeah, I shouldn't have done that in a public place.

C: 云璃后来去找你了吗？
E: Did she come to you afterward?

C: 保管宝剑的流程是怎样的？
E: How was the sword delivered?

C: 朱明制式的剑匣，用来封藏孤云。它的锁扣完好无损，被轻轻打开；内鞘底部留下几片玫瑰花瓣，略显刻意。
E: A sword casket produced by the Zhuming that is used to seal Guyun. Its opened lock appears to have not been damaged. At the bottom of the casket, a few rose petals have been intentionally left behind.

C: …我的脑袋一团乱麻，且容我想想——
E: My thoughts are a mess... Let me sort them out...

C: 可是…您要是走了，我们该怎么办？万一那些狼妖再度出现……
E: But... what should we do with you gone? What if those wolf demons show up again?

C: 接下来，将是漫长而孤独的战斗。
E: What awaits me will be a long and lonely war.

C: 完成植树使命之后，我们使团众人也将离开罗浮仙舟，当然，这一趟的经历也会变成英雄故事中的后日谈吧。
E: Now that my mission is accomplished, the delegation will be leaving the Xianzhou Luofu soon. But of course, the experiences here will become an epilogue to the hero's stories.

C: …虽然不明白，你为何如此执着于破坏家族的藩篱。但我已说过，忆者帮不了你，另请高明吧。
E: ...I don't really understand why you're so fixated on destroying Family barriers, but as I said before, a Memokeeper can't help you. It's frankly above my pay grade.

C: 免了吧，你离贝洛伯格远一点，就是帮了我大忙啦。毕竟花火小姐寻求的「欢愉」…桑博可不敢恭维啊。
E: Forget it. You'll be doing me a favor if you stay away from Belobog. After all, the Elation that Miss Sparkle seeks... isn't something ol' Sampo can stand by.

C: 卟卟——回答错误！你不会以为标新立异就能蒙对吧？
E: Wamp wah — wrong answer. That's funky, but a wild guess.

C: 卟卟——回答错误！你不会以为标新立异就能蒙对吧？
E: Wamp wah — wrong answer. That's funky, but a wild guess.

C: 最后那一题的提示，稍稍有些明显了哦。
E: The hint for the final question was a little too obvious.

C: 我说过，这只是出于一些…小小的好胜心。
E: I told you, it's purely out of a spirit of competitiveness.

C: 真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，凶手一定会逍遥法外！
E: What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the murderer would still be at large!

C: {NICKNAME}你听见了吗，她说带杨叔逛首饰店。嘻嘻，这光景我想想都觉得好玩。
E: Did you hear that, {NICKNAME}? She said she's taking Mr. Yang jewelry shopping. Hehe, that'll be interesting.

C: 我保证，下次若有计划，一定开诚布公。
E: I promise to be more transparent next time.

C: 您有什么想知道的吗？
E: Is there anything you want to know?

C: 此时，「太卜司」内……
E: Meanwhile in the Divination Commission...

C: 好大一棵树，突然就长了出来！
E: That massive tree has suddenly sprung to life!

C: 无偿劳动到此为止啦！
E: Payment, or we go on strike!

C: 要不是我今天把那「换境画屏」翻出来捣鼓，大家都得困死在里面，堆成肥料了。
E: If I hadn't repaired the Shifting Screen today we'd all have been trapped — we'd be fertilizer by now.

C: 事情发生得太突然了，我和弟子们毫无准备。
E: Everything happened so quickly. My students and I were caught by surprise.

C: 关于药王秘传的药方…
E: The prescription from the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 原本送药可以由同僚们代劳，不过眼下四处都需要医士，指望不上他们了。想来想去，也只好拜托你。就当是互惠如何呀？
E: My colleagues were supposed to handle the deliveries, but now healers are needed everywhere... I can't count on them to do it. I thought long and hard, but I realized I had no choice but to ask you. Perhaps you could see it as repaying a favor?

C: 喂，那边那个化外民，你在这儿围观什么呢？这是你该看的东西吗？
E: Hey, what you looking at, outworlder? Mind your own business!

C: 公平分配？公平分配你也没想着我啊？
E: Evenly? How was it even when you stole my share, hmm?

C: 你看，这就是「天人之舟」的真相…「天缺之舟」罢了。
E: You see? This is the truth about the Vessel of Celestials... nothing more than a vessel of the Incomplete.

C: 孽物入仙舟，则仙舟之；仙舟入孽物，则孽物之。如是而已。
E: If an abomination aligns with the Xianzhou, then they are a Xianzhou person. If a Xianzhou person aligns with the abominations, they become an abomination themselves. It is that simple.

C: 在下只是一介丹士，不了解太复杂的因缘。只知道这是一群自认为「丰饶民」的仙舟人。
E: I'm just an alchemist — I don't understand them in any detail. I only know that they are a group of Xianzhou people who view themselves as Denizens of Abundance.

C: 放在一旁
E: Put it aside.

C: 唉！这时候要是能突然出现一位擅长调查事情真相的高人就好了…那位高人恰好还心胸宽广，甚至愿意免费帮助我们这些行善的好人……
E: Alas, it would be great if an expert investigator could suddenly show up here... I wish the investigator would be generous and willing to help kind people like us gratuitously...

C: 没错，我想要的福报就是钱。
E: That's right. Money is the only reward I want.

C: 他们多半不会叫你赔偿的，毕竟这些人不看重金钱这样的俗物，却十分重视看不见摸不着的功德。
E: I don't think they will ask you for compensation. After all, money means nothing to them. They attach great importance to intangible merits.

C: 没伤着我，不用给医药费了。
E: I'm not injured, so there's no need to pay for my medical fees.

C: 好极了，三票全通过！我记得加入「放生帮」得有入帮试炼吧？不如我们商量一下这次该为{NICKNAME}安排怎样的试炼吧。
E: Awesome! Your membership has been approved unanimously! I remember every new member of the Unshackled has to go through a newcomer trial. Let's discuss the trial to be arranged for {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们，细细讨论一下，再告诉你。
E: We'll tell you after having a discussion.

C: （他们聊得好激烈啊…还是先去回复消息吧。）
E: (Wow, the discussion is intense... Let me reply to the message first.)

C: 这个试炼若能通过，足以证明你潜力非凡。
E: If you can pass this trial, it shows that you have great potential.

C: 您就别谦虚了，现在整个地衡司都等着您的好消息呢。
E: Don't be modest. Everyone from the Realm-Keeping Commission is waiting to hear about your success.

C: 没错！没错！都怪你们！如果不是你们俩提议放生那些该死的机器宝宝……
E: Exactly! It's all your fault! If you two hadn't suggested releasing those damned mechanical darlings...

C: 好好好，军爷息怒，军爷息怒，我好好说话……
E: Sure, sure. Please calm down, sir. I'll be serious...

C: 往后如果有空，记得回来看看，参加参加咱们的活动…现在咱们这里是我们微观派的天下，再也不搞什么放生猛兽的狠活了。
E: Please feel free to swing by and take part in our activities... Now that the Microscopic Faction is at the helm, there won't be anymore dangerous activities like releasing beasts.

C: 是剪辑，我加了点剪辑。为了把事情的前因后果表达清楚，最关键的是——
E: Ugh, it's called editing? I edited it! That way I can show what happened before and after. Anyway, the key moment was...

C: 你们有疑惑，可以提问，寒鸦会尽力满足你们的好奇心。但问完之后，还希望两位保守秘密，乖乖离开绥园，别再回来。
E: If you have any questions, raise them now — I will do my best to satisfy your curiosity. But I hope you will keep any information you hear in strict confidence... and then leave Fyxestroll Garden — never to return.

C: 渐渐地，岁阳会扎根宿主的神经系统，利用其内心的欲望和弱点，让他产生种种颠倒妄想，如同操纵棋子傀儡般摆弄宿主。宿主则会对岁阳言听计从，我们称之为「夺舍」。
E: A heliobus will slowly take root in its host's nervous system, using their deepest desires and weaknesses to create wild delusions. They manipulate their host like a chess piece. The host has no choice but to obey the heliobus, so we refer to it as "possession."

C: 我拒绝与你合作。
E: I refuse to work with you.

C: 可惜啊，尾巴大爷今非昔比了。要是咱们还拥有当年的力量，别说突破这「鬼打墙」的迷障幻境…就连把创造它的「恚炎」一口吞了也不在话下。
E: What a pity that "Mr. Tail" is nothing like he used to be. If we still had our old power, we could forget about this maze and devour its creator, Furynox.

C: 藿藿，我也会害怕。
E: Huohuo, I'm afraid too.

C: 所以，我们接下来……
E: So, we're gonna...

C: 呜哇啊啊～我我我、我能不能趴着过去……
E: C—C—Could I crawl my way there...?

C: 我也感觉到了……
E: I feel it too...

C: 这才是最大的「异常」！
E: This is the greatest anomaly!

C: 那天，格尔温太太满载而归。
E: That day, Mrs. Gerwin had a fruitful haul.

C: 请听我解释……
E: Please hear me out...

C: 还有，我这几天已经听到不止一个人反映，你恶意抢走他们的老客户，破坏了同事间的合作氛围。实话说，我对你相当失望……
E: Also, I've already received more than one complaint these past few days from other employees that you maliciously stole away their loyal customers and damaged the work culture. To be honest, I'm quite disappointed in you...

C: 你以为没有人尝试过吗…你以为我没有遇到过和你一样的人吗？
E: Don't you think others have tried... You think I've never met people like you?

C: 我现在…感觉非常好。距离我上次感到这么…鲜活…好像已经过去了一辈子。
E: I'm now... feeling very good. The last I felt so... refreshed... It felt like a lifetime ago.

C: 本地人嘛，很正常。
E: She's a local. It's normal.

C: 我还记得，我生命里唯一的那一丝甜蜜……
E: I still remember, the only hint of sweetness in my life...

C: 听听，你这说的是什么话！你看这签名的字迹，假如不是莱斯利本人，怎么可能模仿得出来？
E: What are you even saying! Look at this autograph. How could someone forge this? This must be the real Lesley!

C: 太没礼貌了，你！你看这签名的字迹——假如不是莱斯利本人，怎么可能模仿得出来？
E: How disrespectful! Look at this autograph. How could someone forge this? This must be the real Lesley!

C: 被击穿的一瞬间，我对自己的存在失去了实感，我感觉自己好像从未活过。
E: When it went through my chest, my existence seemed to lose all sense of reality. I started to feel like I'd never even been alive.

C: 去找服务生吧…
E: Go and search for an attendant...

C: 他扮演的似乎是一名战舰飞行员——大概是某位大部分人都记得其名字的、在那场旷日持久的星际能源战争中起到了重大作用的英雄人物。
E: It seems that he's playing a warship pilot... Likely a heroic figure that played a critical role in the long-drawn-out Interstellar Energy War, someone whose name people remember well.

C: 罗伯特离开了家乡，尽管用的是不便与他人明说的方法。
E: Robert was able to leave his hometown, albeit using methods that he would not easily share with others.

C: 所以他才会加入这项「事业」…放弃自我，去维系一个虚假的理想。
E: So, that's why he went into this "undertaking"... Giving up on himself to maintain a false ideal.

C: 但随后她微微点头，向你表达了谢意。就从这一刻起，她的人生重新开始了。
E: But she nodded slightly thereafter as a gesture of gratitude toward you. From this moment on, her life began anew.

C: 好听的名字。
E: What a beautiful name.

C: 人的一生中，还有什么比「错过」更令人痛惜的呢？
E: In life, is there anything more painful than "missing a chance"?

C: 她不该在缅怀中虚度人生——曾经被莱斯利•迪恩撕开的伤口，现在由我来亲自缝补。
E: She must not waste her life on a memory... These wounds that were once caused by Lesley Dean, I will now sew them shut myself.

C: 反倒是你——你是不是还有什么话要对我说？
E: More importantly... Do you have something that you want to say to me?

C: 可以和您分享吗？
E: May I share it with you?

C: …船员们怎么什么都会。
E: ...Wow, our crew can do anything.

C: 不是我吹嘘哈，您可以去问问咱们同行——虽说他们跟我都是同一个家族的旁支出身，但我保证他们都是老手，经验和品行都过硬！
E: I'm not tooting my own horn. You can ask around in the industry. Although they are from an offshoot of my family, I can guarantee that they are all veterans, packed with experience and integrity.

C: 佩德罗将你带至船长室，示意你看向空白的墙壁。
E: Pedro brings you to the captain's cabin, signaling you to look at the blank wall.

C: （骄傲地）没错，是我！
E: (Proudly) Yes, that's me!

C: 好在匹诺康尼刚刚度过一劫，你*猜测*白日梦酒店现在应该空出了很多房源……
E: Fortunately, Penacony has just been through a disaster. You guess that The Reverie Hotel should have a few empty rooms now...

C: 在三位石心十人成员的指导下，你顺利帮助他们完成了退房手续。
E: Under the three Stonehearts' guidance, you successfully help them check out.

C: 你们自己看吧。
E: Check it out yourself.

C: 我本想向「四尺神王」祈祷，请求祂对你们的宽恕…但无奈你们已经病入膏肓，无药可医。
E: I wanted to pray to the Four-Foot Aeon and ask for their forgiveness for you, but you are beyond redemption.

C: 呵，顺带一提，我刚才的提议还没过期。再给你们四十秒，赶紧把人质交出来！然后滚出我的视线，不然就等着挨枪子儿吧！
E: Heh, by the way, my offer just now still stands. I'll give you another <unbreak>40</unbreak> seconds to release the hostage and get out of my sight. Otherwise, I'll let you taste my bullets!

C: 哟，看样子这位小妹还是仙舟人？你好啊。
E: Huh, you from the Xianzhou, miss? Hello there!

C: …嗯？哪位？
E: ...Hmm? Who are you?

C: 好到值得为它丢了工作？
E: Is it worth losing your job?

C: 哎呀呀…技术挺不错的嘛！
E: Wow... you're good at this!

C: 这个粉毛矮个子是谁呀？
E: Who's this sassy, lost, short pink-haired girl?

C: 看来就是这一份，把它交给我吧。
E: This looks like the one. Give it to me.

C: …不过，这种东西他如果不问的话，就直接交给他也不太合适，我就先放在你那里吧。
E: ...But if he doesn't ask about this, it's really not appropriate to just hand it over to him, so I'll leave it with you for now.

C: 太好了！我其实经常窝在家里看表演相声的幻戏，可有意思了。
E: Cool! Actually, I often binge watch immersias about comedy crosstalks at home, and they're so fun.

C: 每样都给我来一份吧。
E: Give me one of everything, thanks.

C: 既然这样说了，那就走吧，我们去桥上看看星槎。
E: Let's go then. We can go to the bridge and watch from there.

C: 我们不会只是负责拍照而已吧？
E: We're not just in charge of taking photos, are we?

C: 之前发生过严重的事故？
E: Has any serious accident ever happened before?

C: 仙舟的星槎当然是无可挑剔，但是设计语言确实有些陈旧了。老师的新设计肯定能给星槎带来一场革命的。
E: The starskiff of Xianzhou is great, but the design is rather old-fashioned. I'm sure my master's design will bring about a revolution.

C: 这是测试星槎的遥控器，你就当它是一款「糟糕的驾驶模拟器」好了。
E: This is the remote control used to test the starskiff. Just treat it as a shoddy driving simulator.

C: 老师设计的这款轻型星槎，转弯半径小、速度快、航程也更远。当然，星槎的设计改动越是冒进，操作所需要的精确度就越高。
E: This lightweight starskiff designed by my master has a small turning radius, high speed, and can travel far. Of course, the more advanced a design, the higher the precision required to control it.

C: …值得一试。这是个很好的方法！
E: ...I think it's worth a try!

C: …这又是什么奇怪的台词？
E: ...That might be the weirdest thing you've ever said.

C: 卢卡那小子的对手一般都撑不了几个回合，哈哈哈哈。
E: Luka's opponents usually don't last long, hahaha. Go!

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 你们看，彦卿似乎已经到了。
E: Look, Yanqing's here.

C: 真是怕什么来什么。
E: It's like whatever you fear will happen, happens.

C: 彦卿本想再和你们几位多聊聊天，唉，但有些事时时刻刻都让人放心不下……
E: I'd love to chitchat a little longer, but there are some things that can't be left unchecked...

C: 将军说的「焰轮八叶」是？
E: What's the "Flamewheel Octet" the general spoke of?

C: 再扣着我的货物不放，我一纸诉状直接告到你们将军那里去！
E: Keep detaining my cargo, and I'll file a complaint directly with your general!

C: 往小了说，列位是受步离人劫掠的被害者。但往大了说，为什么步离人要在通往罗浮的航线上袭击你们？莫非船员中有人勾结了步离人？
E: Sure, you might purely be innocent victims of a borisin attack, but think about it another way. Why would the borisin launch such an attack near the Luofu? Perhaps some of your crew members colluded with them?

C: 我们与博识学会签署过保密安全协议，一旦违约就要支付天价赔偿！就算把这个星区市场开拓部的员工的灵魂全数典当了也填不上这个窟窿。
E: We've signed a confidentiality and security agreement with the Intelligentsia Guild, and if we breach it, we'll have to pay a hefty sum! Even if we sold the souls of every employee in the Marketing Development Department on this planet, it still wouldn't be enough to cover the costs.

C: 这才像话嘛！能有这样通人性…我是说通达人情的态度，刚才也犯不着撕破脸。
E: Well, that's more like it! If only the young displayed a more... reasonable attitude, we could have sidestepped that altercation just now.

C: 给你添麻烦了。
E: Sorry for the trouble.

C: 不管为了什么，这也许正是步离人会袭击这艘舰船的原因吧。
E: Whatever the reason is, it's probably why the borisin attacked the ship.

C: 在下射洪，是龙师涛然派来的信使。龙师听闻族胞升任司鼎，喜不自胜，本想亲自来道喜，可奈何身体状况不允许。
E: I'm Shehong, a messenger sent by Preceptor Taoran. He wanted to come and congratulate his kindred on becoming Cauldron Master personally, but health limitations hindered his visit.

C: 到底该呼叫哪位将军啊？
E: But which general should I call?

C: 云璃挥舞这么大一把剑，她这么轻轻一击，就化解了云璃的攻势——
E: I mean, when Yunli swung that massive sword, she just casually blocked her attack with ease...

C: 哈哈哈，您太客气了…等等，谁给谁准备拜师礼？
E: Ahaha, you're too kind... Wait, you're giving me a gift? Shouldn't it be the other way round?

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: 建木重生，让那些惯于躲在后方的老家伙们感到了害怕…他们怕孽物再度卷土重来，像三十年前那般。
E: The Arbor's rebirth has frightened the elders who lurk behind the scenes... They fear the resurgence of abominations, much like what happened thirty years ago.

C: 作为东道主，我会传授三月小姐罗浮剑术的精华，然后让她在擂台上大获全胜。到时候，你就没法再对罗浮的剑法优劣评头论足了吧！
E: As the host, I'll be teaching Miss March the essence of Luofu swordplay, after which she'll emerge victorious in the Wardance ring. You won't be complaining about Luofu swordplay then!

C: 我准备好了…
E: I'm ready...

C: 双剑小有所成，三月小姐要是想更进一步，也可以试试其他的仙舟剑器，增添手感。
E: Miss March, you're really getting the hang of wielding dual swords. If you're keen on advancing, trying out different Xianzhou blades could improve your touch.

C: 你们看到了吗，远处那艘飞舰，就是这次演武仪典的比武赛场——「竞锋舰」。
E: Do you see that airship in the distance? That's the Skysplitter, the venue for the Wardance ceremony.

C: 我…父亲是朱明仙舟的匠师，只因他的一念愚蠢，许多人死在了他所造的魔剑之下。
E: My... father... was a craftsman on the Xianzhou Zhuming. Because of his foolishness, many innocent people fell victim to the cursed swords he forged.

C: 小崽子占不了多大地方。这儿到处都是箱子，随便往哪个里头一扔，不会有人发现的。
E: Those little brats won't take up much space. There are boxes all over this place. Just dump them into one and no one will notice.

C: 我总觉得奇怪，贱畜的味道怎么哪儿都有。
E: Is it just me? I keep smelling that stench of lowly beasts everywhere we go.

C: 难道列车就不能做些善事？我们这一路上帮助过的世界都快数…倒也不至于数不清，但总之，有很多很多！
E: What's wrong with doing something good? Along the way, we've helped countless worlds... well, not literally countless, but you get the idea!

C: 这个问题应该由丹枢自己回答。
E: Well, you should ask Dan Shu herself for the answer.

C: 飞霄微微一笑，也不动怒。
E: Feixiao offers a slight smile, displaying no anger.

C: 怎么？
E: What is it?

C: 好，但是别乱跑，这儿不比别的地方。
E: Okay, but watch your step. This place is not like the others.

C: 道路断了？一定是有人更动了机关。
E: The path is cut off? Someone must have altered the mechanism.

C: 除步离人外…还有…别的…入侵者…看不见……
E: Besides the borisin... there were... other... intruders... Invisible...

C: 是「战略撤退的曜青使者」。
E: I prefer to be called "the Yaoqing messenger who strategically retreated."

C: 至少有两拨来历不同的劫狱者闯进了这里，{RUBY_B#步离人}狼崽子们{RUBY_E#}，还有这些魔阴身士卒。
E: At least two different groups of intruders infiltrated here — the {RUBY_B#borisin}wolf cubs{RUBY_E#} and these Mara-Struck Soldiers.

C: 莫非要云璃代替彦卿守擂？
E: Are you suggesting that Yunli takes Yanqing's place as ringmaster?

C: 我？现在哪是悠闲吃饭的时候…而且这也太多了吧！
E: Me? This isn't the time for a leisurely meal... and this is way too much for me!

C: 也就是说，一旦对方停止服药，很快就会原形毕露？
E: So, in other words, if they stop taking the medicine, their true form will soon be revealed?

C: 是。工造司和丹鼎司联手做了勘验…这机器的部件使用了特殊加工过的步离生物组织。
E: Yes, the Artisanship Commission and Alchemy Commission conducted a joint examination and found that... the parts of this machine are made from specially refined borisin bio-tissue.

C: 曜青的将军…一个狐人？很有意思。末度，他所说的一切是真的吗？
E: The Merlin's Claw of the Yaoqing... A foxian? Very interesting. Tell me, Mok Tok, is he speaking the truth?

C: 虽然我不懂呼雷大人的用意。但别以为自己能逃走，明白吗？
E: I don't fully understand Lord Hoolay's intentions, but don't think you can simply run away. Understood?

C: 攀上「月亮」的产床后，都蓝从中获得了自己梦寐以求的东西，一轮形如赤红满月的「心脏」。都蓝切开自己的胸膛，用这轮赤月替换了自己的心。
E: Duran ascended {RUBY_B#Moon}the birthing bed{RUBY_E#} and obtained what he desired: A heart in the shape of a deep-red full moon. He cut open his chest and replaced his original heart with this crimson moon.

C: 应该是工造司匠人。
E: The craftsman from the Artisanship Commission.

C: 太好了太好了，你的脑袋终于恢复记忆了，我也放下了高高举起的「老铁」。
E: Great, you've finally gotten your memory back, and I can put down Old Mettle.

C: 听说这次演武仪典有一位从朱明仙舟来的剑士将要挑战彦卿骁卫，你觉得这两边打起来谁能赢？能不能理性分析一下？
E: I heard that a sword master from the Xianzhou Zhuming is going to challenge Lieutenant Yanqing at this Wardance. Who do you think will win in the fight? Can you give me your analysis?

C: 先别着急去擂场，在这里了解一下你的对手吧。
E: There's no need to rush to the ring just yet, let's get to know your opponents around here first.

C: 是啊，我可是一直强忍着撕开他喉咙的冲动。毕竟，呼雷大人命我们留在此处，就是想看看……
E: That's right. I have been holding back the urge to slit his throat all this time. Well, Lord Hoolay ordered us to remain here, just to see...

C: 我…没能救回椒丘。呼雷比我想像得更狡诈，也更难对付。
E: I... wasn't able to save Jiaoqiu. Hoolay was more cunning and powerful than I imagined...

C: 随时戒备！
E: Be on your guard!

C: 虽说打心眼里希望这场「演武仪典」能一切平安无事，让我虚惊一场……
E: Even though I truly hoped that the Wardance would go ahead uninterrupted and that I was worrying for no reason...

C: 你们…肯定不是负责扮演步离人的云骑军吧？
E: You guys... you're not Cloud Knights acting as borisin, are you?

C: 命运真是讽刺啊。我一直在等待今天，可没想到它会以这种形式到来。
E: What an ironic fate, don't you think? All this time, waiting for this day to come, I never imagined that this was how it would turn out.

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 丹恒先生，我嗅到了一丝古怪的气味，长老迎接我们，恐怕是藏了些手段。麻烦你将这香气源头找出来掐灭。
E: Dan Heng, I smell a strange scent in the air. It seems the elder is welcoming us with some hidden tricks. Could you please track down the source of this scent and put it out?

C: 我本对罗浮持明背叛联盟一事将信将疑…但听完长老剖陈己罪，我觉得奢谈信任，并无意义。
E: I was initially skeptical about the Vidyadhara's betrayal of the Alliance... But after hearing your confession, I realize that there is no point in talking about trust.

C: 一旦战争结束，这些士兵也不会继续繁衍，无需担忧其泛滥成灾。这就是「仙舟联盟」的解救之法，令寰宇断绝寿瘟之苦的上上善道。唯我持明可以做到！
E: Once the war ended, these soldiers would cease reproduction, eliminating concerns of overpopulation. This is the way to salvation for the Xianzhou Alliance, the ultimate path to end the universe's suffering under the immortality plague. Only we, the Vidyadhara, can achieve this!

C: 因为那挨千刀的「司法精神」。
E: It's because of the accursed arm of the law.

C: 如果记忆确实被「家族」封存，那…那我也不知道该怎么把它找回来。这是个死局……
E: If your memories have really been sealed by The Family, then... I don't know how to retrieve them either. It's a dead end...

C: 无妨，你快去快回吧。
E: That's fine. Please make it quick.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 你有点可怕。
E: You're scary.

C: 查普客上尉？你…你这是怎么了？
E: Lieutenant Chapuk? You... What's wrong with you?

C: 蒂索克二世哭了很久才终于冷静下来，恢复了「皇帝」的优雅。
E: Tizocic II finally quiets down after much sobbing, regaining her Emperor-like elegance.

C: 没有其他问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 我答应了他彼时的诉求。自那以后，卡尔德隆•查德威克便音讯全无，仿若星海间全无他曾来过的痕迹。
E: I agreed to help him at that time. Ever since then, I have never heard from him again. It was as if he had never existed in the universe at all.

C: 如果我们一定要见他呢？
E: What if we insist on seeing him?

C: ——我不想说什么「我们的事业是正义的」之类的话…我知道你没那么天真，查。我只是觉得，人有些时候可以把事情想得单纯些…那样日子就能好过很多。
E: I don't want to say things like: "We're working for a just cause," because I know you aren't that naïve, Chad. I just think that our lives can be a lot easier... if we don't complicate stuff.

C: 但要小心，博士。对于你我这类人，一时的懈驰可能导向万千生灵的哀恸。智慧是宇宙对我们的赐福，也是它强加于我们的重负。
E: But you must be cautious, Doctor. For people like us, even a minor slipup can impact the entire universe. Our wisdom is both a blessing and a burden.

C: 「虚数坍缩脉冲」启动准备：已完成。随时可以起爆。
E: Imaginary Implosion Pulse preparation: Complete. Ready to detonate at any moment.

C: 杜，我……
E: Dud, I...

C: 我在听着呢，博士。你还有什么想说的，就趁现在吧。
E: I'm listening, doctor. If there's anything else you want to say, now's the time.

C: （刚刚我所经历的，就是查德威克的前半生吗？）
E: (What I just experienced, was that the first half of Chadwick's life?)

C: 鸟，折纸小鸟，或者「湛蓝爵士」。只要别给我添乱，想怎么叫都行。
E: Bird, origami bird, or Dr. Blues. You can call me anything you want as long as you don't give me any trouble.

C: …这个地方，又只剩我一只鸟了。
E: ...And I'm the only bird left in this place again.

C: 请您不要避重就轻，<color=#dbc291ff>家主</color>——这可是有关于未来筑梦教育的大事！
E: Please refrain from being dismissive, <color=#dbc291ff>esteemed head</color>! This concerns the cornerstone of future Dreamweaving education!

C: 我理解了一切！
E: I understand everything!

C: 让我原谅他，除非他亲自对我的「冯恩三世美食加工机」道歉——犯错了，最少也得有句「对不起」吧？
E: For me to forgive him, he'd have to personally apologize to my Vaughn III Gourmet Refinement Machine. Shouldn't a "sorry" at least be in order when a mistake is made?

C: 不过…也只有在梦中，我们那些被人称为荒诞的想法才有可能实现。冯恩先生，你不也是为此而来吗？
E: But... it's only in a dream that our supposedly hare-brained concepts can be realized. Mr. Vaughn, didn't you come for this very reason too?

C: 他们都不敢尝一口「冯恩三世」做出来的点心！
E: They don't even dare try a bite of the snacks Vaughn III made!

C: 哈哈，那就扯个什么「巴罗已经去浪迹天涯」的谎吧。虽然他可能不信…但有希望，总归是个好事儿。
E: Haha, then just make up some lie about how Barlow has already gone off-world. Although he might not believe in it... But as long as there's hope, it should be a good thing.

C: （奥尔拉的意志减弱了…再这样下去，他<color=#dbc291ff>将被自己的梦境吞噬</color>！）
E: (Orla's will is fading... If this continues, he will be <color=#dbc291ff>consumed by his own Dreamscape</color>!)

C: …这次，我不会再忘记了。
E: ...This time, I won't forget.

C: 总之——真相也找了，梦也打碎了，现在满意了吗？
E: Anyways — The truth was found, and the dream was broken. Happy now?

C: 你进入了浴池——如他所说，水温刚刚好。
E: You enter the bath — as he said, the temperature is just right.

C: 而现在，希望得到圣城庇护的逃难者数量激增——因为你们击败了尼卡多利，通向奥赫玛的道路也变得安全了许多……
E: And now, the number of refugees seeking protection in the holy city is rising. Because you defeated Nikador, and made the journey to Okhema that much safer...

C: 不保证存活…
E: I can't guarantee our survival...

C: 吾师…原来你还懂武技的吗？
E: Master... you knew martial arts all along?

C: 别看了，再看也不会有区别的…唉，随你吧。
E: Forget that, it won't make a difference... Bah, it's your call.

C: 话是这么说没错…但拜托你一定要让他们躺在椅子上、按步骤用餐，不然就享受不到百分百的美味了！
E: You may be right... but I would ask that you must have them lay back in their chairs and taste the food in order, or they won't be able to enjoy the utmost in flavors!

C: 你交出了那几个敞口陶瓶，里面的食物无比精美、仿佛闪着金光。
E: You hand over the ceramic vases. The food in them is exquisite, as if radiating with flavorful light.

C: 我就知道他不让人省心！
E: I knew he was gonna be a handful!

C: 好了，各位公民，请肃静。
E: All right, fellow citizens, order.

C: 咳咳。首先，圣城现在的决策者是阿格莱雅大人。其次，元老院不是那么强权的机构，不会因为几句坏话就拿秤砣砸人。
E: Ahem. Firstly, the current decision-maker of the holy city is Lady Aglaea. Secondly, the Council of Elders is not such a tyrannical institution. They will not punish someone with weights over a few disparaging comments.

C: 听了元老的话，公民们纷纷低下头、露出若有所思的表情。你的言论大概是不会有人附和了。
E: Upon hearing the Elder's words, the citizens lower their heads, their expressions thoughtful. It's likely that no one will support your opinion.

C: 监禁改为流放？
E: Change imprisonment to exile?

C: 那么，请各位公民举手表决……
E: Then, citizens, please raise your hand to vote...

C: 重渊的外邦人怎么样了？
E: What happened to the outlanders at the Abyss?

C: 你此时才发现这副石铸的身躯是多么古老，如夜幕下的悬锋城墙一样陈旧而残破。
E: It's at this moment that you realize just how ancient its stone-cast body is. It's just as old and derelict as the walls of Castrum Kremnos under the curtain of night.

C: 奥赫玛有旅行社带团吗？
E: Does Okhema have travel tours?

C: 悬锋特色火锅！
E: Kremnos' famous hotpot!

C: 不会吧，伟大的大工匠，难道您修不好吗？
E: Surely not. Grand Craftsman, are you saying that you cannot repair her?

C: 是以前的阿格莱雅！似乎和现在没什么差别呢？
E: That's Aglaea from the past! She seems no different to how she is today?

C: 恩人，也请你帮我找找吧，我估计她就在集市附近。
E: Savior, please help me find her. I imagine she must be near the market.

C: 我…我想……
E: I... I want...

C: 我就在旁边吃个瓜。
E: I'll be here with my popcorn.

C: 帕、帕里斯，快帮帮我们！
E: Pa—Paris! Help us!

C: 对，没错！菲罗克不会骗我，那姑娘…天谴猎手一定是被她的同类唤起了纷争的本能，选择回到了悬锋城的军队中，背叛了我！
E: Exactly! Philoc would not lie to me. That girl... The Furiae Archer's battle instincts must have been awakened by her kin. She must have chosen to return to the forces of Castrum Kremnos... She has betrayed me...

C: 其实我也一直持怀疑态度。
E: I've also been suspicious, actually.

C: 我们也试过回到命运重渊，寻找那位眷属，但永远是一无所获。
E: We've also tried returning to the Abyss of Fate, looking for that Titankin, but it was all in vain.

C: 如果她成为了圣女，我，还能再见到她吗？
E: If she becomes the Holy Maiden, can I still see her?

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 如果我带着她逃走，逃去奥赫玛…如果，如果，你在听吗？欧洛尼斯，我可以献上一切，我的心脏，我的眼睛，只要能实现我的祈愿。
E: If only I brought her along to escape to Okhema... If only, if only... are you listening? Oronyx, I can offer my everything. My heart, my eyes... as long as you can fulfill my wish.

C: 帕西提亚的嘴角向上扭曲，而后又往里凹陷，她死死地咬住牙根，努力压抑住抽泣。
E: Pasithea's lips curl up then inwards. She clenches her jaw, fighting to hold back her tears.

C: 在这么大一块地方找出{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的天外之音，总觉得还是有点模糊。
E: To find {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx's{RUBY_E#} echoes from beyond the sky in such a huge place... it feels a little vague.

C: 企划内容，我们已经跟业务巩固部聊过了。结论是：批准执行。
E: We've already discussed the details of this project with the Business Consolidation Department. The verdict is: approved for execution.

C: 放心，定不辱使命。
E: Rest assured, I won't let you down.

C: （沉默）。
E: (keep silent)

C: 我重新挂了笔求购订单。但这种大船，一时半会儿很难找到第二个卖家。
E: I've reposted my purchase order. But it'll be tough to find another seller anytime soon for a ship of that size.

C: 总有一天，记忆会结出果实。
E: One day, memories will bear fruit.

C: 谢谢…帮助…呜呜。
E: Thank you... help... Wooo.

C: （还是有点不放心…回去和那只担忧的呜呜伯确认一下吧！）
E: (I'm still a little worried... Might as well go back and check with that worried Wubbaboo!)

C: 你觉得她应该成为什么样的人，培养怎样的兴趣爱好，平时该做些什么…尽管告诉她就好，这些就是她未来要学习的东西。
E: Tell her what kind of person she should be, things to do for fun, what we do every day... Tell her all you know and she'll pick them up one by one.

C: 这…要怎么培养呢？请指导我，{NICKNAME}老师。
E: How? Please give me some guidance, {NICKNAME}.

C: 虚拟世界里每个人说话既好听又很有意思，这不比上班舒服多了？啊说到上班，差点忘了，古恩老头交代过我，让你在教完课之后去找他，记得去哦。
E: Everyone in the virtual world deserves a podcast. Who needs work when you have homies online? Ah, speaking of work, old Gunn would like to have a chat with you after today's lesson. Don't forget to talk to him when you find time!

C: 拜托了拜托了，你可是语言大师，一定能想到的！
E: Please please please. You're a master of language, and you'll definitely come up with something!

C: 嗯嗯，然后呢…啊抱歉，我还是没忍住。
E: Mmm, mmm, and then... Ah, sorry, I couldn't help it.

C: 和底座的缺口相吻合，这就说明了我的猜想没错，我这就去修！
E: This fits the outline of the crack on the base. That means my hypothesis is right. I'll get to fixing it right away!

C: 负荷已满，推进装置无法响应。
E: Maximum load reached. Thruster compartment not responsive.

C: 哎哟！你这人从哪儿冒出来的，吓死我了！你谁啊，有什么事吗？
E: Woah! Where did you come from? You scared me! Who are you? What are you here for?

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 我们科用它和纳米膜做重力实验，按照原有计划，它受力就会「升维消失」，然后又「降维出现」。
E: My department used to do gravity experiments on it using nano membranes. The original plan was for it to "disappear by being elevated to a higher dimensional world" when it experiences gravity, then "re-appear back into our lower dimensional world."

C: 还是老老实实用框架眼镜吧，框架的就挺好啊，戴着还有一种书卷气。
E: Just use normal glasses with frames. They're pretty good. You even look sophisticated in them.

C: 很长一段时间过去了，我一点消息都没收到…直到最近。
E: It has been a long time since then, and I haven't received any news from them... until now.

C: 但我实在不好意思劳烦铁卫帮我收集野生动物留下的痕迹了…毕竟他们的本职工作已经够辛苦了。
E: But I really don't want to keep asking the Guards to help me collect traces of wild animals... Their own job is difficult enough as it is.

C: 拉雯妮很想和你做朋友。
E: Lavonne would love to be your friend.

C: 不错，不错…你抓住了精髓。歌德宾馆的红茶口感上乘，价格不菲。有心来此享用下午茶的客人必然都有着不俗的品位。
E: Good... This is a great photo. Goethe Hotel's black tea is excellent and expensive. Those who come here for afternoon tea must have good taste.

C: 哦，对了——你能顺便去花店买束花，和信一起转交给莉拉吗？她之前送了我一束花，我也想回赠一次……
E: While you are at it, can you go pick some flowers at the Florist for Lila? Last time, she gave me a bouquet. I want to give her something in return...

C: 嗐，他向来都是这样……
E: I know... He's always like that.

C: 喔，喔…您果然聪明过人。
E: Wowsers, you really are one smart cookie.

C: 而我这位新朋友也能得到应得的酬劳。
E: And that way, this youngster here can also get {M#his}{F#her} well-deserved rewards.

C: 不过，你可千万别灰心丧气。这是我的真心话。像你这样聪明的年轻人，欠缺的只是正规的教育。
E: However, don't be discouraged. I am being utterly sincere with you. All a bright youngster like you lacks is formal education.

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 别人出的题，难归难，好歹也就在数学题的范围内。这老头给你出脑筋急转弯！这种题目，对于我这样耿直的科学家来说，简直就是羞辱！
E: Sure, others might hurl out difficult questions, but at least they're always within the realm of math. This old man gives you mind-bending riddles! For a forthright academic like me, it's frankly humiliating!
Hmm...

C: 所以？你还没明白吗？这就等于在说——属于我，雷金的时代就要到来了！
E: So what? Don't you get it? This is the equivalent of saying: My time has come! The time of Regin is now!

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 我想再看一次题面…
E: Let me see the question again...

C: 是你呀~最近其实还挺顺利的~自从你为小女子带来了塔米拉小姐的珍贵情报，小女子感觉…已经离她越来越近了……
E: Yeah~ Actually it's been going really well~ Since you gave me that precious intel about Tamila, I felt... closer and closer to her...

C: 小女子开始感到，她朦胧的背影在眼前逐渐清晰……
E: I'm starting to feel the mystery surrounding her is gradually becoming clearer to me...

C: 不好意思，我对歌剧不太熟悉，不太认识什么明星。不过，我对她印象倒是蛮深刻的……
E: Sorry, I'm not into musicals and don't know any celebs. However, she certainly made an impression on me...

C: 不出意外的话，你可以在那里找到他。
E: You should be able to find him there.

C: 我来帮你行使正当权益！
E: I'll help you exercise your rightful rights!

C: 原来是这样。我说最近怎么找不到他人……
E: I see. I was wondering why I couldn't find him lately...

C: 原来你这么能聊…
E: I didn't know you were so talkative...

C: …不会。
E: ...No, I won't.

C: 嘿嘿，没事的！我再拜托别人帮我拍一张就好。
E: Hehe, it's okay! I'll just ask someone else to take one for me!

C: 面前的铁卫如获至宝，仰天大笑。你仿佛能从那严密的铁盔下看到他激动的神情。
E: The guard standing in front of you laughs heartily as if he has found a treasure. You can almost see his excited expression through his tightly secured iron helmet.

C: （总之先打开看看，再考虑怎么办吧。）
E: (Let's take a look for now and decide what to do from there.)

C: 你将漂流瓶扔了回波月古海，希望这些小小建议能够到达所需之人手中。
E: You cast the drift bottle back into the Lunarescent Depths, hoping that these suggestions will reach the hands of those that need them.

C: 我要和你一起放生五谷精华！
E: I want to release the essence of grains with you!

C: （跃渊说护珠人已经认可了我的能力，我可以独立处理巡逻中产生的情况。）
E: (Yueyuan said that the Pearlkeepers have already recognized my talents and that I can deal with anything I encounter on patrol alone.)

C: 一个愿望有什么问题吗？您是对*数字*很介意吗？
E: Is there something wrong with granting just one wish? Do you have a problem with that number?

C: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
E: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

C: 我才刚睡醒，没什么印象了。
E: I've just woken up and don't remember anything.

C: 看来，救世还真不是件容易事。但或许正因明知结局仍义无反顾，凡人才会在故事中背负英雄的名号。
E: It seems that saving the world is no simple matter. However, perhaps mortals can become "heroes" in stories because they do not hesitate despite knowing the inevitable outcome.

C: 黑潮侵蚀圣城外围后，商铺纷纷迁至至此：百货杂陈，精工器物，雅俗书卷，琳琅满目。
E: After the black tide corroded the perimeters of the holy city, many merchants relocated here. One can find just about everything from finely crafted vessels or scholarly tomes to daily items and common reading materials.

C: 那么…黑潮是你唯一的弱点？
E: So... is the black tide your only weakness?

C: 技巧？呵，不如说是些可笑的小手段。
E: Technique? Hah, you mean your laughable little tricks?

C: 金丝与根系交错间，泰坦的心脏悬置于此。神血交融，纯粹之理性方得知晓何为「友邻之爱」。
E: The golden threads and roots intertwine, and the Titan's heart is suspended here. With divine blood mingling, only pure reason can grasp the meaning of "neighborly love."

C: 嗯…坐着的体验并不算太好，很硬，屁股咯得难受，芒刺在背的感受让你有些心慌，但你相信，这些都是成为王而必须经受的考验。
E: Hmm... Sitting here doesn't feel that great. The hard seat pokes uncomfortably against you, and the prickling sensation makes you uneasy. But you believe these are simply the trials one must endure to become a ruler.

C: …混乱邪恶！
E: ...Chaotic Evil!

C: 可惜做不到。想将往渡冥界的灵魂复现到现世…还是太难了。
E: It was a shame that you couldn't. To bring the soul that crossed the nether realm back to the world of living... It's too difficult.

C: 那…那位医师小姑娘，她是怎么治病的？
E: So... So the young girl doctor... How is it that she cures people?

C: 既然你这么问了，那就有了。
E: Now that you've asked, it seems there's more to it.

C: 获得辩护的真信念是知识吗？
E: Is justified true belief knowledge?

C: 说起来，我之前偷听到一个问题，想来想去也没有太好的解答。
E: Speaking of which, I overheard a question earlier and couldn't come up with a good answer after thinking about it for a while.

C: 的确，俗话说有钱能使鬼推磨，即使是不好的事，人们为了钱也有可能去做…但仔细一想，如果富商的钱财是被他人逼迫才分出来的，这种情况又该怎么算呢……
E: Indeed, as they say, money makes the world go round. People might even do bad things for money... But if the merchant only gave up their wealth because they were forced to, how should we view that?

C: 就算到了新世界，他也不会停止求索吧。
E: Even in a New World, he will never cease his search.

C: 吼吼！难道异乡的勇士还未听腻？这里是黎明云崖，城中的演讲台上，到处都满溢着华而不实的称颂吼！
E: Roarrr! Surely the warrior from outlands hasn't grown tired of hearing this by now? Here in Dawncloud, the speech platform is overflowing with grandiose, hollow praise!

C: 过去，若虫以「浪漫」之茧为家，在那里交换有趣的秘闻。墨涅塔的丝线可以帮助它们躲避冥河的召唤，如同船载着水手渡过大海。
E: In the past, nymphs made their home within the "Cocoon of Romance," where they exchanged fascinating secrets. Mnestia's silk threads allowed them to evade the call of the River of Souls, like sailors crossing the sea on a vessel.

C: o((♥'ω´♥ )o「这样一来，即便是再普通的豹豹，也能给别人留下深刻印象欧！」)∋
E: o((♥'ω´♥ )o "Dis way, no mwatter how ordinawy I am, I will alwways weave an impwession!" )∋

C: 真的得治治了…
E: You need help.

C: 需要培养忍耐力…
E: You need to build patience...

C: 看来只是虚惊一场…
E: Just a false alarm...

C: 原来是见鬼，还以为是见鬼呢。
E: Yeah, wouldn't want to run into a ghost now.

C: Σ(:３っ「吼吼，无论是正面，侧面，还是后面，都是一样完美！」)∋
E: Σ(:３っ "Hoho, perfection all around! Front, side, and behind!" )∋

C: 身着绣金长袍的史官无动于衷，无人可知此刻你眼中的奇迹。
E: The scribe in gilded robe appears indifferent. No one else knows the miracle before your eyes at this moment.

C: 管他呢，先睡一觉吧。
E: Who cares? Nap time.

C: 他靠这木马将多数来历不明的财产移动到了远方…虽说「最危险的地方就是最安全的地方」，但把贼窝设在卫兵哨站，这就有些过分了……
E: He used this wooden horse to move most of his ill-gotten wealth far away... While "the most dangerous place is often the safest," setting up his den at a guard post seems a bit too obvious...

C: 矗立数千年的建筑仿佛突然间从这个世界抽离，只留下泛着幽蓝萤光的虚影。
E: The structures that have stood for thousands of years seem to have suddenly been pulled away from this world, leaving only faint, glowing blue shadows behind.

C: 你呼唤泰坦的名字，只得到一段漫长的沉默。你甚至没有听到回音。
E: You call out the Titan's name, but only receive silence as an answer. Not even an echo can be heard.

C: 安静下来了……
E: It's quiet now...

C: 不如自己亲自试试。
E: Or... I could try it myself.

C: 这扇木门的把手只与你的膝盖平齐，你必须弯下腰才能仔细端详。
E: This wooden door's handle barely reaches your knee. You'll have to crouch to get a proper look.

C: 对小孩子来说，这架里拉琴的尺寸有点大，但对妖精们来说刚刚好。
E: A lyre way too big for a kid... but just the right size for a fairy.

C: 按下按钮。
E: Press the button.

C: 能吞下万物的圣杯，以法吉娜的残骨所造。数千年前，海妖们便是凭借此番圣物，与「毁灭」的洋流抗争至身消玉陨。
E: The chalice that swallows all things, crafted from the remains of Phagousa. Thousands of years ago, the sea sirens wielded this divine object to defy the tides of Destruction until their bones were all that remained.

C: 满溢之杯的遗物，一盏无底的骨杯，拥有调控水流的力量——不要跳进去洗澡，不然可保不准你会沉到什么地方。
E: A relic of the Chalice of Plenty, a bottomless bone chalice, possesses the power to command the currents. Whatever you do, don't try bathing in it... unless you fancy drowning in unknown depths.

C: 听说天外的鱼…
E: Have you heard about those fish beyond the sky...

C: 我无法教会你们任何事，我只能让你们学会思考，记住了吗？
E: I can't teach you anything. All I can do is teach you how to think. Got it?

C: …也许是时候说再见了，小缇安。我想再四处走走…或许能想起更多事情。
E: ...Perhaps it's time to say goodbye, Trianne. I'd like to wander around some more... Guess it'll help me recall more things.

C: 我知道，那也是你留下来的。
E: I know. It was also left behind by you.

C: 当我醒来时，这是无限大！
E: But when I arise, it shows an infinity of greatness!

C: 明明就差一秒，我就能离开这个地方了，可它竟然不动了！
E: I was only a second away from leaving this place, but it suddenly stopped working!

C: 我还在这里，就是为了告诉你一个惊天大秘密——这条路走不通嘤！
E: I'm still here just to tell you one earth-shattering secret... This path leads to a total dead end, eep!

C: 真希望，这场有你相伴的粉色幻梦，能一直一直…持续下去嘤……
E: I really wish this pink dream with you by my side could just go on and on... forever, eep...

C: 这是你和我的秘密。
E: This is our little secret.

C: 哔——啵。再见，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: Beep-boop. Goodbye, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: 对、对了，听说技术部提前在前线布置好了先进的御敌装置，可以在作战中使用。好像是叫…叫…哦，叫<color=#dbc291ff>「照雪灯炉」</color>。
E: O—Oh yeah, the Technology Division told me that they'd set up advanced enemy defenses on the front line which could be used in combat. I th—think they're called... They're called <color=#dbc291ff>Snowshine Lamps</color>.

C: 装置的具、具体使用方法，您可以在前线咨询奥列格兵长。
E: Ask Captain Oleg on the front lines about how to use it.

C: 汪汪…汪！汪！
E: Woof woof... Woof! Woof!

C: 进不去啊，怎么办？
E: We can't get in. What now?

C: （对了，我体积小，或许能利用附近的物件挡住它们的视线。）
E: (Oh yeah, I'm small. I can use nearby objects to obstruct their line of sight.)

C: 「奇物」是什么？
E: What is a Curio?

C: 门禁就是你弄坏的！
E: You are the one who broke the access control!

C: （算了，别管它了。我们还是去拿回奇物吧，我先解除同步，你可以先放松下筋骨。）
E: (Forget it. Don't bother. Let's retrieve the Curio. I will desync now, and you can relax.)

C: 佩佩解除了同步。
E: Peppy desynchronized.

C: 谢谢你呀，听着{NICKNAME}讲故事，人家就会开心起来。即便这件事不是每天都会发生，但人家会一直期待下去。再会，{NICKNAME}！
E: Thank you! Listening to {NICKNAME} tell stories always brightens my day even if it's not a daily treat. I'll always look forward to it. Until next time, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我倒是不介意呢，一直盼望着新的故事，生活也会变得多彩起来……
E: I don't mind. I'm always looking forward to new stories — they really are the spice of life...

C: 就差背下来了。
E: I can practically recite it by now.

C: 虽然很漂亮，但偶尔会让人家怕怕的…还好一醒来就看到{NICKNAME}啦！
E: They're so beautiful, but sometimes they make me feel a little uneasy... but it's alright. I wake up and see {NICKNAME} right there!

C: 嘻嘻！竟然没有逗人家，都有点不习惯啦！那你继续！人家也再看你一会儿。
E: Hehe! You didn't tease me. I'm not very used to this! Keep going. I'll watch you for a little while longer.

C: 嘻嘻，不过我记住啦。下一次，人家会在{NICKNAME}心情更好的时候出现。
E: Hehe, but I'll keep it in mind. Next time, I'll show up when you're in a better mood.

C: 时间总要继续向前呀，不过，能看到{NICKNAME}这么舍不得，人家的确很开心呢。
E: Time always moves forward, but seeing {NICKNAME} so reluctant to leave makes me really happy.

C: 这次的占算对象是什么呢？
E: What's the divination target this time?

C: 你先走吧，我再想想…
E: Go, then. I must think some more...

C: 不对不对，怎么会这么快就解开了。
E: No, no, wait. How could you have figured that out so quickly?

C: 你怎么认识我？
E: You know me?

C: 拿着你的宝箱走吧。但你记住，三百年河东、三百年河西，莫欺少年穷！
E: Take your treasure chest and leave. But remember, fortunes change over three centuries, so don't underestimate the youth!

C: …我感觉老大还能抢救一下。
E: ...I'm sure it's not too late for the boss.

C: 最后还是决定使用了简单易懂的「Remake」。
E: Finally, we decided to take the simplest approach and chose "Remake."

C: 你想要的难度设置好了。上吧。
E: The difficulty you asked for has been configured. Go forth.

C: 看起来不错哦！游客！能实现就好啦！
E: Doesn't sound too bad! It's fine as long as you realize it!

C: 嗯…有位织者不够小心，爬到了远超自身能力的高度。金丝带来消息，它正吊在<color=#dbc291ff>天平一侧的托盘底下</color>呢，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... a weaver accidentally climbed to a height beyond its own ken. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hanging from <color=#dbc291ff>a plate on one side of a scale</color>. Go look for it there.

C: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
E: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

C: 嗯…有位织者年老且睿智。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>城外桥梁的尽头</color>，目送出征的战士们远去。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who gets wiser with age. The golden thread brings tidings: They now observe the warriors departing <color=#dbc291ff>at the far end of the bridge outside the city</color>.

C: 嗯…有位织者性格自卑，无法和同类玩耍。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>倒地的雕像前</color>，把雕像当成自己的好朋友。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has low self-esteem and can't play with its kind. The golden thread brings tidings: They now seek comfort <color=#dbc291ff>before a fallen statue</color>, as if the statue were their closest friend.

C: 你证明了自己的力量——任何若虫都无法比拟，我会为你让路。
E: You have proven your strength. No nymph is your equal, I will open the path for you.

C: 盯着眼前的蝇头小利，难免会因小失大，您先听我一言再做判断吧~
E: If you obsess over your small losses, you are sure to lose sight of the greater gains. Why not hear me out before you make your decision?

C: 您先别急，我还没说完呢！
E: Don't be so hasty. I haven't finished!

C: 诶？嗯…真的假的？我也不是那么随便的…等等，你不会是在拿我消遣吧？
E: Huh? Uh... Are you serious? I'm not so free and easy as to just... Wait a minute. Are you making fun of me?

C: 现在，我连个宝箱也不能从您手上偷走。这样的我，干脆跳下重渊，游到塞纳托斯面前，让它给我个痛快好了……
E: Now, I can't even pry a single treasure from your hands... As I am now, I may as well jump into the Abyss, swim up to Thanatos, and let them put me out of my misery...

C: 每次假期结束前都想试试…
E: I always toy with the idea when my holiday is about to end...

C: 银、银河球棒侠大人，久仰！
E: Th—The Galactic Baseballer! I've heard so much about you!

C: 看来您也不知道更多……
E: Seems like you don't know much else either...

C: 不是很感兴趣。
E: Not very interested.

C: 「无法确定」包含着一种最深的智慧。我记得扎格列斯老祖就说过……
E: Uncertainty holds the greatest wisdom. As great Zagreus used to say...

C: 我可是考据党。
E: I'm a lore collector.

C: 绝妙的藏宝地。
E: An excellent place to stash treasures.

C: 得了吧，你又不是泰坦……
E: Stop it. You're no Titan...

C: 你提到了再创世？
E: Did you just say "Era Nova"?

C: 吼吼吼…原来你是这么看呀。
E: Ohh... So that's your theory, is it?

C: …你不是巴特鲁斯？
E: ...Wait, you're not Bartholos?

C: 看守宝箱之怪物吾已清理，汝可安享收益。巴特鲁斯大人曾告诫吾等…有一天外之神秘生物，名唤「策划」，专司吾等命运。
E: The monsters guarding the chest have been dealt with. Enjoy your spoils. Lord Bartholos once warned us... A mysterious being from beyond, known as the "Developers," governs our fate.

C: 难道还有一位隐藏的天才？
E: Could there be another hidden genius?

C: 切，一点幽默细胞都没有的家伙。
E: Tch. No sense of humor at all.

C: 那是那是，毕竟这个城邦也病得不轻……
E: True that. This whole city's pretty sick, after all...

C: 桀桀。不愧是你，一眼就能看穿老巴特鲁斯的演技！
E: Heh-heh. I knew it, nothing gets past you! Saw right through my act, didn't you?

C: 我掏…我掏……
E: Let me just... dig a bit... dig a bit more...

C: 啊——没关系，这个实验不需要你出手，你只要当个见证人，避免偶然路过的谁不小心把我叫醒，别让实验意外被打断就好。
E: And don't worry, I'm not going to ask you to participate in the actual experience. Just be my witness, and make sure no one accidentally interrupts the experiment by waking me up.

C: 至少绿灯变红灯了。
E: At least the green light turned red.

C: 是某位看不见的「世界的守护者」抹去了那些数据。仅此而已。
E: Some unseen "Guardian of the World" erased those results. And that's all there is to it.

C: 好的，我这就去工作。
E: Alright, I'll just start working.

C: 顺便一说，你试过用球撞怪物吗？可好玩了！就像是你刚来的…啊不，我什么也没说。
E: By the way, have you tried using the ball to hit monsters? It's so fun! Just like when you first arrived... Oops, I didn't say anything.

C: 我还给每个招式都起了名字，左旋球叫「电光石火」，右旋球叫「石破天惊」，直球叫「直球」。
E: I even named each move! The left spin is "Flash Strike," the right spin is "Earth-Shattering," and the straight shot is just "Straight Shot."

C: 里面藏了什么宝贝？
E: What kind of treasure's inside?

C: 难怪感觉哪都空空的…
E: No wonder it feels so empty...

C: 一枚余火缓缓下落，降在伊来内的掌心。
E: A single ember drifts downward, landing gently in Alain's palm.

C: 斯蒂芬也这么说——我不是很懂，但随便啦。更重要的是：奖赏也会增加！
E: Stephen said the same thing. I don't really get "fun," but whatever. What's more important is that the rewards will also increase!

C: 怎么回事？
E: What happened?

C: 「你陨落太久，宇宙失去了秩序。」祂开始拍手，「接着，一切开始变得混乱！这就是我想要的！我想拥抱你，<color=#dbc291ff>可惜我是个计算机里的方程</color>。噢，这好像还挺酷的。」祂挠了挠头。
E: "You have fallen too long and the universe has lost its order." THEY began to clap THEIR hands, "Then everything started to turn to chaos! This is what I want! I want to hug you, <color=#dbc291ff>unfortunately I'm just an equation in a computer</color>. Oh, that seems kinda cool." THEY scratched THEIR head.

C: 「比如，」男人没有看你，他磕磕绊绊地说，「呃，比如，这就是个随机事件。我写了一些模板，但『模拟宇宙』现在没办法把它转换成有效的内容。所以你会看到下面这些……」
E: "Like," he stutters without looking at you, "like, uh, this is a random Occurrence now. I wrote some templates, but the simulation currently doesn't have any way of converting them into content. So, you will just see the following..."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「你以为升级是什么，电子游戏的版本更新吗？每一个半月给你点无足轻重的小玩意儿？」</color>黑塔啧了一声，<color=#dbc291ff>「这可是一整个微型宇宙！如果所有变化你都能一眼看见，我们还费劲培育宇宙干什么，给你家列车盖个花园不就行了？」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"What do you think an upgrade is? The next version of a video game? Some tiny rewards handed out every one-and-half-months?"</color> Herta snorts. <color=#dbc291ff>"This is a whole micro-universe! If you could see all the changes at a glance, why would we spend all the time training a universe? I can just build a garden for your Express instead!"</color>

C: 你们又想整什么活？
E: What tricks are you trying to pull this time?

C: 模拟宇宙确实很无聊！
E: The Simulated Universe bores me to death!

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 祂来了？你不知道阿哈是什么意思——盛大的巡礼却突然开启，一片喧嚣与欢闹，你却开始无声地尖叫。暖流撩拨着你，上万双眼睛于同一瞬间温柔地看着你，对你发出邀请。
E: THEY are coming? While you are still confused by what Aha said, a grand parade begins all of a sudden. Your surrounding turns boisterous and lively, but you start screaming in silence. A warm current stirs within you as tens of thousands of eyes gently gaze at you invitingly.

C: 但你的眼泪不经意间浇灭了无数的*沙制机兵*…它们开始发出抗议！快停止哭泣吧。
E: Your tears inadvertently destroy countless *Sand Mechs*... prompting them to protest! Please, just stop crying.

C: 传言参与蠹星大屠杀的赏金猎人们，此后一直在清洗手上彩色的血液。
E: Rumors abound that the bounty hunters who participated in the massacre on Lepismat have been washing the multicolored blood from their hands ever since.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了求药使的祷告。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into a prayer from an Elixir Seeker.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: （无视阿哈。）
E: (Ignore Aha.)

C: 继续吧，我感觉不错。
E: Let's continue. I feel good.

C: 「第二个选择：追随『装卸部』<color=#dbc291ff>柯拉帕乌</color>。他们是新生的集团，如同所有的新生代那样：狂妄、热情、年轻气盛。他身后追随着不同星球的『<color=#dbc291ff>合伙人</color>』，把持宇宙资源的运输、物流。」
E: "Your second choice: Follow <color=#dbc291ff>Korapao</color> from the Cargo Division. It is a newly established division. Like all the youths, they are cocky, enthusiastic, and full of vim and vigor. Korapao has the support of the <color=#dbc291ff>Associates</color> across the planets and is in charge of the logistics of resources in the universe."

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 我是*共犯*。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I am her accomplice.

C: 「安达吐尔•扎扎罗」…那是谁？它好像陪伴你很多次，但你从未注意它。无论是谁，模拟宇宙从未知晓它的姓名；但在「博识尊」的计算下，它的「死亡」不可避免。
E: Andatur Zazzalo... Who's that? It seems to have accompanied you many times, but you never notice it. No matter who it is, its name is never known by the Simulated Universe. However, its death will be inevitable, as calculated by Nous.

C: 重建花园。
E: Rebuild the garden.

C: 这或许也是我的命运。
E: This may just be my destiny.

C: 冷漠地拒绝。
E: Coolly decline.

C: 头好晕。
E: I'm dizzy.

C: 好黑啊。
E: It's dark.

C: 空白。
E: Blank.

C: 你记录下它的破碎，完成这次的结题。
E: As you record how it breaks to pieces, you conclude this project.

C: 我不得不自戕。
E: I have to take my own life.

C: 「查询已完成，课题价值核准中。」系统提示音的语调和缓，基于完美进化学派的理论，给予听者好感的最佳振幅，「核准已完成，您的配额为，万分之一的算力使用权，愿您在『智识』之路上寻得真理。」
E: "Inquiry complete. Topic value calculation in progress." The tone of the system's voice prompt is warm. According to the School of Evolutionary Perfection's theory, it uses the optimal amplitude to invoke goodwill in the listener. "Verification complete. Your authorized allocation is one ten-thousandth computational power. May you discover truth on the road of Erudition."

C: 她敲了敲你的额头，将你从角色扮演中唤醒。
E: She raps your forehead, shaking you out of your roleplay.

C: 一具无可腐朽的金属躯壳。
E: A metal shell that cannot decay.

C: 一颗隐形的星星。二世曾认为自己把它藏得很好，被虚数能量包裹，却又恰到好处地处于内外平衡状态，即使花上千纪的时间，围绕王座的卫星也不会被人发现。
E: A hidden star. Rubert II believed he had it perfectly concealed, enveloped in Imaginary energy but also a perfect state of internal and external balance. One could search for thousands of Amber Eras and never find this satellite that circled the Throne.

C: 「呼…终于进来了。应该没被寂静领主发现吧…」斯蒂芬•劳艾德警惕地四处张望。
E: "Phew... Finally in. The Lord of Silence probably didn't notice me..." Stephen Lloyd looks around warily.

C: 路过的杀手将从天而降的凶器——这支足以钉住掀起风暴的蝴蝶的「标本针」拾起，紧握在手。
E: The passing killer picked up this murder weapon that fell from the sky — this specimen needle capable of nailing a butterfly that could whip up storms — and tightly gripped it in her hand.

C: 证明给我看。
E: Prove it to me.

C: 「你…误会了。」他的声音变得急促，「这是互动戏剧，是戏剧性的一环。」
E: "You've... got the wrong idea." There is urgency in his voice. "You're watching an interactive play. This is a part of the show."

C: 你走进莱顿宁星球昏暗的汽车旅馆。在楼梯口，有位硕大的客人令你害怕——它的身体由透明胶液构成，两只头正互相碰撞，一只长着红色触角，一只带有白色光圈。
E: You enter a dimly-lit motel on Layton. At the stairway, you meet a massive guest who looks intimidating. Its body is formed by a transparent gel-like substance, and it has two heads knocking each other — one of them has red antennae, while the other has a white halo.

C: 你获得了1个祝福。
E: You obtained 1 Blessing.

C: 说着说着…这位顾客的头发理好，它便在你眼前飞走了。
E: Soon, their hair is done. They then fly away before your eyes.

C: 「嘿嘿，我的蓬肚肚。」警觉的苍猿，在你的抚摸下逐渐失去了敌意，它瘫软在石头上，任凭另一头灵长类玩弄。
E: "Heh-heh, my floofy tummy." The wary ape gradually throws all caution to the wind under your caress, lounging limply across the rock, allowing another primate to play with it.

C: 结论：应当通过抹消有机生命的方式，纠正宇宙的生命模式。
E: Conclusion: The life model of the cosmos should be corrected by the means of eliminating organic lifeforms.

C: 「宇宙就是一场戏剧！谁能保证，自己不是在舞台上表演？」
E: "The universe is a big play! Who can guarantee that they are not performing onstage?"

C: 这么诡异的地方，万一放出只星际老僵尸可就糟了。
E: It would be troublesome if an ancient interstellar zombie were to be unleashed in such an eerie place.

C: 墨涅塔的金茧里生长出花束，雕像褪色为纯白，被蝴蝶环绕的诗人们，倾倒身体躺在石阶边缘，撩拨手中的琴弦。
E: A bouquet blooms from Mnestia's golden chrysalis, statues faded to alabaster white, poets surrounded by flitting butterflies, their bodies leaned against the edge of the stone steps, gently caressing the strings of their lyres.

C: 你在残垣断壁中来回穿梭，试图从破碎的雕像与祭坛中找到一条通路，可石门上的巨大镜子却挡在了你的面前，「入此门者，当心怀一线希望。」
E: You weave through the dilapidated ruins, attempting to navigate your way through shattered statues and altars, but a massive mirror on the stone wall blocks your way: "Those who enter must carry with them a thread of hope."

C: 在永夜之帷下，岁月为你们展现古老的过去，没有监牢也没有暴君的时代。监狱的石壁在眼前瓦解，你们信步向外走去。
E: Beneath the Veil of Evernight, time shows you the ancient past, an era without prisons or tyrants. The prison's stone walls crumble before your eyes, and you all stride freely into the world beyond.

C: 他掰断冥河河畔的苇草，编织成筏，以渡过死亡的湍流。又把黄金磨成匕首，以抗衡腐蚀与崩解。他跟随死者们的灵魂顺流而下，试图刺杀掌船的塞纳托斯，挑战它的神权。
E: He broke reeds from the banks of the River of Souls, weaving them into a raft to cross Death's perilous waters. He ground gold into a dagger to defy decay and disintegration. Following the current of the dead, he sought to assassinate Thanatos while on the boat and usurp their divine authority.

C: 为父亲报仇。
E: He avenged his father.

C: 可怕的纷争。
E: Dreadful Strife.

C: 有人利用「永夜天帷」的旗号招摇撞骗，其中最知名者便是扎格列斯。它曾假扮成欧洛尼斯，宣告伊卡利亚即将爆发大洪水，害得满城百姓连夜迁移。
E: Some deceive others under the banner of the Evernight Veil, the most famous member being Zagreus. They once disguised themselves as Oronyx, declaring that a great flood was about to engulf Icaria, causing the entire city to flee overnight.

C: 由于地震的破坏性过于巨大，以至于庞恩培拉没有留下任何文物，全靠几位欧洛尼斯的信徒相信了预言并提前逃难，后世的人们才能知晓灾难的细节。
E: The earthquake's devastation was so absolute that Pompeia left no relics behind. Only a few devout followers of Oronyx, who heeded the prophecy and fled beforehand, allowed later generations to learn the details of the catastrophe.

C: 泰坦的力量好强大。
E: Titans' might are so overwhelming.

C: 正如加蒂尔的首领带领他的民众，不舍昼夜地搬运石料，巩固堤坝，就为了不让家园在海洋之神的某次狂欢中毁于一旦。
E: Just as the leader of Kadir led his people to toil day and night, hauling stone and fortifying the dikes, all in the hope that their home would not be destroyed in one of the sea god's wild revels.

C: 土壤里很快长出一个婴孩，那婴孩拥有思考的头脑，与支撑世界的四肢。每呼吸一次，它的身体就变得更大一些，它的智慧也变得更多一些。
E: From the soil, a child swiftly emerged, with a mind that could think and limbs strong enough to bear the weight of the world. With each breath, their body grew larger, and their wisdom deepened.

C: 「是梦，还是回忆呢？」她笑了起来，「也许是一回事哦？总之，好好享受这个故事吧。」
E: "Is it a dream, or a memory?" she laughed, "Maybe they're one and the same? Either way, just sit back and enjoy the story."

C: 还是别碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 在某个按钮附近贴着一张警告：「未经许可坐下以及按下冲水按钮，造成的一切后果本科室概不承担。」
E: There's a button with a warning posted beside it: "Our department is not responsible for any consequences suffered by those who sit down and press Flush without permission."

C: 有机会的话，一定！前提是你们得好好学习，好好吃饭！
E: If the chance arises, then definitely! On the condition that you work hard and eat well!

C: 哪里哪里，该感到荣幸的人是我才对！你的名字，奥列格师父跟希儿他们都经常提及。
E: No, no, the honor's all mine! Master Oleg and Seele have mentioned your name many times before.

C: 尽管那指令极不清晰，你还是凭本能将手掌置入其中。但为什么？你为这下意识的反应感到震悚…随后，你感到一股莫之能御的愧疚感席卷全身——
E: Although the instruction is unclear, you still place your hand in the box out of instinct. But why? You are shocked by your reaction... Next, you experience an overwhelming sense of guilt surging through your body...

C: 该不该告诉老母亲真相？这「传统项目部」——分部——其实只是个养老部门，根本毫无出路？你呜咕，嗡嗡，拧死油门，蹿入新伦蒂尼恩的空中立交航道。
E: Should you tell your mother the truth? That the Traditional Project Department is, in fact, a place for people to retire in and has no future? With a whimper, you twist the throttle to the max and dash into the aerial interchange lane in New Londinium.

C: 可惜晚了。就在你将注意力从云幕扯回道路的瞬间，浮空摩托突然哑火，不受控制地坠向地面…你只希望不要摔进白金汉大道，不然随后的罚款可够你喝一壶了。
E: Yet it is too late. The instant you return your attention from the clouds to the road, the engine of the floating motorcycle suddenly misfires and plummets to the ground out of your control... You just hope you won't land on Buckingham Avenue, or you will be fined an enormous amount.

C: 食物被留在餐盘中却未腐败；无人照管的炉火引发了火灾，复又被大雨熄灭；钢笔在无常的引力中滚落地面，墨水污染了整个房间……
E: Food left on plates hasn't rotten yet. Unattended fireplaces set the building on fire which is later put out by rain. Pens drop to the floor due to gravity, and their ink stain the entire room...

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 啊，你想，这儿好像是这帮泥巴人的御用议事厅！可这场会议与你何干？你忘了。不过你很清楚，只要出现在这里，你就有机会把它们肚子里的珍贵矿藏撬出来。
E: Oh, this place seems to be the Royal Council Chamber of the Claymen! You have forgotten why you are attending the meeting, but you know it is a golden opportunity to pry out the precious minerals from the bellies of the Claymen.

C: 可不能把命赔进去，你想，还是走老路子吧——要是有命挣钱没命花，那才是蠢材呢。你咂咂嘴，开始考虑下一步该如何行动……
E: You can't pay for this with your life. You settle for doing things the old way. You work to live, not live to work. You smack your lips in anticipation and start to plan your next steps...

C: 嗡是什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you feeling okay?

C: 向你挑战！
E: I challenge you!

C: 一般情况，找我租借矿具是要交订金或者实物抵押的…不是我小气啊，是环境如此——不讲信誉的，贪小便宜的家伙可太多了。
E: Normally, I don't lend mining tools without a cash deposit or something to serve as collateral... This isn't me being stingy here. It's just the environment. There are way too many people out there who go back on their word and try to nickle and dime me.

C: 不需要冗杂的鉴定步骤，你内心已经十分清楚——这下发财了。
E: A stone like this doesn't need complex appraisal. You know full well that this is big money.

C: 嗯，我当时也有同感。虽然他只上场了三四次，但几乎每一局都是碾压获胜——连一滴汗都不带流的。
E: Uh-huh. I feel the same way as you. He might have only gotten into the ring three or four times, but he crushed his opponent every match without breaking a sweat.

C: …认赌服输。我这就交钱。
E: ...I admit defeat. I'll pay now.

C: 女人给了你一个冷酷的眼神…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
E: The lady pierces you with an icy glare... but her expression quickly returns to normal.

C: 它何止是*一般*。它甚至可以被用来定义*一般*。
E: It's more than just *average*. It could even be used to define the concept of *average*.

C: 感谢关照，服务总体很满意。
E: I'm very happy with the excellent service. Thank you.

C: 我后悔了…再重新填一张吧。
E: I regret everything... Let's fill out another card.

C: 房门紧闭。坚实的木板后，隐约传来窸窸窣窣的响动。想来这房间一定属于某位贝洛伯格居民。
E: The door is shut tightly. Behind the sturdy wood, you can vaguely hear a rustling sound. This room must belong to a resident of Belobog.

C: 没想到你一进入这房间，它们就都动了起来…赢得还真是轻松呢喀。
E: I didn't know they'd all start moving as soon as you walked into the room... What an easy win.

C: 在真正的「美」面前，思考只是一种亵渎喀。
E: When facing true "beauty," any thoughts are but sacrilege, crrrk.

C: 经常和命运打交道的人，自有分寸。
E: People who often cross paths with fate have their own standard for the two.

C: 正当你全神贯注地盯着手机屏幕时，猛然察觉到铁门背后的男人似乎有所异样——
E: Your attention is focused on your phone screen when you suddenly feel something off with the man behind the gate...

C: …但到了那时，您一定不会拒绝的。
E: ...But when the time comes, you will surely not decline.

C: 喔，不错嘛，荣誉队员！你藏得可真好！
E: Oh, not too bad, honorary member! You hid yourself excellently!

C: 今天就先到这里吧——和荣誉队员在一起，我们都玩得很开心哦！
E: Time to call it a day. We all had fun playing with the honorary member!

C: 卖艺？什么…等等！你先别着急喊出来！
E: Busking? What... Wait! Don't shout that!

C: 西风尽头…遐蝶也曾这样称呼过冥界。但这怎么可能？
E: The end of the west wind... Castorice once referred to the nether realm in the same way, but how is this possible?

C: 别睡了，起来飞！
E: Stop sleeping. Get up and fly!

C: 凭什么你能发现？
E: How did you manage to find it?

C: 我才没在担心！
E: I'm not worried!

C: 我是响应吾主呼唤的骑士，寻觅着足以破除愚昧迷雾、阐明万物运行的真理…可邪祟的势力太过猖狂，连我也不得不暂避锋芒嗡！
E: I am the knight summoned by my master, seeking the truth that dispels the fog of ignorance and reveals the workings of all things... But the forces of fiendlings are too rampant, and even I must momentarily retreat!

C: 凭借一些力量和技巧，你成功制服了集装箱，并将扣押其中的画册拯救了出来。这是一次成功的营救行动。
E: With a little strength and skill, you successfully break open the container and save the seized photo books stored within. It's a successful rescue mission.

C: 那就开始吧。
E: Then let's go.

C: 总之，先回到鹤运物流后再考虑？
E: So... You'll fly back to Heron Express and think things over?

C: 没错，老大，没有比他更好欺负的大人了。
E: I agree, Boss. There is no better grown-up to bully than this one.

C: 好吧，这道题真的很难，就算是获得了智慧的我，也没有搞清楚要怎么解开。用来考验你也正合适，你们把课后作业拿过来。
E: Well, this is a challenging one. Even someone as intellectually endowed as myself can't make heads or tails of it, so it's the perfect question to test your intellect. Bring the workbook over here.

C: 提问！
E: The question is...

C: 怎么就不公平了？
E: How so?

C: 看见它们其乐融融的样子，让你不禁在想，到底谁才是老大。总之，好像事情又解决了一桩，实在是可喜可贺。
E: Seeing how happy they are, you wonder who the boss actually is here. In any case, it seems like the matter has been resolved, which is something to celebrate.

C: 我再考虑考虑。
E: I'll consider it.

C: …那就到此为止吧。
E: ...Let's end this phase here.

C: 哇哦，你就是我的对手吗？看起来弱不禁风嘛。
E: Wow, are you my opponent? You look like a stiff sneeze away from keeling over.

C: 但无论如何，清点过各位选手剩下的包子数量后，我们认为——本届大胃王比赛的冠军，正是{NICKNAME}选手！
E: No matter which way you look at it, our scrutineers have counted out the remaining buns and adjudged the winner of this year's Competitive Eater Championship as none other than — Contestant {NICKNAME}!

C: …好像对自己的工作更加有成就感了。
E: ...Sounds like it makes the job even more worthwhile for you.

C: 「舰长莅临舰桥！」
E: "Welcome to the Bridge, Captain!"

C: 见证历史的时刻！
E: A moment that will go down in history!

C: 好好听讲！
E: Pay attention!

C: 这不是已经有一位测试者了吗？
E: Don't you already have a tester here?

C: 是，虽然这波月古海是有阻燃防爆的功用——但这片水体更是仙舟持明族的生命之水、是他们的古老信仰的象征！
E: Yes, the waters of Lunarescent Depths have flame-retardant and antiknocking properties — But this body of water is also the sacred water of life for the Vidyadhara people, the symbol of their ancient beliefs!

C: 真的不能再讨价还价了吗？
E: Are you sure that I can't haggle?

C: 炸了怎么办？！
E: What if it blows up!?

C: 我就一口气写了三十条回复揭穿他，惹得他极生气，到处放话说要和我碰一碰。
E: So I responded with thirty replies to expose his lies. He was so riled up, he openly threatened to meet me face-to-face to have a fight.

C: 要我看，年轻人还是去太卜司舒服。就待在仙舟上喝喝茶算算卦，坐着刷刷玉兆就把钱挣了，多舒服啊！
E: In my opinion, young people should go to the Divination Commission for an easy life. Just stay on the Xianzhou, drink some tea, do some divination, and earn money by scrolling on the jade abacus. It's so comfortable!

C: 怎么还没来？奇怪……
E: He's still not here? Weird...

C: 不知怎的，你感觉一股莫名的正义感充斥了全身。是时候做些热血开拓者会做的事情了。
E: You somehow feel a strange sense of justice surging through your body. It's time to do whatever a hot-blooded trailblazer has to do.

C: 井盖下的热气喷涌而出，仿佛一个新生的火山口，以炙热的咆哮鞭笞世界。
E: Hot steam bursts forth from under the manhole cover, lashing at the world with a fiery roar like a newly-birthed volcano.

C: 这个巨大的钟表小子是这条街引以为傲的地标，其他街区的孩子都向这里投来艳羡的目光。
E: The giant Clockie here is this street's proud landmark. Children from other neighborhoods all look upon it with great envy.

C: 看，一台长得像垃圾桶的探照灯——也可能是会发光的微型垃圾桶。
E: Look! There's a searchlight that looks like a trashcan!... Or maybe it is a miniature trashcan that lights up?

C: 可尽管如此，你仍能隐约听见，来自隧道彼端的阵阵轰鸣。
E: Even if that is the case, you can still faintly hear a constant roaring from the other side of the tunnel.

C: 三位无名客的纪念碑。英雄们的名字横卧于小小的石头上，几近无法辨认。
E: A monument for three Nameless. The heroes' names are etched nigh illegibly across small steles.

C: 将电视机摆在这里。
E: Place the television here.

C: 小小哈努努的尊严实在太沉重了，按照过往的经验，他的膝盖被压至硬化，无法跳跃。
E: Little Hanunue's dignity weighs too heavily. Based on experiences, his knees have been rendered too stiffened to be able to jump.

C: 应该是从叙事诗里改编的。
E: I think it's based on an epic poem.

C: *鼾声如雷*
E: *thunderous snoring*

C: 不该谢吉奥里亚吗？
E: Shouldn't you be thanking Georios?

C: 压力大时更爱泡澡嘛。
E: People want to bathe more when they're more stressed.

C: 请勿大声喧哗，别走散了！
E: Quiet please, and keep with the group!

C: 因为…我被岁月抛下了。
E: Because... time no longer waits for me.

C: 犹豫？切不可优柔寡断。
E: Hesitate? Do not be indecisive.

C: 不然活着还有什么意思！
E: Otherwise, what's the point of surviving?

C: （向玦轮上方投掷。）
E: (Aim above the jade wheel.)

C: 只要{NICKNAME}乘客乖乖的，那就还是帕姆最喜欢的{NICKNAME}乘客！帕你我今天所说的话，就让它烂在帕姆的肚子帕。
E: As long as {NICKNAME} is well-behaved, then {NICKNAME} is still my favorite passenger! Pom-Pom shall carry the secret to the end of time.

C: 你好好说话，不要学帕姆说帕！
E: Speak properly, and don't imitate Pom-Pom!

C: 你觉得车厢打扫得算干净吗？我最近总觉得好像有点不对劲……
E: Do you think the carriage is very clean? Pom-Pom's been feeling lately like something isn't quite right...

C: 呜哇！我就知道{NICKNAME}乘客心里有我！
E: Wow! Pom-Pom knew {NICKNAME} had me on their mind!

C: 「还行」的话，为什么只有六分？
E: If Pom-Pom is "pretty good," why did you only give me a six out of ten?

C: 你还没来得及把双腿放到坐垫上，帕姆就快速冲了过来……
E: Before you even have the time to place both feet upon the cushion, Pom-Pom charges over...

C: 这就是我想的办法。
E: This is what I came up with.

C: （还是算了吧）
E: (Forget it)

C: 我喜欢吃辣！
E: I like spicy food!

C: 没有不理你，帕姆只是想自己独处一会儿，之后再理你！
E: I just want some me-time before spending time with you!

C: 怎么样，看到自己的「杰作」了吗？
E: Have you seen the "masterpiece" you made?

C: 三月乘客一直都在说车厢的车灯太过单调沉闷了，作为列车长也是很困扰的！
E: March's been complaining that the lights in the coaches are too simple and boring. As the conductor, I'm very bothered by it!

C: 这玩意儿总是时不时自动关机，要不然就是导航报错。我研究过了，它的底层逻辑一塌糊涂……
