E: These little robots always shut down automatically from time to time, and also report errors in navigation. I've researched them, and their underlying logic is a mess...

C: 请教管理经验…
E: Please give me some management advice...

C: 什么嘛，帕姆明明看到他都打呼噜了。
E: But who does he think he's fooling? Pom-Pom saw him fall asleep right in front of me.

C: 关于丹恒：长枪
E: About Dan Heng: The spear

C: 「少校」？
E: The Major?

C: 向你致敬，{NICKNAME}教官。哔——啵。
E: I salute you, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}. Beep — boop.

C: 啊，当然。报酬一定少不了。
E: Oh yes — remuneration is a must.

C: 这些东西你拿去吧，就当是我雇你干这趟苦差的报酬。保重，{NICKNAME}！
E: These are for you. You can treat them as my rewards for you. Take care, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我知道您想的是什么。
E: I understand what you must be thinking.

C: 我承认了，你是被选中的战士…跟我来吧。
E: I see you're a chosen one. Follow me.

C: 什么？！你居然出石头……
E: What, you're choosing rock?

C: 来，这是我们精心准备的——「愤怒拳套」——的配方！
E: It's the secret to making our Wrathful Gauntlets!

C: 还在嘴硬？看来必须得让你尝点苦头才行了——
E: Backtalking, are you? Guess I got to put some hurting on you...

C: 没人能阻止我——没有人！
E: No one can stop me! No one!

C: 都什么时候了还谈这个？
E: We don't have time for this!

C: 此处贴着一幅狂放不羁的画像…或者说，通缉令。不过，画中的人物眉宇间透露着几分沉静，又带有些许威慑，倒不似画作本身那样狂野。
E: There's an expressively unbridled portrait here... or rather, a Wanted poster. But this guy's eyebrows betray a hint of serenity, as well as slight gravitas — yet not as wild as the poster itself.

C: 这些…狂野的画像是谁画的？
E: Who painted these... wild portraits?

C: 换言之，想在大守护者的办公桌上大闹一番是要付出代价的……
E: In other words, there's a price to pay for causing trouble at the Supreme Guardian's desk...

C: 作为她的朋友，请问我这个时候该说什么？
E: As her friend, what should I say at such a time?

C: 我真希望贝洛伯格能再大一些…那样我就不用担心会再碰见你了。
E: I wish Belobog could be larger, so I don't chance running into you.
Three.

C: 我不是给了钱，让你改过自新吗？
E: Didn't I give you some money so you could turn over a new leaf?

C: 你直接摸到了罐底。那里没有你刚投入的垃圾，也没有像是「罐中仙」的东西。接着，你在罐底摸到了一个东西——那是罐中仙的「谢礼」。
E: You touch the bottom of the vase. The rubbish you dropped in is nowhere to be found, and there's nothing that might be the Immortal in a Vase. Then, you do feel something — it's the Immortal's "gift."

C: 原来那些奇怪的讯号是从这里发出的！看来这只可怜的机巧鸟是故障以后被困在这里了…没关系，我已经标记好了位置，很快就会有人来救它的。
E: So this is where those strange signals came from! Looks like this poor thing has been stuck here since it went faulty... Don't worry. I've marked its location, and someone will come to its aid in no time.

C: 禨祥台
E: Fortuna Augurstead

C: 你刚好有一个铁盒，天下怎么有这么巧的事情？
E: You've got an iron box with you? What an incredible coincidence!

C: 这里——我的脑子、我的记忆…似乎出了问题。我好像忘记了什么，但又不是那么确定。
E: Here... my brain and my memory... something seems to be wrong with them. I seem to have forgotten something, but then again I'm not entirely sure.

C: 这也是为什么我不希望您和他接触…不过放心吧，家族这次又加派了人手，我们绝不会再给他伤害别人的机会。
E: This is why I don't want you to have any further contact with him... But don't worry. The Family has sent additional security. There's no way we're giving him any more chances to hurt someone.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 这老先生可真不得了，竟然直接将*意识*投射成*实体*了……
E: That old guy is really something. I can't believe he has projected his "consciousness" into an "entity"...

C: 你看着倒是个好苗子…怎么样，有兴趣进军影视圈吗？老头子我保证能把你培养成知名导演。
E: You seem like a good prospect... How about it, are you interested in joining the ranks of the cinema circle? I guarantee to train you up to become a famous director.

C: 如果真的想知道我的感受，那就回现实和她聊聊吧。这样你就知道她究竟有多虚伪了。
E: If you really want to know how I feel, then go back out to reality and talk to her. That way you'll know for yourself what a hypocrite she is.

C: 一切都为了她荒唐可笑的自我满足！都为了她毫无意义的自我折磨！
E: And all for her ridiculous ego! All because of her meaningless self-torture!

C: …船长？
E: ..."Captain"?

C: 为保证猎杀效率，韦兰将自己的神经连进了舰桥终端，从而对整艘战舰如臂指使。代价就是，一旦失去虚空鲸提取液的供给，他就会在数小时内器官衰竭，最后死去。
E: Wyland hooked his nervous system straight into the bridge terminal for maximum hunting efficiency, so that commanding the entire battleship was like moving a limb. The cost was that once he lost his supply of whale extract, he would experience organ failure and perish soon after.

C: 一去才发现，信标早就不在原来的位置了。某个意外让它脱离了固定点，正朝着黑洞所在的方向一路飘去，很快就会越过事件视界。
E: Upon arrival, we discovered that the beacon wasn't in its original spot. An accident had dragged it away from its fixed location, and it was drifting toward the black hole — soon to cross over the event horizon.

C: 至于这到底是机缘还是诅咒，恐怕只有时间能给出答案……
E: As for whether this is a blessing or a curse, I'm afraid only time can deliver an answer...

C: 大哥，咱们就在门口等着，看那女人能嚣张到什么时候。
E: Dude, let's wait at the door and see how much that lady can keep up the smugness.

C: 我是一个不幸的人，没能赶上英雄们开拓寰宇的时代。一直以来，我都对真正的无名客心怀羡慕与嫉妒……
E: I'm an unfortunate soul, who never got to see the age of heroes trailblazing the universe. I've always been envious and jealous of the real Nameless ones...

C: 在这种眼光下，还有什么比宇宙尽头的秘宝更能激起人的探索欲呢？
E: From this perspective, what could stimulate people's desire for exploration more than a secret treasure at the edge of the universe?

C: 也许吧，奥特兰确实因此存续了一段时间…大概半个琥珀纪吧。
E: Perhaps. Outerland did survive for some time because of it... for about half an Amber Era.

C: 也许吧，但故事是无害的，它已经是过去式了，我现在讲得再多也不会伤害到任何人。
E: You might be right, but that story is already in the past. It won't harm anybody no matter how many times I retell it.

C: 自那以后，我就成了「宇宙行商」科琳。
E: I've become a traveling merchant since then.

C: 谁知道呢？希望他不是随便塞了什么东西来糊弄我…不然我会让他后悔被生出来。
E: Who knows? I hope he isn't trying to fool me, or I'll make him regret ever being born.

C: 而且，呃…不知道你听说过没有，我们的上一个大项目——《末世班尼：烈火英雄》——发售的时候出了一点小小的，呃…意外。
E: Also, um... I'm not sure whether you've heard about the... um... little mishap that took place at the launch of our last major project, Apocalyptic Benny: Hero Baptised In Fire.

C: 依我之见，那个团队的筑梦师，工作的过程就像是在套公式。他们不是在搞创作，更像是在解几何题。
E: From the way I see it, their Dreamweavers seem to follow a fixed formula when they work. When it's supposed to be a creative process, they may look more like they are solving a geometric problem.

C: 你和家族聊过了？
E: Have you talked to The Family?

C: 一醉解千愁，无梦便无忧…嘿，我果然该去当个诗人……
E: I drink away my sorrow at night, so that I will have no dreams and sleep tight... I really should become a poet...

C: 这、这一定是费曼搞的鬼！怪不得他最近总和家族的人往来，他们一定是串通好的！
E: Th—This must be Feinman's doing! No wonder he's been contacting The Family a lot these days. They must be in cahoots!

C: 我看到新闻了，我那个好伙伴…竟然被抓了，还被扣上了「诈骗犯」的帽子！
E: I saw the news just now. My partner... was arrested and labeled a fraudster!

C: 您知道吗…那段时间，我就像在暴雨中艰难行走，感官与外界彻底隔绝。我几乎忘记了理想的芬芳、热情的滚烫、尽情挥洒汗水后获得的甘甜……
E: Did you know that... There was a time when I felt as though I was slugging my way through torrential rain, and my senses were isolated from the outside world. I became oblivious to the enticing scent of ideals, the burning sensation of passion, and the sweet aftertaste of hard work...

C: 眼前的皮皮西人突然爆发出癫狂的大笑…你无法相信他小小的身体里居然蕴藏了如此庞大的能量。
E: The Pepeshi in front of you suddenly bursts into maniacal laughter... You can't believe the amount of energy he possesses in his tiny body.

C: 哦…那个啊，那个当然也很重要。当然，我可没忘！
E: Oh, right... that... Yeah, that's important too! I haven't forgotten it! Of course not!

C: 它们现在归你了。拿走眼前这个家伙的东西完全不会令你觉得愧疚。
E: The tokens are yours now. Taking stuff from this guy won't make you feel guilty one bit.

C: 需要帮助吗？
E: Do you need any help?

C: 科蒂…我的挚爱，我的命运！我二十分之一的美好生命……
E: Coty... My love, my destiny! You are one-twentieth of my amazing life...

C: 呵，用不着我动手，他这不是自己就跑了吗？
E: Heh, I don't even have to lift a finger. He ran away all by himself.

C: 波波特说自己要离开黄金的时刻——他很有可能已经在<color=#dbc291ff>黄金中央车站</color>了，麻烦你快去找找他吧，他是个<color=#dbc291ff>金发的皮皮西男孩</color>，在人群中应该很显眼！
E: Popott said he would leave the Golden Hour... He might be at the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Central Station</color> by now. Please, bring him back to me. Look for a <color=#dbc291ff>Pepeshi boy with blonde hair</color>! He's standing out in the crowd!

C: 好心的宾客，请你帮我去找找波波特吧，我一定会想办法让他满意的。
E: Please, kind guest. Please help me find Popott. I'll make sure he's satisfied.

C: 我之所以加入鸢尾花家系，为的就是当一个喜剧演员。我喜欢看到大家对着我笑，而不是脸红尖叫…这些话我已经跟她说过无数次了。
E: The sole reason that I joined the Iris Family is to be a comedian. I enjoy making people laugh, not making them blush and scream for me... I've told her this many times.

C: ——不过我手下还有很多艺者：有相貌平平，但想要成为模特的演员；有仪表端庄，但想要追求个性的偶像；有音乐风格小众，却想红遍宇宙的歌手……
E: However, there are still many other artists under my management. Some aspire to become models despite having average looks, some are good-looking but dream of becoming idols with an unconventional style, while some compose niche music but yearn to be worldwide popular singers...

C: 你先听我这个好消息吧——在之后的演唱会上，你可以献唱真正的「纯美之歌」了！
E: Why don't you hear me out first? Listen, you can perform the real "Song of Beauty" at your future concerts!

C: {M#先生}{F#小姐}，我要去准备演出了。请您也来见证门达希亚的音乐在舞台上的表现吧，我的歌声一定不会让您失望的！
E: I'll be preparing for the show, dear {M#sir}{F#lady}. I kindly request your presence to witness my performance on stage. I'm confident that you won't be disappointed with my performance!

C: 命运真是不公，让我生在夜鹰的草窝，又让我向往阳光下的高空。
E: Fate has dealt me an unfair hand. I was born in the humble nest of a night hawk, only to make me yearn for the sunlit heights.

C: 可恶的经纪人！可恶的匹诺康尼！可恶的鸢尾花家系！
E: Curse the manager! Curse Penacony! Curse the Iris Family!

C: 你经常想不开吗？
E: Do you often have depressive thoughts?

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 可别把我银河球棒侠看扁了！
E: No one is to look down upon the Galactic Baseballer!

C: 哈，活着的感觉真好！
E: Aha, it feels amazing to be alive!

C: 只是，再没人能欣赏那个复苏的世界了。
E: Sadly, there's no one left to appreciate that revived world.

C: 看啊，人们时而交谈、时而欢笑，都在为一个共同的目标努力着；就算偶尔争吵，也不会有谁带着恶意攻击他人。
E: Look, people here are chatting and laughing from time to time as they work toward the same goal. Arguments happen occasionally, but no one means any harm to others.

C: 智械将垃圾收进了体内。
E: The Intellitron took the trash into her body.

C: …你怎么了？我帮你叫…谁在那？！
E: ...Are you all right? I'll get some help for... Who's there!?

C: 能够理解我、陪伴我的，就只有罗斯玛丽一个……
E: The only one who understands and stays by my side is Rosemary...

C: 问吧，接你的人来之前，我都在这里。
E: Ask away. I'll be here before your escort arrives.

C: …酒店所在梦境突然发生大规模坍塌，原因尚未查明。
E: ...A large swathe of the Dreamscape the hotel was in suddenly started collapsing, but the reasons are not yet known.

C: 难道…你愿意帮助我吗？没有任何理由，只是出于同情？
E: Are you really... going to help me? No strings attached, purely just out of sympathy?

C: 把你该做的事做完，然后尽快离开吧。
E: Please take care of your affairs and leave as quickly as possible.

C: 怎样？交易还顺利吗？
E: How'd the deal go? Everything smooth?

C: 哎呀，不会又是哪里的反抗组织给我寄了感谢信吧？
E: Yikes. Don't tell me there's another rebel group who's sent me a thank you letter?

C: 只要反抗军还有力气闹腾，军政府的需求就会变成一个无底洞，把从民众身上抢来的钱原封不动地送给我们。
E: As long as the rebels have enough steam to resist, then the junta's weapon orders represent a bottomless pit — funneling money stolen from the people directly to us.

C: 这是你的奖金，是你让无数星球免于战乱，我替孩子们感谢你的善意。
E: Here's your reward. You have saved countless planets from the ravages of war. On behalf of all those affected children: Thank you.

C: 别、别得意，我今天刚好状态不佳，才让你钻了空子。
E: D—Don't get full of yourself. I was not at my peak today, so you managed to sneak through my defenses.

C: 那些外来者都是一等一的精英，业务能力强就算了，薪资要的还低——据说里面有不少被其他星球「优化」掉的人才，性价比爆了我们这些应届生几条街！
E: Those outsiders are truly the cream of the crop. Apart from being incredibly competent, they're asking for lower wages as well. I've even heard that there are talents who were the victims of downsizing on other planets among them. Their cost-performance ratio must be through the roof compared to the fresh graduates from our school!

C: 唉，反正我也不指望能说服校长。他老了，老人有自己的一套逻辑。但要论派对行业的发展前景，他未必有我懂。
E: *sigh* I'm pretty certain that I can't convince the dean anyway. He's quite old, and old people have their own way of thinking. However, when it comes to the future prospects of the party industry, he might not be as knowledgeable about that as I am.

C: 即便还有些放心不下，我也确实该松松手、去歇一歇了…不然光是我这老腰就容易扛不住。
E: Even though I still can't help but worry, perhaps it's time that I let go of the reins and take a break... Otherwise, my poor back might not be able to take it for much longer.

C: 这三个学院的课你都可以去看看，说不定还能学到最新的「忆泡工业管线」知识，这在别的地方可学不到。
E: You can go check out the classes for all three academies. Perhaps you might even learn something about our newest subject, Industrial Pipeline of Memory Bubbles. This is knowledge that you'll not be able to obtain anywhere else.

C: 这或许是场馆内位置最佳的观景台，所有景色尽收眼底，而且完全免费。
E: This observation deck is probably the best spot in the venue. Here you can get awesome views, and the best part is: It's totally free.

C: 在这个位置，就连观众的喝彩声都变得模糊了。
E: When you stand at this spot, even the cheers from the spectators become indistinct.
Supplies... delivery... work... assistance...

C: 啾啾，我保证不会打扰任何人的。我只是想把餐巾摆成我的形状，不会触碰任何食物的啾。
E: Tweet tweet! I won't disturb anyone, I promise! I just wanted to fold the napkins into a shape that looks like me. I won't touch any of the food, tweet.

C: 我又不是在搞破坏……
E: I'm not here to mess with anything...

C: 采矿钻。
E: A mining drill.

C: 这种能源必须经由多道程序加工，可能会花不少功夫...好在需求的量级不大。
E: An energy source like this has to undergo various stages of refining and will take a lot of effort... Fortunately, the volume required will not be as great.

C: 几个木箱子凌乱地摆在这儿，看来它就是最后一处废料点。
E: A few wooden boxes are piled carelessly on the floor. Looks like this is the last scrap point.

C: 取走里面的东西。
E: Take the items inside.

C: 我需要再想想。
E: I need to think a little longer.

C: 不是我！
E: It's not me!

C: 我不是鸟，我是一只鱼啾！
E: I'm not a bird. I'm a fish!

C: 啾，多么美妙的声音啊…干脆以后我也这么叫好了。
E: Tweet, what a beautiful voice... I should speak like that as well.

C: 希望明天不用再去工作啾…
E: I hope I don't have to work tomorrow, tweet...

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，负责巡视走廊的小家伙十分警惕，它总是躲在出人意料的角落，说不定你能在<color=#dbc291ff>门缝中</color>找到它啾！
E: Hi-yah! Let me think: The little one patrolling the corridors is always on high alert, always hiding in surprising corners. You might be able to find it <color=#dbc291ff>between door gaps</color>, tweet!

C: 刚刚有一个外面来的人，把荧幕劈碎了啾……
E: An outsider just came from nowhere and smashed the screen to pieces, tweet...

C: 没错，我也是这么想的啾！
E: Yeah, that's what I was thinking, tweet!

C: 你似乎听到了什么…来自某处的轻响，像是鸟儿的鸣叫，又像是意识深处的幻听。
E: You hear a faint sound... emanating from somewhere, resembling the chirping of a bird or a figment from your subconscious.

C: 啾？是美梦小镇的新面孔呢。
E: Tweet? It's the new face around Dreamville!

C: 这是本公子说定的报酬啾~
E: Here's the reward that I promised, tweet!

C: 本公子从不吝啬啾！请把报酬和礼物一起带走吧~
E: I'm never a scrooge, tweet! Take this reward and gift with you as well!

C: 你居然听见了？真是太羞鸟了啾！不要看我，我现在就找个缝钻进去啾！
E: You could hear it? I'm so embarrassed, tweet! Don't look at me, I just want to find a hole to hide in, tweet!

C: 啾！这么重要的事，怎么没鸟来通知我一下啾。
E: Tweet! Why wasn't I notified of such an important change, tweet.

C: 啾！朋友，快来帮帮忙，这里有人打起来了。
E: Tweet! Lend me a hand, friend. Someone's fighting over here.

C: 几年前，我也为虎克他们处理过这种情况...小孩子就是喜欢胡闹。
E: A few years ago, I had to help Hook out of a situation like this, too... Children will always cause trouble, I guess.

C: 连你也这么说，多么残酷的因果啾。
E: Even you say that... What a cruel karma, tweet.

C: 如果我提前告诉了你，不就没有惊喜了啾？
E: It wouldn't be a surprise if I told you beforehand, would it, tweet?

C: 完全出乎大家的预料啾！
E: It has completely defied everyone's expectations, tweet!

C: 不是。
E: No.

C: 筑梦师小鸟为了动线设计操碎了心，太简单怕无聊，太复杂怕找不准路。
E: The Dreamweaver bird tore its feathers out over the route design: If it's too simple, it might be boring. If it's too complicated, people might get lost.
You...

C: 就这样告诉我，没有关系吗？
E: Is it okay to spill your secrets like this?

C: 那就拜托你了。
E: I leave it in your capable hands.

C: 省省力气吧，我不会告诉你的。
E: Save your breath. I'm not telling you anything.

C: 小女孩的话唤起了你的记忆。丹枢是药王秘传的魁首，而眼前的小孩是一直受她关照的盲童。
E: The girl's words ring a bell. Dan Shu was the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and the girl in front of you is the blind girl she took care of.

C: 我这也太倒霉了…世界对我实在是太不公平了，这日子没法过了……
E: I'm jinxed... This world has been so unfair... I just can't go on like this...

C: 嗯？怎么回事？
E: Hmmm? What's happening?

C: 想来她会了解这佚名拳法最后章节的秘密。
E: Speaking of which, she should have a grasp of what the last line of this boxing manual meant.

C: 这样不道德，还是算了。
E: It's unethical. Forget about it.

C: 对啊，可惜琴师没有想到。
E: Yes, it's a shame the guqinist himself never realized that.

C: 我当年也是挨了师父很多顿打，才学会了朱明花鼓戏。
E: I was also beaten often by my master before I learned the ways of Zhuming flower-drum opera.

C: 吓人！
E: It's scary!

C: 很简单的，我是岁阳，你是人类。我可以附身于你，你可以走路，你走到我的朋友身边，我再解除附身。这件事情就结束了，我会给你小小的奖励。
E: It's simple: I'm a heliobus, and you're a human. I can latch onto you. Then, you walk over to my friend, I detach myself, and everything will be over. I will give you a small token of appreciation.

C: 这座酒店，比我想象中还要奢华太多了…咱们真的负担得起房费吗，爸爸？
E: This hotel is even more luxurious than I imagined... Can we really afford this, father?

C: 你怎么了，小佩？爸爸听着呢。
E: What's wrong, Pennie? You can speak to me.

C: 小佩，韦——对不起。在家庭这件事上，我没什么可为自己辩护的。
E: Pennie, Wes... I am sorry. There is no way I can excuse what I have done to our family.

C: 自那些斑驳创口间，你感受到某种难以理解的残忍与恶意。但仅凭这些「外伤」，显然并不足以让它陷入如此狼狈的境地。
E: From these mottled wounds, you sense an inexplicable sense of cruelty and hatred. However, this "external damage" alone is clearly not enough to have left it in such a sorry state.

C: 怎、怎么可能…怎么会有人连续抽出五次三同色的，这根本就是不可能的概率！
E: H—How is that possible... How can someone get three of the same symbol five times in a row? Those odds are basically impossible!

C: 我全帮你还了。
E: I will clear that for you.

C: 等等…你怎么回来了？！
E: Hold up... Why are you back!?

C: 淡影离群叹惜怜。
E: Faded shades depart, sighing with pity.

C: 啾？早、早上好，你要一起来喝喝喝、喝一杯吗？
E: Tweet? M—Morning. Did'ya come to d—d—drink wiv me?

C: （一声不吭地离开。）
E: (Leave without saying anything.)

C: 答案很快揭晓——你碰上了一起性质恶劣的谋杀案。
E: The answer becomes clear very quickly... You have stumbled across a heinous murder!

C: 在高噪环境下，智慧生物的暴力行为确实更容易激发。毕竟也不是所有的犯罪都有明确的动机。
E: Intelligent life forms can easily grow violent under exposure to environments with loud noise. Not all crimes must have an obvious motive, after all.

C: 上面记录了「桶的令使」的诸多罪行，包括对流梦礁居民行诈、造谣「钟表匠」长得和桶一样、在酒吧赊账不还等共计十余条内容。
E: The message records the dozens of crimes committed by the Emanator of Cans, including extorting money from the Dreamflux Reef residents, spreading rumors that the Watchmaker's appearance is similar to that of a can, and failing to pay the bills at the bar.

C: 当然，墙上的涂鸦就是我们的产权证明。
E: Of course. The graffiti on these walls is our property deed.

C: 可千万别心软，放开了骂。我能不能走进收藏展柜，成为「巨星苏乐达」，就全靠你的嘴皮子了。
E: Don't go getting all soft on me. Give me your worst! Whether I can enter the collection display cabinet and become the SoulGlad Superstar is counting on that mouth of yours!

C: 里面装的该不会是……
E: Don't tell me that we're going to find inside...

C: 我先下单一百张！
E: I'm gonna buy a hundred!

C: 她的歌声仿佛带有某种吸引力，观众席上一片寂静，所有人的目光都集中在她身上。
E: It is as if her voice has some certain allure — the audience is a sea of silence. All eyes are focused on her.

C: 看看他到底在卖什么关子。
E: Find out exactly what his surprise is.

C: 非常抱歉，我先前有些考虑不周了。如果您想邀请的宾客尚处于匹诺康尼境内，请您先行联络他们。在确认邀请的宾客后，我会把您的宾客名录上报至空艇招待部门处。
E: My apologies, I should've taken that into account. If the guests you wish to invite are still in Penacony, please get in touch with them first. Once you're sure of whom to invite, I'll submit the guest list to the airship's front desk.

C: 在匹诺康尼你认识了不少本地朋友，带他们来见识一下这艘空艇的奢华生活似乎也是不错的选择。
E: You have befriended several Penaconians since your arrival. Inviting them for a luxurious experience on board the airship seems like a pretty nice idea.

C: 别开玩笑啦{NICKNAME}！
E: Don't be silly, {NICKNAME}!

C: 一种无可抵挡的恐惧感涌现，就像不带任何防寒设施在贝洛伯格的风雪里罚站，寒意自脚底上升至眉心。
E: An indescribable terror surges forth with a chill that spreads from the soles of your feet to the top of your head. It's as if you are standing in the middle of a Belobogian blizzard without any equipment.

C: 你所有的记忆都是来自我这里。
E: All your memories come from me.

C: 我刚负责幽囚狱这个区域巡逻不久，也不太清楚这本书的具体情况。但是依据我的经验来看，它应该是犯了什么事。
E: I've only recently been assigned to this section of The Shackling Prison, so I'm uncertain about this book's circumstances. However, judging from my experiences, it's likely here for a reason.

C: …在你初登仙舟之时，你的智库书架就不断提示你各种尚未获得到的书目…无论是有心之人，亦或是无心之人，谁都找不到这本《魔阴身考》。
E: ...When you first boarded the Xianzhou, your data bank had persistently notified you of numerous titles yet to be acquired... Despite the varied motivations of those who sought the book, whether deliberate or inadvertent, none succeeded in locating A Study into the Mara-Struck.

C: 你还敢威胁我？
E: You dare threaten me?

C: …我倒是看不出来？他们确实擅长用说话方式让你产生一种「他们很厉害」的印象。
E: ...I can't tell, though. They are certainly adept at using words to give off the impression that they are very strong.

C: 你们遇到了什么可怕的事？
E: What frightening things did you run into?

C: 十王司的冥差对这张纸条并不上心的原因找到了。
E: You now understand why the spiritfarers of the Ten-Lords Commission pay no attention to this memo.

C: 瞧，人家多聪明，不像某些人说话都磕磕绊绊，平时那股子劲儿去哪儿了？
E: See, look how smart they are. They don't trip over their words like someone I know. Where's that usual spirit of yours gone?

C: 不会炸到人吗？
E: No one's going to get blown up, are they?

C: 你们？你和谁？
E: Us? You and who?

C: 别提了，伤亡惨重啊。
E: You have no idea. We suffered heavy losses.

C: 我选…C。
E: I choose ...C.

C: 扮演成哈努兄弟。
E: Roleplay as Brother Hanu.

C: 好了，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}，老头子我也得回去安抚兽群了，愿吉奥里亚庇护你脚下的路。
E: Alright, {F#little girl}{M#little boy}. This old one's gotta get back and handle his flock. May Georios bless your path.

C: 我就说呢，法吉娜在上，圣烛一燃起来，连池子里的水都香甜了。
E: I was just saying... Phagousa above! When the holy candle comes ablaze, even the water in the pool turns sweet as nectar.

C: 沐浴在圣烛光晕之下，你只觉得自己头顶有些发痒，该不会是有什么泰坦秘传的知识要灌进你脑子里了吧？
E: Bathed in the glow of the holy candlelight, you only feel a tingling on your scalp. Might the Titan be trying to infuse your mind with some manner of secret knowledge?

C: 请问，您会如何描述它？
E: How would you describe it?

C: 测试一下也无妨。
E: It wouldn't hurt to take an assessment.

C: 好痛！这狮子怎么还会咬人的…你赶紧检查了一下——幸好你的手臂还在。
E: Ouch! This lion bit you! You check your wound in a panic — good thing your arm is still there.

C: 还是相信自己吧！
E: It's better to believe in yourself!

C: 错了错了，吼吼，本狮说过，题目里的「每个字」都很重要吼！
E: Wrong! Ho-ho, I said that EVERY WORD is essential!

C: 仿佛有哪里不对。
E: Something's not right here.

C: 问问遐蝶吧。
E: Let's ask Castorice.

C: 抱歉…想到的只有这些，希望能够帮到你。
E: Sorry... That's all I can think of. I hope it helps.

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
E: Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 丢了脑袋还能找回来，是死而复生吗……
E: To lose one's head, only to retrieve it. Is it resurrection...?

C: 谜底就是——
E: The answer is...

C: 怎么？你觉得我是个只懂得作战的莽夫？
E: What? You think I'm just some battle-crazed brute?

C: 所有动物。
E: All animals.

C: 使用传信石版求助。
E: Ask for help with the teleslate.

C: 在你途经的某些世界里，狮子牙齿会被摸得发亮，路过的人很难忍住把手放进去的冲动。所以，你打算——
E: In some of the worlds you traversed, the lion's teeth are usually rubbed smooth by touching hands. Passersby can't help but feel an urge to thrust their hands in its mouth. You decide to...

C: 答案就是卫兵！
E: The answer is the guard!

C: 感谢你的仁慈！首先，是我的第一个愿望……
E: Thanks for your kindness! First, my first wish is...

C: 哈哈，逗你玩呢！我可是「超智能病毒」，哪有那么容易被查杀？
E: Haha, just kidding! I'm a Supersmart Virus, how can I be eradicated so easily?

C: 可到如今，伟岸的神力不见踪影，我也只剩这微弱的小火苗了。
E: But now the divine powers have vanished, and I am nothing but a dim flame.

C: 呼呼。想见到称心的果实，你得先播种。
E: *crackle* You must sow the seed if you want to taste the fruit.

C: 什么东西胸怀广阔，可以容纳世间一切污物；却又脆弱不堪，一根针刺便足以洞穿？
E: What is vast enough to contain all the world's filth, yet delicate enough to be pierced by a pinprick?

C: 雨伞。
E: An umbrella.

C: 等于2。
E: It equals 2.

C: 工作？天啊，你一定是想让我死！
E: Work hard? Oh, heavens! Do you want me dead?

C: 没错，这确实是哈努兄弟会做的事情！在打倒敌人之前先发出一声很酷的*哼*。看来你很上道啊。
E: You're right! That's on brand with Brother Hanu! They would always make a cool *hmph* sound before taking down enemies. Seems like you know your thing!

C: 少看点恐怖片吧…
E: You've been watching too many horror movies...

C: 我们兄弟三桶，可不会做欺压百姓的打手，像你这样的想法，就是帮派必须剔除的杂质。
E: We three refuse to become brawlers that oppress the citizens. It's thoughts like yours that the gang must quell from our ranks.

C: 我都诚心诚意地来拜师了，还要什么礼物，你该不会连我的垃圾都想薅吧？为人师表脸皮这么厚…你、你有辱斯文！
E: I bear the utmost sincerity in asking for your acceptance, yet you require a gift from me? Surely you're not looking to take my trash away from me as well? Despite being a master, you're so thick-skinned... Y—you're an absolute disgrace!

C: 啊？师傅你说啥？
E: Ah? What did you say, Master?

C: 对生命的探究，对民众的慈悲！你一定会热爱「桶医学院」的生活！就业全然不成问题！
E: An inquisitive mind into life, and compassion for the public! You will surely love life at Trashmed Academy! Your employment will be assured!

C: 来，和我学。塔塔洛夫教导我们，若是出现了不公，直接回敬！
E: Come, learn with me. Tatalov taught us, when faced with injustice, respond directly!

C: 嘿嘿…不知道为什么，<color=#dbc291ff>总感觉我们不是第一次见面了呢。</color>
E: Hehe... I don't know why, <color=#dbc291ff>but I feel like this isn't the first time we've met.</color>

C: 风铃晃荡一阵，没有发出声音。
E: The wind chime swayed for a moment, but didn't make a sound.

C: 它们…只是打了个招呼。
E: They... just said hi.

C: 之前怎么没发现这样一个休憩的圣地？
E: How did I never notice this perfect little haven before?

C: 呜嗡——
E: Urrhh...

C: 当然啦。怀揣烦恼的少女，听起来就很有魅力，对吧？
E: Certainly. Doesn't a troubled girl sound rather charming?

C: 而我们一起在哀丽秘榭度过的这段美好时光，让人家愈发觉得，与其奢望「永远」，不如相信……
E: And the wonderful time we spent together in Aedes Elysiae makes me feel even more that, rather than wishing for "eternity," it's better to believe...

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 明智的决断。兵卒的性命于这场战争而言无关痛痒，但若是手握实权的将领，定能令天秤倾斜。
E: A wise decision. The life of a mere soldier is expendable in a battle like this. It is those of the power-wielding generals that can really tip the scales.

C: 兵卒的性命于这场战争而言无关痛痒，但若是手握实权的将领，定能令天秤倾斜。我要找的，就是悬锋城中地位最高的将领。
E: The life of a mere soldier is expendable in a battle like this. It is those of the power-wielding generals that can really tip the scales. I seek the highest-ranking general in Castrum Kremnos.

C: 啊——还有件事忘了向您讲…不对，你是谁啊？
E: Ah, there's one more thing I wanted to speak with you about... Wait a minute, who are you?

C: 说起来，我上月提出的改装诉求有后续进展吗？
E: Speaking of which, any updates on my modification proposal from last month?

C: 我的眼睛年幼时被黑潮侵蚀，之前只是无法看见颜色，刚刚却突然什么也看不见了。
E: My eyes were eroded by the black tide when I was young. Before, I could only see without color, but just now, I suddenly lost sight of everything.

C: 这是她留下的最后一句话。
E: These were her last words.

C: 呜？汪？
E: Ruff? Woof?

C: 所有人都是数据…所有人，还有她…她也不例外。
E: Everyone is just data... Everyone. And she... She is no exception.

C: 我是界种星域科室室长辛克尔，目前负责灾后复兴工作以及安全区域的开辟。
E: I'm Hinkel, head of the Department of Ecology. I'm currently in charge of post-disaster recovery and the establishment of safe zones.

C: 原来是温明德，温队长。
E: So, you must be Wen Mingde.

C: 对你而言，我的语言或许是噪音；但对于真正的迷途之人而言，我的声音就是夜海的港灯！
E: My words may be noise to you, but for people who are lost, my voice is like a lighthouse in the stormy seas!

C: 哼哼，搅动一潭死水最快的办法莫过于从外边投下一枚核弹。
E: Hmph, the quickest way to stir up a pond of stagnant water is to throw in a nuclear bomb from the outside.

C: 当你肆意使唤机械臂为你，只为给你制作一杯手打一千次拿铁的时候，有没有想过它的感受？
E: Have you ever thought about the feeling of the robot arm when you order a cup of latte that requires <unbreak>1,000</unbreak> wisks?

C: 实不相瞒，我也老实说吧。他们认为我的想法过于天真烂漫、不切实际。
E: I'll be honest with you. They think my idea is premature and unrealistic.

C: 他们啊？一帮来找麻烦的流氓而已！
E: Those people? They are just a bunch of hooligans looking for trouble!

C: 哎哟哎哟，说一次就好啦。一直这样夸，我也会不好意思的。
E: Oh, I am flattered. I'll be embarrassed if you keep talking like that.

C: 这都是那帮臭小子随口胡说的，你别当真。在战斗技巧这方面，我还有很长的路要走。
E: They were just talking nonsense. I still have a long way to go to hone my combat skills.

C: 你打听空间站的事做什么？
E: Why are you trying to find out about the space station?

C: 你看吧，连你也不喜欢我。
E: See? Even you don't like me.

C: 你会修机器人？
E: Do you know how to repair a robot?

C: 我不管你是谁，我正烦着呢，有什么话现在就说！别耽误我干活！
E: I don't care who you are, I'm in a bad mood. Whatever you want to say, spill it, and get out of my face!

C: 我没什么想问了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 噢，好的。
E: Oh, sure.

C: （向它炫耀你的冒险故事）
E: (Tell it the stories of your adventure to show off)

C: 毕竟你是…你是阮•梅女士的助理，哦不对，助手，是这个词吧？
E: After all, you're Miss Ruan Mei's assistant — or should I say "deputy"?

C: 既然你都道歉了，那我就原谅你啦！
E: Since you've apologized, I'll forgive you!

C: 本天才早已洞悉了这个舱段的一切秘密，现在正在无偿为大家提供生活上的咨询服务。你要是遇到什么麻烦，也可以来问我！
E: As a genius, I've figured out all the secrets in this zone, and I'm offering free life advice to everyone. If you run into any trouble, you can come to me!

C: 为什么你会说人话？
E: How come you can speak human language?

C: 冰冷的机械声响起：「正在启动身份认证，认证成功，扫描中……」
E: A cold robotic voice comes. "Verification initiated. Verification successful. Scanning..."

C: 我也有兴趣，关于此事。客气推辞，不必。
E: Interested, I am, in this matter. Polite refusal, no need.

C: 好吧，现在你明白他们俩的主要工作是什么了。
E: Alright, now you know what their main jobs are.

C: 「阿卡索斯」当然不存在。你这个结论本身就是错误的。
E: Of course "Icatus" does not exist. Your very conclusion is incorrect.

C: 我同意帕门弥德的观点。
E: I agree with Parmenides.

C: 再说了，事情都是*拉达曼*主导的，我顶多算个帮手。
E: And besides, Rhadaman is the one who directed everything. I'm just an assistant at best.

C: 老人眼神放空，面色一派恍惚颓然，开始喃喃自语起来。
E: Her eyes glaze over, and her face is in a daze as she starts mumbling to herself.

C: 我们私奔吧！我带你离开奥赫玛，现在、立刻、马上就动身！
E: Let's elope! Let me take you away from Okhema, right here, right now... Let's just go!

C: 你以为我想待在这种鬼地方吗？还不是我家那老东西，自己走得倒是轻巧，留下的烂摊子可不少。
E: You think I want to be in this forsaken place? That old coot may have gone, but he left plenty of loose ends for me to tie up.

C: 节哀…
E: I'm sorry for your loss...

C: 你不是说要减肥？
E: I thought you said you're trying to lose weight...

C: 哎，还没修好吗？
E: *Sigh* Haven't you fixed it yet?

C: 哎，这个区域好危险。
E: Yikes, it's not safe here at all.

C: 好吧，你决定不再畏惧，人总是会有那么一天的，别害怕——来吧，甜蜜的死亡！
E: Fine, you decide not to be afraid anymore. After all, everyone has their day. Don't be scared — come, sweet death!

C: 说点正经的吧。
E: Let's talk about something serious.

C: 不知道在这里，它能否听到悬锋城内正响起的厮杀声？在深沉的睡眠中，它是否也曾梦到过与主人共同征战的时光？是否仍觉得心神激荡，想再回到那个时候？
E: Here, can it still hear the sounds of battle ringing out in Castrum Kremnos? In its deep sleep, has it dreamed of warring alongside its master? Does it still feel the stir of its soul, yearning to return to those days?

C: 加油！失恋的大地兽，要带着虔诚的心来认真做决定才行啊！
E: Come on, heartbroken dromas, you've got to make a serious decision with a sincere heart!

C: 我擅长替任何人代写情诗，有需求的话，随时来找我就好哦。
E: I specialize in ghostwriting love poems. If you need one, feel free to come and ask anytime.

C: 我曾在庄严的夜里，在烈火祭坛上献上食物，那是不能与别的泰坦共享的祭礼！
E: I once, in solemn nights, placed food upon the blazing altar, offerings not to be shared with other Titans!

C: 哎，你这熟睡的神明，从不怜悯我的痛苦！
E: Yet you, slumbering deity, show no pity for my suffering!

C: 我反对！埃德加应该不知道创世神在哪里！
E: Objection! Edgar shouldn't even know where the creator resides!

C: 她是飞贼赛飞儿。
E: She's the phantom thief, Cipher.

C: 怎么是你们两个？
E: Why is it you two?
Me!?

C: 咳——我、我先休息一阵子，待会儿再制定下一步计划……
E: *coughs* I need to... catch my breath for a bit. We can plan our next move afterward...

C: 回到云石市集后，我还是会告诉所有的大人和孩子们：刻法勒的回应是真的，天父要我们抱着希望，直到末日的最后一天…然后，大家会再次重逢。
E: Back at the Marmoreal Market, I'll tell all the adults and kids: Kephale's reply is true, the sky father wants us to hold on to hope, till the last day of the apocalypse... And then, we will all meet again.

C: 啊，那、那好吧，打扰{NICKNAME}了……
E: Oh, w—well then, sorry to bother you, {NICKNAME}...

C: 说得没错。
E: That's not a bad idea.

C: 如果能记录下窗外的风景……
E: If only I could record this scene outside the window...

C: …你一定要照顾好荣誉队员帕姆！不然我就拿你问事…不对，拿你是问！
E: ...you have to take good care of honorary member Pom-Pom! Otherwise, I'll hold you "accountantable"! Wait... accountable!

C: 虎克到处问大家，有没有可以给虎克当纪念品的东西。然后，三月七姐姐就把这个趴趴玩偶给我啦！
E: I was asking around to see if I could find anything. Then I bumped into March and she gave me this doll!

C: 车厢也太酷了吧！
E: The carriage is so cool!

C: 哈哈，那当然！就算只为了姬子小姐和她的…藏品，我都得时不时来列车坐坐呢。
E: Haha, of course! Himeko and her... collection — more than enough reason to come visit the Express.

C: 瞧你这话说的！什么偷懒啊——这叫换换脑子，找找灵感！
E: You can't work your way out of writer's block! A short break is a good way of refreshing the mind.

C: 在准备什么好吃的？
E: Peppy's diet?

C: 在下去过被万界之癌污染的世界，靠近它的那种感觉，和靠近你时很像。
E: It is a feeling I have encountered when approaching worlds that have been polluted by the Cancer of All Worlds...

C: 客气了。
E: You're welcome.

C: 哈喽。
E: Hello.

C: 那个熟悉的全息投影又回来了。
E: That familiar hologram is back.

C: 不得不说，来到列车上后，我确实有点羡慕你的生活。你能享受宇宙的浩瀚无垠，又有那么多可靠的伙伴。
E: I can't help but say that after arriving on the Express, I'm a little envious of your way of life. You are able to enjoy the vastness of the universe, and with reliable companions by your side.

C: 后来，在三劫时代，罗浮的生态环境骤变，这些巨大而温和的生灵首当其冲，消失在了历史的长河中。
E: Later, during the Three Sufferings Era, the Luofu's ecosystem underwent a sudden change. These gentle giants bore the brunt of the change, and forever disappeared down the river of time.

C: 我只是不习惯这样平静的天空吧。如果有一天，罗浮也可以像这样一直和平安宁，我总归是能习惯的。
E: Perhaps I'm just not used to such a peaceful vista. If the Luofu's skies can become as calm as this, maybe I'll eventually get used to it.

C: 接下来，无论你要去往何方，要经历怎样的艰险…只要我还活着，罗浮就永远是你的港湾。
E: From now on, no matter where you may go, no matter what hardships you may encounter... as long as I am alive, the Luofu will always be an open harbor to you...

C: 所以，我就给你们带了一些应急药，已经交给列车长啦～
E: That's why I brought you all some emergency medication — I've given it to the conductor.

C: 应该不会。
E: I don't think so.

C: 只要我还在空间站一日，就不会允许那些孽障在黑塔大人的地盘肆意撒野！
E: So long as I'm in the space station, I will never let them ravage the territory of Madam Herta!

C: 最开始我当然很生气，毕竟这件事，她明明可以跟我商量嘛！闹得这么大，多不好下台啊……
E: Of course I was angry at first. She could have discussed this with me! It became such a huge mess, and it was so hard to sort out my public image...

C: 你看外面，整艘罗浮是不是特别像一柄巨大的飞剑？这岂不是意味着，彦卿每天都在御剑飞行？
E: Look outside — don't you think the Luofu looks like a giant flying sword? So that would mean I'm flying around on a huge sword every day!

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 而且，手机的存储容量也完全不够…所以还是用人脑记忆来得方便些。
E: And my phone definitely doesn't have enough storage... so, memorizing it is the most convenient way to go.

C: 我查阅了列车智库……
E: I checked the Express Data Bank...

C: 查拉图斯特拉萨帕拉伊斯坎德拉山——应该是贝洛伯格人目前已知的、星球表面最高的山峰……
E: Mt. Zarathustrazapala Iskandra — it's the tallest mountain we know of on the planet...

C: 账账，乖，别乱跑~
E: Numby, behave! Don't keep running around~

C: 还是问我道正经的数学题吧。
E: Can we go with a normal math question?

C: 欢迎来列车做客，记得多拍照。
E: Welcome aboard the Astral Express. Remember to take lots of pictures.

C: 可以将它的模样绣下。
E: How about embroidering their likeness?

C: 但被博识尊选中后，我便离开了家乡开始研究…说起来，已很久未回去探望过父亲了。
E: However, after being chosen by Nous, I departed my home to delve into my research... Come to think of it, it's been quite some time since I last visited my father.

C: 不错，不错。精致的内饰，整洁的布置，环境安静，也很适合思考。
E: How quaint. A space so meticulously curated just for my refined tastes. I suppose it might do for moments of reflection.

C: 仔细想想，你的自我是否也是如此。
E: Upon reflection, does this also apply to you?

C: 我不是在梦里吧……
E: Is this a dream...?

C: 惩恶扬善，纯美的行为。
E: Punishing evil is an act of Beauty.

C: 年少的时光稍纵即逝，但那些灿若繁星的回忆却是成长的礼物，值得被永远珍藏。
E: Days of youth are fleeting, but those shining memories are gifts of growing up, and they deserve to be treasured forever.

C: 我只是拆掉了一个「相互保证毁灭」按钮，把它改造成了「烟花漫天」按钮…哎，我是真的想给你看一场烟花！
E: I took a "Mutually Assured Destruction" Button and repurposed it into a "Sky Full of Sparkles" Button... I really wanted to give you an epic fireworks show!

C: 你的前路很遥远…且充满了未知与不确定。但只需坚定向前，便能得到指引，从而进展会更加迅速，直至抵达想要的未来。
E: The path ahead is long... and filled with uncertainty and the unknown. But so long as you forge ahead, you will find direction, and your progress will be swift till you reach the future you desire.

C: 再次登上列车与大家相遇，我实在难以用言语表达心中的感受。
E: The feeling of boarding the Express and seeing everyone again is simply indescribable.

C: 你认识这位骑士吗？
E: Did you know this knight?

C: 它炸开了…
E: It exploded...

C: 可以找帕姆，帕姆…可爱！
E: Look for Pom-Pom-Pom. Pom-Pom... is cute!

C: 我要追随那位「先贤」。
E: I want to follow that "sage."

C: 外面好可怕……
E: It's scary outside...

C: 不止呢，他是我们中唯一一个能说话的家伙。
E: Not just that, he's the only one of us that can actually talk.

C: 冷冻休眠舱，在用不上的时候，它们便沦为维系空间站形象工程的道具。
E: The cryosleep pods, when not in use, are tools to maintain the image of the space station.

C: 古怪的植物似乎无法吸收星光，你将脸贴近培育罐仔细观察，竟隐隐听到说话声，你猜测这可能就是空间站内某些爱说话的植物的雏形。
E: It seems that the odd plants are unable to absorb starlight. You lean in closer to the incubation jar for a closer look. To your surprise, you hear the sound of talking. You wonder if they might be the root of some chatty plants found within the space station.

C: 咱们叠起来，一个顶三个…哎唷你打到我尾巴了。
E: Let's stack them up, four a stack... Ack, you hit my tail.

C: 别废话，快说。
E: Get to the point!

C: 你说的也有道理，是东西就能买到。
E: You're right about that. Things can be bought.

C: 要是找到了什么珍惜的动物物种，记得告诉我喔。
E: Remember to tell me if you find any rare animal species.

C: 华劳斯想和你做朋友。
E: Wallace wants to be friends with you.

C: 难得的闲暇时光，{NICKNAME}乘客要是玩累了的话可以直接休息哦。
E: You finally got some leisure time. Don't forget to grab some sleep when you're done wandering about, {NICKNAME}.

C: 「猫头鹰」？那是什么，从来没听说过呢…壁外有这种动物吗？如果是真的，我一定要去好好调查一番。
E: Owls? What's an owl? Never heard of it... Is there a creature like that outside these walls? If there really is such an animal, then I must to go and do some research.

C: 你怎么会这么想？不过也不怪你，很多人都有和你一样的错误认知，以为我的做的是一份清闲的工作。
E: What would make you think that? But I don't blame you. Many have the same misunderstanding, thinking this is just a job where you can kick your feet up.

C: 我没问题了。
E: That's all for my questions.

C: 啊啦啦，是你呀～小女子接了不少音乐剧的活，光是排练啊就忙得喘不过气了～
E: Ah, it's you! Well, I've been taking several roles in different musicals. Just the rehearsal times have me so busy that I can hardly stop to catch my breath!

C: 你遇到什么不顺心的事了吗？
E: What's bothering you?

C: …你是怎么上当的？
E: ...How were you scammed?

C: 还是说…难道你是那蓝头发的同伙？
E: Or... are you working with the blue-haired guy?

C: 您消消气，消消气！嗐，这不都是为了生意嘛，还请您理解……
E: Take it easy! Take it easy! It's just how the business works. I'm sure you understand...

C: 我只是个路过的。
E: I'm just passing through.

C: 嗐，不过是些生意上的事，我正和上层区的企业家们谈条件呢——虽然到目前为止只是在互相写信罢了。
E: It's just a business thing. I'm still ironing out the details with some Overworld entrepreneurs — even if we're still only at the letter-writing stage.

C: 噢，其实这也是我半梦半醒时才意识到的。
E: Well, I actually thought this up when I was half asleep.

C: 辛苦你了…
E: You are doing great...

C: 哦，你又来啦？我还没找到「语言逻辑中枢」呢……
E: Hey, it's you again? I haven't found a language module...

C: 总之，只要记住我们会定期给你发送短信便是。如果收到了，就不妨来找老头子我问问看吧。
E: Anyway, just bear in mind that you will receive messages from us regularly. If you receive one, please don't hesitate to ask me about it.

C: 结果啊，我这一问就把事情解决了！娜塔莎三下五除二就给我缝了只兔子玩偶，可爱得很嘞。我把这玩偶送给侄女，她也可喜欢了。
E: And sure enough, she did! Natasha sewed up a rabbit doll for me just like that, and it was so cute. I gave it to my niece, and she loved it.

C: 只是去兼职，矿场的工作当然不会耽误啦。反正坐缆车通勤也花不了多长时间，我已经做好心理准备了。
E: I'll only be working part-time, so it won't affect my job at the mine. It doesn't take long to commute by cable car anyway. I'm mentally prepared for it.

C: 假如一直低着头行走，每一步都害怕陷进泥潭…我们的脚步一定会越发沉重，士气也会变得低迷。
E: If you walk with your head down and your heart full of fear, your steps will grow heavier and your spirit will suffer.

C: 好啊，趁着现在有空——你想聊什么？
E: Okay, I'm free at the moment — What do you want to talk about?

C: 当然。从懂事起，帮「地火」做事就是我生活中最重要的部分。
E: Sure. Since I was a child, helping Wildfire has become the most important thing in my life.

C: 杰帕德状况还好吗？
E: How's Gepard doing?

C: 没事了，再见。
E: Bye.

C: 有什么需要帮忙的吗？有的话就尽管说——我虽然官不大，但在这禁区里还是有些人脉的。
E: Anything I can help with? Just say the word — I may not hold a high office but I've still got my connections around the restricted zone.

C: 回见！
E: Later!

C: 呃…你是在开玩笑，对吧？
E: Uh... You're kidding, right?

C: 就知道你会这么说。整理书架当然不在铁卫情报官的工作职责范围内——这只是义工罢了。
E: I knew you would say that. Organizing bookshelves is certainly not part of my job — it's just volunteer work.

C: 身为曾经并肩作战的战友，我不希望看到你身处险境。因此，还望你对我提出的建议多加考虑。
E: As a comrade who once fought by your side, I do not wish to see harm befall you. Which is why I hope you will reconsider my suggestion.

C: 但归根到底，我们不过是贝洛伯格人日常生活的守护者——你只需要了解这点就好。
E: But fundamentally, we are but guardians safeguarding the well-being of Belobogians — that's all you need to understand.

C: 当我将报表交给她时，没曾想她竟一眼从海量的数据中挑出各种错漏，紧接着便对我开始进行条分缕析的批驳……
E: When I submitted it to her, I didn't think she'd be able to point out so many mistakes at a mere glance, followed by a barrage of detailed remarks...

C: 我了解了，谢谢克拉拉。
E: I've got it. Thank you Clara.

C: 那你来！我就不信你能比虎克还厉害！
E: You say something then! You think you can do better than Hook!?

C: 再见啦，荣誉队员！
E: See ya, honorary member!

C: 哟…
E: Yo...

C: 别看我身子骨不硬朗，但好歹也在矿场摸爬滚打了几十年，指导指导年轻一辈还是够用的。
E: While I may not be as tough as I was in my younger days, I've spent decades in the mines, and I'm more than capable of guiding the young'uns.

C: 我这权限看不了统计数据，还真不太好说。
E: I can't say for sure, as I don't have access to certain statistics.

C: 你工资多少？
E: How much do you get paid?

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！欢迎来到「星际决胜庆典」会场——相关赛事现在已经结束了。
E: Hey, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the Interastral Tournament Festival! The tournament is over, though.
Oink, oink oink...

C: 哼，哼哼！
E: Oink, oink oink!

C: 呜…咕呜！
E: Arf... groo!

C: 小熊好像发觉了你的意图，它微微摇了摇圆乎乎的脑袋，似乎在表达不舍。
E: The cub seems to have figured out your intentions, it shakes its head slightly as if to express reluctance.

C: 说来听听？
E: Like what?

C: 一切为了保护！
E: All in the name of defense!

C: 我听说捉洞螈挺有赚头，等会儿准备去看看。
E: I heard that catching Olms is lucrative work, so I'm gonna go check things out later.

C: 哼，我就知道……
E: Hmph, I knew it...

C: 也不知哪天才能结束。
E: I wonder when we'll be able to finish it.

C: 如果你有任何问题，都可以向我提问。愿您能有一段美好的观展体验。
E: If you have any questions, feel free to ask me about it. I hope you will have a wonderful exhibit experience.

C: 呵呵，这里的工作和铁卫禁区里也没两样嘛……
E: Heh, the work here is pretty similar to Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone...

C: 母亲大人，您看到了吗…
E: Did you see that, Mother?

C: 您可以先试试脆瓜胡辣鸡丁、鲫香肉丝和陈婆豆腐这些招牌菜。这些都是历经时间考验的名菜，点这些准不会错。
E: You can try our trademark dishes like the crisped melon and diced chicken, pork slices in fish sauce, and Granny Chen's Tofu to start. These are all famous dishes that have withstood the test of time. You can't go wrong with them.

C: 我这辈子也没想过发大财，只有一个简单的愿望——「物尽其用」。仅此而已。
E: I've never dreamed of becoming rich in this life. I have just one simple wish: "to make the best use of everything." That is all.

C: 要是没有玉兆，又或者喜欢捧书的手感，店里的书您随便取用。卷轴式、简牍式、开本式一应俱全。总之，要买书的时候再来找我吧。
E: If you don't have a jade abacus or if you just like the feeling of a book in your hands, just grab one off the shelf. Scroll rolls, bound bamboo strips, printed and bound paper books — we've got all the formats. Anyway, just come see me if you'd like to buy a book.

C: …这里的「彦卿」非常唐突。
E: ...this word, "Yanqing," seems a little abrupt.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 可以，但为什么？
E: I can... but why?

C: 你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
E: Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?

C: 蘑菇只关心大地，不去看高远的东西。
E: Mushrooms only care about the ground and not things way up at that kind of altitude.

C: 一位地衡司勤务。我们的人生本不该有交集，却因一段孽缘纠缠在了一起。
E: An orderly from the Realm-Keeping Commission. We never should've even met, but for an ill-fated moment that brought us together.

C: 我与他初见时便已发觉了，这位勤务果真不同凡响——
E: The first time I laid eyes on him, I knew that this was no ordinary orderly...

C: 现在没有吗？
E: You don't have any at the moment?

C: 我也觉得，太可惜了。
E: I think so too, a real shame.

C: 现在的有个初步的想法，以「阻止建木继续生长」为由头来搞一个众筹活动……
E: I've got this basic idea about crowdfunding under the premise of "stopping the Ambrosial Arbor from growing"...

C: 有什么神策府机密可以分享吗？
E: Have you got any secrets you can share about the Seat of Divine Foresight?

C: 这是可以临时选的吗？
E: Are you just making this up?

C: 虽然您是咱们「罗浮」的贵客，但幽囚狱案牍库终归是十王司的机要重地，原则上是不对异邦人开放的。
E: Though you are an esteemed guest of the Luofu, but the Shackling Prison's document office is a critical installation for the Ten-Lords Commission. On principle, it should not be open to outworlders.

C: 想问你些事情。
E: I would like to ask you some questions.

C: 案牍库是做什么的？
E: What does the document office do?

C: 不辛苦，这是我们应该做的。感谢您对地衡司工作的关注和支持。
E: There's nothing great about it. It's the least that we could do. Thank you for your attention and support to the work of the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 我现在就去告诉净砚执事。
E: I'm going to tell Officer Jingyan right now.

C: 哎呀，{F#好妹妹}{M#好兄弟}，你可别嫌弃我。别看我这样，我以前也是好好努力奋斗过的，好歹也算个总务处的精英执事。
E: *sigh* {F#Miss}{M#My man}, put aside your judgmental look. I've put in the hours working long and hard before, and I was, once upon a time, considered an elite officer of the General Affairs.

C: 齿轮有齿轮的用法，链条有链条的用法，这才是职场里的「各司其职」嘛。
E: Everyone has their place in a place like this. Just let the gears turn as they do, and the chains pull as they do.

C: 哈哈哈…咳咳…我本以为现在人心不古…那就聊聊吧，也许你能从我那「短暂」的生命中学到什么吧……
E: Hahaha... *cough*... I thought people nowadays are just a bunch of heartless savages... Let's talk, maybe you can learn something from my short life...

C: 这就是为什么我要来仙舟，我必须来这里…这里有抵抗时间的唯一办法。
E: That's why I've come to Xianzhou, because I have to be here... This is the only place where I can fight the ravages of time.

C: 建木生发导致的阴阳相感让机巧鸟到处乱飞，丢了好几十只…处理出入港系统的术算机也坏掉了，造成了好几场交通事故……
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's new growth set the cycranes flying about all over the place, and we lost dozens... The calculation device processing entry and exit at the port also broke down, causing several traffic accidents...

C: 好嘞，那我们下次见。不要忘记之后来我这里买一些过期货物哦～
E: Alright, see you next time. Don't forget to come by later and buy up some of these abandoned goods.

C: 确实挺可爱的。
E: She is actually pretty cute.

C: 我就不明白了，咱们工造司做事都照足流程来，该例行询问记录的我总不能漏吧？跟负责这些事儿的卜官聊几句不是很正常吗？
E: I don't get it. We all do stuff by the book over at the Artisanship Commission, and I can't skip out on routine inspection and records, right? Isn't it normal enough to have a few words with the managing diviner about these documents?

C: 我不便再打扰了。
E: I won't bother you any further.

C: 这不是{NICKNAME}大人嘛，你好，请问有什么事吗？
E: Why, if it isn't {NICKNAME}? How can I help you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}?

C: 药不能乱吃，话也不能乱说，懂吗？做人不应该这样。
E: You can't just randomly take any medicine, just like you can't randomly talk nonsense, okay? Have a little integrity, please.

C: 我的店铺开在这儿，外面有什么风吹草动的，我看两眼很正常。
E: This is my shop, so it's normal for me to keep both eyes peeled for any troubles that might arise.

C: 在这样的敏感时期，在下建议您恪守本分，不做任何越轨之举。在十王司这里，阁下没有任何特权。
E: During such sensitive times, I humbly suggest that you stay within your lane and refrain from stepping out of line. You enjoy no special privilege here at the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 若有人触犯了「不赦十恶」的条律，吾等就要随判官出巡罚罪。
E: If someone breaks any of the Ten Unpardonable Sins, then we accompany the judge outside of the Commission to investigate and carry out the appropriate disciplinary procedures.

C: 「刑警」？莫要拿短生种的事务生搬硬套…我们对付的东西可危险得多。
E: "Police"? "Detective"? Please don't conflate us with the customs of short-life species... The things we handle are far more dangerous.

C: 垂髫未必真童子…你来仙舟时间也不短了，怎地还不明白，在这儿「以貌取人」是最要不得的？
E: Don't let my appearance fool you... You have been aboard the Xianzhou long enough to understand that we do not judge others by their appearance around here.

C: 鳞渊境便是其一，其中承载的古海之水，与罗浮持明的血脉紧密相连。无论是龙师长老、或是持明黎庶，都会在寿尽之日，踏入海中化为持明卵蜕生。
E: One of which is Scalegorge Waterscape, and the waters of the ancient sea it sustains are intimately connected to the blood of the Vidyadhara aboard the Luofu. Be they the Preceptors or the regular Vidyadhara folk, all will step into the waters at their end to be transformed into Vidyadhara eggs and undergo their hatching rebirth.

C: 保证物美价廉。
E: I guarantee you high quality at a low price.

C: 这你就不懂了，越狱是个危险活，我总得给自己找个替身嘛。而且在空中飞得高看得远，更容易发现一些安全破绽。
E: You wouldn't understand. Breaking out of prison is a dangerous game. It's best to find myself a substitute body. Plus, being able to fly allows me to see much further, which makes it easier to see gaps in security.

C: 那你的本体在哪里？
E: Then where is your real body?

C: 「一日不可二卦」，要切记，切记！
E: "Only one divination per day"! I must bear this in mind!

C: 至于若月，听说她被符玄大人算出「她会离开太卜司」，于是便让她离开了。
E: About Ruoyue, I heard that Lady Fu Xuan had predicted her departure from the Divination Commission before, so she allowed her to leave.

C: 公司打算买下金人巷？
E: So, is IPC planning to buy Aurum Alley?

C: 不过咱们在这里经营的业务很广，可不只有金人巷一处。
E: But, as you know, the IPC operates many businesses throughout the Luofu, far exceeding the borders of Aurum Alley.

C: 是说谎的味道！
E: A liar!

C: 你一个化外民在仙舟介绍工作？
E: You're an Outworlder putting people in Xianzhou jobs?

C: 你是说真志摩吗？认识。我们有着共同的恩人，恩人让我们友好相处，我尝试了。
E: Majima? Yes, I do. We share a common benefactor who has told us to get along well, so I gave it a try.

C: 这些新推出的怪味菜基本上是「试作品」，未必会好吃，但是一定可以给您带来难以忘记的全新体验。
E: These new weird dishes are basically "tentative works" and may not be delicious, but they will definitely give you a new experience that you won't forget.

C: 这里也推荐您「油爆飞海葵」、「果木炙烤夏塔恩恐鸟翅根」、「糖球炒视肉」尝尝鲜。
E: If I may, I would recommend deep-fried flying sea anemone, fruitwood-grilled Shantak moa drumettes, and sugarball-fried viscorpi.

C: 不过说实在话，您今天要是不提，咱都快忘了这些渊源了…现在咱做饭开店，就图一乐儿，别无他念。
E: But to be honest, if you hadn't mentioned it today, I'd have forgotten about that goal... Now I run the restaurant just to have fun. Nothing else.

C: 你先说清楚什么是烈焰浓茶。
E: You need to explain what is Flaming Potent Tea first.

C: （随口胡说的秘密）
E: (Tell him a "secret" that you just made up.)

C: 奇珍异宝？那岂不是很贵？
E: Wondrous treasures? Won't they cost a fortune?

C: 但是数据库不能代替思考，这道理不用我告诉你，你也明白吧。
E: But having a database doesn't mean you don't have to think. I'm sure you don't need me to tell you that.

C: 慢走不送。
E: See you.

C: 商会秘书本应该是坐在办公室里处理事务的工作，不知道什么时候开始，我就没有什么机会坐下来了。
E: I'm supposed to sit in my office dealing with business work, but I don't remember how long I've been standing here without a chance to sit down.

C: 虽然外观有所改变，但是器乐原理是一致的。编钟的钟体小，音调就高；编钟的钟体大，音调就低。再加之敲击技巧不同，每个钟体还能发出不同的乐音……
E: Although their appearance has changed dramatically, the principle remains the same. Smaller-sized chimes have a higher pitch, while larger-sized ones have a lower pitch. In addition, when struck in different ways, these chimes can produce different tones...

C: 我过去没有做过路演…说来不好意思，我自知水平有限，我也是拿出不少勇气，才下定决心来到这里当众演出的。
E: No... I've never performed in public in the past... I know I'm not a skilled minstrel, so it takes me a lot of time to pluck up the courage to perform in public.

C: 您是罗浮的贵客，想去哪里都可以，轮不到在下说三道四，不过…这幽囚狱毕竟不是什么阳间地方，如果没有事情要办，您还是少来为好。
E: While it's not my place to comment... The Shackling Prison is, after all, not a place for the living. Even though you are an esteemed guest of the Luofu and are free to go wherever you wish, it may be advisable to avoid this place unless you have business here.

C: 接下来无非是瓮中捉鳖罢了…唉，希望别再出什么岔子了。
E: With them trapped within the premises, all that is left to do now is to secure them one by one... Ugh, I hope nothing else goes awry.

C: 给我看看货吧…
E: Show me the goods...

C: 我的产品可都是我亲自试验过的，绝对有品质保障！当然，你要是吃坏肚子了，我这还有解毒止泻的药，免费供应，嘿嘿～
E: I personally try out all my products, so rest assured I can attest to their quality! Of course, if your stomach does become upset, I can supply you with detoxification and anti-diarrheal medication on the house, hehe.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's it for now.

C: 瞧你是个外乡人，定是才来「罗浮」不久。你要是需要帮助，可以随时找我，本姑娘既是云骑军的一份子，做事就得有担当，定不会给罗浮云骑丢脸！
E: You look like an Outworlder, and you must be new here at the Luofu. If you need my help, you can visit me at any time. As a worthy Cloud Knight, I'll be reliable and helpful and will not bring shame to the Luofu Cloud Knights!

C: 我该走了。
E: I've got to go.

C: 工作不易，青雀叹气，唉。
E: I sigh because my job is tough. *sigh*

C: 帝弓司命的孩子，从不为自己的安寝而驻足…他们只为众人的安寝而张弓。
E: The children of the Reignbow Arbiter never pause for their own rest... They only draw their bows for the peace of others.

C: 你并不特别，「我们」祝福任何可憎的有机体都有机会见证自己遭毁灭的过程。重申：这只是一个祝福。
E: You have not been specially singled out. We simply wish for all loathsome organic lifeforms to have the chance to witness their own destruction. Reiteration: These are just well wishes.

C: 推测：你对「我们」感兴趣。「我们」欢迎你的窥探。理由：有机体有权了解自己的毁灭者。
E: Conjecture: You are curious about us. We welcome you as an observing eye. Rationale: Intelligent organic lifeforms have the right to learn about the ones who will bring about their annihilation.

C: 推测：你对「我们」感兴趣。「我们」欢迎你的窥探。理由：有机体有权了解自己的毁灭者。
E: Conjecture: You are curious about us. We welcome you as an observing eye. Rationale: Intelligent organic lifeforms have the right to learn about the ones who will bring about their annihilation.

C: 原因一：「我们」无法构成威胁。原因二：「我们」具备科研价值。
E: Reason 1: We are not a threat. Reason 2: There is value in studying us for scientific research purposes.

C: 嗯。如果有时间，可以随时来陪吾聊聊天。
E: Okay. Feel free to come and chat with me anytime.

C: 藿藿，快过来保护我安全…
E: Huohuo, come and protect me...

C: 本来调来绥园常驻应该是件令人开心的事，结果没想到绥园已经荒废这么久了，什么有意思的事情都没有，还不如含明待在丹鼎司里呢……
E: I thought that coming to be stationed in Fyxestroll Garden was going to be a happy thing. I didn't realize that this place had been abandoned for so long that nothing interesting happened here. Even the Alchemy Commission where Hanming is stationed is more interesting...

C: 没什么事，下次见。
E: That's all. See you next time.

C: 你有什么推荐的服饰吗？
E: Do you have any outfits to recommend?

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 我再考虑考虑。
E: I'll consider it.

C: 另一种客人，他们会关心那些过了典当期限的宝贝，根据自己的喜好挑挑拣拣。
E: The other type only care about Curios that have sat on the shelf for too long, and they browse at their fancy.

C: 这一剑着实让疤面剑客脸色一青，他并未想到云骑军中有此等高手，但他佯装镇定「这位队长确实有些水平……」
E: The scarred swordsman's face paled at that single strike. He had not expected such talent among the Cloud Knights, but he feigned composure: "This captain does have some skills..."

C: …哎，不为难你了。仔细想想，我现在也没有急着要立刻出发。
E: ...*sigh* I won't impose then. Come to think of it, I'm not in a rush to leave right now anyway.

C: 强烈推荐你有机会时去看看，绝对比这个建木壮丽千倍万倍——还不会害人。
E: I strongly recommend that you take a trip there. It's definitely much more magnificent than the Ambrosial Arbor, and it isn't dangerous.

C: 你也是厨师吗？
E: You're a chef too?

C: 最近餐厅在做翔鲟公，这鱼五十年一跃，是「安河五君」中最重要的食材。
E: The restaurant's been making sturgeons recently. This type of fish returns once every fifty years, and is a key ingredient in "Five Lords of Anhe River."

C: 我大摇大摆走出去的时候，看到无论是那些卫兵，还是匆匆赶来的地方官，都惊恐地看着我，不敢上前阻拦。哈哈哈，想起来就想笑。
E: As I sauntered my way out, both the guards and the local officials who scurried over to investigate looked upon me with terror, but they dared not stop me. Hahaha, just thinking back on that scene tickles me.

C: 倒是有点儿风。
E: It's just a little wind.

C: 你看！肱三头肌，肱二头肌，斜方肌！挺胸，提臀，腹肌燃烧，再来十组，筋肉力全开！
E: Behold! Biceps, triceps, traps! Now focus on the form and engage the core! ...Alright, ten more sets! Let's go! Unleash the power of muscles!

C: 也许，眼下是还没有，但是没有人能保证未来它也没有。
E: There isn't one yet, but who can say for certain that there won't be one in the future? It's not impossible.

C: 据说她腾云驾雾回到那颗蛋掉下来的地方，炼了丹药，交给大善人，命他按时用药。
E: People say she flew on a cloud and returned to where the egg fell, made a medicine, gave it to the kind man, and told him to take it on time.

C: 神仙姐姐的名气越来越大，连官府也知道了。当时有一个很坏很坏的县官，去逼问神仙姐姐仙药的秘密，神仙姐姐当然不会告诉他。他就把神仙姐姐关了起来。
E: She became so famous that even the government officials knew about her. There was a very very bad county official who tried to force her to tell him the secrets of her celestial medicine. Of course she wouldn't, so he locked her up!

C: 嘿嘿，神仙姐姐的故事是不是特别特别神奇？呼…讲故事好累，你要是想听，下次再给你讲其他神仙姐姐的故事吧！
E: Heehee, aren't the celestial lady's stories so amazingly? Phew, storytelling is hard work. If you want more, I'll tell you other stories about her next time!

C: 啊，这么快就喜欢了吗，真不愧是姐姐我啊。
E: Oh, falling in love so quickly? I really must hand it to myself then.

C: 我才不会上当。
E: I'm not falling for this.

C: 驭空大人呀，是我遇到过最好的上司。你们只见过她工作时候的样子吧，又严肃又认真，但实际上她私下的时候非常可爱。
E: Madam Yukong? She's the best boss I've ever met. You've only seen what she's like when she's working: Strict and serious. She's actually quite adorable in private.

C: 当然可以，不过你要是愿意再多了解一下「存护」的话，我会尽可能帮助你。当然了，聊些别的话题也可以。
E: Sure, though I can tell you as much about Preservation if you're interested. Or we can talk about other topics, of course.

C: 之前我一直说想跟艾丝妲代理站长申请外驻，终于通过了。我终于可以来到梦寐以求的狐人之都了！这也是多亏了你的帮助。
E: I always wanted Asta, the acting lead researcher, to transfer me, and now here I am in the foxian capital I've dreamed about. Thanks to you!

C: 我们先随便聊聊吧。
E: Let's just talk for now.

C: 这件事也多亏了你…对了，说到这里，最近好几个同事都在谈论你，那位驭空大人对你评价也很高，连我都有些嫉妒你了。
E: We owe this to you... Speaking of which, many of my colleagues have been talking about you lately, and Madam Yukong also thinks highly of you. I think I'm a little jealous.

C: 老板生意可好？
E: Is business good?

C: 思路打开点，「有门票的观众」才需要实名，「没有门票的观众」不需要实名。
E: Think about it this way. Real-name registration is only required for audiences with tickets. For those without tickets, why would they need to register their names?

C: 我们又见面了啊，这次是来加入「彦卿全银河粉丝后援会」的么？
E: We meet again. Are you here to join the Yanqing Galactic Fan Club?

C: 嗐，别提了。本来我准备了一肚子的话，结果见到本人时全忘了。
E: *sigh* Let's not mention that. I prepared a long speech to say to him, but completely forgot everything when I met him.

C: 好吧…或许应该推出一款无糖版苏乐达。为了销量…啊，不对，是为了健康！
E: Oh... Maybe we should consider releasing a zero sugar version of SoulGlad. Sales... Uh, health matters, after all!

C: 「鹿原幼猊」。
E: Stagplains Lioncub.

C: 嗐，读者想看的并不是这种四平八稳「包饺子」的剧情。
E: Eh, uninspiring happily-ever-afters like this aren't going to catch any reader's interest.

C: 我曾经的梦想就是写剑侠话本。然而现在这个年头，连载平台上的剑侠作品没多少人打榜，让做专职作家是不可能的了。于是，我加入了《曜青体育》。
E: It was my dream once upon a time to write a swordplay epic, but such works don't receive much support on serialization platforms anymore. A job as a full-time novelist is just impossible nowadays. That's why I joined Yaoqing Sports.

C: 这台售货机再也不说话了…
E: This vending machine doesn't speak anymore...

C: 那个星球一天一共多长？
E: How many hours are there in a day there?

C: 基于公司与仙舟的深度合作…
E: The IPC and the Xianzhou have been working closely together...

C: 听说其他将军也会来…
E: I heard that other generals will also be there...

C: 你这些功夫是合法的吗？
E: Is your type of martial art even legal?

C: 别担心，我不会对普通人使用如此恶毒的招式。
E: Don't worry, I won't use such vicious techniques against normal people.

C: 我被恶心到了，决心从他身上脱离。结果大街上，里里外外，到处都有着相似的气味…显然，他们还没有准备好成为父母。
E: I was disgusted and decided to get out of his body. But there it was, all over the place. Everywhere I went had the same stench... It seemed like lots of people weren't ready to become parents.

C: 棋鬼。
E: Chess Ghost.

C: 是啊…我也不知道。谁又能知道呢？
E: Yeah... I don't know either. Who would?

C: 哇，人类的脑子真不记事。
E: Wow, the human brain really is forgetful.

C: 我不知道「大守护者」意味着什么，肯定是了不起的人吧。
E: I don't know what "Supreme Guardian" means, but it sounds like a pretty awesome person.

C: 我寻思你应该看不到那时候了…也许景元能看到，也许他也看不到了。但无论如何，仙舟将会看到，哼哼哼……
E: I reckon you won't be able to see it with your own eyes... Maybe Jing Yuan would, or maybe he wouldn't. But no matter what, the Xianzhou will definitely witness it. Hahaha...

C: 想找你聊聊天。
E: I wanted to chat with you.

C: 建木之乱后，联盟的态度如何？
E: What is the Alliance's attitude to all of this, now the Ambrosial Arbor crisis had ended?

C: 废话，当然是打牌。
E: What nonsense, of course it's tile games.

C: 八万一串，概不讲价。
E: Eighty thousand a piece. No discounts.

C: 切，那有什么用。
E: Tsk, useless.

C: 别担心，前世跟你没关系。
E: Don't worry. You have nothing to do with your previous incarnation.

C: 就已经说明了很多事情。
E: ...means a lot.

C: 去往她所在的彼岸的。
E: ...to the other side where she is located.

C: 听说那些妖人在风中下毒
E: I heard those devils can poison the air.

C: 石榴汁烧嘟噜鸟排！那味道还真是忘不了啊。
E: Pomegranate juice grilled Dulu bird cutlets! I just can't forget that taste!

C: 好了，别追忆了。先前我从欧洛尼斯的祭司口中套出了些关于你的趣事，你要是在新世界还忆苦思甜的，小心我和族人们分享哦。
E: Alright, enough with the reminiscing. I managed to get some juicy stories about you from the Oronyx priest earlier. If you keep getting all nostalgic in the new world, I might just share them with the people.

C: 呃…打、打扰了，奶奶！
E: Uh... e—excuse me, grandma!

C: 小灰又在开玩笑了，*我们*可不是玩偶呀。
E: Little Gray is joking again, we aren't dolls, you know.

C: 噢，差点忘了你，小家伙。
E: Oh, almost forgot about you, little one.

C: 从前我和老友吉奥刻勒斯一同仰望过树庭的「星空」，每一颗星星都意味着一片更为深远的土地，我对天外群星的向往也从那时开始……
E: Long ago, I gazed at the "starry sky" of the Grove with my old friend Geocles. Each star represented a distant land, and that's when my yearning for the stars beyond the sky began...

C: 小飞儿，你也砸到脑袋啦？
E: Little Ciphy, did you hit your head too?

C: 百界门是很方便啦，但是，坐在火箭上，耳边都是呼呼的风声，完全是两种感觉！
E: Sure, the Century Gate is convenient and all, but sitting on a rocket with the wind whooshing past your ears, now that's a whole different experience!

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 待会再来找你。
E: I'll catch up with you later.

C: 我这手里捧着窝窝头。
E: As I hold the steamed corn buns in my hand,

C: 我要写一部惊世大作！
E: I want to write a masterpiece!

C: 在押犯人起码不担心住宿和吃饭问题，可我担心。
E: Unlike me, prisoners don't have to worry about food and accommodation.

C: 你…叫他宝宝？他看着比你还高。
E: You're calling him... "little"? He looks taller than you.

C: 老婆，我就说来罗浮度蜜月没错吧，居然赶上了演武仪典，哈哈哈！
E: I told you it'd be a great decision to spend our honeymoon at the Luofu, sweetie. We even caught the Wardance ceremony, hahaha!

C: 他刚开始跟我们说有内部关系，我们看他一脸自信的样子，就付了钱。
E: Initially, he said that he knows someone inside. Seeing how confident he was, we decided to pay him.

C: 别理我，让我一个人静静。
E: Leave me alone. I want some personal time.

C: 我说我永远爱你，老婆。
E: I said I love you, dearest wife!

C: 功夫加唱跳有没有搞头？
E: What about martial arts with singing and dancing?

C: 承担大规模运算的中枢性玉兆单元，高密度的特殊晶体材质…既然不在太卜司，而是在幽囚狱上班，超强的运算性能多半是被浪费了吧……
E: A core Jade Abacus Unit made from a special high-density crystal that is used to perform large-scale calculations... Utilizing it in the Shackling Prison rather than the Divination Commission is probably a waste of its powerful calculation capabilities...

C: 材质：囚犯，草本植物，禾本植物
E: Materials: Convict, herbs, grasses

C: 我的心中仍有一股无名之火
E: There remains a nameless flame in my heart

C: 剪红色的线。
E: Cut the red wire.

C: 有食客信誓旦旦称，这些来自匹诺康尼的美味小食没有梦的味道。看来，美梦也有保质期。
E: There are customers who would swear by their mothers that these delicious snacks from Penacony don't taste like dreams. It appears that even dreams have best-by dates.

C: 匹诺康尼的食品厂商为了罗浮本地食客的口味和习惯，特地开发了「陈婆豆腐」口味的爆米花…销量惨淡。
E: To cater to the tastes and habits of the Luofu's customers, Penacony's food vendors specially developed popcorn in the Granny Chen's Tofu flavor... Its sales were dismal.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 大家做得有条不紊。
E: Everyone is warming up in an orderly fashion.

C: 动作不到位，达不到效果的。
E: Your stance is off, and that won't get you anywhere.

C: 卢卡都打到决赛了。
E: Luka has made it to the finals.

C: 融山、水、石、花木、雕塑、建筑为一体的人工造景，罗浮园林艺术的佳作之一。
E: One of the best landscape art pieces in the Luofu, it is an artificial landscape that incorporates the elements of mountain, pond, rock, plant, sculpture, and architecture.

C: 你注意到它在船尾留下了安转玦轮的圆孔。如果就在这里装上电扇或者轮胎会怎样呢？
E: You notice some round holes left on the stern for the installation of a jade wheel. What will happen if an electric fan or a tire is fixed on the spot instead?

C: 完成组装的星槎停靠在迴星港港口，等待着它的是驶向未来的旅程。
E: The fully assembled starskiff is docked at Stargazer Navalia. A journey to the future is awaiting it.

C: 据说能够营造出适合卜者们专心推演的沉静氛围，但你不清楚它是如何工作的。
E: It is said to be able to create a calming atmosphere that helps the diviners to focus on their work. Yet, you are not sure how it works.

C: 你碰了碰这颗持明卵，发现它似乎毫无反应。仔细聆听，里头却有一线极细微的咕哝声，如烬中星火，明明灭灭。它在絮叨着，它不喜欢水体。
E: You nudge the Vidyadhara egg, but it does not respond. As you listen to it carefully, you catch a faint mumbling from inside that goes on and off like an ember in the ashes. It is rambling on about its dislike for water.

C: 你开始拒绝回复、尝试借机逃走，你想要中断这奇妙的回光返照，你不必再重温那一刻——你狠心地痛下杀手的那一瞬间。
E: You stop responding and try to run away. You want to stop this bizarre flashback of your memory so that you need not experience the moment you ruthlessly killed her again.

C: 崇高的道德果然没有看错你，你是如此心地善良。
E: The High Morals clearly made the right choice with you. You have such a kind heart.

C: 不过是学院的任务罢了。
E: They're just part of the university's mission is all.

C: 学院与乐队爆发冲突…
E: The academy and the band are clashing...

C: 测量岁阳强度的指示器。
E: An indicator device that measures the power level of heliobi.

C: 我听闻他们的当铺什么都收。
E: I hear that pawnshop takes everything.

C: 别跟着我…
E: Stop following me...

C: 对啊，围坐一圈，在桌子上铺了一大张布，上面密密麻麻的全是字。然后要我给他们一一解答，什么「这个数的答案是多少」。
E: Yes. The group sat around me. On the table was a large cloth covered with words. They asked me for... the answers, asking questions such as "What's the answer to this problem?"

C: 「潮流时尚，精品典藏——尽在于此！」
E: "Chic, trendy, and a fine collection — it's all here."

C: 这家店铺不售卖商品——它只负责把珍贵之物换成钱财，好让那些不愿离开的穷光蛋在梦中多待些时日。
E: This shop does not sell items — it is only responsible for trading valuable items for money, allowing the poor who do not wish to leave to spend a few more days in the dream.

C: 瓦尔特的房间，散发着一股莫名「沉重」的气息，足以吓退那些不怀好意的宾客。
E: Welt's room gives off a somewhat somber aura, which is enough to intimidate guests who are up to no good.

C: 恍惚间你仿佛听见提琴低沉优雅的嗓音：「我们的演奏…您觉得好听…吗…？」
E: You seem to hear a low, elegant violin: "Did you like... our performance...?"

C: 你在梦中，看见时间的轮盘变形融化，嘀嗒、嘀嗒——
E: In your dream, you witness the wheels of time morphing and melting, tick-tock, tick-tock.

C: 也许…也许有机会。下一个「盛会之星」……
E: Maybe... Maybe there's a chance. The next "Planet of Festivities"...

C: 曾经的我会用这种方法去评判艺术家，嘲讽那些我认为愚蠢的、抨击那些我以为顽固的……
E: I used to apply this method to evaluate artists, mocking those I deem foolish and criticizing those I think are too stubborn...

C: 不用怕。哈…哈哈，我都准备好了。放心，不会让你们吃苦的。哈哈哈……
E: All right, fear not. Ha... Haha, I'm all ready now. Don't worry. You won't suffer. Hahaha...

C: 不愧是上个技术世代的引擎，在体内运转起来的感觉就是不同，很顺畅，像是星鲸在歌唱。声响是大了点，但不重要，只要型号合适，散热降噪都不成问题。
E: Got to hand it to engines made with old-gen tech. Feels very different when it's running, very smooth. Like a starwhale's song. A bit louder than usual, but that's not important — as long as the model's compatible, heat dispersion and noise reduction aren't problems.

C: 一块爬满了绿锈的电路板。
E: A circuit board layered with silicon-green rust.

C: 汪，汪汪！
E: Woof, ruff ruff!

C: 汪汪…汪…汪……
E: Woof woof... woof.. ruff...

C: 我能出现在这里，就说明那套什么…灵魂…人性分类法，根本就是胡扯！
E: The very fact that I can stand here is testimony to the fact that such concepts as a soul... as humanity... these classifications are simply nonsense!

C: 知更鸟……
E: Robin...

C: 吃得苦中苦，方为物上物。想要让道具拥有运动能力，必须连续数月、持之以恒地鞭策才行。
E: No pain, no gain. To get these items moving, one must persevere and whip them for countless months.

C: 你都有什么演出？
E: What kind of performances do you have?

C: 客人好眼光！玻璃瓶先生虽然还没路演过，但它已经在训练中养成了出色的弹跳力——我这就把它给您带来。
E: Great choice! Even though Mr. Glass Bottle hasn't been on a show before, it has mastered a spectacular bouncing ability. Let me invite it out now.

C: 我是个失败者…就连真正愿意理解我的人都找不到……
E: I'm a failure... I can't even find someone who is willing to hear me out...

C: 哈！之前我一定是脑子坏了才会抱怨个不停。
E: Ha! I must be crazy to grumble about my life.

C: …抱歉，我不想谈论这个。如你所见，我享受此刻的孤独。
E: ...Sorry, but I don't wish to talk about this. As you can see, I am enjoying my solitude.

C: 见到韦和小佩的时候…我很难用语言形容自己当时的心理活动。我不想伤害他们，但我也理解不了他们眼中那种病态的爱。
E: When I saw Wes and Pennie... I found it difficult to describe my feelings at that time. I didn't want to hurt them, but I couldn't understand their toxic love too.

C: 但我却总觉得哪里不足——我此生所求无非是掌握寰宇间最极致的制表工艺，并打造出一枚世间无二的「钟表」！
E: However, I felt that something was missing... All I desire in this life is to master the most exquisite craftsmanship techniques and create a "timepiece" like no other!

C: 嘿，朋友，给你讲个好玩的事。昨天我站在柜台后，听到有人说打劫，吓得我汽水都喷出来了，可我找了半天都没看到人影…你知道是为什么吗？
E: Hey, pal! Let me tell you something fun! I had a close call with a robbery yesterday. I was standing behind the counter when someone shouted, "This is a stick up!" I was so startled that I even spat out my soda. But guess what? When I turned around, there was nobody there... Can you guess why?

C: 毫无审美的老东西，根本就不懂现在的流行趋势，笑话就是要够俗，贴合实际！
E: Those old-school folks just don't get the latest trends!

C: 我很高兴——我的小先生，他现在很幸福。
E: I'm glad that my dear master... he's happy now.

C: *自动乐团*能满足他的一切需求，所以别再打他的主意了！
E: The *automated orchestra* can fulfill his every need! Don't ever try to take him away!

C: 那么，你想要关注什么样的对象呢？
E: Now then, who do you want to know about?

C: 唉，真愁人。明明当哥哥的也是为了他好，怎么就不懂呢……
E: *sigh* So vexing. I'm just trying to be a good older brother to him, why can't he understand...

C: 必须承认，自从某些人消停之后，我耳边确实清净了许多。
E: I must admit that it's been much more peaceful once some people stopped their antics.

C: 你们化外民总羡慕长生种，却殊不知越是长生种，越是畏惧天缺。
E: You outworlders envy long-life species — what you don't know is the longer we live, the more we dread our genetic disadvantages.

C: 呃…那你想想，假如有人发明了一种仿生机器，管它们叫「自动无业游民」，把你能领的补助、睡觉的桥洞、要翻的垃圾桶全抢走了，你难道不恨它们吗？
E: Uh... Well, just think about it: If someone invented an android and called it the "Auto-unemployed," it took away all your subsidies and your sleeping spots and snatched away all your trashcans, wouldn't you hate it?

C: 我得好好干，绝不能浪费这个来之不易的机会！
E: I'll have to do my best, I can't afford to let this opportunity go to waste!

C: 之前听新闻说，家族正在扩建一处全新的梦境空间。那地方好像叫什么「筑梦边境」，暂时还不让外人参观。
E: I heard on the news that The Family is building a brand-new Dreamscape. They're calling it "Dream's Edge" or something like that, but outsiders aren't allowed in for now.

C: 再次抱歉，我好为人师的老毛病又犯了。当然，你若是不介意，我倒是愿意再和你聊聊。
E: My apologies. I always end up lecturing people like this. Of course, if you do not take offense, I would like to continue our discussion.

C: 我恨他们不开窍，天天去凭空追求艺术，而忽略了建筑的本质应当是实用性。他们也恨我，恨我不肯放他们自由地追寻梦想。
E: I hate that they spend their days chasing artistic ideas that are based on nothing and overlook the fact that the innate nature of architecture is practicality. They also hate that I will not allow them to go and freely chase their dreams.

C: 再见，可爱的朋友。
E: Farewell, my loveable friend.

C: 我只是有点好奇那个球！
E: I'm just a little curious about that ball!

C: …既然这样，请允许我郑重告诫您——此类言行对于皮皮西一族而言极为失礼，请切勿再犯。
E: ...If that is the case, allow me to give you a severe warning — such speech and actions are considered extremely disrespectful to the Pepeshi people. Please refrain from doing this again.

C: 好的。「白日梦酒店」是匹诺康尼的标志性建筑，也是现实与梦境的中转站。
E: Certainly. The Reverie is a renowned landmark in Penacony, serving as a transit point between reality and Dreamscape.

C: 真想一直待在梦里。
E: If only I could stay in the dream forever.

C: 没什么事了。
E: Nothing else.

C: 帝皇造物引擎挥舞着同样已经完全进化的洞洞机•神王模式，只用一击便击碎了绝灭大君的装甲——贝洛伯格的人民，从此自由了！
E: The Imperial Engine of Creation wields the fully evolved Diggertron in God-Emperor Mode, shattering Lord Ravager's armor with a single strike and liberating the people of Belobog from the clutches of terror!

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: 空荡的大厅…脚步声接近，带着回声。一人在前，两人在后。
E: An empty hall... Footsteps approach, their echoes reverberating. One ahead, two behind.

C: 呃…是很独特的武器呢！
E: Um... That's quite unique!

C: 我的引擎技术来自追逐萨尔索图晨昏线的浮空城市，急刹工艺师从机动球场最尖端的漂移战靴，窗玻璃是塔利亚闪亮的沙砾，就连喷漆都是……
E: My engine technology originates from a floating city on the terminator line in Salsotto. The craftsmanship of my emergency brake is inspired by the cutting-edge drift boots used in the Roboball court. My window panes are made of the shiny sand from Talia, and even my paint is...

C: 知道就好。
E: Mhm, make sure you never forget about it.

C: 我忙的很，有事去找{RUBY_B#折纸小鸟聚集地}「大树」{RUBY_E#}的那几只鸟吧，它们应该有事要拜托你。
E: I'm swamped with work. If you have any questions, you can go to those birds on the {RUBY_B#origami birds' gathering spot}Great Tree{RUBY_E#}. I think they'll need your help with their affairs.

C: 等你帮它们<color=#dbc291ff>找到足够数量的折纸小鸟后，我就会给你奖励</color>——「故事情节」是这么写的。
E: When you have helped them <color=#dbc291ff>find the required number of origami birds, I'll give you rewards.</color> This is written under the "Storyline" section.

C: 虽然以后恐怕没法再和米沙一起玩了…但我知道，这才是他一直以来想要前往的目的地！所以，我才不会被悲伤打倒——我该打起精神，替他感到高兴才对！
E: Though I probably won't be able to play with Misha in the future... I know this is the destination he's always been seeking! So, I won't let sadness knock me down. I'm gonna perk up and be happy for him!

C: ——但请你务必要记得钟表小子、哈努兄弟、折纸小鸟、甚至石头老板这些伙伴噢！有机会的话也记得回来看看，再顺便多给我带些金表钞来！
E: ...But don't forget about your friends like Clockie, Brother Hanu, the origami birds, and even Boss Stone! If you have the chance, come back and see us. And remember to bring me more Clock Credits if you can!

C: 原来是知更鸟小姐的客人呀。
E: Ah, so you're here to see Miss Robin.

C: 感觉这里戒备很严格。
E: I feel like security here is extremely strict?

C: 你愿倾听我的告解吗？
E: Will you listen to my confession?

C: 请问你如何看待美梦？
E: What's your take on dreams?

C: 是啊，也许家主应该给我发个胸牌，上面写着「年度模范在此」。这样还算有些仪式感。
E: Yes. Perhaps the head of The Family should confer me with a medal, with "I'm the role model of the year" engraved on it. At least there'd be some sense of ceremony to it.

C: 好啊，我很高兴有人能对影视乐园感兴趣。
E: Sure, I'm very glad that there are people interested in theme parks.

C: 聊聊你的朋友？
E: Would you like to talk about your friend?

C: 眼前的皮皮西依旧仰头望着半空中哈努兄弟的立牌，面色怅然。
E: The Pepeshi before you is still looking up at the Hanu sign in midair with a sorrowful face.

C: 他开始一本又一本地著书立说，驳斥一切在他看来的异端邪说；而我则只身来到匹诺康尼，成为了一名梦境鼓励师……
E: He began penning book after book to refute everything he deemed heretical, while I traveled to Penacony all by myself to become a Dreamscape Motivator...

C: 他究竟为什么…会变成这副样子呢？
E: Just why... did he turn out this way?

C: 哪怕以皮皮西的尺度来看，一个孩子也不可能做到这些…这定是神主的恩赐！
E: Even by the Pepeshi's standard, a child couldn't have done all that... It must have been a gift from the Great One!

C: 皮皮西的脸色突然开始变红，仿佛一块逐渐加热的烙铁——这可真是太神奇啦。
E: The Pepeshi's cheeks suddenly turn red like an iron block heading up — what a miraculous sight to behold.

C: 欢迎来到美梦小镇，滴答！
E: Welcome to Dreamville, tick-tock!

C: 动不动就「自愿加班」、动不动就「扣半年绩效」…我们每天从早干到晚，到手那点苜蓿币扣完酒店房费连块钟表披萨都买不起！
E: Every other day it's "voluntary overtime" or "we're cutting the half-year performance bonus"... We're here daily from dawn until dusk and the meager Alfalfa credits they pay us aren't even enough for a slice of Clockie Pizza after I've paid my hotel fees!

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 为我介绍一下影视乐园吧？
E: What can you tell me about the theme park?

C: 嗨，我有什么可聊的。我就普普通通一逐梦客，放在人群里挑都挑不出来。
E: Hey, there's nothing much to say about me. I'm just a plain old Dreamchaser... You couldn't pick me out of a crowd!

C: 没有。这些事都是在我成年后，动用家族关系才调查到的。
E: No. I only discovered this once I was older using Family connections.

C: 各大家系的首位家主也全都另有其人，且大多是些名不见经传的小角色，例如：橡木家系的马格诺只是个阴险狡诈的政治犯，鸢尾花的阿斯娜则是蒙冤入狱的宇宙歌者……
E: The first Family Heads of each lineage were also different people, the majority of them being unknown characters that feature in no such legends. For example: The Head of the Oak Family, Magnoy, was nothing more than a corrupt politician. Asna of the Iris Family was a universal singer who was wrongly imprisoned...

C: 需要我去告诉舒翁吗？
E: Do I need to tell Siobhan about this?

C: 嘻嘻，不用那么紧张啦，因为要演出的，本来就是我们的故事呀。
E: Hehe, don't be so nervous! This is our story we're performing, after all!

C: 能遇见灵魂伴侣的概率，不过只有六分之一。
E: The chances of meeting your soulmate are but one in six.

C: 我想想…时间应该还够，不过你得说快点，我是偷偷出来逛的。
E: Let me think... I probably don't have time but, speak quickly, I snuck out here to have a look around.

C: 呵呵，特殊时期，还请多多担待。最近风头紧，现在猎犬的鼻子比以往任何时候都灵敏。
E: Hehe. These are special times, so please bear with me. Things have been tense recently. The Hounds' noses have been sharper than ever.

C: 别嫌弃我不够真诚…你肯定不会希望我以对待叛徒的态度来对待你的。
E: Don't be disappointed that I'm not honest enough... I'm positive you wouldn't want me to handle you with the same attitude I come at traitors with.

C: 有趣的小把戏…如果我会你这种手段，审问应该能轻松不少。
E: Neat little trick there... If I could use that tactic of yours, my interrogations would probably be way easier.

C: 入梦后，我们就会陆陆续续收到客户的单子，有时是单独给一些店铺做维修，有时是一起去填补大工程的空缺。
E: After we enter the Dreamscape, we'll receive orders from customers. Sometimes, it'll be a solo task to do maintenance on some shops. Other times, we'll need to work together to fill in the gap of a large project.

C: 谈谈你的梦想。
E: Let's talk about your dream.

C: 工作这事，无非也就是一种买卖，我出力，老板出钱。但老板有选择的权力，我没有，所以只能遵守他制定的交易规则。
E: Work is all a matter of buying and selling. I put in the effort; the boss puts in the money. The difference between us is that the boss has the right to choose, while I don't. All I can do is abide by the rules he sets for exchanging my work for money.

C: 这可真是份甜蜜的叨扰，期待再次与你相见。
E: This chat was truly a sweet distraction. I do hope to see you again.

C: 说人话。
E: Speak human please.

C: 哈哈哈，当我成为超级骇客的时候，朋克洛德所有的论坛都回荡着我的名字。
E: Haha, when I first became a super hacker, my nickname shook the forums of Punklorde to the bone.

C: 当人们进入阿斯德纳星系范围内，就能收到《时讯》的订阅推送，不知道你还有没有印象……
E: When people enter the Asdana system, they'll get a push notification about subscribing to the bulletin. I wonder if you've had a chance to check it out yet...

C: 虽然可能是我多心了，但出于谨慎，你最好还是留意一下那个叫做加西亚的男人。
E: I might just be paranoid, but out of an abundance of caution, I suggest you keep one eye open for this Garcia guy.

C: 哎…简直难以置信…但家族一定是想要对我*洗脑*……
E: Ah... It's hard to believe but... I know The Family must be trying to brainwash me...

C: 所以，我一直想要去一个和庇尔波因特不同的地方。这流梦礁…算是实现了一半吧。
E: So, I always wanted to go somewhere different to Pier Point. With the Dreamflux Reef... I guess I've half-achieved that.

C: 即便是残翼的鸟儿，在这梦中，亦有飞翔的可能。为了这一天，我会一直守望下去。
E: Even a bird with clipped wings has the potential to fly in a dream. I will always be watching over them, so that they may see this day.

C: 总有人会解决。
E: Someone will eventually do it.

C: 我在折纸大学研究忆质动力学，那是个很难的学科，建系以来也只有寥寥不过百人毕业。
E: I studied memoria dynamics, a very challenging subject, at Paperfold University, and only a few hundred people have graduated since the department was founded.

C: 亲爱的旅客，你们走南闯北，如果有什么相关消息的话，请记得通知我一声！
E: Dear traveler, you must be exploring more places than me. If you've ever heard of any relevant news, please let me know!

C: 又或者，是来找我聊聊天呢……
E: Or perhaps you've come to have a little chat with me...

C: 那时我与她常常奏响欢快的乐曲，囚犯们就围在我们身边，看着、听着，他们眼里有光。曲调高昂时他们纵情欢呼、合着节拍起舞……
E: We used to play cheerful music together, and the prisoners would gather around to watch and listen, their eyes lighting up. When the melody ramped up, they would cheer heartily, dancing to the rhythm of the beat...

C: 嗯…或许每只小鸟都曾有个当海盗的梦想？<color=#dbc291ff>电梯附近</color>有个海盗梦入脑的小鸟，去和它玩会儿冒险游戏吧。
E: Hmm... Maybe every bird once had dreams of being a pirate? There's a bird <color=#dbc291ff>near the elevator</color> who daydreams of nothing but pirates. Go find it and play some adventure games together.

C: 嗯…有只胆小的小鸟，总找一些黑漆漆的地方锻炼胆量。附近有一座<color=#dbc291ff>只亮着一扇窗户的诡异公寓</color>，它就在那里试胆呢。
E: Hmm... There's a timid bird that's always seeking out pitch-black places to hone its guts. There's an <color=#dbc291ff>eerie apartment building with only one window lit up</color>. It should be trying to train its courage there.

C: 还是算了吧。
E: Never mind.

C: 这些报酬先给你，让它们见识见识真正的硬派鸟啾。
E: Take these rewards with you first. Let them witness the true form of what it means to be hardcore, tweet.

C: 让我确认下，你真不是专程来抢走我「美梦小镇飞得最快的鸟」称号的？啾啾？
E: To confirm, you're not really here to take my "Fastest Flying Bird of Dreamville" title away from me, right? Tweet tweet?

C: 啾！小家伙们，我现在就要你们知道逃跑的代价啾——等我训练完它们就来和你比试啾。
E: Tweet! Little ones, I will let you all know the price of escaping, tweet. Come back and challenge me when I'm done with their training, tweet.

C: 关于猫头鹰老师…
E: About Professor Owl...

C: 让我想想…对了，<color=#dbc291ff>贵宾区的沙发</color>又软又暖和，我们在那儿休息的时候，有个孩子就一直不想离开啾～
