E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, the <color=#dbc291ff>guest area's sofa</color> is soft and warm. We sometimes take a break there, but there's always a child that simply doesn't want to leave, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，<color=#dbc291ff>有个堆满了镜子的房间，里面不时会传出稚嫩的琴声</color>，想必是那个好学的孩子弄的动静啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, <color=#dbc291ff>there's a room full of mirrors, and sometimes dissonant piano tunes can be heard from within</color>. I bet it's that studious child that's causing the noise, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有好几个孩子都跑到<color=#dbc291ff>镜子房间</color>去了，有个活泼的孩子自告奋勇去接它们，它应该就在<color=#dbc291ff>入口</color>等着啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, quite a few children went into the <color=#dbc291ff>mirror room</color>. A lively child has volunteered to fetch them — They're probably waiting at the <color=#dbc291ff>entrance</color>, tweet!

C: 你为什么留在流梦礁？
E: Why have you decided to stay in the Dreamflux Reef?

C: 哦~这位生面孔的顾客，你是来照顾我的生意？还是想跟我畅聊一番？
E: Ooh, a familiar face. Are you here to take care of my business? Or for a chat?

C: 但没关系，你说得对，很少有有机生命爱玩玩具。
E: But it's okay. You're right — few organic lifeforms like toys.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all the questions I have.

C: 哎，希望如此~
E: *sigh* I sure hope so!

C: 哎呀！「美梦剧团」们真是太可怜了，我看不下去了！
E: Oh dear! The Sweet Dreams Troupe members are such poor things. I can't bear this any longer!

C: 既然你造访了流梦礁，还能走到这里来，说明你对这场美梦已经很了解了。
E: That you visited the Dreamflux Reef and still made it this far, it means you know this dream very well.

C: 我曾去过太多地方…在死与恶中，嗅到无限生机、窥见永恒的美。于是我将它们记录下来。
E: I've been to too many places... Amidst death and evil, I have discovered limitless opportunity and observed eternal beauty. This is why I record such moments down.

C: 我曾去过太多地方…在死与恶中，嗅到无限生机、窥见永恒的美。于是我将它们记录下来。
E: I've been to too many places... Amidst death and evil, I have discovered limitless opportunity and observed eternal beauty. This is why I record such moments down.

C: 诸位，请先冷静一些……
E: Everybody, please calm down...

C: 这就是意外惊喜——音乐的高潮总在于出其不意，烹饪亦然。
E: What an unexpected surprise... The climax of a music piece lies in the element of surprise. Naturally, this applies to cooking as well.

C: 至于那位朋友…他反倒是一直要在食材的新奇上下文章。
E: As for my friend, he yearned to make a name for himself using exotic ingredients.

C: 所以，我向来都对自己的职业相当自豪。
E: Which is all to say, I've always been very proud of my profession.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 这是人类最伟大的体系。不过，「伟大」是不是经常用来形容…那些现在已经失去意义的东西？
E: This is mankind's greatest system, but have you noticed how we always use "greatest" to describe things that have lost its significance?

C: 啊，瞧我的记性，甚至…如果你能替我留心一些「小细节」，免费体验都不是问题哦？
E: Oh, I almost forgot. Actually, if you help me take note of some "small details," I can offer you the experience for free instead.

C: 嗯…聊聊看也没什么，虽然的确出人意料，但目前还仅仅只是猜测嘛。
E: Oh, I can talk about it. It's surprising to be sure, but all I have is conjecture right now.

C: 关于美食一切，我都可以回答你。
E: For anything food-related, just ask away.

C: 闲聊几句也不行吗？
E: Not even a bit of chitchat?

C: 还好，他们肯虚心接纳我的意见…现在我可以骄傲地说，在投资这一行，我就从没失手过！
E: Fortunately, they were open to my suggestions. Now, I can proudly say that I've never lost on an investment!

C: 要记住，不动声色才是在法庭上取胜的王道——就像我现在这样。
E: Remember, maintaining your composure — like the way I'm behaving now — is the golden rule to winning in court.

C: 客官，如果您有「魔法硬币」就好了，魔法硬币可以唤醒人家的记忆啾！
E: Dear guest, it'd be fantastic if you have a magic coin. Magic coins can reawaken my memories, tweet!

C: 我想说…
E: Actually...

C: …要是流程走到人力部门那边，他们会不会开除我？呜呜…我家里还指望我补贴下生活费呢…这下怎么办呐……
E: ...Will HR fire me if this reaches them? *sob* My family's expecting me to help out with our living expenses... What do I do now?

C: 别担心，船长来了。
E: Let the captain take your worries away.

C: …就这么抛弃过去的自己，我…我还是舍不得……
E: I—I can't bring myself to close the chapter on my past just like that...

C: 如您所愿，已经更改成功了，如果您还想继续更换方案，随时喊我就好。
E: I've made the desired changes. Please let me know whenever you'd like to change the design again.

C: 世事洞明皆学问，我目前所掌握的也只是一些管理学知识的皮毛，离「深奥」这个层级还差得远呢。
E: To have insight into worldly affairs is to be truly learned. I only know the basics of management and am nowhere near having a deep understanding of it.

C: 当然，如果您还有别的事项想问，请问吧，我很乐意为您解答。
E: Of course, if there's anything else that you'd like to know, I'm more than happy to satisfy your curiosity.

C: 对了，船长您来这儿是有啥事吗？有什么任务的话尽管吩咐吧，老佩德罗随时候命！
E: So... Captain, are you here on business? Just say the word if you need us on a mission. Old Pedro's always raring to go!

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你也是这里的学生吧？正好，若我当年有过来人指点指点，也不至于落得这般废物的模样。我把人生的智慧传授于你吧，听好了——
E: {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, you're also a student here, right? In the past, if someone had been there to guide me, I might not have ended up in this pathetic state. So, let me share some of my life wisdom with you. Listen carefully...

C: 不过你放心，等咱混进去了，一定带上你。我派对王最痛恨这种拉帮结派的作派！
E: But no worries! Once I'm in, I'll make sure to get you in too. As the Party King, I can't tolerate this kind of exclusion!

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: （提出你的星际垃圾场计划）
E: (Tell him your plan for the interastral junkyard.)

C: 那些人究竟什么时候才能意识到——筑梦在成为艺术前，首先是一项工程！
E: When will these people realize that... before dreamweaving became an art, it was a form of engineering!

C: …在我看来，这不单单是对教师们正当权益的侵犯，更是对学生的不负责！故而我的诉求是……
E: ...In my opinion, this is not only a violation of the legitimate rights and interests of teaching staff, it is also a disservice to the students! Therefore, my request is...

C: 不过当然，这并不影响我为自己和学生们的权益继续抗争下去。
E: However, naturally, that won't stop me from continuing to defend the rights of myself and my students.

C: 这社团，它正经吗？
E: Is this club official?

C: 别紧张，还没准备好也没关系，我又有新素材了，正好和你分享一下！
E: No need to worry if you haven't got it ready yet. I've got new material to share with you!

C: 经理好。音乐派对还没有结束，外面这么热闹，您该去享受欢快的校园生活才对。
E: Hello Manager. The music party isn't over yet. It's bustling out there, and you should be enjoying the carefree school life outside.

C: 你尝试用钟表把戏碰触达凡绮的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，听到的都是相同的话语……
E: You try using clockwork to get in touch with Dafanchy's heart, but no matter how much the clock turns, you hear the same old words...

C: 属于我的音乐派对已经结束了，现在该专心准备毕业的相关事项。
E: My music party has already ended. It's now time to focus on the affairs concerning graduation.

C: 呵…乱破同学很早就说过，校园并非如我想象得那般平静，可那时候我以为她只是在胡言乱语，甚至还为此指责你们…对不起。
E: Heh... Rappa said it earlier before: The school isn't as peaceful as I thought, but I thought she was just spouting rubbish and even blamed you all for that... I'm sorry.

C: 谢谢经理，我再复制一份给你，就当作是纪念了。毕业以后，希望我们都不要忘记这段为了音乐梦想而共同努力的经历。
E: Thank you, manager. I will make a copy for you as a souvenir. After I graduate, I hope you all won't forget this time when we all worked together for our dream of music.

C: 嗯，经理想找我聊些什么呢？
E: Mm, what do you wish to talk about?

C: 好好享受这场音乐派对吧！
E: Enjoy this music party to the fullest!

C: …辞职？不行，那可不行。我还有好多没用上的音乐灵感，想出席的隆重场合，还有很多事情等着我去做。
E: ...Quit? No, that won't do. I still have plenty of unrealized musical inspiration that needs to be serenaded on a grand stage. There are plenty of amazing things waiting for me to accomplish them.

C: 家人供我读书已经很艰难了，老爹一把年纪了，还要来匹诺康尼进厂打工…我要是毕不了业，学费贷款花了那么多钱，感觉都拿去喂狗都比花在我身上好！
E: My family is already having a hard time supporting my education. My old man still has to come to Penacony and work in a factory at his age... If I don't graduate, all my student loans spent would have been better off feeding the dogs than on me!

C: 先不聊了。
E: We'll talk later.

C: 欸？写得这么快，已经完成了吗…我这就上传给学院那边…对了，我也发你一份吧，如果你想吃什么甜品，可、可以让我寄给你哦……
E: Eh? That was quick. You're done already...? I'll upload it to the academy then... Oh yes, I'll also send you a copy. If you have a dessert you want to eat, y—you can get me to send it to you...

C: 没，我什么也没问。
E: No, I didn't ask anything.

C: 听我说了这么多，真不好意思…给你这个……希望你能一直有「蕉错就错」的勇气。
E: Sorry for making you listen to my rant... Take this... and may you always find the courage to "Embrace the Mistakenana."

C: 虽说要开始苦行，但我觉得它仍有纪念的价值，就想好好保存，却不慎在匹诺康尼遗失了。
E: Even though I was about to start my penance, I wanted to keep it for its sentimental value, but I lost it in Penacony.

C: 在这人世创造乐园，仍是我毕生的夙愿。获得准许后，我也查阅了智库中的信息，发现宇宙中有不少世界有着类似的名号。
E: Creating a paradise remains my lifelong ambition. When I obtained permission and accessed the data bank, I came across many references to this concept throughout the universe.

C: 我方郑重承诺，参赛者的个人隐私将得到严密保护，请放心使用该注册设备。
E: As we pledge to closely guard the privacy of all participants, please feel free to register with this device.

C: 你憋着一口气，隔空发力，尝试着一次性批量打开所有抽屉，然而它们不为所动。
E: You hold your breath and try to telekinetically open all the drawers at once, but they remain closed.

C: 在这里跳下去会落到知更鸟小姐与星期日先生的面前吗？你想起初次入梦时，摔落至「黄金的时刻」的经历，不禁哑然失笑……
E: Will jumping off the edge plop you right in front of Miss Robin and Mr. Sunday? You recall the first time you dived into the dream and how you plummeted into the Golden Hour. You can't help but smile...

C: 你这才意识到这似乎是某种虚拟现实的功能，透过监控设备，令使用者犹如亲临于高空之上。
E: You suddenly realize that this seems to be some sort of virtual reality function that allows the user to feel as though they are really high up in the sky through the surveillance device.

C: 报告中提到，船长周边正在火热预售中，税后分成已在存入你的保险柜中。
E: The report mentions that the pre-sale for the captain's merchandise is currently ongoing and the profits after tax deduction have already been deposited into your safe.

C: 糖浆汽水容易长胖。
E: It's easy to put on weight with sugary soda.

C: 没钱你买什么奢侈品？
E: If you don't have money, why are you shopping for luxuries?

C: 给他来个儿童餐。
E: Give him a kid's meal.

C: 好棒的音乐！
E: Gorgeous music!

C: 真是放荡不堪！
E: How imprudent!

C: 我就说该这么办…
E: Like I said, we should do it that way...

C: 真是连梦都做不起了。
E: Can't even catch a break in my dreams.

C: 再来一次！
E: One more time!

C: 钱不好赚啊…
E: Making money isn't easy...

C: 我都亲自体验过了！
E: I've experienced them myself!

C: 买爆米花送剧场门票！
E: Buy popcorn and get a free movie ticket!

C: 智械也是有灵魂的。
E: Intellitron have souls too.

C: 什么时候才能清理干净…
E: When will I be free of this thing?

C: 确实不错，我都想下去游一圈了。
E: Yeah, it looks nice. I want to go for a swim down there.

C: 客人请留步，这里是匹诺康尼电视台总部，工作时间不向外人开放。
E: Excuse me, esteemed guest, but this is the headquarters of Penacony TV Station and is off-limits to outsiders during working hours.

C: 嘶…这墙怎么过不去？不是说后面有个隐藏车站吗？
E: Argh... Why can't I travel through this wall? Isn't there a secret station behind it?

C: 哼…我偏要继续玩，难道你还能反抗不成？
E: Hmph... will you stop me if I insist on playing?

C: 太过分了，那你怎么处理的？
E: That's tough. How did you handle it?

C: 花名册…是该在这儿啊。
E: The Flora Codex... should be here...

C: 我一开始也觉得他赢定了，可赶过去的那无名客也不是一般人，我甚至从他们身上看出了一股英雄惜英雄的色彩。
E: At first, I thought he was going to win for sure, but the Nameless who rushed over was no ordinary person. I even saw a tinge of heroism in them.

C: 唉，我吓得心脏病快出来了……
E: Ah, my heart almost jumped out of my mouth...

C: 「一定得再三注意！」
E: "Pay extra attention!"

C: 你能不能现实点，整天听信那种十八手消息，什么「典当行」能典当青春…别做梦了！
E: Can you please be more realistic? Listening to all this word-of-mouth news, stuff about how you can pawn your youth at the Pawnshop... Stop dreaming!

C: 艺术是有力量的，我们的光芒会照亮最暗的时刻，就用这次表演证明这一点吧。
E: There is power in art. Our radiance will illuminate even the darkest moments, and we shall use this show to prove just that.

C: 谐乐大典遇袭取消，这件事影响巨大…你认为家族会接受并购案的可能性有多大？
E: The Charmony Festival's cancellation due to an attack — this matter has grave effects... What do you think are the odds of The Family accepting the acquisition?

C: 我们当时距离那么近！
E: She was so close that I could smell her!

C: 你不懂，这机会千载难得…
E: You don't know. This is a golden opportunity...

C: 这是克劳克影视乐园，筑梦学院优秀毕业生的作品——你看了半天才认出来，画得还挺别致。
E: This is Clock Studios Theme Park, the work of Dreamweaver Academy's exemplary graduates — you inspect it for quite a while before realizing what the topic is. The art is quite unconventional.

C: 车站的设计图手稿，系某位筑梦师的作品，你仔细端详拱门的形状，觉得有些眼熟，星穹列车似乎刚好能停泊于此。你开始怀疑这是否属于无名客前辈们的杰作。
E: The station's design sketch — the work of a certain Dreamweaver. You carefully examine the archway's form, finding it somewhat familiar, as if the Astral Express would fit like a glove. You start to suspect if this was a masterpiece of a Nameless predecessor.

C: 「咔哒」，天黑请闭眼。
E: "Click," close your eyes as it gets dark.

C: （玩的差不多了）
E: (That's enough playing)

C: 想了解一下吗？这是我给赫拉克勒斯专门撰写的故事，你也收一本吧。
E: Eager to hear more about his adventures? I've penned an epic just for Heracles. Here, take a copy.

C: 一点小心意，不足挂齿。
E: It's nothing. Don't mention it.

C: 你和自己相谈甚欢。突发奇想，干脆下次让你自己的快乐、担忧、愤怒、讨厌、害怕一起登场如何？可惜咱们没有那么多的颜色，人稍微一多就分不出谁是谁了。
E: You chat with yourself in good spirits. A sudden thought crosses your mind — what if next time, all your joy, worry, anger, dislike, and fear all show up at once? Too bad we don't have that many colors, and once there are too many people, it's hard to tell one another.

C: 冷静下来一想，你们仨要是分别叫灰宝，灰安，灰宁的…好像也不是不行。
E: Thinking it over, you realize if the three of you were named Grayie, Grayanne, and Graynnon... it doesn't sound too bad.

C: o((◉ω◉!)o「我就猜到会变成这样」)∋
E: O((◉ω◉!)o"I knew this would happen!")∋

C: 听说他们正准备深入探索东北边那片区域，那里很久都没人去过了吧，会不会有什么危险……
E: I heard they're prepping for an in-depth exploration up northeast, but that area's been deserted for ages, right? Wonder if there are any dangers lurking...

C: 没什么想买的了。
E: I think I'm good for now.

C: 不打扰你消磨时光。
E: I'll be out of your hair now.

C: 「二人旅途未竟，仓惶归乡；却见万籁死寂，唯有黑潮肆意蔓延。」
E: "Returners, met with silence's deafening wail. Only the black tide's encroaching violence, a bitter tale."

C: 没关系，利波就在这，随时等候着您的到来~
E: No worries. Lipos is here, patiently awaiting your return.

C: 嘿，理一下我——
E: Hey, don't ignore me...

C: 可你刚刚无视我。
E: But you just ignored me.

C: 客人，我们非常感激您的心意，但入会两次实在是对您的财富太不健康了。还是请看看别的吧。
E: Good guest, we are extremely grateful, but joining the membership twice will be far too harmful to your wealth. Please browse something else.

C: 当然，也有人将其视为蛮愚与暴戾的泰坦，称其为「疯王」…倒也不无道理，对于羔羊来说，野狼的哈欠都足以使其破胆。
E: Of course, there are those that see Nikador as foolish and violent. They call Nikador the "Mad King"... It does make sense. To a flock of sheep, even a yawn from a wolf is enough to send them into hysteria.

C: 譬如…扎格列斯的故事。
E: For instance... The story of Zagreus.

C: 也太浪费了吧？
E: Don't you think that's a waste?

C: 那个，我是说，咱也是初来乍到，过去就是个家里蹲，在这奥赫玛实在找不到适合赚钱的营生，所以才从他们的传信石版里学了这么一套……
E: So, what I mean is I only just got here, too. I used to be a real homebody and couldn't find a way to earn a crust in Okhema, so I learned this trick from their teleslate...

C: 街坊间的人情味。
E: The warmth between neighbors.

C: 没什么，我也不打扰你。拜拜。
E: It's nothing, I won't bother you. Bye-bye.

C: 轻松愉快些，无忧无虑的生者啊~时间实在太过短暂，领你一起去见塞纳托斯~
E: Relax and be joyous, you who live without concern~ Time is fleeting. Soon it shall take you to meet Thanatos~

C: 为了把控住生命的方向，我们有时候需要舍弃许多利益…让人清醒的冷水澡，也会给不习惯的人带来冲击和痛苦。
E: There are times when we must abandon many gains in our lives in order to control its direction... A cold bath that brings sobering reality can cause shock and suffering to those who aren't accustomed.

C: 只有英雄的灵魂才能立于尼卡多利左右。战士们，献上你们的身躯、努力去成为英雄吧！
E: Only a heroic soul may stand by Nikador's side. Warriors, give your bodies, and strive to become heroes!

C: 有个传闻说，收集到一百个「翻飞之币」，能让扎格列斯老爷本尊把你最想要的东西亲自给你偷来！有意思不是？可惜现在这时候，可没人找得到咧。
E: Rumor has it, gathering a hundred Coins of Whimsy might just prompt the great Zagreus themself to steal your most coveted item for you! Fascinating, isn't it? It's a pity they're so hard to come by these days.

C: 这行业的源头，是以前扎格列斯老爷还会显灵的时候，信徒们发明出来的经济模式，为那些生来就懒的兄弟求个福祉。
E: The origin of this industry was a business model invented by Great Zagreus' disciples, way back when the Titan still manifested themself, providing an easy means of prospering for those inherently indolent.

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 我会去向元老院讲述我的猜想，邀请树庭的学者们见证我的发现。我要在集市里做演讲，在浴池里举办讨论会，我要让所有人都知道这件事。
E: I will go to the Council of Elders with my conjectures and invite Grove scholars to witness my findings. I'll give lectures in the marketplace, and hold discussions in the baths. I want everyone to know about this.

C: 颜色...它们对我来说只是一种概念。但情感，情感才是真实的...这种灰，应该再深一些…对，就是这样，像深海一样神秘……
E: Colors... to me, they're merely a concept. But emotions... emotions are tangible. This gray should be darker... yes, just like that, as enigmatic as the depths of the ocean.

C: 虽然我能理解，这算是对我的作品的某种夸奖，因为我画得太真实了，他们才会这么胡思乱想。但我实在无法解释，我的创作究竟是怎么做到这个程度的。
E: While I understand that's a form of praise for my realistic paintings, as they spawn such wild imaginations, I can't explain how my creations reach such a level.

C: 我现在也放弃恢复的想法了，毕竟，缺陷并没影响到我的生活。
E: I've now given up on the idea of recovery. After all, this defect hasn't really impacted my life.

C: 说是什么这人初来乍到啥都不会，好心人往他脖子上套了个饼，结果他甚至只知道吃前面的那一小半，都不知道把后边的饼转过来吃！
E: They told me a story about a newcomer so clueless that when someone hung a pancake around his neck, he only ate the part right in front of him and never thought to turn it around to eat the rest!

C: 用「开拓」的力气往前跳！
E: With the force of trailblazing, jump forward!

C: 哈？还不是你告诉我们——
E: Huh? Weren't you the one who told us —

C: 一想到神谕和史书可能也因类似情况一步步变得面目全非，我就感到有些哀伤。真的是一点兴致都提不起来。
E: Just the thought that prophecies and historical records might have gradually become distorted due to similar circumstances makes me feel a bit sorrowful. Honestly, it dampens any enthusiasm I have.

C: 好些客人跟我提议，希望我能帮他们拓些新书看看，但他们口中的「新书」，多是些幻想曲、情爱诗。以往的哲史与数算类目，却越来无人问津。
E: Many guests have suggested that I help them acquire some new books, but the "new books" they're referring to are mostly fantasy tunes and love poetry. Meanwhile, the older categories like philosophy, history, and mathematics are becoming increasingly neglected.

C: 其实这倒无妨，黄金裔们骁勇善战，人们对生活有了热情，应是好事。烦心的是这帮人身上的共性——把看书视作消遣，走马观花不说，还经常边吃边看。
E: Actually, it's not a big deal. The Chrysos Heirs are brave and skilled warriors, and the enthusiasm people have for life is a good thing. What bothers me, though, is the common trait among these people — they treat reading as mere entertainment. Not only do they skim through without paying attention, but they often eat while reading as well.

C: 我现在的名字是弥斯，如你所见，既非出身阔绰的贵族，也不是腰缠万贯的巨贾，只是个借琴声作消遣的普通演奏者罢了。
E: My current name is Misia. As you can see, I am neither a silver-spooned noble nor a purse-heavy merchant, just an ordinary musician who finds joy in melodic pastimes.

C: 我现在正忙。
E: I'm busy right now.

C: 啊？！不是——别啊老师，我知道错了！
E: Huh!? No — Please, Sir, I was wrong!

C: 奇怪…传信石版怎么没动静了，我再检查下……
E: Strange... Why did the teleslate go silent? Let me double check...

C: 祭典结束后，我会举办一场规模盛大的宴会。要是你能待到那时候，记得来捧场啊。
E: When the festival ends, I'll be hosting a huge feast. If you can stay around till then, don't forget to come by.

C: 阿德勒先生送了一些资料过来，他说他准备放弃对空间站怪谈的相关研究了，他将整理出来的手稿传了过来，已经为你装订好啦。
E: Mr. Adler has sent over some materials, announcing he's abandoning his research into the space station's ghost stories. He's compiled and bound a manuscript, which he has already sent your way.

C: 譬如回到这里，回到雅努萨波利斯。据说，通过了雅努斯之门后，你的船只会像奥赫玛的飞天坛递一样，拥有在空中飞行的能力。
E: You could return straight here, to Janusopolis, for instance. Legend has it that once you pass through the Gates of Janus, your ship will obtain the ability to soar through the skies like the Flying Amphora of Okhema.

C: 就聊到这里吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 我想找你聊聊天。
E: I was hoping to chat with you.

C: 他还是奥赫玛棍球协会的成员，据说打棍球的水平比「曳石学派」的很多人还要好…不过这个也有可能是他自吹自擂的结果。
E: He's also a member of the Okhema Stickball Society, rumored to play better than many from the Helkolithists, though that might be his own brag.

C: 因为没有什么定期活动，随着时间推移，不时有旧人退出、偶尔才有新人加入…到今年就只剩下了我们四个活跃分子。
E: Without regular gatherings, the group's dynamics shifted over time, and members have come and gone... Now, just the four of us remain actively involved.

C: …没多少技术含量，算是个看天吃饭的活计吧。
E: ...It's not a skilled job, really. Just one that depends on the whims of fate.

C: 行了，不必多言，这就是我坚持的律法，问心无愧。
E: Nevermind then. This is the law I uphold, and my conscience is clear.

C: 我是未来人。
E: I am from the future.

C: 真想也让你认识一下她，只可惜…没有这个机会了……
E: I wish I could introduce her to you, but alas... that opportunity is long gone.

C: 与我十分甚至九分像的白厄。
E: My almost-doppelgänger, Phainon.

C: 翁法罗斯的医术是什么样的？
E: What is Amphorean healing like?

C: 哈哈…初次听到这样的称呼的时候，我还有些害臊呢，毕竟老大不小了，早就不是当初那个举着木剑、口口声声要拯救世界的稚子了。
E: Haha... When I first heard that title, I felt a bit embarrassed. After all, I'm not exactly a kid anymore, the kind who'd wave a wooden sword and prattle on about how they're going to save the world.

C: 迈德漠斯，悬锋的新王，他曾一度在奥赫玛收获同伴和认可。但为了世界的明天，他选择离开，投身于永无止境的战争。
E: Mydeimos, the new king of Kremnos, once gained companions and recognition in Okhema. Yet, for the sake of the world's future, he chose to leave and devote himself to endless war.

C: 「我们站在光历的转折点上！」哎，这句话我自己都不太信……
E: "We stand at the turning point of the Light Calendar!" Ugh, even I don't believe that nonsense...

C: 怎么说呢…我每天都有无数次离职的冲动，但是它们终究只是冲动，不会付诸实践。毕竟日子还得过，我需要这份工作。
E: Well... I think about quitting at least a dozen times a day, but it's just that — thoughts, not actions. Life has to go on, and I need this job.

C: 你…先别说话，我记得你，阿格莱雅身边的贵客，对不对？我可没有记错人吧。
E: You... Wait a minute, I know you. You're Aglaea's esteemed guest, aren't you? I'm not mistaken, am I?

C: 至于什么「悲剧比喜剧深刻」，或者「喜剧比悲剧有建设性」…我并不在意这种争论，也愿意尝试不同的情节安排。
E: As for debates like "tragedy is deeper than comedy" or "comedy is more constructive than tragedy"... I don't really care. I'm open to trying different story structures.

C: 石板？什么石板…
E: Teleslate? What teleslate...

C: 真是最引人注目的项目？
E: Is it really the most eye-catching event?

C: 有趣的说法。
E: Interesting take.

C: 这是留在战场上的铭文——
E: These are engravings left on a battlefield —

C: 嗯…有位织者信心满满。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>树丛中</color>，考验来往旅人的眼力呢。
E: Hmm... A weaver is full of confidence. The golden thread brings news that it is testing the eyes of passing travelers in <color=#dbc291ff>the bushes</color>.

C: 没有了。
E: That's all.

C: 今天实在发生了太多的事…我自己其实也慌得很。但是慌没用啊，越慌越乱——赶过大地兽的人都知道。
E: So much has happened today... I'm actually pretty nervous myself. But panic doesn't help, it only makes things worse — anyone who's herded dromas knows this.

C: 嗯…我在树庭研习多年，又把大半辈子花在了研究上。仰赖瑟希斯赋予的理性，在我看来，那刻夏的论证并无纰漏。
E: Hmm... I studied at the Grove for many years and spent most of my life doing research. By the wisdom bestowed by Cerces, I see no flaws in Anaxa's reasoning.

C: 也是，时间不多了。年轻人，要是有什么想做的事、想见的人，就尽快去吧！
E: That's true, time is running out. Young one, if there's something you want to do or someone you want to see, go now while you still can!

C: 利波…愿意相信。对利波而言，这世上有许多美好还未曾记录、也有太多遗憾无法弥补。
E: I... want to believe. There are so many beautiful things in this world that have yet to be recorded, and so many regrets that can never be healed.

C: 还请多保重。
E: Take care of yourself.

C: 想当大地兽。
E: I want to be a dromas.

C: 那么趁最后这段时间，你还可以去学学认字。
E: Well, maybe in this last bit of time, you could learn how to recognize some characters.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 嗯…有位织者与伙伴结伴同行。金丝带来消息，它们正在<color=#dbc291ff>一堆储存器元件上</color>，希望它们面对黑潮威胁能同心协力。
E: Hmm... There was a weaver traveling with companions. The golden threads brought news, they're now atop <color=#dbc291ff>a pile of storage unit components</color>. May they stand united against the threat of the black tide.

C: 嗯…有位织者怀揣着惩恶扬善的信念。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一根石柱上</color>，为雨之民打抱不平呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who carries the belief of punishing evil and promoting good. The golden thread brings tidings: They are on <color=#dbc291ff>a stone pillar</color>, standing up for the Rainfolk.

C: 嗯…哪里去了呢？偷偷躲在哪个小角落里，等着我去找呢？
E: Hmm... Now where did it go? Hiding in some corner, waiting for me to come find it?

C: 再说了…你看他像是会听我解释的样子吗，哪次不是二话不说，先拎着藤条给我一顿抽……
E: And besides... does he look like someone who listens to explanations? Every time it's the same thing — no questions, just the cane!

C: 好，有空记得再来玩。
E: Sure. Come by again when you've got time.

C: …什么时候出发？我和你妈去送你。
E: ...When are you leaving? Your mother and I will see you off.

C: 迷！今天在熬汤的时候睡着了，被村长揪住教训了半天。
E: Mem! The chief caught me dozing off while cooking the soup today. I got a big lecture this time.

C: 那么，是怎么赚到的呢？
E: So how did you earn all that?

C: 迷，新来的客人，你真的来参加舞会啦！
E: Memi! You really came to the dance, new guest!

C: 可惜秋千太小了！
E: But it's way too small!

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 石板怎么变成苹果了？
E: How did the stone tablet turn into an apple?

C: 但你手中之物…给我的感觉完全不同。我只在最古老的英雄史诗中见到过相似的表述。
E: But the thing you're holding... feels completely different. I've only seen descriptions like this in the oldest heroic epics.

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游，好吗？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 阁下的文笔，比我想、想得更好呢！如果连起来的话……
E: Your writing is even better than I i—imagined! If we put it all together...

C: 你这是喝了多少？
E: How much did you have to drink?

C: 瞧吧…瞧这斯缇科西亚——它曾一度笼罩于「死亡」的幻梦，但风暴…将粉碎蜃景、迷狂终…放逐寂静……
E: Behold... behold Styxia — once shrouded in "Death's" delusions, but the storm... shall shatter illusions and exile silence with frenzy...

C: 在那个时代，黄金裔们并非都是英雄，其中不乏将神力用于恶念之人…我们借助泰坦的圣物与古老的炼金术，得到了抹杀黄金裔的力量，守护手无寸铁的人民。
E: In that era, many Chrysos Heirs wielded power for malice... Not all of them were heroes. We wielded the Titans' divine objects and alchemy of old to achieve power capable of slaying the Chrysos Heirs, thus protecting the defenseless.

C: 聊聊这场宴会。
E: Talk about this feast.

C: 呼嗝~！海，海瑟音大人是半神，半神，醉，醉不了的，换一个人吧。
E: Burp~! L—Lady Hysilens is a demigod. Demigods c—can't get drunk. Ask about someone else.

C: 是店长迷，您需要来点什么吗？
E: Oh, manager, mem. What can I get for you?

C: 泡泡这里的热水，把筋骨都泡开，这样会舒服很多。
E: Try this hot bath, it relaxes the muscle. It feel very nice.

C: 哎，真是搞不懂你们年轻人，或许是我老了吧……
E: *sigh* I really don't understand you youngsters. Perhaps I'm just getting old...

C: 也可能是被门给夹了。活了这么大把年纪，我还是头一回见有人摆摊不做生意，只为了展示的。
E: Maybe just bashed against the door frame. At my age, this is my first time seeing someone set up a stall just for display and not for business.

C: 别天真了，树庭这么多学者，吃饭不用钱？研究学问不用钱？没钱怎么做学问？你好歹也体谅下我吧，家里的生活费还是我出的呢。
E: Don't be naive. There are so many scholars in the Grove. Their food and studies all require funds. We won't last without money. I'm the one covering our living expenses. Have a heart!

C: 后来呢？
E: What happened next?

C: 我还是喜欢冷水浴。
E: I still prefer cold baths.

C: 了不起的新同学，谢谢你对折纸树林教育的助力，请务必收下老鸟的心意。
E: Distinguished new student, thank you for assisting Paperfold Woods' educational process. You must accept my token of appreciation.

C: 你别吓我啊？！这要是记错了，我的工作就会全面搁浅。
E: Don't scare me like that! If I get it wrong, I will lose my job.

C: 你是医生么？
E: Are you a doctor?

C: 哎，是你啊，来找老头子是有什么事吗？
E: Ah, it's you again. How can an old man like me help you?

C: 那我还是不打扰你了。
E: I shouldn't keep you.

C: 荒笛是…怎样的半神呢？
E: What kind of demigod is Terravox...?

C: 天呐，过路的旅者，你怎么在天花板上喀！
E: Holy moly, traveler, what are you doing stuck on the ceiling, crrk!?

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 愿清风常伴汝身。
E: May the cool breeze always be by your side.

C: 我同意，不过这里可能需要把阴影关系加强一些……
E: I agree, but we might need to strengthen the shadows here...

C: 咦，这是…几位，快看看谁来了——
E: Huh, what's this... hey everyone, look who's here —

C: 这次的假期很长，我们可以好好规划一下。
E: It's a long holiday this time, so let's make some proper plans.

C: 埃阿科，你呢？我对你的博识早有耳闻，有没有兴趣和我共举大事？
E: Eacus, what about you? I've heard all about your vast knowledge. Care to join me in something big?
...Huh?

C: 吃？
E: Food?

C: 说两句话嘛，大家心里不都这么想的吗？
E: Come on, say something! We're all thinking the same thing, aren't we?

C: 无论什么，都避不过金织爵的丝线。我想，她或许是看我百无聊赖，所以想用这个法子，让我寻些实际的事做吧。
E: Nothing can escape Dux Goldweaver's threads. I guess she probably saw how bored to death I was, so she used this method to get me to do something more productive.

C: 还没和你正式地说一声「好久不见」，万敌。
E: Haven't had the chance to properly say "long time no see," Mydei.

C: 翁法罗斯的故事虽然暂时封笔了，但你的故事还很漫长。如果在某一页你踟蹰不前，一定要记得向前看哦。
E: Though the story of Amphoreus has reached its final page for now, your own story still has many chapters ahead. If you ever find yourself stuck on a page, remember to keep looking forward.

C: 多奇妙的缘分呀。你、我，还有三月七，都担任过岁月的半神呢。
E: What a fascinating twist of fate. You, me, and March 7th... We've all served as demigods of Time.

C: 那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅都是懂得审时度势的人，危机面前能放下成见，携手合作……
E: Professor Anaxa and Aglaea were both people who knew how to read the situation. In times of crisis, they could set aside their differences and work together...

C: 兑换「时光硕果」。
E: Exchange for the "Fruit of Time."

C: 没错，不过我在犹豫该怎么开口。
E: Indeed. Though I'm hesitant about how to bring it up.

C: 那道光芒…照射出了什么东西？
E: That light beam... what did it reveal?

C: 所以，我搜集了这些若虫，作为对自己和后来者的小小警示：「控制」不过是一种幻象。
E: So, I collected these nymphs as a small reminder to myself and those who come after: "Control" is nothing but an illusion.

C: 银河是很广大的啊。你突然这么问我，我也不知从何说起……
E: The galaxy is endlessly vast. I wouldn't know where to begin, especially if you ask me that so suddenly...

C: 相较于星神，派系就要好懂很多了：一群凡人为了共同的目的聚集在一起，践行自身对「星神」和「命途」的理解，即是派系。
E: Compared to the Aeons, the factions are much easier to understand. Mortals with the same objective gather together to practice their understanding of Aeons and the Paths.

C: 这些派系拥有和我们一样的星际跃迁能力。想要在银河中顺利旅行，很难不与他们打交道。
E: These factions possess the same power as us to voyage between worlds. It would be hard to travel through the galaxy without them.

C: 为了报答列车的救命之恩，并支付救援相关的费用，他们选择留在列车上打工抵债。
E: They chose to work for the Express as a way to say thanks for saving their lives and pay off their rescue-related expenses.

C: 有是有，不过最新的《冒险鼹鼠队》有点奇怪。它像是一个活页的笔记本，上面只有前言和目录，根本没有冒险故事。
E: Yes, yes, but the latest Adventurous Moles comes off a bit strange. It came in a loose-leaf notebook, with only a preface and a table of contents, and no adventure stories at all.

C: （既然在这里捡到了缺失的书页，那么跟矿灯有关的谜题就在前面吧…）
E: (Since I found the missing page here, then the riddle about the Miner's Lamp should be up ahead...)

C: 嗐，总算能摆脱这没长进的臭小子了，哈哈！
E: Ha! Then I can finally get rid of that useless brat, haha!

C: 你为什么会来做矿车工？
E: What drove you to become a mine cart operator?

C: 操作控制器、换轨道、前进…再操作控制器、然后倒车……
E: Operate the controller, change the track, move forward, operate the controller again, and then reverse...

C: 哎，坏了，我好像忘记装卸地髓了。这该怎么倒车啊……
E: Oh no. I think I forgot to load the Geomarrow. How do I go back?

C: 给你的报酬就在那边，快清点一下吧。
E: Your reward is over there. Go take a look.

C: 滴答，哎呀，我刚刚吓到你了，真不好意思！
E: Tick-tock, ah, I'm really sorry for startling you just now!

C: 我原本以为她给我的又是那种随处可见的流窜软件——根本查不出开发者是谁的那种——程序错漏满天飞，运行几秒就要闪退一次。结果……
E: At first, I thought she gave me some junk software that can be found all over the place — the kind where you've got no idea who's developed it. It's probably riddled with bugs and keeps crashing every few seconds. But actually...

C: 这、这怎么可能？明明两份密钥都没有被动过，她到底是怎么做到的……
E: H—How is this possible? Neither of the two encryption keys has been touched, so how on earth did she do it...

C: 啊这…你也是垃圾短信的受害者？好吧，那确实和我有点关系……
E: Ah, that... Do you get spam messages too? Alright, I kinda have something to do with it...

C: 哈哈！
E: Haha!

C: 她说她很关心这事！
E: She said she cared about this!

C: 「你的游戏水平还不赖，我记住了，期待以后能和你再玩上几局。」
E: "Your gaming skills aren't too bad at all, if I recall correctly. Looking forward to playing a few more rounds with you later."

C: 接下来，我雷比尼将为这大矿区的风景画下点睛的一笔——敬请见证！
E: Next up I, Rebini, will add the finishing touches to this landscape depicting the Great Mine — I beseech you to bear witness!

C: 加钱就加钱！
E: Fine by me!

C: 名字嘛，我暂时还没想好——但既然你是它的主人，这项艰巨的任务就交给你了。
E: As for the name, I haven't settled on one yet — but seeing as it's yours now, such a daunting task lies in your hands.

C: 我找到旧照片上的展品了。
E: I found the exhibit item from that old photo.

C: 这次，我希望你能够帮忙收集<color=#dbc291ff>「自动机兵•战犬」</color>的机体数据……
E: This time around, I hope you can help us retrieve some data from <color=#dbc291ff>Automaton Hound</color>...

C: {NICKNAME}，有件事想要拜托你帮忙。
E: {NICKNAME}, there's something I need your help with.

C: 非常合适。
E: Very much so.

C: 我想再重新考虑一下。
E: I would like to reconsider.

C: 如果你对成稿结果有兴趣，不妨之后亲自去历史文化展馆看看吧。
E: If you're interested in the final text, come to the History-Culture Hall yourself to check it out.

C: 你有时会感到好奇——为什么如此重要的机器内部竟然充满了连你这种门外汉都能修好的电路？
E: Your curiosity is piqued — Why is the inside of such an important machine filled with circuits that even a layperson like you can fix?

C: 随着一声脆响，有关「守护众人之人」的内容登时出现在博物馆的墙面上，随后是一道沉稳的女声辅以解说。
E: With a crisp click, the content regarding "The Protector of All" appears on the wall of the museum. A velvety female narration accompanies the presentation.

C: 可是…这两艘仙舟不都……
E: But... Aren't these two Xianzhous...

C: 这个幻影，和晴霓小姐长得好像…她为什么一直在呼唤你的名字？
E: This illusion looks so much like Miss Qingni... Why is she constantly calling your name?

C: 三十年前与丰饶民的大战结束后，许多人都曾来到这儿纪念阵亡的飞行士。
E: After the great war with the Denizens of Abundance thirty years ago, many people had come here to commemorate the fallen pilots.

C: 我品尝得到…你咸涩的眼泪，在心里流…一直在流。
E: I can taste your salty tears... you have never stopped crying in your heart...

C: 是你拍照技术的问题。
E: Sounds like a skill issue.

C: 你好呀，{NICKNAME}，有什么事吗？
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. What's going on?

C: 我想给你拍张照片。
E: I'd like to take a picture of you.

C: 没问题！
E: No problem!

C: 不不不，你是外来的客人，你应该试试。
E: No, no, no, you're our honored guest — you can drink it.

C: 要不让我来试试？
E: Can I give it a try?

C: 往好处想，万一成了呢？咱们以后在金人巷的消费说不定就被他们全包了！
E: Think about it this way — what if you succeed? We'd have free meals forever!

C: 明白了，你们要是方便的话，能跟我去一趟「鹤运物流」的金人巷分部吗？
E: I see your point. If you have the time, could you accompany me to Heron Express' Aurum Alley branch office?

C: 不留下名字比较容易逃走。
E: It'll be easier to escape if nobody knows my name.

C: 哎哟，公司那些化外民年纪小不懂事，小秘书你怎么还跟着一起掺和呢？
E: *sigh* Those outworlders from the IPC are the worst — how did you get bogged down with them?

C: 仔细想想，你好像什么都没做？
E: Wait a sec... You haven't contributed anything so far.

C: 写作朋友…读作饭票。
E: By "friend" you mean "free meal ticket," right?

C: 总之，就是去找你就对了呗？
E: So basically I just need to go talk to you at the dock?

C: 我反倒要问问，我的花瓶本来包装得好好的，差点就要被砸碎了，这算怎么回事？
E: Now let me ask you a question — my vase was almost smashed to pieces — what do you say about that?

C: 金人巷码头公开招标后，公司凭借「外贸资源」和「雄厚资本」成功中标。随后，公司将码头租赁给金人巷商会实际运营。
E: When the Aurum Alley dock went up for public bid, the IPC won the bid using its interstellar trade resources and extensive capital. Then the IPC leased the dock out to the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild for management and operations.

C: 码头工人阿丰的证言，他承认自己接受公司的好处，并破坏了码头物流的正常运作。
E: The testimony of dock worker A-Feng, who has admitted to disrupting the normal operations of the dock in exchange for payment from the IPC.

C: 呃呃呃…可恶的家伙……
E: Ughhhh... this guy...

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 我也不太理解，走吧，我们去找会长讨个说法。
E: I'm also confused. Let's go have a word with him.

C: 况且这同功坊的情况你又不是不知道，我们哪儿有钱雇新学徒？
E: Even if I did want to hire more people, I couldn't afford them. You know that better than I do.

C: 我也做了很久生意，会长算是老友。
E: Yes, he's an old friend.

C: 公开会议就要开始了。
E: The hearing is about to begin.

C: 公司计划将金人巷改造为物流中转仓，你们所作所为的本质也是如此。
E: The IPC plans to turn the Alley into a logistics hub. You are practically thinking the same.

C: 就当是我想多了吧。
E: If you say so.

C: 我还有别的事儿。
E: I have something else to do first.

C: 抱歉，我有些发呆。
E: Sorry, I was zoning out.

C: 如果斯科特是小少爷的上司…
E: If Skott has turned out to be Xiaohan's superior...

C: 开摆！
E: Let's get started!

C: 你拿着我改造好的机巧鸟过去，将快递放到一个高处——我给你在导航里标记好了，客人会自己来取的。
E: Take the modded cycrane with you and send it to a very high location. I'll put a marker on your navigator so the client can collect.

C: 青雀小姐之前来开过证明，病症是「恹恹病」。不知道银河里是否有这种疑难杂症，「恹恹病」确实是我翻诗集编出来的病状。
E: Miss Qingque came to get a medical certificate from me before for "Feebleitis." I'm actually not sure if it's a real thing. I just made up the name by looking through a few poetry books.

C: 这比重新打造优势更简单直接。
E: Building on an existing strength is much easier than starting out from scratch.

C: 「金人巷」刻在了每个人的心中，这不比默默无闻在两三百年之后消失更好？
E: Wouldn't it be better for the Alley to take on a new life and stay known forever? If it remains a market, I can assure you it will die quietly over the course of the next two centuries.

C: 这与我们的讨论无关，请收回吧。
E: I can't say what this has to do with our discussions. Please remove it.

C: 你光顾着自己飞，都不想想我…
E: You're so lost in yourself that you've lost track of me...

C: 指什么路啊，我知道在哪儿，就别劳烦人家了，你跟着我别再走丢了。时间也不早了，回头再聊！
E: Don't bother, I know where it is. Just follow me and don't get lost again! Oh, it's getting late. Let's talk later!

C: 等等，机巧鸟有牙齿的吗？算了，这也不重要了，总之…那是只睡相奇差的机巧鸟。你试着喊醒它，但它翅膀抖了抖，却装作没听见继续睡。
E: Wait, do Cycranes even have teeth? Eh, whatever. It's a cycrane that's slouched over and sleeping. You try to wake it up, but it just flutters its wings, pretending not to hear you before drifting back to sleep.

C: 尽管这里没有摆放任何「此路不通」的标语牌，但堆积的杂物显而易见地提醒着你。
E: While there is not a "No Entry" sign, the piles of clutter here have clearly expressed this.

C: 嘿嘿嘿，上次的践踏者尾巴报告被小组长表扬了…说世玲的切入点非常刁钻！
E: Hehehe, the team leader commended me for that Trampler Tail report, and said that my analysis was very crafty!

C: （拿走钥匙）
E: (Take the key)

C: 坏了我来赔！
E: I'll pay if you break it!

C: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和「色彩」有关的<color=#dbc291ff>「变化图案」</color>…我不好说，你就当是我的小小建议吧！
E: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>changing shapes</color>" and "colors"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

C: 开启博物馆经营
E: Start Museum Management

C: {NICKNAME}，我听艾丽斯小姐说了，你打理起博物馆相关的事务得心应手，简直就像个熟练经理人——真令人佩服！
E: {NICKNAME}, Eris told me you managed the museum so well that it was as though you had done it for years. I'm impressed!

C: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
E: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

C: ——是个相当劲爆的题材，体验过的客人全都好评如潮…保准符合您的口味！
E: The batch has a pretty exciting theme. Those who have tried it are full of praise... I'm sure you'll like it!

C: 我知道你啾，你是掀起这场动乱的哈努兄弟。
E: I know who you are, tweet. You're Hanu, the guy who started this turmoil.

C: 我看得出来，您应该也是一位直觉敏锐的人——而且还富有正义感，这在匹诺康尼的梦境里可不多见。
E: I can see that you're someone who's also got acute senses, and you're ripe with righteousness too — a rare combination in Penacony's Dreamscapes.

C: 但我们已经走到这一步了，半途而弃未免太过可惜…我们再试一次吧，{F#女士}{M#先生}？我相信您也一定对后续的发展十分好奇……
E: But since we're already here, it'd be a waste to give up now... Let's try one more time, {F#miss}{M#mister}? I think you're very curious about how all this will unfold as well...

C: 刁钻的评委将视线转向你。
E: The crafty judge shifts their gaze toward you.

C: 原来你藏了个大的啊。
E: So there's a catch.

C: （…或许可以趁机进入它的内心世界，帮它改掉这个爱捉弄人的坏毛病。）
E: (...Maybe I can seize this chance to slip into his internal world and help him change this bad habit of pranking others.)

C: 我自愿做的。
E: I took the job voluntarily.

C: 人家…想约它出去玩嘛，又不知道…该怎么开口。
E: I... I wanted to ask him to hang out, but I don't know... how to go about it.

C: 好了，别装了吧。
E: Alright, just stop pretending.

C: 汪！醒醒哇。你、你认不出我们了吗？
E: Woof! Get back to your senses! You... you don't recognize us?

C: 她到底在做什么汪……
E: What is she doing, woof...?

C: 想了解一下玛姬的事…
E: I want to know more about you...

C: 我吗？当然可以，你问吧。
E: Me? Of course, ask away.

C: 亲爱的朋友，你是来寻找宝藏的吧？
E: My dear friend, are you here for the treasure?

C: 您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You're indeed a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 您果然是一位充满好奇心、观察力敏锐、极具谋略与智慧的选手！
E: You're indeed a contestant who has keen curiosity, astute powers of observation, and is full of tactics and intellect!

C: 咕噜噜，看来只能靠《美梦往事》了！
E: *gurgle* Seems like we can only pin our hopes on Dreamjoy Memoir now!

C: （出示「钟表匠」的邀请函）
E: (Present the invitation letter from the Watchmaker)

C: 尝试洞察她的内心。
E: Try reading her inner thoughts.

C: 确实，看个乐子。
E: Indeed, people should have fun watching it.

C: 呵呵，钟表小子决不能承担那么多沉重的东西——他的故事就应该像糖果一样，没有酸涩，只有甜蜜——
E: Hehehe, Clockie must not bear so many heavy themes — His story should be like candies. There's no bitterness, only sweetness —

C: 贵宾，你应该听说过这位「钟表匠」的事迹吧——扰乱梦境的治安，制造混乱，用谎言把大家骗的团团转…这样的人，值得你为他付出吗？
E: You must have heard about Watchmaker's deeds, right? He disturbed the peace of Penacony, created confusion, and took everyone for a ride with his lies... Is a man like him worthy of your support?

C: 真是一位了不起的父亲。
E: What an amazing father.

C: 呵呵，他可不是非常完美的父亲…但我们依然爱他，对吧，米莫萨。
E: Heh, he's not the perfect father... but we will always love him. Am I right, Mimosa?

C: 米莫萨，你还是和小时候一样聪明，做事雷厉风行，心眼还不少。
E: Mimosa, you're still as clever as you were when you were a child, getting things done promptly and decisively, with a keen eye.

C: 但这部片子不一样，我看得出，这些故事之下似乎藏着秘密——是一段不为人知的漫长时光，对吗？
E: But this movie is different. I can tell that there are secrets hidden behind these stories — a lengthy account of an untold story, perhaps?

C: 「感觉疲劳，不想值班？守卫们也是这么想的！休息一下，让我们进入广告时间！」
E: "Feeling tired and longing for a break from duty? The guards think so too! Let's take a break and head to commercial!"

C: 没错！你想要的，尽在「匹诺康尼」！
E: That's right! Anything your heart may desire, it's all on Penacony!

C: 「为了苏乐达，为了拯救美梦小镇，钟表小子所向披靡！」
E: "For SoulGlad, for the Dreamville, Clockie is invincible!"

C: 感谢你的帮助，小助手，这下《美梦仙踪》算是基本杀青了——哇，我已经很久没拍过这么带劲的影片了，<color=#dbc291ff>太棒了</color>！
E: Thank you for your help, trusty assistant. We can wrap up the Dreamjoy Ascension filming now... Woah, it's been a long time since I've done such an exhilarating movie — that was awesome!

C: 不瞒您说，咱们苏乐达最近也要和钟表小子动画联动——记得一定来捧场啊！
E: I'll be candid — our SoulGlad will soon have a collaboration with Clockie — don't forget to cheer us on!

C: 哦！这个说法和历史记录一样，很不错。
E: Oh! That's great, and historically accurate too.

C: 青春偶像。
E: Youthful idol.

C: 这份剧本就给你留做纪念吧——我们的外传一定会很受欢迎的！
E: Here's a script for you to keep as a souvenir... Our extra story is going to be a hot property!
Hmph...

C: 哼，我明白了，那哈努兄弟的墨镜下一定有一双温柔的眼睛吧。
E: Hmph, got it. Brother Hanu's definitely got a pair of kind eyes beneath those cool sunglasses.

C: 如果说钟表小子是美梦小镇的大明星，木头老爷是美梦小镇的大靠山，他就是美梦小镇的大英雄！
E: If Clockie is Dreamville's star celeb and Old Man Wood is its big backer, then Brother Hanu's gotta be Dreamville's big hero!

C: 呀，这个够直接！骑着球笼奔驰确实是个很爽的事情，我也喜欢跑到热砂飙球…在驾照被猎犬吊销之前。
E: Jeez, that's straight to the point. Racing around in that Spheroid really is all about joy, and I used to love Spheroid racing in Scorchsand, too... until the Bloodhounds eventually revoked my license.

C: 太劲爆了！
E: I'm fizzing!

C: 这是怎样一种孽缘…
E: What a screwed-up twist of fate...

C: 请允许我先进行一次自我介绍——鄙人名为乔瓦尼•迪•乔尔吉奥•达•艾普瑟隆，一介来自艾普瑟隆的小小私商。
E: Please allow me to introduce myself first: My humble name is Giovanni di Giorgio da Epsilon, and I'm a tiny private trader from Epsilon.

C: 球棒侠{M#先生}{F#小姐}意下如何？
E: What say you, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} Baseballer?

C: 选择黑暗球棒，成为银河大反派…
E: Pick the dark bat and become the greatest villain in all the cosmos...

C: 这就是记忆的影片吗……
E: So, this is a memory film...

C: 但后面才是真正的挑战，你们将面对本节目有史以来最严苛的评委，只能凭借自身完美的演技令对方折服！
E: However, the true test is yet to come. You're about to encounter the harshest judge this show has ever seen. You'll need to rely on perfect performances if you want to win them over.

C: 我穷困潦倒，她生活平凡。
E: I fell into poverty, while she's leading a normal life.

C: 喝下这瓶苏乐达™，快乐美梦速速达，嘎呜——！
E: Grab a bottle of SoulGlad™, and make your dreams a blast! Grawwrr!

C: 欢迎来到由苏乐达™有限公司赞助热砂盛典第二关——「枪火时间」！
E: Welcome to the second stage of Scorchsand Festival, sponsored by SoulGlad™ Enterprises — Gunfire Time!

C: 哼…哼！
E: Hmph... Hmph!

C: 你看到两个员工脸色煞白，满头大汗，晕倒在地。
E: You see two pale faced workers laying on the ground, sweat pouring down their foreheads.

C: 忆域迷因的生命力很顽强，它看起来不会有什么危险。没有了迷因的影响，那两位员工也应该能很快醒来。
E: The Memory Zone Meme is very resilient. It didn't look that dangerous, though. Without the influence of the memes, the two workers should be able to wake up soon.

C: 不过这只迷因为什么会出现在这里，加拉赫先生应该不会容忍这种事情的发生吧。
E: But how did the meme get here? Mr. Gallagher probably wouldn't allow such a thing to happen.

C: 导演
E: Director

C: 你为什么穿着丧服？
E: Why are you dressed in mourning attire?

C: 我会在这里继续等待，直到你做好准备。
E: I'll continue my wait here until you are fully prepared.

C: 战火持续了两个琥珀纪，已知的国家最后只成为了地理概念。
E: The war lasted for two Amber Eras. Eventually, the established nation was reduced to a mere geographical concept.

C: 三月，要当心仙舟的客套话。
E: Watch out for the overly generous Xianzhou social niceties, March.

C: 天下没有破不了的剑法，也没有拆不断的剑，更没有不败的剑客。
E: In this world, there is no such thing as an infallible technique or an unbreakable sword, and there especially is no such thing as an unbeatable swordmaster.

C: 那…要是我赢了呢？
E: And... if I win?

C: 本姑娘记住了。
E: Got it, it's all etched into my memory.

C: 在「教导无方」前面给我换上你的名字啊！
E: Hey, YOU are the terrible teacher here!

C: 嗯嗯！我为成为大侠而挥剑！我想路见不平拔刀相助，让那些宵小之辈见着本姑娘就吓得两腿打颤，连滚带爬地立刻滚开！
E: Absolutely! I wield my sword to become a hero! I want to fight for justice, punish the wicked, and make them quiver in fear and run away when they see me!

C: 实不相瞒，彦卿就曾被桂乃芬小姐吞过宝剑，那确实是剑术练习中学不到的本事。
E: Actually, I was once convinced by Guinaifen into swallowing a sword. That's definitely not something you learn from regular practice.

C: 狠狠击败斯科特也不够痛快？
E: Giving Skott a good beating isn't satisfying enough for you?

C: 尾巴大爷有何高见呢？
E: What do you think, Mr. Tail?

C: 斯科特专员，刚才三月七一挥剑，就有一个绿色的东西冲进了你身体里…然后你就站在那里，嘴上念念有词…你还好吗？
E: Specialist Skott, March 7th swung her sword, and something green entered your body... Then you froze and started muttering something... Are you okay?

C: 藿藿急匆匆地离开了……
E: Huohuo scuttles off in a hurry...

C: 可惜，其中没有一招和剑术有关。
E: Unfortunately, though, not a single move is related to swordplay.

C: 嗯嗯，我已经将流窜的岁阳收进藏月瓠里了。
E: Yes, I've subdued that vagrant heliobus in the Lunaumbra Gourd.

C: 仙舟上可没有那么方便的药物啦。不过如果只是为了在赛前让自己的体力短暂提升，那也不是做不到。
E: We don't have any convenient pills like that, but if you just need a temporary boost for the duel, we might be able to figure something out.

C: 那个…椒丘大夫，这是不是不太好？我们是不是应该堂堂正正一点…要不还是别这么做了吧？
E: Well... Doctor Jiaoqiu? Are we really doing this? Shouldn't we defeat him in a more honorable way...? Maybe we should just completely forget about this idea.

C: 嘿，尊敬的三月七小姐，请放心，会赢赢的。
E: Don't worry, dear Miss March! Rest assured, we will win.

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 这真的需要排除法吗？我比{F#她}{M#他}可正经多了！
E: Was the process of elimination even necessary? I'm much more respectable than {F#she}{M#he} is!

C: 我听说朱明仙舟有一位武人，自出生之日起，母亲以神奇药水为他浑身洗净，让他的身躯坚实如铁，挨打再也不觉得疼了！
E: I have heard tell of a martial artist on the Xianzhou Zhuming whose mother bathed him in the miracle medicine since his birth. His body was rendered hard as steel, feeling no pain to all blows!

C: 我听说朱明仙舟上有一座高塔，塔上住着一位猫猫模样的仙人。剑士们只需吃下一粒它所种植的蚕豆，不仅可从极度疲惫中立刻恢复至最佳状态，还可在十天之内不再饥饿。
E: I heard of a tower on the Xianzhou Zhuming, where a feline-looking celestial dwelled atop. Swordmasters only had to consume a silkworm bean that it planted — they could instantly recover from their most exhausted states, and even go without food for ten days.

C: 这「黑玉」二字作何解释啊？该不会是真的往里加了玉屑吧？
E: How do you explain the "obsidian" then? You didn't really add rocks to it, did you?

C: 我背包里有些加暴击的东西。
E: There are items in my inventory that can help with crits.

C: 又不是他封了你<unbreak>76</unbreak>个游戏账号。
E: He isn't the one blocking <unbreak>76</unbreak> of your game accounts.

C: 我俩差不多。
E: That makes two of us.

C: 事到如今，我再也不能沉下心去做那些只有以前会热衷的事了。
E: Nowadays, I find it increasingly difficult to focus on the things that once ignited my passion.

C: 老夫在这里站半天了，却无～人～发～现～呐～
E: I have been here the whole time, yet NOT A SINGLE SOUL deigned to acknowledge my presence...

C: 生活磨平了成年人的棱角啊…
E: The individualism of adulthood can be dulled by the weight of reality.

C: 只有你愿意翻开我的桶，了解我的内在，我的黑色塑料袋、我的鱼骨、我的苹果核、我的一切……
E: Only you were willing to open me up and get familiar with my insides. My black plastic sack, my fish bones, my apple cores, every part of me...

C: 好的，五月九。
E: Alright, May 9th.

C: 朋友有难，老桑博一定拔刀相助！看吧，哪怕是到对面当卧底也可以！
E: If a friend is in trouble, I will always rush to their aid! See, even if it means infiltrating the enemy and taking them down from the inside!

C: 总之，我第一次觉得自己这么没用，连出门问路这样的小事都做不好……
E: Anyways, this is the first time in my life I've felt so useless. I can't even do something as trivial as asking for directions...

C: 很简单的，教练只要站在场边，及时向选手进行战术指示就够了。
E: Simple: You just gotta stand at the byline and give your team tactical instructions.

C: …果然是你啊，青总。
E: ...So it is you, President Qing.

C: 好，速战速决！
E: Sure, lightning quick!

C: 这段信息完全没提到仙舟联盟…也不知道他最后是怎么一路打到罗浮的。
E: This section of information doesn't mention the Xianzhou Alliance at all... I wonder how he fought his way to the Luofu.

C: 可不能每次都被吓到出现幻觉啊！哈哈哈哈！
E: I can't keep getting spooked and hallucinating all the time! Hahaha!

C: {NICKNAME}，我们又见面了。你身边这位是？
E: {NICKNAME}, we meet again. Who is this beside you?

C: 虽然食量惊人，倒也没什么会吃坏脑子的东西啊。
E: Your appetite astounds me, but it seems you didn't eat anything that might affect your brain.

C: 看来梦貘不仅能让人恢复理性，还能让人丧失理性。倒也算是个有趣的研究课题。
E: Looks like the tuskpir not only regenerates rationality, it also destroys it. Now that'd make for an interesting research topic.

C: 卢卡，无论技术还是力量你都无可挑剔。但你，太在意胜负了。这反而让你没办法发挥全力。
E: Luka, there wasn't ever any doubt in your technique and strength. But you were too concerned with winning, and that prevented you from unleashing your utmost.

C: …这已经是四百多年前的邀请函了。
E: ...This invitation was dated four hundred years ago.

C: 罗浮的守擂剑士，也就是参赛选手要挑战的终极目标？
E: To challenge the Luofu's ringmaster, that's the ultimate goal for all the contestants?

C: 下次开始我真的要收费了啊！
E: I'm really going to start charging money next time!

C: 玛吉！你又来看我比赛啦？
E: Margie! You're here to watch me fight again?

C: 卢卡哥哥…下下场我可能也来不了了…接下来很长一段时间，我可能都来不了了……
E: Luka... I don't think I can make it for that either... For a long time after this, I might not be able to come...

C: 唉…节哀顺变吧，卢卡。
E: My condolences, Luka.

C: 笨蛋！这种事问别人有屁用？那不应该是你自己说了算吗？
E: Fool! What's the point of asking someone else this question? Isn't that something that only you can define?

C: 不，不不不。你向前踏出一步，无畏地向恐怖的对手挥出拳头…那一幕真的很美，让我忍泪回味了许久。
E: No, not at all. When you stepped forward and swung your fist at a formidable opponent fearlessly, the beauty of that moment struck me. I've been replaying it in my mind for some time, and it always brings tears to my eyes.

C: 虽然不是很明白啦！但我还是很开心，能见证你的成长！
E: Even though I don't fully understand it, I'm still pleased to witness your growth!

C: 哈哈哈哈，那你还是直接三拳打死我吧！
E: Haha! Oh, no no, you might as well just give me three punches and end me now!

C: 相信我，以你这样的身手，就算去参加星际巡回赛也一定能打出个名堂。奖金、名望…别人一辈子挣不到的，你抬抬手就能收下！
E: Trust me. With your skills, you'll surely make a name for yourself if you join the Interstellar Circuit. Prize money, fame... things others can't achieve in a lifetime, all within your reach!

C: 而现在，我想回赠给他的后代一件礼物。
E: Now, I'd like to give something to his descendant in return for his gift.

C: 狐人少女的脸上显露出一丝慌乱，仿佛为自己即将与他人争斗而惭愧不已。
E: The foxian girl's face flashes with a hint of panic, as if she is ashamed that she is about to fight another.

C: 她垂下眼帘，半晌才鼓起勇气。
E: She lowers her eyes, and takes a moment to find her courage.

C: 所以，我再问一遍，是谁杀了他们？
E: So, I'm asking once again, who killed them?

C: 我想站在擂台上告诉所有人，丹轮寺的僧侣没有败给自己的本性！
E: I want to stand on the ring and tell everyone that the monks of Claretwheel Temple have not caved in to their nature!

C: 这期报道写得太好了，把我都看感动了。
E: This article is beautifully written. I could almost cry!

C: 不妙啊不妙，波提欧直接把卢卡信心打没了。
E: Ah, this is bad! Boothill just completely shattered Luka's confidence!

C: 小东西，你竟然还有这神奇的本领…仙舟可真不可思议啊！
E: Such a little thing bursting with so much wondrous ability... The Xianzhou is certainly full of surprises!

C: 对于「幻觉」一事，不知道{NICKNAME}教练是如何看待这件事的？
E: Regarding this hallucination, I wonder if Coach {NICKNAME} has any comments?

C: 想象不同的对手，对手如何出招，以及自己如何应对，都是经常有的事。卢卡早已习惯如此，请各位朋友们不必担心。
E: Imagining different opponents, how they will strike, and how you will counter them — these are all common occurrences. Luka has long been accustomed to such situations, so everyone need not worry.

C: 嘁，那他们也不在这啊！
E: Tch, but they're not even here!

C: 虽然卢卡选手遇到了一点小小的挫折，但我相信只要有大家的支持，他一定能及时走出阴霾，谢谢大家，你们永远是卢卡最坚强的后盾！
E: Luka may have run into a small hiccup, but I believe that with everyone's support, he will surely bounce back. Thank you, everyone. You will forever be Luka's strongest support!

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 首先恭喜卢卡选手获得复活赛胜利，关于这场比赛，我们再次邀请到了{NICKNAME}教练接受记者提问。
E: First off, congrats to Luka for winning the repechage. We have once again invited Coach {NICKNAME} to answer journalist questions about this match.

C: 关于卢卡选手的纯美，{NICKNAME}教练是如何理解的？
E: What is Coach {NICKNAME}'s understanding of Luka's Beauty?

C: 我的教学方法并不适合每个人。换句话说，卢卡与我相性比较好，也许换作其他人，我们就早早出局了。
E: My coaching methodology isn't for everyone. In other words, Luka and I are quite compatible. We might've been knocked out of the tournament if I had been with anyone else.

C: 你对我们这么没信心？
E: Did you have that little faith in us?

C: 护法僧毗梨、智众经师驮那，为一万三千人请愿，于星辰间圆寂。愿您勿遗忘他们的名字。
E: Dharmic Monk Virya and Revered Master Dhyana left this world on their journey across the stars to petition for thirteen thousand living beings. Please, do not forget their names.

C: 动起来啊！卢卡！磐岩镇的拳王可不能在这里倒下！
E: Keep moving, Luka! The boxing champ of Boulder Town can't fall here!

C: 你累吗？要不要找个椅子坐一会？你渴了吗？红茶绿茶花草茶这里都有。
E: Are you tired? Do you need a chair to sit on? You thirsty? I have red tea, green tea, and floral tea!

C: 「阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务！零食饮料，日化百货，未语先笑，代客煎药！您的需要就是阿合马铁窗集团奋斗的目标！」
E: "The Arma Correctional Group is sincerely at your service! Snacks and drinks, daily necessities, service with a smile, medicine for our guests! We aim for your every need at Arma Correctional Group!"

C: 嘘。这边——
E: Shh. Over here...

C: …什么是「观忍社」？
E: ...What's the Ninja Appreciation Society?

C: 你将自己的奇特经历详细告诉了乱破……
E: You tell Rappa about your strange experiences in detail...

C: 与主公相识的时日已经不短了，在下何时骗过你？
E: We have been acquainted with each other for long. When have I ever been dishonest?

C: 太感动了！我要代表世界上所有遭受压迫的非人生物向你表示谢意！
E: I'm so touched! I sincerely thank you on behalf of all non-human organisms who suffer persecution!

C: 不如做点更摇滚的事吧！
E: Why not do something even more rock!

C: 没错，你挡住我的路了，乱破同学。
E: That's right. You're blocking my path, Rappa.

C: 主公，在下有些不知头脑，现在是何等情况？
E: Sound Master, I do not fully understand. What is going on right now?

C: ——且慢！切勿妄下判断！这位…呃，金属•大师，可否听在下说几句？
E: ...Wait! Please don't be so hasty to make your judgment! Kind, uh... metal master, would you hear me out?

C: 呜呜呜…谢谢你们…我会努力的！
E: Waaa... Thank you all so much... I will work so hard!

C: 真想报答的话，就去写首好曲子吧。
E: If you want to repay me, then go and write a good song.

C: （乐队成员的问题都解决了，这场演出应该不会出什么差错吧？）
E: (The problems with all the band members have been solved. There shouldn't be any more issues with this performance, surely?)

C: 带带我。
E: Take me along.

C: 咳。诸位——我等乃是「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」！
E: Ahem. Fellow ninja... We are Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party!

C: 虽然好长时间没上过舞台了，但随便打打碟还是没什么问题。
E: Although it's been some time since I've stepped on stage, it's still not a problem for me to spin some records.

C: <size=36>「缭乱」！「缭乱」！「缭乱」！</size>
E: <size=36>Dazzling Ninja! Dazzling Ninja! Dazzling Ninja!</size>

C: 首先我不是学校的支持者，我看到这场演出的时候已经毕业很久了。但不得不说，老师对学生的教导真的很重要，其实我觉得演奏正常音乐也没有什么不好的。
E: Firstly, I am not a supporter of the school. I already graduated long before I saw this performance. But I must say that a teacher's instruction is of utmost importance for their students. In fact, I believe that there's no harm in playing conventional music.

C: 再这么拖拉下去，害我们赶不上选拔时间就是你的错了哟。
E: If we keep dragging things out, it'll be your fault if we miss the selection time.

C: 艾尔菲。折纸大学谐乐学院的学生，目前…在经理的乐队里担任吉他手。
E: Arfey. A student from Paperfold University's Charmony Academy, currently... a guitarist in the manager's band.

C: 好吧，看来这只扑满并不介意你触碰它的鼻尖，甚至主动朝这边靠了靠。
E: Okay, seems like the trotter doesn't mind you touching its nose. It even presses its nose into your hand.

C: 不止是这些！她说还要让乐队的成员，还有演奏的自己也开心！
E: Not just that! She also said that the band members and the one playing should be happy too!

C: 即便灯光熄灭，被赶下舞台，即便没有人喝彩，我们的音乐也不会停歇。
E: Even if all the lights are extinguished, and we're booted off the stage... Even if no one cheers for us, our music will never cease.

C: 就鼓起勇气抱怨自己的晚餐吧，它总能令人失望！
E: Just muster the courage to complain about your dinner, for it's always such a let-down!

C: 对对对，是我，总算把你盼来了。听说星穹列车去过匹诺康尼了？正好有些事想跟你打听打听。
E: Yes yes, I was. My wait is finally over. I heard that the Astral Express traveled to Penacony before? I've been meaning to ask you about some matters.

C: 你看你看，他们说喝了这杯「米酿酸奶牛乳茶」，会有大幅度的属性上升！
E: Lookie here, they say that your stats will be greatly boosted after drinking this Rice-Brewed Yogurt Milk Tea!

C: 清水如臂使指，绸缎般拂拭地面，掀起灰尘和污垢，重新注入桶中。
E: Clear water flowing as sleek as a guided hand, mopping the floor smooth as silk, lifting up dust and dirt, then back into the bucket again.

C: 唔，说来有点丢脸…我昨晚梦见列车长抢走了我的枪，把它改造成了一个扫把。我想要回来，列车长就凶巴巴地吼我——就是这样一个莫名其妙的噩梦。
E: Mm, it's a little embarrassing... I dreamt that the conductor took my spear and turned it into a broom. I wanted to get it back, but the conductor yelled at me with fearsome anger... It was such a bizarre nightmare.

C: 没关系，大家都做过莫名其妙的噩梦，没人会因此而笑话你的。我想想…做了这样的梦，一定是因为你……
E: It's fine. Everyone's had strange nightmares before. No one's going to laugh at you because of that. Let me think... to have had such a dream, it must be because you...

C: 你们说得对，现在并不是造访空间站的好时机。阿兰，也请你们注意安全。
E: You're right. It's not the best time to visit the space station now. Arlan, you all please be careful too.

C: 点、点、点、点。对不起，我只用了「四个手指」，甚至很难用来「撕手纸」。
E: Tap, tap, tap, tap. Apologies, I only used four digits. I can hardly use them to tear toilet paper.

C: 时间十分充裕，我甚至没忘了使用4张优惠券——这就叫「优4难忘」。你们理解了吗？「优4难忘」与「忧思难忘」谐音……
E: There was ample time, and I even remembered to use four discount coupons — I had to do it for this count. Get it? Four discount? For this count? It's a pun...

C: 你是说之前在网上看到的「那一招」吗？真能有用吗……
E: You mean "that move" you saw on the internet? Will it really work...

C: 不管学什么，都是从「起跑线」开始的嘛！
E: No matter what you learn, it all begins at the starting line!

C: 扶我起来……
E: Help me up...

C: 现货秒发！
E: We have ready stock available to ship!

C: 有破绽——再吃我一招！
E: An opening — here's another punch from me!

C: 拽一拽。
E: Kick it.

C: 上传照片之后，看看大家的反响吧。
E: Let's see what everyone's comments are after uploading the photos.

C: 总感觉阴森森的…我们还是赶紧开溜吧？
E: It feels super creepy... We'd better get outta here fast.

C: 这下你总算愿意搭理我了~我在作品评论区的留言，你可是不理不睬呢。
E: At least you're not ignoring me now! You weren't responding to my comments on your photos.

C: 「惊梦踢踏舞」。
E: "Dreamjolt Tap."

C: 呃…好像不是想象中的那种「雅韵」。
E: Err... Doesn't look like the "stately" I imagined.

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 嘿嘿，是它们太热情了。快拍快拍，别辜负了它们的一片好意。
E: Heehee, they were just too enthusiastic. Hurry up and take the shot. Don't squander their efforts.

C: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
E: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

C: 我们怀疑这小贼与冥河中新升起的泰坦有关。
E: We suspect this thief is in cahoots with the Titan newly arisen from the River of Souls.

C: 喂喂，前面那些穿着铠甲的…是奥赫玛的援兵吧！喂——我们在这里啊！！！
E: Hey look, those armored figures up ahead... They're Okheman reinforcements, aren't they! Heyyyy! We're over here!!!

C: 没问题。元老院向来尊崇民意，和那些自以为是的救世主不一样，你当然有拒绝的权利。
E: Of course. The Council of Elders has always respected the will of the people, unlike some arrogant saviors. You obviously have the right to refuse.

C: 别紧张，我也会帮忙的…真、真没做好的话，我来替你挨训！
E: Calm down. I'll help too... I—If they don't do a good job, I'll take the punishment in your place!

C: 好险，差点就没完成…不过已经很厉害了，灰宝，还有小奇美拉们都辛苦啦。
E: That was close. We almost didn't make it... But Grayie and the chimeras have all worked hard for this.

C: 奇美拉的合理搭配是获胜关键。
E: The key to victory lies in the strategic synergy of the chimeras.

C: 造谣是要负责任的！
E: Slander comes with consequences!

C: 该继续北伐了！
E: The time for conquest is nigh!

C: 你和风堇带着小奇美拉在浴池里舒服地泡着澡，尽情放松了片刻……
E: You and Hyacine bring the chimeras to the bath to indulge in a relaxing time...

C: 正好，生命花园的园丁最近也在问，是否需要派些更厉害的奇美拉来支援。
E: It's good timing that the Gardeners have recently asked if we need stronger chimeras to assist us.

C: 嗯？灰宝已经休息好啦？还觉得疲惫的话，我可以帮你疗愈哦。
E: Hmm? You're all done taking a break? I can help you loosen up if you're still feeling tired.
Huh!?

C: 我听得懂，别翻译了行吗？
E: I got all that. No need to translate, okay?

C: 你们也网上冲浪？
E: You folks surf the net too?

C: 你睁开眼，不敢相信眼前的场景。
E: You open your eyes, barely able to believe the sight before you.

C: 还有更变态的吗？
E: Is there a more insane one?

C: 小助手，来，一二三，上链接！
E: Mods, ready? And-a-one, and-a-two, and-a-three, send the link!

C: 丹恒你没事吧！
E: Dan Heng, are you alright?

C: 平时…我总是躲在缇宝和缇安身后，胆子也是*我们*当中最小的。
E: We've always been the most timid of us three, always hiding behind Tribbie and Trianne...

C: 缇宁大人，你已经是了。
E: You already have, Lady Trinnon.

C: 他们喊着友情啊羁绊啊胜利啊什么的就冲上来了…好！让我们期待庆典的最高潮，{NICKNAME}选手对战风堇选手！
E: They're charging in, shouting about friendship, bonds, and victory... Great! Let's look forward to the grand climax of the celebration — Contestant {NICKNAME} vs Contestant Hyacine!

C: 你甚至都没有报名比赛……
E: You didn't even sign up for the competition...

C: 漂亮话差不多得了，要来就来！
E: Enough with the sweet talk, just bring it on!

C: 原来重头戏在后面？
E: So the real plot unfolds now?

C: 那是因为，你是能够拯救所有小海豹的「预言之子」。
E: Because you are the Child of Prophecy who can save all the baby seals.

C: …感觉成为一只小海豹也不错。
E: ...Becoming a baby seal doesn't seem that bad.

C: 嗷呜～相信我们会成为心照不宣的好伙伴的。
E: Awooo~ I believe we will become the best of partners.

C: 真的吗？不要太害怕输赢结果，重要的是参与……
E: Really? Don't sweat too much about the results. It's the process that matters...

C: 赛飞儿？
E: Cipher?

C: 不愧是阿格莱雅大人！有了「豹币」，就能购买参赛的小海豹了。
E: As expected of Lady Aglaea! With these Seal Tokens, you can buy baby seals to join the competition.

C: *我们*听说{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}会平等地惩罚每个毁坏宴会的家伙，对于这一点，你没有什么要说的吗？
E: We heard that {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} punishes every party spoiler without prejudice. Do you have anything to say on this point?

C: 要是弃赛，我就赢咯？
E: So if you forfeit, does that mean I win?

C: 嗷呜～尽管了解了{NICKNAME}不能说出口的原因，但现在泡泡心里还是很受伤……
E: Awoo~ Even though I now understand why {NICKNAME} can't speak of it, I still feel a little hurt inside...

C: 什么？又出现了新的预言？
E: What? There are new prophecies?

C: 泡泡你好，方便透露一下「转队」的原因是什么吗？是遇到了不公正的对待、严苛的合约条款、有摩擦的豹友关系，还是…有其他尚未披露的细节？请告诉我。
E: Bubbles, could you tell us the reason behind your team transference? Was it unfair treatment, a harsh contract, conflicts with teammates, or...some other undisclosed details? Fill us in.

C: 够爽快，泡泡果然没看错你。
E: Right on. I knew I was right about you!

C: 「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」
E: "Under the cunning tricks of the Duke, the righteous Baseballer is caught off guard and falls into a black hole that connects to countless unknown worlds."

C: 祝你游玩愉快！
E: Happy gaming!

C: …嗯？看您这表情，难道这报名表有问题？呃，现在比赛已经开始了，大家都在等您上场，您可千万别退赛啊，求求了！
E: ...Hm? Judging from your expression, might this list be wrong? Agh. The match is already starting, everyone is waiting for you to arrive. Please don't back out! Please!

C: 全银河难道就只有一个黑客吗？
E: Is there only one hacker in the entire Cosmos?

C: 要是太卜也来追你，你会更快…
E: If master diviner comes after you personally, you'd move even faster...

C: …你注意安全。
E: ...You stay safe.

C: 您好，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}！我是星际和平公司派来与您交接的工作人员莱娜——您可能不认识我，毕竟此前我都是和「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」大副沟通的。
E: Hey there, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}! I'm Lena from the Interastral Peace Corporation, here to touch base with you — We haven't actually met before since I've only been communicating with the first mate of the The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand up till now.

C: 他宝贝的，还挺可爱呀。
E: Son of a fudge, that's actually pretty cute.

C: 别担心，即便波提欧兄弟化作折纸小鸟，他那火热而正直的心也愿意助我们一臂之力！
E: No worries! Even as an Origami Bird, Boothill's hot-blooded, justice-loving heart is still on our side!

C: 嗯…口味的确有点奇怪。除此之外，没有什么特别之处。
E: Hmm... the profile is odd. But beyond that, nothing extraordinary.

C: 新的调饮配方，来测！

C: 瞧吧，我就说——
E: See? I told you—

E: But really, really, really, there's no one else you want to become?

C: 哼，有点意思。

C: 定让那大君仓皇而逃！

E: A fresh cup of your favorite hand-crafted coffee.

C: 有一次，任务结束后，在公司物流舰的首席办公室，我按下了办公桌上的按钮。结果，智械侍者摇摇晃晃地送来了饮品。
E: After a mission, I once pressed a button in the executive office of an IPC logistics ship, and a wobbling Intellitron butler came in with a drink.

E: Would you like a classic drink or a newly launched recipe?

E: That's not for me. I can just have other people bring me relics for a nice appraisal fee. Isn't that much safer than doing it myself?

C: 唉，这可怎么办呢……
E: Hmm, now this is a real pickle...

C: 当然是，但我和一般的寻宝者不同。对于寻找古代遗物这项工作，我有五年以上的经验，大家都叫我「资深寻宝者」。
E: 'Course I am — but I'm not like your average joe. I've got more than five years of experience in relic-hunting. They call me: Mr. Senior Treasure Hunter.

C: 这…其实不该告诉你的，但听说外来者身手不凡，说不定你能帮忙。
E: It's... I shouldn't be telling you, but I heard outsiders have some special skills which might just come in handy.

C: 这个插件用来干嘛的？

C: 「起飞吧！{NICKNAME}！迎接您最后的试炼吧！」
E: "Take off, {NICKNAME}! Welcome to this, your final trial!"

C: 不不不，那不是机巧鸟，那是您至真至纯、不受引力束缚的心灵，在初代司鼎的幻境中呈现出的结果。可不能按照机巧鸟的逻辑来理解呀。

C: 按您原本的冒险故事…剿灭了那些药王秘传，居然立刻就和绝灭大君照面决战了。这故事进展展开的也太快了吧？
E: Based on your original story... After taking out the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, you almost immediately fought your decisive battle against the Lord Ravager Phantylia. Don't you think that's pushing the story along too fast?

C: 我已为你指明了方向，去吧，无名客！你索求的助力便在眼前！
E: I've pointed out the way for you. Go, Nameless! The help you seek is at hand!

E: If fight is what you want, then come and take it!

E: Ssh, don't mention my real name around here! You'll kill my flow and take me out of the zone. Call me by my role, er... Which is what, again? Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe, that's right. Call me Dan Heng / Cold Dragon Young / High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak> / John Doe.

E: Hmm... using the IPC's cutting-edge Aether copying technology, we can record any creature you've seen inside of an Aether Coin...

C: 你认真的？

C: 那就听你的好了。
E: Alright, alright...

E: Where will I start? From this step right here, I shall leave this safe and stable job and begin my business plan... I will make Celestial Jade popular across the galaxy! Then I shall branch out into other dimensions...

C: 你、你到底有什么目的？

C: 真没眼力劲，我这么耀眼你都没发现？

E: Just look at how light and transparent it is, like some small object sculpted from gemstone. Go sell it for money~ One feather is worth all you can earn across several days of storytelling!

C: ……这铄金先生不是反对公司的传统武学派吗？怎么又接下了这代言机甲的活儿？
E: ...Isn't Mr. Shuojin a member of the traditional martial arts schools that oppose IPC? Why did he take on this mech endorsement?

C: 星际和平商城各大门店均有销售！我老叽米还给大家争取到了<unbreak>100</unbreak>个免费体验名额，今天在发布会现场和我一起高呼兑换码——「铁拳卢卡！无敌拳法！」即有机会领取！
E: Available at all major outlets of the Interastral Peace Mall! I, Owlbert, have secured <unbreak>100</unbreak> free trial spots for everyone. Today at the launch event, chant the redemption code "Iron Fist Luka! Iron Fist Fury!" to claim your spot!

C: 根据烛墨学派的资料，这片空洞本属于第二次帝皇战争后，一段被称为「学派战争」的历史。
E: According to data from the Candelagraphos, this void originally belonged to a time in history named the "Scholars' Strife" after the second Emperor's War.

C: 但从外部向内窥探，那里只有一片紊乱的「不可知域」。
E: But when observed from the outside, all that can be seen within is only a chaotic "Unknowable Domain."

C: 结论：距离她进入「不可知域」，已过去<unbreak>33</unbreak>个标准时。
E: Conclusion: Thirty-three standard hours have passed since her entry into the Unknowable Domain.

C: 然后，我们就能得到第五位天才的头脑。而我，将向他……她？不，应该说向它提出问题——正如当年「学派战争」的尾声，有人提出了那个{RUBY_B#孤波算法}最终被我解开的难题{RUBY_E#}一样。
E: Then, we will be able to obtain the brain of the fifth genius. Then I shall ask him... or her? No, should be "it"... a question, just like how someone asked at the end of the Scholars' Strife the {RUBY_B#solitary waves theory}question that I ultimately solved{RUBY_E#}.

C: 与以往相同，我和斯蒂芬会在外部全力保障你们的安全。无论如何，请二位务必平安归来。
E: Just like before, Stephen and I will fully guarantee your safety outside. No matter what happens, you two must return safe and sound.

C: 真假并没有那么重要。「寂静领主」似乎拥有沿着因果链条自由现身的力量。
E: Her true identity doesn't matter. The Lord of Silence appears to have the power to show up along the chains of karma.

C: 看你忧心忡忡的，还有什么要说的吗？我现在心情不太好，只给你一次提问的机会，想清楚了再问。
E: From your anxiety-laden expression, I take it you have more to say? I'm not in a particularly good mood right now, so you only get one question. Think hard before asking it.

C: 说起来，我还没怎么「开拓」过那节有吧台的车厢…今天难得悠闲，去逛逛吧。
E: Hmm, I haven't really "trailblazed" that bar car much, have I...? Heh, and I AM free today... Time to go check it out, then!

C: 对不起了列车长，看来我们两个是少数派。
E: I'm sorry, conductor, but it seems we're in the minority.

C: 此时此刻，依旧一片狼藉的毛坯房中……
E: At this moment, in the still messy unfurnished room...

C: 嗯…好像还少个枕头？虽然能睡纸箱子的人可能也不需要枕头……
E: Uh, we're still lacking a pillow in here. Although someone who can sleep comfortably on a cardboard box probably doesn't need one...

C: 好宽敞的浴室，好气派的浴缸！
E: What a spacious bathroom! What a grand bathtub!

C: 我喝果汁就可以了！
E: I'll just stick with juice!

C: 我已经找好了绕开城墙的最佳路线。事不宜迟，咱们这就出发吧。
E: I already have an ideal route to go around the city walls. Let's set off now.

C: 这里看起来和奥赫玛很像。
E: This place looks so similar to Okhema.

C: 听起来很安全。
E: Sounds like a safe place.

C: 那就期待我们的继续协作吧，英雄。要是在里面找到什么东西，你先收着就好。
E: Well then, let's look forward to our continued cooperation, dear hero. If you find anything valuable in there, just keep it with you for now.

C: 摸摸它的下巴。
E: Pet its chin.

C: 这孩子的各项指标，让我想想怎么说呢…嗯，有很大的进步空间！
E: This young one's current physical condition... how should I say this... indicates significant potential for development.

C: 呜嗡！（带它长大！）
E: Grumph! (Raise me up!)

C: 呜呜呜？（神悟树庭？是做什么的地方？）
E: Grumph? (Grove of Epiphany? What's that place?)

C: 总之，照这样下去，它很快就能掌握欧洛尼斯的权能。不敢想象它最终会成长到何种地步。
E: Anyway, at this rate, it'll master the power of Oronyx in no time. I can't even imagine how far it might go from there.

C: 相信应该你已经知道，这头大地兽…并非生来就超凡脱俗。但它拥有无限的潜力。
E: As you probably already know, this dromas... wasn't born extraordinary, but it possesses limitless potential.

C: 呜嗡。（才不会啦。）
E: Grumph. (No way.)

C: 只要顺利完成任务，并且完成一些考核，就能直接转至主队！也就是实习，怎么样？
E: Once you complete the mission and pass a few evaluations, you'll get to join the main team. It's like an internship, what do you think?

C: 你最近总在学习，身体会累垮的。打会儿电动好不好…我是说，要不要去泡澡？
E: You've been studying non-stop lately. You'll wear yourself out. How about playing some video games... I mean, want to go take a bath?

C: …咱们如约泡澡去？
E: ...Shall we head to the bath as planned?

C: 呜嗡~呜嗡嗡！（一样了呢~这样一来，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}就是我真正的{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}啦！）
E: Grumph~ Grumphhh! (Exactly! This means {F#Mama}{M#Papa} is my real {F#Mama}{M#Papa} now!)

C: 最终，圣城的公民们做出了决定——让刻法勒下来，它上去顶球。
E: Finally, the citizens of the holy city made their decision: Let this dromas take the place of Kephale and prop up the sphere.

C: 它不在这里，或许在你们之前留下过回忆的地方。去浴场看看吧。
E: It's not here. Maybe it's somewhere you made memories together before. Try checking the bath.

C: 今天没有适合你上手的宝物啦，请明天再来吧。
E: There are no suitable treasures for you to handle today. Please come back tomorrow.

C: 你的意思是，我是{F#搞笑女}{M#搞笑男}？
E: So you're saying I'm a {F#goofball}{M#goofball}?

C: …大概是我记忆里的人吧。
E: ...Probably people from my memory.

C: 绝对不会有危险的，有任何异常，我第一时间拔线！
E: No danger at all, if anything goes wrong, I'll pull the plug right away!

C: 衡量、判断、修正…我们追随{RUBY_B#「均衡」互}祂{RUBY_E#}的脚步，惟愿寰宇归于平衡。
E: Measure, judge, rectify... We follow in {RUBY_B#HooH the Equilibrium}THEIR{RUBY_E#} footsteps, seeking only to bring balance to the universe.

C: 有趣……
E: How interesting...

C: 数周后，难民们重返故地，发现巨人的身体已经化作一块石碑。此后的数个琥珀纪，三折河再未出现过洪水。
E: Weeks later, when the refugees returned to their homeland, they found the giant's body had turned into a stone monument. For many Amber Eras after that, the Three-fold River never flooded again.

C: 嘻，那我帮你说：感谢大家的辛苦付出，尤其要感谢我们尊敬的店长哦！
E: Hehe, then I'll say it for you: Thank you everyone for your hard work. Most of all, our honorable Manager!

C: 那应该也不行吧……
E: That's... probably not allowed either...

C: 黄金裔活动中心。
E: Chrysos Heir Activity Center.

C: 小灰的表现也很棒，要夸夸！
E: Little Gray did great too. Worthy of praise!

C: 呼，有点累了。虽然通过了评审很开心，但餐馆还要继续营业，可别忘了哦。
E: Phew, I'm exhausted but thrilled we passed. Just remember, the restaurant still needs to open tomorrow.

C: 命运爵，是你的视角太低了。若是站在高位，便能清楚看到朝右才是正解。
E: Dux Fatorum, your angle's too low. From a higher vantage point, it's obvious — it needs to go right.

C: 缇宁在想，形成这个印象的，是环境吗，还是别的原因呢。
E: Trinnon's wondering... is that because of the environment? Or is it something else?

C: 出发咯！
E: Let's roll!

C: 现在没人管着我，自由自在，想干啥就干啥，我可太爱这种日子了。
E: No one's bossing me around these days. I do what I want, when I want, and I'm loving every second of it.

C: 有缘再会！没缘分的话，有生意做也成啦。再见！
E: Until we meet again! If it's not the case, I'm always open to business. See ya!

C: 多说无益。开始吧。
E: No more words. Let's get to it.

C: 刚烹制的「糖醋烩鸡」，请。
E: Freshly made "Sweet & Sour Braised Chicken," coming right up.

C: 「酸豆泥」，请。
E: Here's some "Pickled Bean Purée." Enjoy.

C: 来餐馆上班吧，那刻夏老师！
E: Join our restaurant staff, Professor Anaxa!

C: 报告，昔涟打算偷吃！
E: Heads up! Cyrene's trying to sneak a taste!

C: 而在那一成不变的守候中，一定会有奇迹发生……
E: And in that constant anticipation, a miracle is sure to happen...

C: 小灰！*我们*完成了布置的任务，把「甜蜜蜜节」办得很出色！
E: Little Gray! We did it! We nailed the mission and made the Sweetie Festival a big success!

C: 小灰去忙自己的事情吧，*我们*会努力的！
E: Go handle your business, Little Gray! We'll do our best!

C: 呵呵，店长总算回来了。餐馆再不开门的话，妖精们可都要饿坏了哪。
E: Heh, the manager's finally back. The fairies would've starved if we kept the restaurant closed any longer.

C: 呵，店长，我在此等候你许久了。餐馆工作不容怠慢，要认真对待每次经营迷。
E: Heh, manager, I've been waiting here for you for quite a while. Restaurant work isn't something to slack off on. You've got to take every business day seriously, mem.
