C: 纷争的冠军 万敌
E: Champion of Strife, Mydei

C: 无言的男人坐在桌边，\n等待我先开口。\n杯中盛满的，是<color=#9e5738>猩红的液体</color>。
E: The taciturn man is seated at the table,\nexpecting me to break the silence.\nBefore us is a cup, filled to the brim with <color=#9e5738>a crimson liquid</color>.

C: 狮子终有一死，\n此去再无复还。
E: Even the lion will one day die,\nA departure with no way back.

C: 在奥赫玛的一角，\n初来乍到的旅人驻足片刻。
E: In a corner of Okhema,\nthe newly arrived traveler stops for a moment.

C: 三位孩童笑容各异。\n一位烂漫，一位机灵，一位沉静，\n却透着同样的神秘。
E: The three children have differing smiles.\nOne is beaming, one has a shrewd grin, and one is smiling serenely,\nyet each of them looks just as mysterious as the other two.

C: 曾经，一名濒死沙场的士兵，\n希望与远在城中的爱人道别。
E: There was once a dying soldier on the battlefield,\nwho wished to bid farewell to his lover in a distant city, far away.

C: 其间少女与万物交谈… 标本，茶具，甚至诸多枕头， 仿佛她能听见死物的回应。 「我向来深居简出…」 「出于礼节，以此演练一言一行。」
E: The girl converses with all items in the house... With specimens, tea sets, and even pillows in profusion, As if she can hear the responses of these non-living things. "I have always lived in isolation..." "Out of courtesy, this is how I practice my words and actions."

C: 「夫人，白绸论匹怎个卖？」 「先生，只需两千利衡币。」 诚实的价码， 只能换来微薄的收益。
E: "Madam, what is a bundle of white silk's price?" "Sir, only 2,000 Balance Coins." An honest price tag, Can only meager profit obtain.

C:
这也是最好的时代——
多洛斯涌现三百侠盗，
其人均有瞒天的智谋，
诈富济贫，诓财挪赃。
E:
This is also an age of splendor—
Three hundred thieves spring forth from Dolos,
Each scheming to conceal the truth from prying eyes,
Robbing the rich to give succor to the poor.

C: 「谎言总是谎言……」\n「你却使它比坦诚更美丽。」
E: "Lies are always but lies..."\n"But you can make them more beautiful than the truth."

C:
燕子纷飞各地，
蝴蝶翩跹花乡。
孤狮据守险崖，
彩虹补缀穹苍……
E:
Swallows soar through the open skies,
and a butterfly dances across the blooming land.
A lone lion watches over the perilous cliffs,
as the rainbow mends the torn sky...

C: 巨龙颔首，\n却并未看着统帅，\n也只字不提自己的由来。
E: The Giant Dragon nodded,\nBut it did not look at the commander,\nAnd never mentioned where it came from.

C:
梦醒时分，
我有所触动。
也许不朽的承托，
不是肉体的再造，
亦非血脉的相融。
E:
Something stirs within me
At the moment of awakening.
Perhaps the legacy of the Permanence
Lies not in recreating flesh,
Nor in the merging of bloodlines.

C: 偌大的圣城，\n竟无人能拿出她存在的证明。
E: In the entire holy city,\nThere are none who can provide proof of her existence.

C: 少女伸手，不为扶正额上王冠， 反倒扶起瑟缩的孩童。 「听闻此地旧律， 袭击戴冠者当处枭刑。」 「但我所戴并非此邦之冠， 旧律也应一并废止。」
E: The girl reached out, not to straighten the crown on her head, But to help up the child shivering in dread. "I heard, in the old laws of this land, whoever assaults the crown shall be punished." "But I wear another land's crown, And your old laws should also be abolished."

C: 凯撒<color=#9e5738>「背叛」</color>了逐火的同盟，\n我是为她的伟业铺路的罪人。\n一如深海游鱼无法摆脱洋流的引线。
E: The Imperator <color=#9e5738>"betrayed"</color> the Flame-Chase Alliance,\nAnd I was the sinner who paved the way for her achievements,\nLike how a deep-sea fish cannot escape the tides' push and pull.

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>
E: <color=#9e5738>Who will win?</color>

C: 「想不到…我竟沦落至你来安慰。」\n她在篝火旁苦笑，\n「刚见你时，你沉闷得就像深海的底礁。」
E: "Who would have thought... I've sunk so low that I need you to comfort me."\nShe gave a bitter chuckle next to the bonfire,\n"You were as gloomy as the bedrock of the ocean when we first met."

C: 昏光庭院已随岁月离析，\n少女已是血脉末裔。
E: The faded Twilight Courtyard, long eroded by time,\nNow shelters a girl, the sole heir of her lineage.

C: 「若不是她，我本应有更多骂名。」
E: "If it weren't for her, I would have suffered more accusations."

C: 「看看万敌和那刻夏老师，\n男孩都会变成严肃的大人。」
E: "Look at Mydei and Professor Anaxa.\nBoys all grow up into serious adults."

C: 它的骄傲不下于主人。
E: These golden threads are no less prideful than the master they now belong to.

C:
她总习惯独自沐浴，
自离愁或明晰时分初起。
<color=#9e5738>金色的长发</color>浸没在水中，
像散开的金丝，将她重新包裹成茧…
E:
She is used to bathing alone,
At the start of the hours of Lucid or Parting.
Her <color=#9e5738>golden hair</color> spread in the water like a throne,
Like the scattered golden threads, wrapping her again in a cocoon...

C: 「逐火之旅，圆满收官。」
E: "The Flame-Chase Journey Comes to a Perfect Close."

C: 出乎意料的是，这一次，黑衣人并未像以前那样遁走，而是站在原地，等待他的到来。远处的天边泛起黑色的碎浪。二人面对面站着，黑衣剑士的脚下，蔺草在燃烧。
E: Unexpectedly, this time, the figure in black didn't vanish like before, but stood their ground, waiting for his arrival. Dark waves rippled across the distant horizon. As they faced each other, the bulrush beneath the black swordmaster's feet was burning.

C: 「此前{NICKNAME}偷偷在门口布张的横幅所言夸张了，星穹餐车此次到访并无敌意，只是为了与翁法罗斯本地交流烹饪心得，顺带将我们所收集的天外美食分享给本地居民。」
E: "The banner {NICKNAME} snuck up at your door was an exaggeration. We come without hostility. The Astral Food Express is here to share knowledge with Amphoreus chefs, and to bring the interstellar cuisines we've gathered to your people."

C: 「…小飞儿，怎么用鱼做出甜品先不提，比赛还是要正大光明的好。」
E: "...Little Ciphy, aside from how you'd even make a dessert out of fish, it's still better to win fair and square."

C: 很快，双方选出了第一轮的参赛选手。黄金Aurum一方，店长遐蝶亲自上阵，她的菜品是：安提灵糖霜布丁塔，又名…「彼岸的拥抱」。「布丁作为餐后甜点，它像是宴会与你告别时最后一个甜甜的拥抱。」
E: Soon, both sides selected their first contestant. For Grand Chrysos, the manager Castorice stepped forward herself. Her dish: Antila Frost Sugar Pudding Tower, also called... "An Embrace from Beyond." "As the sweet ending of a banquet, pudding is like a final embrace before saying goodbye."

C: 「她只是又放错了盐和糖，丹恒。」
E: "She just mixed up salt and sugar again, Dan Heng."

C: 「口感沁凉，仿佛真的化身为持明族类……」
E: "The refreshing taste... it really feels like transforming into one of the Vidyadhara..."

C: 参赛双方各自只剩下一名选手——毋庸置疑，正是白厄与{NICKNAME}。
E: By now, each side had only one contestant left... Naturally, it was Phainon and {NICKNAME}.

C: 路径：岁月。原动力：哀怜。 注释：行为模式异常，具备特殊情感投射机制。 该电信号会自主记述其余电信号的行动，行为模式符合「记忆」筛选与记录的逻辑。 但决策时常出现不确定、不稳定的主动倾向，判断为模拟命途产生扰动，原因未知。 实为「德谬歌」的心识。 于永劫回归中，踏上记录世界，回归自我的旅途。 著者批注：多么美妙呀。最后的涟漪滋润了大树，让它结出了…一颗粉色的桃子。
E: Track: Time. Primum Mobile: Lament Annotation: Abnormal behavioral pattern, possessing a special emotional projection mechanism. This electrical signal autonomously records the actions of other electrical signals. The behavioral pattern aligns with the logic of "Remembrance" screening and recording. However, decisions often exhibit uncertain, unstable, and proactive tendencies, which is judged to be a perturbation caused by the simulated Path. The reason is unknown. In actuality, it is the Mind of the "Demiurge." In the Eternal Recurrence, it embarks on a journey to record the world and return to the self. Author's Note: How wonderful. The final ripple nourished the great tree, allowing it to bear... a pink peach.

C: 看来…你相信「开拓」是孤独的，一条直指终点的苦旅。\n真有趣，你竟然与那位铁尔南默契十足。虽然他不善言语，但假如你们能结伴而行……\n…他一定会放心将后背交给你的。
E: It seems... You believe Trailblaze to be a lonely and bitter journey that points straight to the end.\nHow fascinating. You're not so different from Tiernan. Though he might not be very talkative, if you could walk the same path as he...\n...He'd definitely put his full trust in you.

C: 你开始质疑自己这一路以来的运气…因为你又遇见了桑博。\n「一次跨越星海的久别重逢」——你无数次在脑海中彩排过类似的情境。但为什么必须得是桑博•科斯基？你觉得宇宙跟你开了个残酷的玩笑。
E: You're beginning to suspect your fortunes along the way... Mainly because you ran into Sampo once again.\n"A grand reunion across the stars." Your mind has played countless similar scenes, but why did the one you reunited with have to be Sampo Koski? You think the universe is playing a cruel joke on you.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，这里徘徊着失控的『原型机』，那是筑城者留下的古代机器。守护贝洛伯格的工具如今威胁着民众的安全，还真是讽刺——{NICKNAME}，我们一起扫除这个威胁吧。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, there are malfunctioning prototypes wandering around, ancient machines left behind by the Architects. The tools that were meant to protect Belobog now pose a threat to the safety of the people. Isn't it ironic? {NICKNAME}, let's eliminate this threat together."

C: ——这里的敌人都注意到了你，纷纷现身…或许古代炸弹可以帮助你摆脱困境。
E: — Enemies around here have all noticed you and are showing up in droves... Maybe an Ancient Bomb can help you out.

C: ——小心，埋伏的强敌将会发动突袭，削减你的耐力值。
E: — Be careful. Hidden formidable foes here will drain your Stamina by launching Surprise Attacks against you.

C: ——在遗迹中，你好像看到了熟悉的身影……
E: — Within the ruins, you seem to detect a familiar silhouette...

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「装备扑满」</color>携带古代装备的存护扑满出现！

C: 第一遗迹的深层区域，疲惫的你无法在每层自动恢复耐力，请谨慎行动。
E: This is in the depths of the first ruin. Weary as you are, you won't automatically recover stamina on each floor. Please proceed with caution.

C: 寻宝者每行动#1次，敌人会进行自我强化，至多强化#3次。（强化等级：#4）\n敌人出现时，会封锁周围的区域。
E: For every #1 action(s) the Treasure Hunter takes, the enemies will strengthen themselves for up to #3 time(s). (Strengthen Level: #4)\nEnemies will lock down the surrounding areas when they appear.

C: 通关<color=#f29e38ff>拟造花萼</color>、体验<color=#f29e38ff>模拟宇宙</color>等更多玩法，能够提升开拓等级。当开拓等级达到要求后，将会面临<color=#f29e38ff>均衡的试炼</color>。完成试炼后会提升<color=#f29e38ff>均衡等级</color>。

Once your Trailblaze Level is high enough, the <color=#f29e38ff>Equilibrium Trial</color> will become unlocked. You can complete the trial to raise your <color=#f29e38ff>Equilibrium Level</color>

C: 在限定的轮数内消灭敌方目标以完成<color=#f29e38ff>星芒战幕</color>挑战。每场战斗开始前，挑战者的生命值、战技点和能量会恢复到指定数量。
E: Defeat enemies within specified number of Cycles to complete the <color=#f29e38ff>Stellar Flare</color> challenge. Before the start of each battle, your HP, Skill Points, and Energy will be restored to a specified amount.

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Present evidence</color> in accordance with what the opposition is saying to refute their arguments

E: The path of destiny is not a smooth one... <color=#f29e38ff>Should you fall, you will experience eternal damnation.</color>

C: 按下<color=#f29e38ff>冲拳</color>技能按键可以进入瞄准状态，此时「扎格列斯之手」<color=#f29e38ff>无法移动</color>。拖动屏幕调整方向，按下<color=#f29e38ff>冲拳</color>技能按键可以做出<color=#f29e38ff>「冲拳动作」</color>，「扎格列斯之手」将沿瞄准的方向加速挥出，冲刺过程中<color=#f29e38ff>无法控制</color>「扎格列斯之手」。
E: Hit the <color=#f29e38ff>Punch</color> ability button to enter the aiming state. During this time, the Hand of Zagreus <color=#f29e38ff>cannot move</color>. Drag the screen and adjust the direction, and hit the <color=#f29e38ff>Punch</color> ability button to perform a <color=#f29e38ff>Punch Action</color>, whereby the Hand of Zagreus will sprint toward the aimed direction. During the sprint, the Hand of Zagreus <color=#f29e38ff>cannot be controlled</color>.

C: 沉浸装置可读取沉浸于<color=#f29e38ff>模拟宇宙</color>中的意识；模拟宇宙运行时，随体验深入，会逐渐生成<color=#f29e38ff>理论中存在的世界</color>。沉浸装置将这些数据储存于球状<color=#f29e38ff>位面饰品</color>中。
E: The Immersion Device is able to read the consciousness immersed within the <color=#f29e38ff>Simulated Universe</color>. As you go deeper into the operating Simulated Universe, it will gradually generate <color=#f29e38ff>worlds that exist in theory</color>. The Immersion Device stores this data in spherical <color=#f29e38ff>Planar Ornaments</color>.

C: 今天的我比昨天更棒了~
E: Today me is even more awesome than yesterday me!

C: 争斗…并无意义。
E: Fighting... is meaningless.

C: 接下来，就交给我吧。
E: Leave the rest to me.

C: 我还是放心不下。
E: I can't relax just yet.

C: 来之不易啊…
E: You don't see these every day...

C: 记住还能呼吸的感觉。
E: That breathing sensation? Remember it.

C: 接受星星的祝福吧~
E: A gift from the stars~

C: …虽然现在一个字都还没写，但写起来肯定很快。
E: ...I haven't written a single word yet... But it won't take long once I get started!

C: 准备万无一失。以现在的状态，随时都能应对战斗。
E: The preparations are flawless. The way I am now, I can fight anytime.

C: 好机会，该斩除祸患了！
E: A chance to deal with the problem at its root!

C: 被点亮的，是贝洛伯格的未来。
E: The future of Belobog shines bright.

C: 决定战局的关键一步。
E: A decisive moment in the battle.

C: 区区恶徒。
E: Evildoer.

C: 嗯，辛苦了。
E: Well done.

C: 我家小妹，她性格有些…古怪。不，不是脾气差的意思——我只是希望她能健康成长，不要走希露瓦走过的弯路。
E: My little sister has a... peculiar streak. No, no, I don't mean a bad temper... *sigh* Let's just say she reminds me more of Serval than me.

C: 还没到我退场的时候。
E: I'm still needed.

C: 积少成多。
E: A little goes a long way.

C: 同样的错误我不会犯两次。
E: I won't make the same mistake twice.

C: 关于我的全名，军中至少流传着<unbreak>32</unbreak>种说法，至于我为什么知道…这就是情报官的能力。
E: There are <unbreak>32</unbreak> versions of my full name circulating among the troops. How do I know? I'm an intelligence officer after all.

C: 抓紧时间休息，补充体力。
E: Get some rest while you can and gather your strength.

C: 这次赚大了！
E: Now that's what I'm talking about!

C: 这就到头了？不不，人生是场持久战，还得继续向上才行。
E: Don't be complacent — good investors always think long-term.

C: 怎么还没摸到…
E: This hand sucks...

C: 是上佳的商品。
E: Quality merchandise.

C: 从我的角度来看，他始终是一个医士。只不过寻常医士着眼于某个病患，而他则想治好仙舟黎黎众生的疾患。
E: The way I see it, he was always a healer. It's just that ordinary healers focus on one patient at a time, while he wanted to cure the ailments of all the people on the Xianzhou.

C: 吃我一招，太虚形蕴！
E: Take this — Shape of Taixu!

C: 给您来个返场小段儿！
E: The show must go on!

C: 可惜本小姐的步子迈不大，不然早去漫游银河啦。
E: Hmph, if I was bigger, I could've explored the whole galaxy by now.

C: 可以拿去换糖吃！
E: Take these and pay me back with more sugar!

C: 吾与十王司约定，每缉拿一个凶徒，可还阳半日。这半日在你们眼中算不得长，于我却弥足珍贵。
E: As per my arrangement with the Ten-Lords Commission, for each criminal I take into custody, I will be granted half a day of wakespan. It might not seem much to you, but I cherish every second of it.

C: 上次还阳时，是这样么？
E: Was it this easy the last time I was awake?

C: 徒然草寇殉臣节，又有强狐犁兔穴。朝朝圣人少义人，代代皆负英雄血。不，没什么…只是在自言自语罢了。
E: Bandit in life, death in vain; Fox in shadow, rabbit in plain. Mighty reigns, justice wanes; Epochs of heroes' blood in our veins. Never mind any of that... I was just talking to myself.

C: 胜负在人，而不在剑。
E: The outcome lies within the self, not the sword.

C: 身心，需清净。
E: Both body and mind must be pure.

C: 没事的。
E: It's fine.

C: 命定如此么……
E: Is this my fate...?

C: 是你吗，姬子小姐？果然，在你的勇气所及之处，便有星辰浩海。
E: Miss Himeko, with your courage ablaze, the stars seem to shine even brighter.

C: 彷徨的人啊，你的目光正看向何方？
E: You who wander, what do your eyes seek?

C: 不足为意。
E: Flesh wound.

C: 万物本质如一。
E: All things are as one.

C: 或许有一天，你会主动同我分享你的记忆——我期待这一刻的到来。
E: Perhaps, there will come a day when you'll willingly share your memories with me — I eagerly await such a time.

C: 寻找机会的时候，一个像他那样的赌徒永远不会拒绝你的要求。投其所好，也要有所防备。
E: When exploring opportunities, one such as he, a gambler, will never reject your overtures. Gratify his whims, but also keep your defenses up.

C: 加拉赫先生总是将自己的温柔藏起来呢…虽然平常看起来有些散漫，但关键时刻永远会站在同伴身侧。
E: Mr. Gallagher likes to keep his softer side hidden, and even though he might seem a little disorganized at times, he's always there for his friends when it matters most.

C: 愚钝和混乱都是一种普世的顽疾，若非立场相对，我和那位教授应该会聊得来。
E: Dullness and confusion are universal ailments. If not for our opposing positions, the professor and I would be able to get along.

E: People often get nervous when they're being bandaged, getting injections, or having a health check-up, and that's when the healer's communication skills are tested! It's just that people sometimes get sleepy when I talk to them... Huh? Did you just yawn?

C: 用留影石机记录翁法罗斯的鸟儿，积累下的相册已经厚厚一本啦！我和树庭的学者讨论过，为什么艾格勒和法吉娜不合？我想，是因为它有事没事便差些使者去海边整点法吉娜的蜜酿！
E: I like to record Amphorean birds with my photostone. I've got a whole thick album of the pictures already! I've once discussed with Grove scholars regarding why Aquila and Phagousa don't get along, and I think it's because Aquila is always sending their messengers to the seaside to steal Phagousa's honey brew!

C: ・黄泉来到梦境酒店推进调查：途中遭遇了同在调查的你和黑天鹅。并且和你们一同见证了流萤的死亡。\n・在遭遇萨姆后，黄泉独自留下迎战。
E: ・ Acheron arrived at the hotel in the Dreamscape to advance the investigation. Along the way, she encountered you and Black Swan who were also investigating. Together, you all witnessed Firefly's death.\n・ After encountering Sam, Acheron stayed behind alone to face the battle.

C: ・砂金在迎来死亡后，因无名客拉扎莉娜的遗产进入了橡木鸣蛀之梦。\n・在理清梦主的阴谋后，他在银枝的帮助下离开，向公司传递情报，并进行下一步的布置。
E: ・ After his death, Aventurine entered the Dream of Gnawing Oak through the legacy of the Nameless Razalina.\n・ After unraveling the Dreammaster's conspiracy, he left with Argenti's help, transmitted intelligence to the IPC, and proceeded with the next phase of his plan.

C:
・被花火杀死后，知更鸟到达了流梦礁，并在米凯的帮助下熟悉了这里。
・在决定去打听一下外部消息时，流萤和大丽花找到了知更鸟，并将她邀至星核猎手的隐秘据点。
・流萤向知更鸟坦明了自己的目的，她怀疑梦主正在幕后策划着一桩危及梦境的阴谋——考虑到梦境中的确存在不谐和音，两方暂时达成了合作关系。
・大丽花展示了一段从忆域中打捞出的历史：AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>正是被梦主亲手加害，据他所说，这是为了用「繁育」的乐园造就乐园。
・几人正准备继续追查时，黑天鹅赶到，她正受星期日所托寻找知更鸟。
・黑天鹅揭晓了大丽花的真实身份：她并非星核猎手，而是梦主的合作者。在梦境中，她一直借助忆者的能力，伪装成各个势力的同伴。
・在流萤作出反应之前，大丽花将她传送到了别处，而知更鸟在黑天鹅的掩护下得以离开——只是，大丽花已经先一步在她的意识中种下焚化工的火苗，使对方遗忘方才的这段经历。
・黑天鹅与大丽花交手，但梦主通过「律令」向大丽花分享了力量，在匹诺康尼，她变得远比过去强大。情急之中，黑天鹅同样使用了焚化工的技艺，将大丽花身上的「律令」烧毁。
・大丽花将黑天鹅带往了一片诡异的梦境「橡木鸣蛀之梦」——原来，两人依据观察，早已在不言之中心存默契，此前的交手，正是大丽花借此烧毁律令的一出戏，梦主不但借此分享了力量，也对大丽花施予了禁制。
・在这里，大丽花揭晓了梦主的阴谋：他不具有肉身，并在不久之前，将自己的意识也彻底杀死，化作了四条功能各异的「律令」，以此完成他的最终计划——于美梦中再造寰宇蝗灾。
E:
・ After being killed by Sparkle, Robin arrived at Dreamflux Reef and, with Mika's help, got acquainted with the surroundings.
・ When she decided to gather information about the outside world, Firefly and The Dahlia found Robin and invited her to the Stellaron Hunters' secret base.
・ Firefly revealed her true purpose to Robin: she suspected the Dreammaster was plotting a conspiracy that endangered the dreamscape. Considering the disharmony within the dreamscape, the two sides formed a temporary alliance.
・ The Dahlia showed a piece of history salvaged from the Memory Zone: AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> was harmed by the Dreammaster himself, who claimed it was to create a paradise through Propagation.
・ Just as they were about to continue their investigation, Black Swan arrived, sent by Sunday to find Robin.
・ Black Swan revealed The Dahlia's true identity: she wasn't a Stellaron Hunter, but rather the Dreammaster's collaborator. In the dreamscape, she had been using the Memokeepers' abilities to disguise herself as an ally of various factions.
・ Before Firefly could react, The Dahlia teleported her away, while Robin managed to escape under Black Swan's cover. However, The Dahlia had already planted The Cremators' flame in her consciousness, making her forget this recent experience.
・ Black Swan confronted The Dahlia, but the Dreammaster shared his power with The Dahlia through "Divine Law," making her far more powerful than before while in Penacony. In desperation, Black Swan also used The Cremators' technique to burn away the "Divine Law" on The Dahlia.
・ The Dahlia led Black Swan to a strange dreamscape called the "Dream of Gnawing Oak." As it turned out, based on their observations, the two had already reached an unspoken understanding, and their previous confrontation was actually The Dahlia's ploy to burn away the Divine Law, through which the Dreammaster had not only shared power but also placed a containment mechanism on The Dahlia.
・ Here, The Dahlia revealed the Dreammaster's conspiracy: He had no physical form, and not long ago, he completely killed his own consciousness, transforming into four functionally distinct "Divine Laws" to accomplish his ultimate plan, to recreate the Swarm Disaster within Dreamjoy.

C: （虫群也就算了，可就算是忆质。）
E: (The Swarm is one thing, but even for memoria...)

C: 别担心，事关重大，大典开幕前，我定会查明真相。
E: Don't worry. This is crucial. I'll uncover the truth before the festival begins.

C: {F#她们}{M#他们}分开了？
E: They split up?

C: 没想到能在这遇见您！我、我刚加入猎犬家系的日子，正是您送来了家族问候。
E: I never thought I'd meet you here! When I joined the Bloodhound Family, you were the one who delivered The Family's greetings.
Ah...

C: 还真令人…心花怒放。可惜，我指的不是这种感觉。
E: How... delightful. A pity, though, because that's not the kind of feeling I was thinking about.

C: 你在筑梦边境的经历，连我也无从知晓。询问流萤时，她不愿回答。
E: Even I don't know about your experiences in Dream's Edge. When I asked Firefly about it, she declined to give an answer.

C: 不会有什么新经验的，我会启动「火萤IV型」，速战速决。
E: There won't be any new experiences. I'll activate Fyrefly Type-IV and end this quickly.

C: 走吧，我们去看看。
E: Let's go check it out.

C: 在此之后，我们再来好好谈谈你的忘恩负义，亲爱的「狱友」。
E: After this, we'll have ourselves a nice long talk about your ingratitude, my dear "cellmate."

C: 那时她正在试图逃离自己的命运。
E: At that time, she was trying to escape her own destiny.

C: …她是你的朋友吗？
E: ...Is she your friend?

C: 流萤小姐呢？她没事吧？
E: What about Miss Firefly? Is she alright?

C: …多谢。
E: ...Many thanks.

C: 无论逃去哪里，我都会找到你的。
E: No matter where you run, I will always find you.

C: 还记得知更鸟小姐的疑问吗？若是「梦主」意在「繁育」，何必非得加害格拉默铁骑？
E: Remember Miss Robin's question? If the Dreammaster was after the Propagation, why did he have to harm the Glamoth Knight?

C: 赶往匹诺康尼前，银狼的确告诉我，要留意询问「生命因何而沉睡」的人。但作为证据，这还不够。
E: Before heading to Penacony, Silver Wolf did tell me to keep an eye out for anyone asking "why does life slumber." But as evidence, that's not enough.

C: 我倒也想为其辩解，但说是被迫，未免自欺欺人……
E: I'd like to defend him, but calling it "forced" would be self-deception...

C: 人们自以为清醒，精神却早已步入「秩序」的殿堂。
E: People think they are awake, but their spirits have long since stepped into the temple of Order.

C: 所以我才会说：银河间不再需要第二种「秩序」。梦主的计划确实天衣无缝…然而，面对虫灾的恐惧，呼唤「存护」，难道有何不同吗？
E: That's why I said the cosmos no longer needs a second Order. The Dreammaster's plan is indeed flawless... However, when faced with the terror of the Swarm Disaster, how is calling for the Preservation any different from calling for the Order?

C: 别以为我在吓唬你，匹诺康尼到处是我埋下的炸弹，花了不少功夫呢。
E: Don't think that I'm just trolling you. My bombs are hidden all over Penacony. They took a really long time to set up, you know.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>全都得死。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>They will all die.</color>

C: 实现心愿，当然能够带来生存的喜悦。但若是此后，再也没有新的愿望，浮现在人们的心间……
E: Fulfilling a wish can certainly make people feel the joy of being alive, but if no new wishes ever surfaced again in people's hearts...

C: 但…无论你和她行于怎样的道路，{RUBY_B#虚无}死亡{RUBY_E#}总是注定的终局，与最后的重逢。
E: But no matter which path you and she walk... {RUBY_B#Nihility}Death{RUBY_E#} will always be the destined finale and the last reunion.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>事实上，神主日陨落后，直到离开匹诺康尼，流萤都没有去见过任何人，包括你。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>What really happened is that Firefly didn't meet with anyone between the fall of The Great Septimus and when she left Penacony... Not even you.</color>

C: 如此说来…人们都觉得大丽花的花语是「背叛」，可最初发现它的那颗星球上，那里的人们认为，<color=#dbc291ff>大丽花象征着「生机与繁荣」。</color>
E: Come to think of it... People all believe that the dahlia's floriography means "betrayal," but on the planet where it was first discovered, the locals saw it as <color=#dbc291ff>a symbol of "vitality and prosperity."</color>

C: 不，我知道这是一个约定。
E: No. I know this was a promise.

C: 你怎么会知道「约定」？我明明没有说过……
E: How did you know about "the promise"? I never mentioned it...

C: 而你知道，如今这已是不复存在的注脚。
E: And you know that this footnote no longer exists.

C: 免费使用是好文明。
E: To give freely is to show true courtesy.

C: 我说啊，树庭男孩，你是什么时候产生了能打得过我的错觉？嘻，究竟谁是考官……
E: Hey, Grove boy, when exactly did you get the delusion that you could beat me? Heh, who do you think is the examiner here...

C: 处于【可负载】状态的单位会将受到伤害<color=#f29e38ff>超出当前生命值的部分</color>转化为【负载生命值】，且不会因此陷入无法战斗状态。
E: Units in the "Overloadable" state will convert <color=#f29e38ff>any damage exceeding their current HP</color> into "HP Overload" and won't be knocked down as a result.

C: 挑战赛规则
E: Challenge Match Rules

C: 点击小奇美拉，就能看到它的技能啦。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} on the little chimera to see its abilities!

C: 为了让灰宝快速熟悉，我们已经为你准备了一套阵容。
E: To help you get up to speed quickly, we've already prepared a lineup for you.

C: 随机角色选择开放了！使用随机训练家完成比赛，可以获得额外的段位积分哦。
E: Random character selection is available now! Use a random trainer to complete the competition and obtain additional rank points.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>保存为预设后，角色在此队伍中的命途将不再随切换改变</color>
E: <color=#f29e38ff>After saving the Path as preset, the character(s) in the team will no longer change Paths when switching</color>

E: About The Dahlia

E: First Meeting
